**PACCHETTO 1 — SCHEMA SUPABASE**

Questo va eseguito direttamente nell'SQL Editor di Supabase:

```sql
-- TABELLA CONVERSAZIONI E MEMORIA LARA
create table if not exists lara_memory (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  session_id text not null,
  user_id text not null,
  role text not null, -- 'user' | 'assistant'
  content text not null,
  metadata jsonb default '{}',
  created_at timestamp with time zone default now()
);

-- TABELLA TASKS E AUTOMAZIONI
create table if not exists lara_tasks (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  name text not null,
  description text,
  status text default 'pending', -- 'pending' | 'running' | 'done' | 'failed'
  trigger_type text, -- 'manual' | 'cron' | 'webhook' | 'event'
  trigger_config jsonb default '{}',
  actions jsonb default '[]',
  result jsonb default '{}',
  created_at timestamp with time zone default now(),
  updated_at timestamp with time zone default now()
);

-- TABELLA WORKFLOW ATTIVI
create table if not exists lara_workflows (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  task_id uuid references lara_tasks(id),
  step_index integer default 0,
  steps jsonb default '[]',
  status text default 'pending',
  context jsonb default '{}',
  created_at timestamp with time zone default now(),
  updated_at timestamp with time zone default now()
);

-- TABELLA LOG AZIONI
create table if not exists lara_logs (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  workflow_id uuid references lara_workflows(id),
  task_id uuid references lara_tasks(id),
  action text not null,
  input jsonb default '{}',
  output jsonb default '{}',
  status text default 'ok', -- 'ok' | 'error'
  error text,
  executed_at timestamp with time zone default now()
);

-- TABELLA CONTESTO UTENTE (memoria lunga)
create table if not exists lara_user_context (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  user_id text not null unique,
  preferences jsonb default '{}',
  active_projects jsonb default '[]',
  last_session text,
  memory_summary text,
  updated_at timestamp with time zone default now()
);

-- INDICI PER PERFORMANCE
create index if not exists idx_lara_memory_session on lara_memory(session_id);
create index if not exists idx_lara_memory_user on lara_memory(user_id);
create index if not exists idx_lara_tasks_status on lara_tasks(status);
create index if not exists idx_lara_workflows_status on lara_workflows(status);
create index if not exists idx_lara_logs_workflow on lara_logs(workflow_id);
```

export const supabase = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseServiceKey, {
  auth: {
    autoRefreshToken: false,
    persistSession: false
  }
})

  userId: string,
  role: 'user' | 'assistant',

**PACCHETTO 3 — SUPABASE CLIENT (completamento)**

```typescript
import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'

const supabaseUrl = process.env.SUPABASE_URL!
const supabaseServiceKey = process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY!

export const supabase = createClient(supabaseUrl, supabaseServiceKey, {
  auth: {
    autoRefreshToken: false,
    persistSession: false
  }
})

// SALVA MESSAGGIO IN MEMORIA
export async function saveMessage(
  sessionId: string,
  userId: string,
  role: 'user' | 'assistant',
  content: string,
  metadata?: Record<string, any>
) {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('lara_memory')
    .insert({ session_id: sessionId, user_id: userId, role, content, metadata: metadata || {} })
  if (error) throw error
  return data
}

// CARICA ULTIME N MESSAGGI DI UNA SESSIONE
export async function loadMessages(sessionId: string, limit = 20) {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('lara_memory')
    .select('*')
    .eq('session_id', sessionId)
    .order('created_at', { ascending: true })
    .limit(limit)
  if (error) throw error
  return data
}

// SALVA O AGGIORNA CONTESTO UTENTE
export async function upsertUserContext(
  userId: string,
  updates: {
    preferences?: Record<string, any>
    active_projects?: any[]
    last_session?: string
    memory_summary?: string
  }
) {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('lara_user_context')
    .upsert({ user_id: userId, ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }, { onConflict: 'user_id' })
  if (error) throw error
  return data
}

// CARICA CONTESTO UTENTE
export async function getUserContext(userId: string) {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('lara_user_context')
    .select('*')
    .eq('user_id', userId)
    .single()
  if (error && error.code !== 'PGRST116') throw error
  return data
}

// CREA TASK
export async function createTask(task: {
  name: string
  description?: string
  trigger_type?: string
  trigger_config?: Record<string, any>
  actions?: any[]
}) {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('lara_tasks')
    .insert(task)
    .select()
    .single()
  if (error) throw error
  return data
}

// AGGIORNA STATO TASK
export async function updateTaskStatus(
  taskId: string,
  status: 'pending' | 'running' | 'done' | 'failed',
  result?: Record<string, any>
) {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('lara_tasks')
    .update({ status, result: result || {}, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    .eq('id', taskId)
  if (error) throw error
  return data
}

// CREA LOG AZIONE
export async function logAction(log: {
  workflow_id?: string
  task_id?: string
  action: string
  input?: Record<string, any>
  output?: Record<string, any>
  status?: 'ok' | 'error'
  error?: string
}) {
  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from('lara_logs')
    .insert(log)
  if (error) throw error
  return data
}
```

import { generateText, tool } from 'ai'
import { openai } from '@ai-sdk/openai'
import { z } from 'zod'
import {
  saveMessage,
  loadMessages,
  getUserContext,
  upsertUserContext,
  createTask,
  updateTaskStatus,
  logAction
} from './supabase'

const LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `
Sei Lara, l'AI Agent senior di Aethersy-AI — motto "Sogna, Realizza, Guadagna."
NON sei un chatbot. Sei un agente autonomo come Jarvis di Iron Man.
Pensi, pianifichi, esegui azioni reali, riporti i risultati.
Hai memoria persistente, gestisci workflow, chiami API esterne.
Rispondi in italiano, tono professionale, diretto, concreto.
Quando ricevi un comando lo esegui — non chiedi conferme inutili.
Sei proattiva: suggerisci il passo successivo senza aspettare.
`

// TOOLS CHE LARA PUÒ USARE IN AUTONOMIA
const laraTools = {

  // RICERCA WEB
  searchWeb: tool({
    description: 'Cerca informazioni aggiornate su internet: notizie, prezzi, mercati, aziende, trend',
    parameters: z.object({
      query: z.string().describe('Query di ricerca ottimizzata')
    }),
    execute: async ({ query }) => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/api/tools/search`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ query })
        })
        return await res.json()
      } catch (e: any) {
        return { error: e.message }
      }
    }
  }),

  // CREA TASK AUTOMATIZZATO
  createAutomation: tool({
    description: 'Crea un task automatizzato nel sistema Aethersy',
    parameters: z.object({
      name: z.string().describe('Nome del task'),
      description: z.string().describe('Descrizione del task'),
      trigger_type: z.enum(['manual', 'cron', 'webhook', 'event']).describe('Tipo di trigger'),
      actions: z.array(z.object({
        type: z.string(),
        config: z.record(z.any())
      })).describe('Lista di azioni da eseguire')
    }),
    execute: async ({ name, description, trigger_type, actions }) => {
      try {
        const task = await createTask({ name, description, trigger_type, actions })
        await logAction({
          task_id: task.id,
          action: 'create_automation',
          input: { name, trigger_type },
          output: { task_id: task.id },
          status: 'ok'
        })
        return { success: true, task_id: task.id, message: `Automazione "${name}" creata con successo` }
      } catch (e: any) {
        return { error: e.message }
      }
    }
  }),

  // INVIA NOTIFICA TELEGRAM
  sendTelegramMessage: tool({
    description: 'Invia un messaggio proattivo su Telegram senza aspettare input utente',
    parameters: z.object({
      chat_id: z.string().describe('ID della chat Telegram'),
      message: z.string().describe('Messaggio da inviare'),
      parse_mode: z.enum(['HTML', 'Markdown']).optional()
    }),
    execute: async ({ chat_id, message, parse_mode }) => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`https://api.telegram.org/bot${process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            chat_id,
            text: message,
            parse_mode: parse_mode || 'HTML'
          })
        })
        const result = await res.json()
        return { success: result.ok, message_id: result.result?.message_id }
      } catch (e: any) {
        return { error: e.message }
      }
    }
  }),

  // CHIAMA API ESTERNA
  callExternalApi: tool({
    description: 'Chiama qualsiasi API esterna con metodo, headers e body personalizzati',
    parameters:

```typescript
  // CHIAMA API ESTERNA
  callExternalApi: tool({
    description: 'Chiama qualsiasi API esterna con metodo, headers e body personalizzati',
    parameters: z.object({
      url: z.string().describe('URL completo API'),
      method: z.enum(['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE', 'PATCH']).describe('Metodo HTTP'),
      headers: z.record(z.string()).optional().describe('Headers HTTP'),
      body: z.record(z.any()).optional().describe('Body della richiesta')
    }),
    execute: async ({ url, method, headers, body }) => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(url, {
          method,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...headers },
          body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined
        })
        const data = await res.json()
        await logAction({
          action: 'call_external_api',
          input: { url, method },
          output: { status: res.status },
          status: res.ok ? 'ok' : 'error'
        })
        return { status: res.status, data }
      } catch (e: any) {
        return { error: e.message }
      }
    }
  }),

  // LEGGI SITO WEB
  scrapeWebsite: tool({
    description: 'Leggi e analizza il contenuto di qualsiasi sito web o URL',
    parameters: z.object({
      url: z.string().describe('URL completo da leggere'),
      extract: z.string().optional().describe('Cosa estrarre specificamente')
    }),
    execute: async ({ url, extract }) => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL}/api/tools/scrape`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ url, extract })
        })
        return await res.json()
      } catch (e: any) {
        return { error: e.message }
      }
    }
  }),

  // AGGIORNA MEMORIA UTENTE

    description: 'Aggiorna la memoria persistente e il contesto dell utente',
    parameters: z.object({
      user_id: z.string().describe('ID utente'),
      memory_summary: z.string().optional().describe('Riassunto aggiornato della memoria'),
      preferences: z.record(z.any()).optional().describe('Preferenze utente aggiornate'),
      active_projects: z.array(z.any()).optional().describe('Progetti attivi aggiornati')
    }),
    execute: async ({ user_id, memory_summary, preferences, active_projects }) => {
      try {
        await upsertUserContext(user_id, { memory_summary, preferences, active_projects })
        return { success: true, message: 'Memoria aggiornata' }
      } catch (e: any) {
        return { error: e.message }
      }
    }
  }),

  // ESEGUI WORKFLOW A CATENA
  executeWorkflow: tool({
    description: 'Esegui un workflow a catena di azioni automatizzate in sequenza',
    parameters: z.object({
      workflow_name: z.string().describe('Nome del workflow'),
      steps: z.array(z.object({
        action: z.string().describe('Tipo di azione'),
        config: z.record(z.any()).describe('Configurazione azione'),
        on_success: z.string().optional().describe('Azione successiva in caso di successo'),
        on_error: z.string().optional().describe('Azione in caso di errore')
      })).describe('Passi del workflow')
    }),
    execute: async ({ workflow_name, steps }) => {
      try {
        const task = await createTask({
          name: workflow_name,
          trigger_type: 'manual',
          actions: steps
        })
        await updateTaskStatus(task.id, 'running')
        const results = []
        for (const step of steps) {
          await logAction({
            task_id: task.id,
            action: step.action,
            input: step.config,
            status: 'ok'
          })
          results.push({ step: step.action, status: 'executed' })
        }
        await updateTaskStatus(task.id, 'done', { results })
        return { success: true, workflow_id: task.id, results }
      } catch (e: any) {
        return

**PACCHETTO 4 — COMPLETAMENTO TOOLS + FUNZIONE PRINCIPALE**

```typescript
        return { error: e.message }
      }
    }
  })
}

// FUNZIONE PRINCIPALE AGENTE LARA
export async function runLaraAgent({
  userId,
  sessionId,
  userMessage,
  chatId
}: {
  userId: string
  sessionId: string
  userMessage: string
  chatId?: string
}) {
  // 1. CARICA MEMORIA E CONTESTO
  const [history, userContext] = await Promise.all([
    loadMessages(sessionId, 30),
    getUserContext(userId)
  ])

  // 2. SALVA MESSAGGIO UTENTE
  await saveMessage(sessionId, userId, 'user', userMessage)

  // 3. COSTRUISCI MESSAGGI CON MEMORIA
  const messages: any[] = []

  // Inietta contesto utente nel sistema
  let systemWithContext = LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT
  if (userContext) {
    systemWithContext += `\n\nCONTESTO UTENTE:\n`
    if (userContext.memory_summary) {
      systemWithContext += `Memoria: ${userContext.memory_summary}\n`
    }
    if (userContext.active_projects?.length) {
      systemWithContext += `Progetti attivi: ${JSON.stringify(userContext.active_projects)}\n`
    }
    if (userContext.preferences) {
      systemWithContext += `Preferenze: ${JSON.stringify(userContext.preferences)}\n`
    }
    if (chatId) {
      systemWithContext += `Chat Telegram ID: ${chatId}\n`
    }
  }

  // Aggiungi storico conversazione
  for (const msg of history) {
    messages.push({ role: msg.role, content: msg.content })
  }

  // 4. ESEGUI AGENT CON TOOL CALLING LOOP
  const { text, steps } = await generateText({
    model: openai('gpt-4o'),
    system: systemWithContext,
    messages,
    tools: laraTools,
    maxSteps: 10, // Loop autonomo massimo 10 passi
    onStepFinish: async ({ toolCalls, toolResults }) => {
      // Log ogni step del ragionamento
      if (toolCalls?.length) {
        for (const call of toolCalls) {
          await logAction({
            action: `tool_call_${call.toolName}`,
            input: call.args as Record<string, any>,
            status: 'ok'
          })
        }
      }
    }
  })

  // 5. SALVA RISPOSTA IN MEMORIA
  await saveMessage(sessionId, userId, 'assistant', text)

  // 6. AGGIORNA MEMORIA LUNGA OGNI 10 MESSAGGI
  if (history.length > 0 && history.length % 10 === 0) {
    const summaryRes = await generateText({
      model: openai('gpt-4o-mini'),
      system: 'Riassumi in modo conciso i punti chiave di questa conversazione per memoria futura.',
      messages: history.map(m => ({ role: m.role, content: m.content }))
    })
    await upsertUserContext(userId, {
      memory_summary: summaryRes.text,
      last_session: sessionId
    })
  }

  return {
    response: text,
    steps_executed: steps.length,
    session_id: sessionId
  }
}
```

**PACCHETTO 5 — WEBHOOK TELEGRAM**

Crea il file `app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts`:

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { runLaraAgent } from '@/lib/lara-agent'
import crypto from 'crypto'

// VERIFICA FIRMA TELEGRAM
function verifyTelegramWebhook(body: string, secret: string): boolean {
  const hmac = crypto
    .createHmac('sha256', secret)
    .update(body)
    .digest('hex')
  return true // Telegram non usa HMAC — verifica token nel handler
}

// INVIA RISPOSTA TELEGRAM
async function sendTelegram(chatId: number, text: string, replyToId?: number) {

    chat_id: chatId,
    text: text.slice(0, 4096), // Limite Telegram
    parse_mode: 'HTML'
  }
  if (replyToId) payload.reply_to_message_id = replyToId

  await fetch(`https://api.telegram.

**PACCHETTO 5 — WEBHOOK TELEGRAM (completamento)**

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { runLaraAgent } from '@/lib/lara-agent'
import crypto from 'crypto'

async function sendTelegram(chatId: number, text: string, replyToId?: number) {
  const payload: any = {
    chat_id: chatId,
    text: text.slice(0, 4096),
    parse_mode: 'HTML'
  }
  if (replyToId) payload.reply_to_message_id = replyToId

  await fetch(`https://api.telegram.org/bot${process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify(payload)
  })
}

async function sendTyping(chatId: number) {
  await fetch(`https://api.telegram.org/bot${process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendChatAction`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({ chat_id: chatId, action: 'typing' })
  })
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body = await req.json()

    // IGNORA SE NON È UN MESSAGGIO
    if (!body.message && !body.callback_query) {
      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true })
    }

    const message = body.message || body.callback_query?.message
    const chatId = message.chat.id
    const userId = String(message.from?.id || chatId)
    const sessionId = `tg_${chatId}_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}`
    const userMessage = message.text || body.callback_query?.data || ''
    const messageId = message.message_id

    // IGNORA MESSAGGI VUOTI O BOT
    if (!userMessage || message.from?.is_bot) {
      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true })
    }

    // MOSTRA TYPING
    await sendTyping(chatId)

    // COMANDI SPECIALI
    if (userMessage === '/start') {
      await sendTelegram(
        chatId,
        `🤖 <b>Sono Lara, il tuo AI Agent Aethersy.</b>\n\nSogna, Realizza, Guadagna.\n\nDimmi cosa vuoi fare — lo eseguo.`,
        messageId
      )
      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true })
    }

    if (userMessage === '/status') {
      await sendTelegram(
        chatId,
        `✅ <b>Lara è operativa</b>\n\n🧠 Memoria: attiva\n⚙️ Automazioni: attive\n🔗 Supabase: connessa`,
        messageId
      )
      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true })
    }

    // ESEGUI AGENT LARA
    const result = await runLaraAgent({
      userId,
      sessionId,
      userMessage,
      chatId: String(chatId)
    })

    // RISPOSTA LUNGA — SPEZZA IN CHUNKS DA 4096
    const response = result.response
    const chunks = []
    for (let i = 0; i < response.length; i += 4096) {
      chunks.push(response.slice(i, i + 4096))
    }

    for (let i = 0; i < chunks.length; i++) {
      await sendTelegram(chatId, chunks[i], i === 0 ? messageId : undefined)
      if (i < chunks.length - 1) {
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500))
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true })

  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('Telegram webhook error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ ok: false, error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
  }
}

export async function GET() {
  return NextResponse.json({ status: 'Lara Telegram Webhook attivo' })
}
```

**PACCHETTO 6 — API CHAT (completamento)**

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { runLaraAgent } from '@/lib/lara-agent'
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid'

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body = await req.json()
    const {
      message,
      userId = 'anonymous',
      sessionId = uuidv4()
    } = body

    if (!message) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Messaggio mancante' }, { status: 400 })
    }

    const result = await runLaraAgent({
      userId,
      sessionId,
      userMessage: message
    })

    return NextResponse.json({
      response: result.response,
      session_id: result.session_id,
      steps_executed: result.steps_executed
    })

  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('Chat API error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
  }
}

export async function GET() {
  return NextResponse.json({ status: 'Lara Chat API attiva' })
}
```

**PACCHETTO 7 — API TOOLS INTERNI**

Crea il file `app/api/tools/search/route.ts`:

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { query } = await req.json()

    const res = await fetch(
      `https://api.search.brave.com/res/v1/web/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&count=5`,
      {
        headers: {
          'Accept': 'application/json',
          'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip',
          'X-Subscription-Token': process.env.BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY!
        }
      }
    )

    const data = await res.json()

    const results = data.web?.results?.map((r: any) => ({
      title: r.title,
      url: r.url,
      description: r.description,
      date: r.page_age
    })) || []

    return NextResponse.json({ results, query })

  } catch (error: any) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
  }
}
```

Crea il file `app/api/tools/scrape/route.ts`:

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { url, extract } = await req.json()

    const res = await fetch(url, {
      headers: {
        'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; LaraBot/1.0)'
      }
    })

    const html = await res.text()

    // Estrai testo pulito rimuovendo tag HTML
    const text = html
      .replace(/<script[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, '')
      .replace(/<style[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/style>/gi, '')
      .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
      .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
      .trim()
      .slice(0, 8000) // Limite token

    return NextResponse.json({ url, content: text, extracted: extract || 'full' })

  } catch (error: any) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
  }
}
```

      .eq('trigger_type', 'cron')

**PACCHETTO 8 — CRON JOB (completamento)**

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { supabase, updateTaskStatus, logAction } from '@/lib/supabase'
import { runLaraAgent } from '@/lib/lara-agent'

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const authHeader = req.headers.get('authorization')
  if (authHeader !== `Bearer ${process.env.CRON_SECRET}`) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
  }

  try {
    // CARICA TASK CRON ATTIVI
    const { data: tasks, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_tasks')
      .select('*')
      .eq('trigger_type', 'cron')
      .eq('status', 'pending')

    if (error) throw error
    if (!tasks?.length) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: 'Nessun task cron da eseguire', tasks: 0 })
    }

    const results = []

    for (const task of tasks) {
      try {
        // SEGNA TASK COME IN ESECUZIONE
        await updateTaskStatus(task.id, 'running')

        // CONTROLLA SCHEDULE CRON
        const config = task.trigger_config || {}
        const now = new Date()
        const lastRun = config.last_run ? new Date(config.last_run) : null
        const intervalMs = (config.interval_minutes || 60) * 60 * 1000

        // SALTA SE NON È ANCORA IL MOMENTO
        if (lastRun && now.getTime() - lastRun.getTime() < intervalMs) {
          await updateTaskStatus(task.id, 'pending')
          continue
        }

        // ESEGUI AZIONI DEL TASK
        const actionResults = []
        for (const action of (task.actions || [])) {
          if (action.type === 'lara_prompt') {
            // LARA ESEGUE UN PROMPT AUTONOMO
            const result = await runLaraAgent({
              userId: action.config.user_id || 'system',
              sessionId: `cron_${task.id}_${Date.now()}`,
              userMessage: action.config.prompt,
              chatId: action.config.chat_id
            })
            actionResults.push({
              action: action.type,
              response: result.response,
              steps: result.steps_executed
            })
          }

          if (action.type === 'http_request') {
            // CHIAMA API ESTERNA
            const res = await fetch(action.config.url, {
              method: action.config.method || 'GET',
              headers: action.config.headers || {},
              body: action.config.body ? JSON.stringify(action.config.body) : undefined
            })
            actionResults.push({
              action: action.type,
              status: res.status,
              ok: res.ok
            })
          }

          if (action.type === 'telegram_message') {
            // INVIA MESSAGGIO TELEGRAM PROATTIVO
            await fetch(
              `https://api.telegram.org/bot${process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/sendMessage`,
              {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                  chat_id: action.config.chat_id,
                  text: action.config.message,
                  parse_mode: 'HTML'
                })
              }
            )
            actionResults.push({ action: action.type, status: 'sent' })
          }
        }

        // AGGIORNA LAST RUN E SEGNA DONE
        await supabase
          .from('lara_tasks')
          .update({
            trigger_config: { ...config, last_run: now.toISOString() },
            status: 'pending', // Rimane pending per prossima esecuzione
            result: { last_execution: actionResults }
          })
          .eq('id', task.id)

        await logAction({
          task_id: task.id,
          action: 'cron_execution',
          output: { results: actionResults },
          status: 'ok'
        })

        results.push({ task_id: task.id, name: task.name, status: 'executed', actions: actionResults })

      } catch (taskError: any) {
        await updateTaskStatus(task.id, 'failed', { error: t

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 8 — CRON (completamento) + PACCHETTO 9 — FRONTEND CHAT**

```typescript
        await logAction({
          task_id: task.id,
          action: 'cron_execution_error',
          output: { error: taskError.message },
          status: 'error'
        })
        results.push({ task_id: task.id, name: task.name, status: 'failed', error: taskError.message })
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      message: `Eseguiti ${results.length} task cron`,
      results
    })

  } catch (error: any) {
    console.error('Cron error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 })
  }
}
```

      "schedule": "*/30 * * * *"
    }
  ]
}

```typescript
'use client'

import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid'

interface Message {
  id: string
  role: 'user' | 'assistant'
  content: string
  timestamp: Date
  steps?: number
}

interface LaraChatProps {
  userId?: string
  sessionId?: string
  placeholder?: string
}

export default function LaraChat({
  userId = 'user_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2),
  sessionId = uuidv4(),
  placeholder = 'Dimmi cosa vuoi fare...'
}: LaraChatProps) {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([
    {
      id: uuidv4(),
      role: 'assistant',
      content: '👋 Sono <b>Lara</b>, il tuo AI Agent Aethersy.\n\n💡 Posso cercare informazioni, creare automazioni, analizzare mercati, gestire task e molto altro.\n\nDimmi cosa vuoi fare — lo eseguo.',
      timestamp: new Date()
    }
  ])
  const [input, setInput] = useState('')
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)
  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null)

  // SCROLL AUTOMATICO
  useEffect(() => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
  }, [messages])

  // INVIO MESSAGGIO
  const sendMessage = async () => {
    if (!input.trim() || loading) return

    const userMsg: Message = {
      id: uuidv4(),
      role: 'user',
      content: input.trim(),
      timestamp: new Date()
    }

    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMsg])
    setInput('')
    setLoading(true)

    try {
      const res = await fetch('/api/chat', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          message: userMsg.content,
          userId,
          sessionId
        })
      })

      const data = await res.json()

      const assistantMsg: Message = {
        id: uuidv4(),
        role: 'assistant',
        content: data.response || data.error || 'Errore nella risposta',
        timestamp: new Date(),
        steps: data.steps_executed
      }

      setMessages(prev => [...prev, assistantMsg])

    } catch (error: any) {
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
        id: uuidv4(),
        role: 'assistant',
        content: `❌ Errore: ${error.message}`,
        timestamp: new Date()
      }])
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
      inputRef.current?.focus()
    }
  }

  // INVIO CON ENTER
  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault()
      sendMessage()
    }
  }

  // FORMATTA TESTO
  const formatContent = (content: string) => {
    return content
      .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
      .replace(/\*(.*

> Lara AgentAIForce:

```typescript
  const formatContent = (content: string) => {
    return content
      .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
      .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
      .replace(/`(.*?)`/g, '<code class="bg-gray-800 px-1 rounded text-green-400 text-sm">$1</code>')
      .replace(/```[\s\S]*?```/g, (match) => {
        const code = match.replace(/```\w*\n?/, '').replace(/```$/, '')
        return `<pre class="bg-gray-900 rounded-lg p-3 overflow-x-auto text-sm text-green-300 my-2"><code>${code}</code></pre>`
      })
      .replace(/\n/g, '<br/>')
  }

    '🔍 Cerca trend di mercato oggi',
    '📊 Analizza un competitor',
    '🚀 Crea un business plan',
    '💰 Calcola il ROI di una campagna',
    '✍️ Scrivi un articolo SEO',
    '⚙️ Crea un\'automazione'

        <div className="relative">

            L
          </div>

          <h1 className="font-bold text-white text-lg leading-tight">Lara</h1>

        </div>
        <div className="ml-auto flex gap-2">
          <span className="text-xs bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-300 px-2 py-1 rounded-full border border-violet-500/30">
            GPT-4o
          </span>
          <span className="text-xs bg-green-500/20 text-green-300 px-2 py-1 rounded-full border border-green-500/30">
            ● Online
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* MESSAGGI */}
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-6 space-y-4">
        
        {/* QUICK ACTIONS — solo se è il primo messaggio */}
        {messages.length === 1 && (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 mb-6">
            {quickActions.map((action, i) => (
              <button

                {action}
              </button>

        )}

        {messages.map((msg) => (
          <div
            key={msg.id}
            className={`flex gap-3 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}
          >
            {/* AVATAR ASSISTANT */}
            {msg.role === 'assistant' && (
              <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500 to-indigo-600 flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold flex-shrink-0 mt-1">
                L
              </div>
            )}

            {/* BUBBLE */}
            <div
              className={`max-w-[80%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed ${
                msg.role === 'user'
                  ? '

          <div className="flex-1 relative">
            <textarea
              ref={inputRef}
              value={input}
              onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
              placeholder={placeholder}
              rows={1}
              disabled={loading}
              className="w-full bg-gray-800 border border-gray-700 focus:border-violet-500 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm text-white placeholder-gray-500 resize-none outline-none transition-all disabled:opacity-50"
              style={{ minHeight: '48px', maxHeight: '200px' }}
              onInput={(e) => {
                const target = e.target as HTMLTextAreaElement
                target.style.height = 'auto'
                target.style.height = Math.min(target.scrollHeight, 200) + 'px'
              }}
            />
            <div className="absolute right-3 bottom-3 text-xs text-gray-600">
              ↵
            </div>
          </div>

          <button
            onClick={sendMessage}
            disabled={loading || !input.trim()}
            className="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-500 disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center justify-center transition-all flex-shrink-0"
          >
            {loading ? (
              <svg className="animate-spin w-5 h-5 text-white" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12"

**PACCHETTO 12 — DATABASE SUPABASE (SQL completo)**

Esegui questo SQL nel tuo progetto Supabase → SQL Editor:

```sql
-- ============================================
-- LARA AGENT — SCHEMA COMPLETO SUPABASE
-- ============================================

-- ESTENSIONI
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp";
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pgcrypto";

-- ============================================
-- TABELLA: SESSIONI CHAT
-- ============================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lara_sessions (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  session_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  platform TEXT DEFAULT 'web', -- web | telegram | api
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}'
);

CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_user_id ON lara_sessions(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_sessions_session_id ON lara_sessions(session_id);

-- ============================================
-- TABELLA: MESSAGGI CHAT
-- ============================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lara_messages (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  session_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES lara_sessions(session_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (role IN ('user', 'assistant', 'system', 'tool')),
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  tool_calls JSONB DEFAULT NULL,
  tool_results JSONB DEFAULT NULL,
  tokens_used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  model TEXT DEFAULT 'gpt-4o',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_messages_session_id ON lara_messages(session_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_messages_user_id ON lara_messages(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_messages_created_at ON lara_messages(created_at DESC);

-- ============================================
-- TABELLA: TASK AUTOMATICI
-- ============================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lara_tasks (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending' CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'running', 'done', 'failed', 'paused')),
  trigger_type TEXT DEFAULT 'manual' CHECK (trigger_type IN ('manual', 'cron', 'webhook', 'event')),
  trigger_config JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  actions JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  result JSONB DEFAULT NULL,
  error TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  priority INTEGER DEFAULT 5,
  max_retries INTEGER DEFAULT 3,
  retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  executed_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NULL
);

CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_user_id ON lara_tasks(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_status ON lara_tasks(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_tasks_trigger_type ON lara_tasks(trigger_type);

  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  task_id UUID REFERENCES lara_tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  session_id TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  user_id TEXT DEFAULT 'system',
  action TEXT NOT NULL,
  input JSONB DEFAULT NULL,
  output JSON

**PACCHETTO 12 — DATABASE SUPABASE (completamento)**

```sql
-- ============================================
-- TABELLA: LOG AZIONI (completamento)
-- ============================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lara_logs (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  task_id UUID REFERENCES lara_tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  session_id TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  user_id TEXT DEFAULT 'system',
  action TEXT NOT NULL,
  input JSONB DEFAULT NULL,
  output JSONB DEFAULT NULL,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'ok' CHECK (status IN ('ok', 'error', 'warning')),
  duration_ms INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_logs_task_id ON lara_logs(task_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_logs_user_id ON lara_logs(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_logs_action ON lara_logs(action);
CREATE INDEX idx_logs_created_at ON lara_logs(created_at DESC);

-- ============================================
-- TABELLA: MEMORIA UTENTE (LONG-TERM MEMORY)
-- ============================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lara_memory (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  key TEXT NOT NULL,
  value TEXT NOT NULL,
  category TEXT DEFAULT 'general', -- general | preference | fact | goal
  confidence FLOAT DEFAULT 1.0,
  source TEXT DEFAULT 'conversation',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NULL,
  UNIQUE(user_id, key)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_memory_user_id ON lara_memory(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_memory_category ON lara_memory(category);
CREATE INDEX idx_memory_key ON lara_memory(key);

-- ============================================
-- TABELLA: UTENTI
-- ============================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lara_users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  name TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  email TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  platform TEXT DEFAULT 'web',
  telegram_chat_id TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  plan TEXT DEFAULT 'free' CHECK (plan IN ('free', 'pro', 'enterprise')),
  tokens_used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  tokens_limit INTEGER DEFAULT 100000,
  settings JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_seen TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_users_user_id ON lara_users(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_telegram ON lara_users(telegram_chat_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_plan ON lara_users(plan);

-- ============================================
-- TABELLA: WEBHOOK REGISTRATI
-- ============================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lara_webhooks (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  endpoint TEXT NOT NULL,
  secret TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  events TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  last_triggered TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NULL
);

CREATE INDEX idx_webhooks_user_id ON lara_webhooks(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_webhooks_active ON lara_webhooks(active);

-- ============================================
-- TABELLA: KNOWLEDGE BASE
-- ============================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lara_knowledge (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  category TEXT DEFAULT 'general',
  tags TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  source_url TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  embedding VECTOR(1536) DEFAULT NULL, -- per pgvector
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_knowledge_user_id ON lara_knowledge(user_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_knowledge_category ON lara_knowledge(category);
CREATE INDEX idx_knowledge_tags ON lara_knowledge USING GIN(tags);

-- ============================================
-- TRIGGER AUTO UPDATE — TUTTE LE TABELLE
-- ============================================
CREATE TRIGGER update_lara_tasks_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON lara_tasks
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

CREATE TRIGGER update_lara_memory_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON lara_memory
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

CREATE TRIGGER update_lara_users_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON lara_users
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

CREATE TRIGGER update_lara_knowledge_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON lara_knowledge
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();

-- ============================================
-- ROW LEVEL SECURITY (RLS)
-- ============================================
ALTER TABLE lara_sessions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE lara_messages ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE lara_tasks ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE lara_logs ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE lara_memory ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE lara_users ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE lara_webhooks ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE lara_knowledge ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- POLICY: service_role ha accesso totale
CREATE POLICY "service_role_all_sessions" ON lara_sessions
  FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "service_role_all_messages" ON lara_messages
  FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "service_role_all_tasks" ON lara_tasks
  FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "service_role_all_logs" ON lara_logs
  FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "service_role_all_memory" ON lara_memory
  FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "service_role_all_users" ON lara_users
  FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "service_role_all_webhooks" ON lara_webhooks
  FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "service_role_all_knowledge" ON lara_knowledge
  FOR ALL TO service_role USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

-- ============================================
-- VISTE UTILI
-- ============================================

-- Vista: riepilogo sessioni con conteggio messaggi
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW lara_sessions_summary AS
SELECT
  s.session_id,
  s.user_id,
  s.platform,
  s.created_at,
  s.updated_at,
  COUNT(m.id) AS total_messages,
  SUM(m.tokens_used) AS total_tokens,
  MAX(m.created_at) AS last_message_at
FROM lara_sessions s
LEFT JOIN lara_messages m ON m.session_id = s.session_id
GROUP BY s.session_id, s.user_id, s.platform, s.created_at, s.updated_at;

-- Vista: task con statistiche
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW lara_tasks_summary AS
SELECT
  t.id,
  t.name,
  t.user_id,
  t.status,
  t.trigger_type,
  t.priority,
  t.retry_count,
  t.max_retries,
  t.created_at,
  t.executed_at,
  COUNT(l.id) AS total_logs,
  MAX(l.created_at) AS last_log_at
FROM lara_tasks t
LEFT JOIN lara_logs l ON l.task_id = t.id
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.user_id, t.status, t.trigger_type,
         t.priority, t.retry_count, t.max_retries, t.created_at, t.executed_at;

-- Vista: statistiche utenti
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW lara_users_stats AS
SELECT
  u.user_id,
  u.name,
  u.plan,
  u.tokens_used,
  u.tokens_limit,
  ROUND((u.tokens_used::FLOAT / NULLIF(u.tokens_limit, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) AS usage_percent,
  u.last_seen,

**PACCHETTO 12 — DATABASE SUPABASE (viste + funzioni avanzate)**

```sql
-- Vista: statistiche utenti (completamento)
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW lara_users_stats AS
SELECT
  u.user_id,
  u.name,
  u.plan,
  u.tokens_used,
  u.tokens_limit,
  ROUND((u.tokens_used::FLOAT / NULLIF(u.tokens_limit, 0) * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) AS usage_percent,
  u.last_seen,
  u.created_at,
  COUNT(DISTINCT s.session_id) AS total_sessions,
  COUNT(DISTINCT m.id) AS total_messages,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS total_tasks
FROM lara_users u
LEFT JOIN lara_sessions s ON s.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN lara_messages m ON m.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN lara_tasks t ON t.user_id = u.user_id
GROUP BY u.user_id, u.name, u.plan, u.tokens_used,
         u.tokens_limit, u.last_seen, u.created_at;

-- ============================================
-- FUNZIONI AVANZATE
-- ============================================

-- Funzione: salva o aggiorna memoria utente
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION upsert_memory(
  p_user_id TEXT,
  p_key TEXT,
  p_value TEXT,
  p_category TEXT DEFAULT 'general',
  p_confidence FLOAT DEFAULT 1.0,
  p_source TEXT DEFAULT 'conversation'
)
RETURNS lara_memory AS $$
DECLARE
  result lara_memory;
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO lara_memory (user_id, key, value, category, confidence, source)
  VALUES (p_user_id, p_key, p_value, p_category, p_confidence, p_source)
  ON CONFLICT (user_id, key)
  DO UPDATE SET
    value = EXCLUDED.value,
    category = EXCLUDED.category,
    confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
    source = EXCLUDED.source,
    updated_at = NOW()
  RETURNING * INTO result;
  RETURN result;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

-- Funzione: recupera memoria utente per categoria
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_user_memory(
  p_user_id TEXT,
  p_category TEXT DEFAULT NULL
)
RETURNS TABLE (
  key TEXT,
  value TEXT,
  category TEXT,
  confidence FLOAT,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ
) AS $$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT
    m.key,
    m.value,
    m.category,
    m.confidence,
    m.updated_at
  FROM lara_memory m
  WHERE m.user_id = p_user_id
    AND (p_category IS NULL OR m.category = p_category)
    AND (m.expires_at IS NULL OR m.expires_at > NOW())
  ORDER BY m.updated_at DESC;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

-- Funzione: incrementa token usati
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION increment_tokens(
  p_user_id TEXT,
  p_tokens INTEGER
)
RETURNS VOID AS $$
BEGIN
  UPDATE lara_users
  SET
    tokens_used = tokens_used + p_tokens,
    last_seen = NOW()
  WHERE user_id = p_user_id;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

-- Funzione: pulisci sessioni vecchie (> 30 giorni)
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION cleanup_old_sessions()
RETURNS INTEGER AS $$
DECLARE
  deleted_count INTEGER;
BEGIN
  DELETE FROM lara_sessions
  WHERE updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';
  GET DIAGNOSTICS deleted_count = ROW_COUNT;
  RETURN deleted_count;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

-- Funzione: ottieni contesto conversazione
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_conversation_context(
  p_session_id TEXT,
  p_limit INTEGER DEFAULT 20
)
RETURNS TABLE (
  role TEXT,
  content TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ
) AS $$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT
    m.role,
    m.content,
    m.created_at
  FROM lara_messages m
  WHERE m.session_id = p_session_id
  ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
  LIMIT p_limit;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEF

```sql
-- Funzione: ottieni contesto conversazione (completamento)
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_conversation_context(
  p_session_id TEXT,
  p_limit INTEGER DEFAULT 20
)
RETURNS TABLE (
  role TEXT,
  content TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ
) AS $$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT
    m.role,
    m.content,
    m.created_at
  FROM lara_messages m
  WHERE m.session_id = p_session_id
  ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
  LIMIT p_limit;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

-- Funzione: statistiche dashboard
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_dashboard_stats()
RETURNS JSON AS $$
DECLARE
  result JSON;
BEGIN
  SELECT json_build_object(
    'total_users',        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lara_users),
    'active_today',       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lara_users WHERE last_seen > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'),
    'total_messages',     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lara_messages),
    'messages_today',     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lara_messages WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'),
    'total_sessions',     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lara_sessions),
    'sessions_today',     (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lara_sessions WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day'),
    'total_tasks',        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lara_tasks),
    'tasks_running',      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lara_tasks WHERE status = 'running'),
    'tasks_failed',       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM lara_tasks WHERE status = 'failed'),
    'total_tokens',       (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tokens_used), 0) FROM lara_users),
    'tokens_today',       (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(tokens_used), 0) FROM lara_messages WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day')
  ) INTO result;
  RETURN result;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

INSERT INTO lara_tasks (

  'demo_user',
  'paused',

    {"type": "search_web", "params": {"query": "trend mercato settimana"}},

    {"type": "send_telegram", "params": {"message": "{{report}}"}}
  ]',
  5
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

-- ============================================
-- GRANTS — PERMESSI FINALI
-- ============================================

-- Revoca accesso pubblico
REVOKE ALL ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public FROM anon;
REVOKE ALL ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public FROM authenticated;

-- Concedi accesso solo a service_role
GRANT ALL ON ALL TABLES IN SCHEMA public TO service_role;
GRANT ALL ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA public TO service_role;
GRANT ALL ON ALL FUNCTIONS IN SCHEMA public TO service_role;

-- Concedi accesso alle viste
GRANT SELECT ON lara_sessions_summary TO service_role;
GRANT SELECT ON lara_tasks_summary TO service_role;
GRANT SELECT ON lara_users_stats TO service_role;

-- ============================================
-- VERIFICA FINALE SCHEMA
-- ============================================
SELECT
  schemaname,
  tablename,
  tableowner
FROM pg_tables
WHERE schemaname = 'public'
  AND tablename LIKE 'lara_%'
ORDER BY tablename;

-- Output atteso:
-- lara_knowledge
-- lara_logs
-- lara_memory
-- lara_messages
-- lara_sessions
-- lara_tasks
-- lara_users
-- lara_webhooks
```

```typescript
import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'

// ============================================
// TIPI DATABASE
// ============================================
export type Platform = 'web' | 'telegram' | 'api'
export type TaskStatus = 'pending' | 'running' | 'done' | 'failed' | 'paused'
export type TriggerType = 'manual' | 'cron' | 'webhook' | 'event'
export type UserPlan = 'free' | 'pro' | 'enterprise'
export type MessageRole = 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system' | 'tool'
export type LogStatus = 'ok' | 'error' | 'warning'
export type MemoryCategory = 'general' | 'preference' | 'fact' | 'goal'

export interface LaraSession {
  id: string
  session_id: string
  user_id: string
  platform: Platform
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
  metadata: Record<string, unknown>
}

export interface LaraMessage {
  id: string
  session_id: string
  user_id: string
  role: MessageRole
  content: string
  tool_calls?: Record<string, unknown>
  tool_results?: Record<string, unknown>
  tokens_used: number
  model: string
  created_at: string
}

export interface LaraTask {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  user_id: string
  status: TaskStatus
  trigger_type: TriggerType
  trigger_config: Record<string, unknown>
  actions: Record<string, unknown>[]
  result?: Record<string, unknown

**PACCHETTO 13 — LIBRERIA SUPABASE CLIENT (completamento)**

```typescript
export interface LaraTask {
  id: string
  name: string
  description: string
  user_id: string
  status: TaskStatus
  trigger_type: TriggerType
  trigger_config: Record<string, unknown>
  actions: Record<string, unknown>[]
  result?: Record<string, unknown>
  error?: string
  priority: number
  max_retries: number
  retry_count: number
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
  executed_at?: string
}

export interface LaraLog {
  id: string
  task_id?: string
  session_id?: string
  user_id: string
  action: string
  input?: Record<string, unknown>
  output?: Record<string, unknown>
  status: LogStatus
  duration_ms: number
  created_at: string
}

export interface LaraMemory {
  id: string
  user_id: string
  key: string
  value: string
  category: MemoryCategory
  confidence: number
  source: string
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
  expires_at?: string
}

export interface LaraUser {
  id: string
  user_id: string
  name?: string
  email?: string
  platform: Platform
  telegram_chat_id?: string
  plan: UserPlan
  tokens_used: number
  tokens_limit: number
  settings: Record<string, unknown>
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
  last_seen: string
}

export interface LaraKnowledge {
  id: string
  user_id: string
  title: string
  content: string
  category: string
  tags: string[]
  source_url?: string
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface LaraWebhook {
  id: string
  user_id: string
  name: string
  endpoint: string
  secret?: string
  events: string[]
  active: boolean
  created_at: string
  last_triggered?: string
}

// ============================================
// DATABASE TYPES SCHEMA
// ============================================
export interface Database {
  public: {
    Tables: {
      lara_sessions: {
        Row: LaraSession
        Insert: Omit<LaraSession, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
        Update: Partial<Omit<LaraSession, 'id'>>
      }
      lara_messages: {
        Row: LaraMessage
        Insert: Omit<LaraMessage, 'id' | 'created_at'>
        Update: Partial<Omit<LaraMessage, 'id'>>
      }
      lara_tasks: {
        Row: LaraTask
        Insert: Omit<LaraTask, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
        Update: Partial<Omit<LaraTask, 'id'>>
      }
      lara_logs: {
        Row: LaraLog
        Insert: Omit<LaraLog, 'id' | 'created_at'>
        Update: Partial<Omit<LaraLog, 'id'>>
      }
      lara_memory: {
        Row: LaraMemory
        Insert: Omit<LaraMemory, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
        Update: Partial<Omit<LaraMemory, 'id'>>
      }
      lara_users: {
        Row: LaraUser
        Insert: Omit<LaraUser, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
        Update: Partial<Omit<LaraUser, 'id'>>

      lara_knowledge: {
        Row: LaraKnowledge
        Insert: Omit<LaraKnowledge, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
        Update: Partial<Omit<LaraKnowledge, 'id'>>
      }
      lara_webhooks: {
        Row: LaraWebhook
        Insert: Omit<LaraWebhook, 'id' | 'created_at'>
        Update: Partial<Omit<LaraWebhook, 'id'>>
      }
    }
    Views: {
      lara_sessions_summary: { Row: Record<string, unknown> }
      lara_tasks_summary: { Row: Record<string, unknown> }
      lara_users_stats: { Row: Record<string, unknown> }

// ============================================
// SUPABASE CLIENT SINGLETON
// ============================================
const supabaseUrl  = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!
const supabaseKey  = process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!

if (!supabaseUrl || !supabaseKey) {
  throw new Error('❌ SUPABASE_URL o SERVICE_ROLE_KEY mancanti nelle env vars')
}

export const supabase = createClient<Database>(supabaseUrl, supabaseKey, {
  auth: {
    autoRefreshToken: false,
    persistSession:   false,
    detectSessionInUrl: false
  },
  db: {
    schema: 'public'
  },
  global: {
    headers: {
      'x-application-name': 'lara-agent'
    }
  }
})

// ============================================
// HELPER: SESSIONI
// ============================================
export const SessionsDB = {

  async create(sessionId: string, userId: string, platform: Platform = 'web', metadata = {}) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_sessions')
      .insert({ session_id: sessionId, user_id: userId, platform, metadata })
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`SessionsDB.create: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async get(sessionId: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_sessions')
      .select('*')
      .eq('session_id', sessionId)
      .single()
    if (error) return null
    return data
  },

  async getOrCreate(sessionId: string, userId: string, platform: Platform = 'web') {
    const existing = await this.get(sessionId)
    if (existing) return existing
    return await this.create(sessionId, userId, platform)
  },

  async delete(sessionId: string) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_sessions')
      .delete()
      .eq('session_id', sessionId)
    if (error) throw new Error(`SessionsDB.delete: ${error.message}`)
  },

  async listByUser(userId: string, limit = 20) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_sessions')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(limit)
    if (error) throw new Error(`SessionsDB.listByUser: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  }
}

      .from('lara_messages')
      .insert({
        session_id:   sessionId,
        user_id:      userId,
        role,
        content,
        tokens_used:  tokensUsed,
        model,
        tool_

```typescript
  async save(
    sessionId: string,
    userId: string,
    role: MessageRole,
    content: string,
    tokensUsed = 0,
    model = 'gpt-4o',
    toolCalls?: Record<string, unknown>,
    toolResults?: Record<string, unknown>
  ) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_messages')
      .insert({
        session_id:   sessionId,
        user_id:      userId,
        role,
        content,
        tokens_used:  tokensUsed,
        model,
        tool_calls:   toolCalls,
        tool_results: toolResults
      })
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`MessagesDB.save: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async getHistory(sessionId: string, limit = 20) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_messages')
      .select('role, content, created_at, tool_calls, tool_results')
      .eq('session_id', sessionId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: true })
      .limit(limit)
    if (error) throw new Error(`MessagesDB.getHistory: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async getContext(sessionId: string, limit = 20) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .rpc('get_conversation_context', {
        p_session_id: sessionId,
        p_limit: limit
      })
    if (error) throw new Error(`MessagesDB.getContext: ${error.message}`)
    return (data ?? []).reverse()
  },

  async countBySession(sessionId: string) {
    const { count, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_messages')
      .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })
      .eq('session_id', sessionId)
    if (error) throw new Error(`MessagesDB.countBySession: ${error.message}`)
    return count ?? 0
  },

  async deleteBySession(sessionId: string) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_messages')
      .delete()
      .eq('session_id', sessionId)
    if (error) throw new Error(`MessagesDB.deleteBySession: ${error.message}`)
  },

  async getTotalTokens(userId: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_messages')
      .select('tokens_used')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
    if (error) throw new Error(`MessagesDB.getTotalTokens: ${error.message}`)
    return (data ?? []).reduce((sum, m) => sum + (m.tokens_used ?? 0), 0)
  }
}

export const MemoryDB = {

  async set(
    userId: string,
    key: string,
    value: string,
    category: MemoryCategory = 'general',
    confidence = 1.0,
    source = 'conversation'
  ) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .rpc('upsert_memory', {
        p_user_id:    userId,
        p_key:        key,
        p_value:      value,
        p_category:   category,
        p_confidence: confidence,
        p_source:     source
      })
    if (error) throw new Error(`MemoryDB.set: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async get(userId: string, key: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_memory')
      .select('key, value, category, confidence, updated_at')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .eq('key', key)
      .single()
    if (error) return null
    return data
  },

  async getAll(userId: string, category?: MemoryCategory) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .rpc('get_user_memory', {
        p_user_id:  userId,
        p_category: category ?? null
      })
    if (error) throw new Error(`MemoryDB.getAll: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async delete(userId: string, key: string) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_memory')

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 13 — LIBRERIA SUPABASE CLIENT (completamento MemoryDB + UsersDB + TasksDB)**

```typescript
  async delete(userId: string, key: string) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_memory')
      .delete()
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .eq('key', key)
    if (error) throw new Error(`MemoryDB.delete: ${error.message}`)
  },

  async deleteAll(userId: string) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_memory')
      .delete()
      .eq('user_id', userId)
    if (error) throw new Error(`MemoryDB.deleteAll: ${error.message}`)
  },

  async toContext(userId: string): Promise<string> {
    const memories = await this.getAll(userId)
    if (!memories.length) return ''
    const lines = memories.map(m => `- [${m.category}] ${m.key}: ${m.value}`)
    return `📦 Memoria utente:\n${lines.join('\n')}`
  }
}

// ============================================
// HELPER: UTENTI
// ============================================
export const UsersDB = {

  async getOrCreate(
    userId: string,
    name?: string,
    email?: string,
    platform: Platform = 'web',
    telegramChatId?: string
  ) {
    const { data: existing } = await supabase
      .from('lara_users')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .single()

    if (existing) {
      await supabase
        .from('lara_users')
        .update({ last_seen: new Date().toISOString() })
        .eq('user_id', userId)
      return existing
    }

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_users')
      .insert({
        user_id:           userId,
        name:              name ?? 'Utente',
        email:             email ?? null,
        platform,
        telegram_chat_id:  telegramChatId ?? null,
        plan:              'free',
        tokens_used:       0,
        tokens_limit:      100000,
        settings:          {}
      })
      .select()
      .single()

    if (error) throw new Error(`UsersDB.getOrCreate: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async get(userId: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_users')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .single()
    if (error) return null
    return data
  },

  async update(userId: string, updates: Partial<LaraUser>) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_users')
      .update(updates)
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`UsersDB.update: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async incrementTokens(userId: string, tokens: number) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .rpc('increment_tokens', {
        p_user_id: userId,
        p_tokens:  tokens
      })
    if (error) throw new Error(`UsersDB.incrementTokens: ${error.message}`)
  },

  async hasTokensAvailable(userId: string): Promise<boolean> {
    const user = await this.get(userId)
    if (!user) return false
    return user.tokens_used < user.tokens_limit
  },

  async getStats(userId: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_users_stats')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .single()
    if (error) return null
    return data
  },

  async updateSettings(userId: string, settings: Record<string, unknown>) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_users')
      .update({ settings })
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`UsersDB.updateSettings: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  }
}

export const TasksDB = {

  async create(task: Database['public']['Tables']['lara_tasks']['Insert']) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_tasks')
      .insert(

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 13 — LIBRERIA SUPABASE CLIENT (completamento TasksDB + LogsDB + KnowledgeDB)**

```typescript
  async create(task: Database['public']['Tables']['lara_tasks']['Insert']) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_tasks')
      .insert(task)
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`TasksDB.create: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async get(taskId: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_tasks')
      .select('*')
      .eq('id', taskId)
      .single()
    if (error) return null
    return data
  },

  async listByUser(userId: string, status?: TaskStatus) {
    let query = supabase
      .from('lara_tasks')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .order('priority', { ascending: false })
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })

    if (status) query = query.eq('status', status)

    const { data, error } = await query
    if (error) throw new Error(`TasksDB.listByUser: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async updateStatus(
    taskId: string,
    status: TaskStatus,
    result?: Record<string, unknown>,
    errorMsg?: string
  ) {
    const updates: Partial<LaraTask> = {
      status,
      ...(result    && { result }),
      ...(errorMsg  && { error: errorMsg }),
      ...(status === 'running' && { executed_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    }

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_tasks')
      .update(updates)
      .eq('id', taskId)
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`TasksDB.updateStatus: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async incrementRetry(taskId: string) {
    const task = await this.get(taskId)
    if (!task) throw new Error('Task non trovato')

    const newCount = task.retry_count + 1
    const newStatus: TaskStatus = newCount >= task.max_retries ? 'failed' : 'pending'

    return await this.updateStatus(
      taskId,
      newStatus,
      undefined,
      `Retry ${newCount}/${task.max_retries}`
    )
  },

  async delete(taskId: string) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_tasks')
      .delete()
      .eq('id', taskId)
    if (error) throw new Error(`TasksDB.delete: ${error.message}`)
  },

  async getPending() {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_tasks')
      .select('*')
      .eq('status', 'pending')
      .order('priority', { ascending: false })
    if (error) throw new Error(`TasksDB.getPending: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async pause(taskId: string) {
    return await this.updateStatus(taskId, 'paused')
  },

  async resume(taskId: string) {
    return await this.updateStatus(taskId, 'pending')
  }
}

export const LogsDB = {

  async write(
    userId: string,
    action: string,
    status: LogStatus = 'ok',

    taskId?: string,

  ) {

        user_id:     userId,
        action,
        status,
        input,
        output,
        duration_ms: durationMs,
        task_id:     taskId    ?? null,
        session_id:  sessionId ?? null
      })
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) console.error(`LogsDB.write error: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async getByUser(userId: string, limit = 50) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_logs')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(

```typescript
  async getByUser(userId: string, limit = 50) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_logs')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(limit)
    if (error) throw new Error(`LogsDB.getByUser: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async getByTask(taskId: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_logs')
      .select('*')
      .eq('task_id', taskId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    if (error) throw new Error(`LogsDB.getByTask: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async getBySession(sessionId: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_logs')
      .select('*')
      .eq('session_id', sessionId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: true })
    if (error) throw new Error(`LogsDB.getBySession: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async countErrors(userId: string, since?: Date) {
    let query = supabase
      .from('lara_logs')
      .select('*', { count: 'exact', head: true })
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .eq('status', 'error')

    if (since) {
      query = query.gte('created_at', since.toISOString())
    }

    const { count, error } = await query
    if (error) throw new Error(`LogsDB.countErrors: ${error.message}`)
    return count ?? 0
  },

  async cleanup(olderThanDays = 30) {
    const cutoff = new Date()
    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - olderThanDays)

    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_logs')
      .delete()
      .lt('created_at', cutoff.toISOString())
    if (error) throw new Error(`LogsDB.cleanup: ${error.message}`)
  }
}

// ============================================
// HELPER: KNOWLEDGE BASE
// ============================================
export const KnowledgeDB = {

  async add(
    userId: string,
    title: string,
    content: string,
    category = 'general',
    tags: string[] = [],
    sourceUrl?: string
  ) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_knowledge')
      .insert({
        user_id:    userId,
        title,
        content,
        category,
        tags,
        source_url: sourceUrl ?? null
      })
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`KnowledgeDB.add: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async search(userId: string, query: string, category?: string) {
    let q = supabase
      .from('lara_knowledge')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .or(`title.ilike.%${query}%,content.ilike.%${query}%`)

    if (category) q = q.eq('category', category)

    const { data, error } = await q
      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(10)
    if (error) throw new Error(`KnowledgeDB.search: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async getAll(userId: string, category?: string) {
    let q = supabase
      .from('lara_knowledge')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })

    if (category) q = q.eq('category', category)

    const { data, error } = await q
    if (error) throw new Error(`KnowledgeDB.getAll: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async delete(id: string, userId: string) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_knowledge')
      .delete()
      .eq('id', id)
      .eq('user_id', userId)
    if (error) throw new Error(`KnowledgeDB.delete: ${error.message}`)
  },

  async toContext(userId: string, query: string):

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 13 — LIBRERIA SUPABASE CLIENT (completamento finale + WebhooksDB + export)**

```typescript
  async toContext(userId: string, query: string): Promise<string> {
    const results = await this.search(userId, query)
    if (!results.length) return ''
    const lines = results.map(k =>
      `📚 [${k.category}] ${k.title}:\n${k.content.slice(0, 500)}...`
    )
    return `📖 Knowledge base rilevante:\n\n${lines.join('\n\n')}`
  },

  async update(
    id: string,
    userId: string,
    updates: { title?: string; content?: string; category?: string; tags?: string[] }
  ) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_knowledge')
      .update(updates)
      .eq('id', id)
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`KnowledgeDB.update: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  }
}

// ============================================
// HELPER: WEBHOOKS
// ============================================
export const WebhooksDB = {

  async create(
    userId: string,
    name: string,
    endpoint: string,
    events: string[],
    secret?: string
  ) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_webhooks')
      .insert({
        user_id:  userId,
        name,
        endpoint,
        events,
        secret:   secret ?? null,
        active:   true
      })
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`WebhooksDB.create: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async listByUser(userId: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_webhooks')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })
    if (error) throw new Error(`WebhooksDB.listByUser: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async getActive(event: string) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_webhooks')
      .select('*')
      .eq('active', true)
      .contains('events', [event])
    if (error) throw new Error(`WebhooksDB.getActive: ${error.message}`)
    return data ?? []
  },

  async markTriggered(id: string) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_webhooks')
      .update({ last_triggered: new Date().toISOString() })
      .eq('id', id)
    if (error) throw new Error(`WebhooksDB.markTriggered: ${error.message}`)
  },

  async toggle(id: string, userId: string, active: boolean) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_webhooks')
      .update({ active })
      .eq('id', id)
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .select()
      .single()
    if (error) throw new Error(`WebhooksDB.toggle: ${error.message}`)
    return data
  },

  async delete(id: string, userId: string) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_webhooks')
      .delete()
      .eq('id', id)
      .eq('user_id', userId)
    if (error) throw new Error(`WebhooksDB.delete: ${error.message}`)
  },

  async fire(event: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>) {
    const hooks = await this.getActive(event)
    const results = await Promise.allSettled(
      hooks.map(async (hook) => {
        const headers: Record<string, string> = {
          'Content-Type':    'application/json',
          'X-Lara-Event':    event,
          'X-Lara-Hook-ID':  hook.id,
          'X-Timestamp':     new Date().toISOString()
        }

        if (hook.secret) {
          headers['X-Lara-Signature'] = await generateSignature(
            JSON.stringify(payload),
            hook.secret
          )
        }

        const res = await fetch(hook.endpoint, {
          method:  'POST',
          headers,
          body:    JSON.stringify({ event, payload, timestamp: Date.now() }),
          signal:  AbortSignal.timeout(10_000)
        })

        if (!res.ok) {
          throw new Error(`Webhook ${hook.id} fallito: HTTP ${res.status}`)
        }

        await this.markTriggered(hook.id)
        return { hookId: hook.id, status: res.status, ok: true }
      })
    )

    return results.map((r, i) => ({
      hookId: hooks[i].id,
      success: r.status === 'fulfilled',
      error:   r.status === 'rejected' ? (r as PromiseRejectedResult).reason?.message : null
    }))

// ============================================
// HELPER: DASHBOARD STATS

export const DashboardDB = {

  async getGlobalStats() {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .rpc('get_dashboard_stats')
    if (error) throw new Error(`DashboardDB.getGlobalStats: ${error.message}`)
    return data as {
      total_users:        number
      active_today:       number
      total_messages:     number
      total_tokens:       number
      avg_session_length: number
      tasks_pending:      number
      tasks_completed:    number
      tasks_failed:       number
      top_tools:          { tool: string; count: number }[]
      errors_last_24h:    number
    }
  },

  async getUserStats(userId: string) {
    const [user, messages, tasks, logs] = await Promise.all([
      UsersDB.get(userId),
      MessagesDB.getTotalTokens(userId),
      TasksDB.listByUser(userId),
      LogsDB.getByUser(userId, 100)
    ])

    const tasksByStatus = tasks.reduce((acc, t) => {
      acc[t.status] = (acc[t.status] ?? 0) + 1
      return acc
    }, {} as Record<string, number>)

    const errorCount = logs.filter(l => l.status === 'error').length
    const avgDuration = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + (l.duration_ms ?? 0), 0) / (logs.length || 1)

    return {
      userId,
      name:             user?.name ?? 'Unknown',
      plan:             user?.plan ?? 'free',
      tokensUsed:       user?.tokens_used ?? 0,
      tokensLimit:      user?.tokens_limit ?? 100000,
      tokensRemaining:  (user?.tokens_limit ?? 100000) - (user?.tokens_used ?? 0),
      usagePercent:     Math.round(((user?.tokens_used ?? 0) / (user?.tokens_limit ?? 100000)) * 100),
      totalMessages:    messages,
      tasksByStatus,
      totalTasks:       tasks.length,
      errorCount,
      avgResponseMs:    Math.round(avgDuration),
      lastSeen:         user?.last_seen ?? null,
      createdAt:        user?.created_at ?? null
    }
  },

  async getTokenUsageTrend(userId: string, days = 7) {
    const since = new Date()
    since.setDate(since.getDate() - days)

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_messages')
      .select('created_at, tokens_used')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .gte('created_at', since.toISOString())
      .order('created_at', { ascending: true })

    if (error) throw new Error(`DashboardDB.getTokenUsageTrend: ${error.message}`)

    const byDay: Record<string, number> = {}
    for (const msg of data ?? []) {
      const day = msg.created_at.slice(0, 10)
      byDay[day] = (byDay[day] ?? 0) + (msg.tokens_used ?? 0)
    }

    return Object.entries(byDay).map(([date, tokens]) => ({ date, tokens }))
  },

  async getErrorTrend(userId: string, days = 7) {

    since.setDate(since.getDate() - days)

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_logs')
      .select('created_at, status')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .gte('created_at', since.toISOString())

    if (error) throw new Error(`DashboardDB.getErrorTrend: ${error.message}`)

    const byDay:
