**PACCHETTO 13 — LIBRERIA SUPABASE CLIENT (completamento DashboardDB + generateSignature + export finale)**

```typescript
    const byDay: Record<string, { ok: number; error: number }> = {}
    for (const log of data ?? []) {
      const day = log.created_at.slice(0, 10)
      if (!byDay[day]) byDay[day] = { ok: 0, error: 0 }
      if (log.status === 'error') byDay[day].error++
      else byDay[day].ok++
    }

    return Object.entries(byDay).map(([date, counts]) => ({ date, ...counts }))
  },

  async getTopTools(userId: string, limit = 10) {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_logs')
      .select('action')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .eq('status', 'ok')

    if (error) throw new Error(`DashboardDB.getTopTools: ${error.message}`)

    const counts: Record<string, number> = {}
    for (const log of data ?? []) {
      counts[log.action] = (counts[log.action] ?? 0) + 1
    }

    return Object.entries(counts)
      .sort(([, a], [, b]) => b - a)
      .slice(0, limit)
      .map(([tool, count]) => ({ tool, count }))
  },

  async getSessionSummary(sessionId: string) {
    const [messages, logs] = await Promise.all([
      MessagesDB.getHistory(sessionId, 100),
      LogsDB.getBySession(sessionId)
    ])

    const tokens     = messages.reduce((s, m) => s + 0, 0)
    const duration   = logs.reduce((s, l) => s + (l.duration_ms ?? 0), 0)
    const toolsUsed  = [...new Set(logs.map(l => l.action))]
    const errorCount = logs.filter(l => l.status === 'error').length

    return {
      sessionId,
      totalMessages: messages.length,
      totalTokens:   tokens,
      totalDuration: duration,
      toolsUsed,
      errorCount,
      startedAt:     messages[0]?.created_at ?? null,
      endedAt:       messages[messages.length - 1]?.created_at ?? null
    }
  }
}

// ============================================
// UTILITY: FIRMA HMAC PER WEBHOOKS
// ============================================
async function generateSignature(payload: string, secret: string): Promise<string> {
  const encoder   = new TextEncoder()
  const keyData   = encoder.encode(secret)
  const msgData   = encoder.encode(payload)

  const cryptoKey = await crypto.subtle.importKey(
    'raw',
    keyData,
    { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' },
    false,
    ['sign']
  )

  const signature = await crypto.subtle.sign('HMAC', cryptoKey, msgData)
  const hashArray = Array.from(new Uint8Array(signature))
  return 'sha256=' + hashArray.map(b => b.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('')
}

// ============================================
// UTILITY: HEALTH CHECK SUPABASE
// ============================================
export async function checkSupabaseHealth(): Promise<{
  ok: boolean
  latencyMs: number
  error?: string
}> {
  const start = Date.now()
  try {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('lara_users')
      .select('user_id')
      .limit(1)

    return {
      ok:        !error,
      latencyMs: Date.now() - start,
      error:     error?.message
    }
  } catch (e) {
    return {
      ok:        false,
      latencyMs: Date.now() - start,
      error:     (e as Error).message
    }
  }
}

**PACCHETTO 14 — CORE AI ENGINE: `src/lib/ai/engine.ts`**

```typescript
// ============================================
// LARA AI ENGINE — CORE ORCHESTRATOR
// Gestisce: context building, tool routing,
// streaming, memoria, logging, retry logic
// ============================================

import Anthropic                           from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'
import { SessionsDB, MessagesDB, MemoryDB,
         UsersDB, LogsDB, KnowledgeDB }    from '@/lib/supabase'
import { toolRegistry }                    from '@/lib/tools/registry'
import { buildSystemPrompt }               from '@/lib/ai/prompts'
import { TokenCounter }                    from '@/lib/ai/tokens'
import { RateLimiter }                     from '@/lib/ai/rate-limiter'
import { StreamHandler }                   from '@/lib/ai/stream-handler'
import type {
  EngineInput,
  EngineOutput,
  ToolCall,
  ToolResult,
  StreamChunk
}                                          from '@/lib/ai/types'

// ============================================
// COSTANTI ENGINE
// ============================================
const MAX_TOKENS_RESPONSE = 8192
const MAX_TOOL_ITERATIONS = 10
const RETRY_ATTEMPTS       = 3
const RETRY_DELAY_MS       = 1000
const MODEL_PRIMARY        = 'claude-opus-4-5'
const MODEL_FALLBACK       = 'claude-sonnet-4-5'
const CONTEXT_WINDOW       = 200_000
const RESERVE_TOKENS       = 10_000

// ============================================
// ANTHROPIC CLIENT
// ============================================
const anthropic = new Anthropic({
  apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY!,
  maxRetries: 0  // gestiamo noi il retry
})

// ============================================
// RATE LIMITER
// ============================================
const rateLimiter = new RateLimiter({
  requestsPerMinute: 50,
  tokensPerMinute:   100_000
})

// ============================================
// ENGINE PRINCIPALE
// ============================================
export class LaraEngine {

  private userId:    string
  private sessionId: string
  private stream:    boolean

  constructor(userId: string, sessionId: string, stream = false) {
    this.userId    = userId
    this.sessionId = sessionId
    this.stream    = stream
  }

  // ==========================================
  // METODO PRINCIPALE: run()
  // ==========================================
  async run(input: EngineInput): Promise<EngineOutput> {
    const startTime = Date.now()
    let tokensUsed  = 0
    let model       = MODEL_PRIMARY

    try {
      // 1. Verifica rate limit
      await rateLimiter.check(this.userId)

      // 2. Verifica token disponibili
      const hasTokens = await UsersDB.hasTokensAvailable(this.userId)
      if (!hasTokens) {
        throw new Error('TOKEN_LIMIT_REACHED: Hai esaurito i token disponibili.')
      }

      // 3. Costruisci contesto
      const context = await this.buildContext(input.message)

      // 4. Recupera storico messaggi
      const history = await MessagesDB.getHistory(
        this.sessionId,
        50,
        CONTEXT_WINDOW - RESERVE_TOKENS
      )

      // 5. Aggiungi messaggio utente allo storic

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 14 — CORE AI ENGINE (completamento run() + buildContext + tool loop)**

```typescript
      // 6. Prepara messaggi per Claude
      const messages: Anthropic.MessageParam[] = [
        ...history.map(m => ({
          role:    m.role as 'user' | 'assistant',
          content: m.content
        })),
        {
          role:    'user',
          content: input.message
        }
      ]

      // 7. Tool loop con retry
      let response: EngineOutput | null = null
      let attempts = 0

      while (attempts < RETRY_ATTEMPTS) {
        try {
          response = await this.toolLoop(
            messages,
            context,
            model
          )
          break
        } catch (err: unknown) {
          const error = err as Error
          attempts++

          // Fallback su modello secondario al 2° tentativo
          if (attempts === 2) model = MODEL_FALLBACK

          if (attempts >= RETRY_ATTEMPTS) throw error

          await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempts))
        }
      }

      if (!response) throw new Error('ENGINE_ERROR: Nessuna risposta generata')

      // 8. Salva risposta assistant
      const savedMsg = await MessagesDB.add(
        this.sessionId,
        this.userId,
        'assistant',
        response.text,
        response.toolsUsed,
        response.tokensUsed
      )

      // 9. Aggiorna token utente
      tokensUsed = response.tokensUsed
      await UsersDB.incrementTokens(this.userId, tokensUsed)

      // 10. Aggiorna last_seen
      await UsersDB.touch(this.userId)

      // 11. Salva log
      const duration = Date.now() - startTime
      await LogsDB.write(
        this.userId,
        'engine.run',
        'ok',
        { message: input.message.slice(0, 200) },
        { tokensUsed, model, toolsUsed: response.toolsUsed },
        duration,
        undefined,
        this.sessionId
      )

      return { ...response, messageId: savedMsg?.id, durationMs: duration }

    } catch (err: unknown) {
      const error = err as Error
      const duration = Date.now() - startTime

      await LogsDB.write(
        this.userId,
        'engine.run',
        'error',
        { message: input.message.slice(0, 200) },
        { error: error.message },
        duration,
        undefined,
        this.sessionId
      )

      throw error
    }
  }

  // ==========================================
  // TOOL LOOP: gestisce iterazioni tool_use
  // ==========================================
  private async toolLoop(
    messages:  Anthropic.MessageParam[],
    context:   string,
    model:     string
  ): Promise<EngineOutput> {

    const systemPrompt = await buildSystemPrompt(this.userId, context)
    const tools        = toolRegistry.getAnthropicTools()

    let currentMessages = [...messages]
    let totalTokens     = 0
    let toolsUsed:      string[] = []
    let iteration       = 0
    let finalText       = ''

    while (iteration < MAX_TOOL_ITERATIONS) {
      iteration++

      // Chiamata a Claude
      const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
        model,
        max_tokens:  MAX_TOKENS_RESPONSE,
        system:      systemPrompt,
        tools,
        messages:    currentMessages,
        temperature: 0.7
      })

      totalTokens += response.usage.input_tokens + response.usage.output_tokens

      // Caso 1: stop_reason = 'end_turn' → risposta finale
      if (response.stop_reason === 'end_turn') {
        finalText = response.content
          .filter(b => b.type === 'text')
          .map(b => (b as Anthropic.TextBlock).text)
          .join('\n')
        break
      }

      // Caso 2: stop_reason = 'tool_use' → esegui tool
      if (response.stop_reason === 'tool_use') {
        const toolUseBlocks = response.content
          .filter(b => b.type === 'tool_use') as Anthropic.ToolUseBlock[]

        // Aggiungi risposta assistant ai messaggi
        currentMessages.push({
          role:    'assistant',
> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 14 — CORE AI ENGINE (completamento tool loop + buildContext + streaming)**

```typescript
        // Esegui tutti i tool in parallelo
        const toolResults = await Promise.allSettled(
          toolUseBlocks.map(async (block) => {
            const result = await this.executeTool(block.name, block.input)
            toolsUsed.push(block.name)
            return {
              type:        'tool_result' as const,
              tool_use_id: block.id,
              content:     typeof result === 'string'
                             ? result
                             : JSON.stringify(result, null, 2)
            }
          })
        )

        // Costruisci tool_result message
        const toolResultContent = toolResults.map((r, i) => {
          if (r.status === 'fulfilled') return r.value
          return {
            type:        'tool_result' as const,
            tool_use_id: toolUseBlocks[i].id,
            content:     `❌ Errore tool: ${(r.reason as Error).message}`,
            is_error:    true
          }
        })

        currentMessages.push({
          role:    'user',
          content: toolResultContent
        })

        continue
      }

      // Caso 3: max_tokens → tronca e restituisci
      if (response.stop_reason === 'max_tokens') {
        finalText = response.content
          .filter(b => b.type === 'text')
          .map(b => (b as Anthropic.TextBlock).text)
          .join('\n')
        finalText += '\n\n⚠️ _Risposta troncata per limite token._'
        break
      }

      break
    }

    return {
      text:       finalText,
      tokensUsed: totalTokens,
      toolsUsed:  [...new Set(toolsUsed)],
      model,
      iterations: iteration
    }
  }

  // ==========================================
  // ESEGUI SINGOLO TOOL
  // ==========================================
  private async executeTool(
    toolName: string,
    input:    Record<string, unknown>
  ): Promise<unknown> {
    const logStart = Date.now()

    try {
      const tool   = toolRegistry.get(toolName)
      if (!tool) throw new Error(`Tool non trovato: ${toolName}`)

      const result = await tool.execute(input, {
        userId:    this.userId,
        sessionId: this.sessionId
      })

      await LogsDB.write(
        this.userId,
        `tool.${toolName}`,
        'ok',
        input as Record<string, unknown>,
        { result: JSON.stringify(result).slice(0, 500) },
        Date.now() - logStart,
        undefined,
        this.sessionId
      )

      return result

    } catch (err: unknown) {
      const error = err as Error

      await LogsDB.write(
        this.userId,
        `tool.${toolName}`,
        'error',
        input as Record<string, unknown>,
        { error: error.message },
        Date.now() - logStart,
        undefined,
        this.sessionId
      )

      throw error
    }
  }

  // ==========================================
  // BUILD CONTEXT: memoria + knowledge base
  // ==========================================
  private async buildContext(message: string): Promise<string> {
    const [memories, knowledge] = await Promise.all([
      MemoryDB.getRelevant(this.userId, message, 8),
      KnowledgeDB.toContext(this.userId, message)
    ])

    const parts: string[] = []

    if (memories.length > 0) {
      const memLines = memories.map(m =>
        `• [${m.category}] ${m.key}: ${m.value}`
      )
      parts.push(`🧠 Memoria utente:\n${memLines.join('\n')}`)
    }

    if (knowledge) {
      parts.push(knowledge)
    }

    // Aggiunge info utente base
    const user = await UsersDB.get(this.userId)
    if (user) {
      parts.push(
        `👤 Utente: ${user.name ?? 'N/D'} | ` +
        `Piano: ${user.plan} | ` +
        `Token rimasti: ${(user.tokens_limit - user.tokens_used).toLocaleString()}`
      )
    }

    return parts.join('\n\n')
  }

  // ==========================================
  // STREAMING VERSION: runStream()
  // ====================

**PACCHETTO 14 — CORE AI ENGINE (completamento runStream + StreamHandler + RateLimiter)**

```typescript
  // ==========================================
  // STREAMING VERSION: runStream()
  // ==========================================
  async *runStream(input: EngineInput): AsyncGenerator<StreamChunk> {
    const startTime = Date.now()

    try {
      // 1. Verifica rate limit e token
      await rateLimiter.check(this.userId)
      const hasTokens = await UsersDB.hasTokensAvailable(this.userId)
      if (!hasTokens) {
        yield { type: 'error', error: 'TOKEN_LIMIT_REACHED' }
        return
      }

      // 2. Contesto e storico
      const [context, history] = await Promise.all([
        this.buildContext(input.message),
        MessagesDB.getHistory(this.sessionId, 50)
      ])

      // 3. Salva messaggio utente
      await MessagesDB.add(
        this.sessionId,
        this.userId,
        'user',
        input.message
      )

      // 4. System prompt + tools
      const systemPrompt = await buildSystemPrompt(this.userId, context)
      const tools        = toolRegistry.getAnthropicTools()

      const messages: Anthropic.MessageParam[] = [
        ...history.map(m => ({
          role:    m.role as 'user' | 'assistant',
          content: m.content
        })),
        { role: 'user', content: input.message }
      ]

      let fullText   = ''
      let tokensUsed = 0
      let toolsUsed: string[] = []

      // 5. Stream principale
      const stream = anthropic.messages.stream({
        model:       MODEL_PRIMARY,
        max_tokens:  MAX_TOKENS_RESPONSE,
        system:      systemPrompt,
        tools,
        messages,
        temperature: 0.7
      })

      // 6. Itera eventi stream
      for await (const event of stream) {

        // Chunk di testo
        if (
          event.type === 'content_block_delta' &&
          event.delta.type === 'text_delta'
        ) {
          const chunk = event.delta.text
          fullText += chunk
          yield { type: 'text', text: chunk }
        }

        // Tool use — esegui e restituisci risultato
        if (event.type === 'content_block_start' &&
            event.content_block.type === 'tool_use') {
          yield {
            type:     'tool_start',
            toolName: event.content_block.name
          }
        }

        // Usage finale
        if (event.type === 'message_delta' && event.usage) {
          tokensUsed = event.usage.output_tokens
        }

        if (event.type === 'message_stop') {
          break
        }
      }

      // 7. Gestisci tool calls se presenti
      const finalMsg = await stream.finalMessage()
      if (finalMsg.stop_reason === 'tool_use') {
        const toolBlocks = finalMsg.content
          .filter(b => b.type === 'tool_use') as Anthropic.ToolUseBlock[]

        const toolResults = await Promise.allSettled(
          toolBlocks.map(async (block) => {
            yield { type: 'tool_start', toolName: block.name }
            const result = await this.executeTool(block.name, block.input)
            toolsUsed.push(block.name)
            yield { type: 'tool_end', toolName: block.name, result }
            return {
              type:        'tool_result' as const,
              tool_use_id: block.id,
              content:     JSON.stringify(result)
            }
          })
        )

        // Seconda chiamata con tool results
        const toolResultMessages: Anthropic.MessageParam[] = [
          ...messages,
          { role: 'assistant', content: finalMsg.content },
          {
            role:    'user',
            content: toolResults
              .filter(r => r.status === 'fulfilled')
              .map(r => (r as PromiseFulfilledResult<unknown>).value) as Anthropic.ToolResultBlockParam[]
          }
        ]

        const stream2 = anthropic.messages.stream({
          model:      MODEL_PRIMARY,
          max_tokens: MAX_TOKENS_RESPONSE,
          system:     systemPrompt,

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 14 — CORE AI ENGINE (completamento runStream + salvataggio + tipi)**

```typescript
          if (
            event.type === 'content_block_delta' &&
            event.delta.type === 'text_delta'
          ) {
            const chunk = event.delta.text
            fullText += chunk
            yield { type: 'text', text: chunk }
          }

          if (event.type === 'message_delta' && event.usage) {
            tokensUsed += event.usage.output_tokens
          }

          if (event.type === 'message_stop') break
        }
      }

      // 8. Salva risposta completa
      await MessagesDB.add(
        this.sessionId,
        this.userId,
        'assistant',
        fullText,
        toolsUsed,
        tokensUsed
      )

      // 9. Aggiorna token e last_seen
      await Promise.all([
        UsersDB.incrementTokens(this.userId, tokensUsed),
        UsersDB.touch(this.userId)
      ])

      // 10. Log finale
      const duration = Date.now() - startTime
      await LogsDB.write(
        this.userId,
        'engine.runStream',
        'ok',
        { message: input.message.slice(0, 200) },
        { tokensUsed, toolsUsed },
        duration,
        undefined,
        this.sessionId
      )

      // 11. Yield done
      yield {
        type:      'done',
        tokensUsed,
        toolsUsed: [...new Set(toolsUsed)],
        durationMs: duration
      }

    } catch (err: unknown) {
      const error = err as Error
      yield { type: 'error', error: error.message }
      throw error
    }
  }
}

// ============================================
// TIPI ENGINE: src/lib/ai/types.ts
// ============================================
export interface EngineInput {
  message:    string
  attachments?: {
    type:    'image' | 'file' | 'url'
    content: string
    name?:   string
  }[]
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>
}

export interface EngineOutput {
  text:       string
  tokensUsed: number
  toolsUsed:  string[]
  model:      string
  iterations: number
  messageId?: string
  durationMs?: number
}

export type StreamChunk =
  | { type: 'text';       text: string }
  | { type: 'tool_start'; toolName: string }
  | { type: 'tool_end';   toolName: string; result: unknown }
  | { type: 'done';       tokensUsed: number; toolsUsed: string[]; durationMs: number }
  | { type: 'error';      error: string }

export interface ToolCall {
  id:    string
  name:  string
  input: Record<string, unknown>
}

export interface ToolResult {
  tool_use_id: string
  content:     string
  is_error?:   boolean
}

// ============================================
// RATE LIMITER: src/lib/ai/rate-limiter.ts
// ============================================
interface RateLimiterConfig {
  requestsPerMinute: number
  tokensPerMinute:   number
}

export class RateLimiter {
  private config:   RateLimiterConfig
  private requests: Map<string, number[]> = new Map()

  constructor(config: RateLimiterConfig) {
    this.config = config
  }

  async check(userId: string): Promise<void> {
    const now      = Date.now()
    const windowMs = 60_000
    const key      = userId

    if (!this.requests.has(key)) {
      this.requests.set(key, [])
    }

    const timestamps = this.requests.get(key)!
    const recent     = timestamps.filter(t => now - t < windowMs)

    if (recent.length >= this.config.requestsPerMinute) {
      const oldest  = recent[0]
      const waitMs  = windowMs - (now - oldest)
      throw new Error(
        `RATE_LIMIT: Troppe richieste. Riprova tra ${Math.ceil(waitMs / 1000)}s`
      )
    }

    recent.push(now)
    this.requests.set(key, recent)
  }

  reset(userId: string): void {
    this.requests.delete(userId)
  }
}

// ============================================
// TOKEN COUNTER: src/lib/ai/tokens.ts
// ============================================
export class TokenCounter {

  // Stima approssimativa: ~4 chars per token (regola Claude)
  static estimate(text: string): number {
    return Math.ceil(text.length / 4)
  }

  // Stima array di messaggi
  static estimateMessages(
    messages: { role: string; content: string }[]
  ): number {
    return messages.reduce((total, m) => {
      return total + this.estimate(m.content) + 4 // overhead per role
    }, 0)
  }

  // Tronca testo a max token
  static truncate(text: string, maxTokens: number): string {
    const maxChars = maxTokens * 4
    if (text.length <= maxChars) return text
    return text.slice(0, maxChars) + '… [troncato]'
  }

  // Tronca array messaggi per stare nel context window
  static truncateHistory(
    messages: { role: string; content: string; created_at: string }[],
    maxTokens: number
  ): { role: string; content: string }[] {
    let total    = 0
    const result: { role: string; content: string }[] = []

    // Scorri dal più recente al più vecchio
    for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const tokens = this.estimate(messages[i].content) + 4
      if (total + tokens > maxTokens) break
      total += tokens
      result.unshift({
        role:    messages[i].role,
        content: messages[i].content
      })
    }

    return result
  }

  // Calcola costo stimato in USD (Claude Opus 4)
  static estimateCost(inputTokens: number, outputTokens: number): number {
    const INPUT_COST_PER_1K  = 0.015  // $15 / 1M tokens
    const OUTPUT_COST_PER_1K = 0.075  // $75 / 1M tokens
    return (
      (inputTokens  / 1000) * INPUT_COST_PER_1K +
      (outputTokens / 1000) * OUTPUT_COST_PER_1K
    )
  }
}

    ? (user.tokens_limit - user.tokens_used).toLocaleString('it-IT')

// ============================================
// STREAM HANDLER: src/lib/ai/stream-handler.ts
// ============================================
import type { StreamChunk } from '@/lib/ai/types'

export class StreamHandler {

  private encoder = new TextEncoder()

  // Converti AsyncGenerator in ReadableStream per API Route
  toReadableStream(
    generator: AsyncGenerator<StreamChunk>
  ): ReadableStream {
    return new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        try {
          for await (const chunk of generator) {
            const data  = JSON.stringify(chunk)
            const bytes = new TextEncoder().encode(`data: ${data}\n\n`)
            controller.enqueue(bytes)

            // Chiudi stream su done o error
            if (chunk.type === 'done' || chunk.type === 'error') {
              controller.close()
              return
            }
          }
          controller.close()
        } catch (err) {
          controller.error(err)
        }
      },
      cancel() {
        // Client disconnesso — cleanup se necessario
      }
    })
  }

  // Parse SSE stream lato client
  static async *parseSSE(
    response: Response
  ): AsyncGenerator<StreamChunk> {
    const reader  = response.body!.getReader()
    const decoder = new TextDecoder()
    let   buffer  = ''

    while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read()
      if (done) break

      buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
      const lines = buffer.split('\n\n')
      buffer = lines.pop() ?? ''

      for (const line of lines) {
        if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue
        try {
          const json  = line.slice(6)
          const chunk = JSON.parse(json) as StreamChunk
          yield chunk
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 14 — STREAM HANDLER (completamento) + TOOL REGISTRY**

```typescript
        } catch {
          // Ignora chunk malformati
          continue
        }
      }
    }
  }

  // Accumula stream in stringa completa
  static async collect(
    generator: AsyncGenerator<StreamChunk>
  ): Promise<{ text: string; tokensUsed: number; toolsUsed: string[] }> {
    let text      = ''
    let tokens    = 0
    let tools:    string[] = []

    for await (const chunk of generator) {
      if (chunk.type === 'text') {
        text += chunk.text
      }
      if (chunk.type === 'done') {
        tokens = chunk.tokensUsed
        tools  = chunk.toolsUsed
      }
      if (chunk.type === 'error') {
        throw new Error(chunk.error)
      }
    }

    return { text, tokensUsed: tokens, toolsUsed: tools }
  }

  // Crea Response SSE con headers corretti
  static createSSEResponse(stream: ReadableStream): Response {
    return new Response(stream, {
      headers: {
        'Content-Type':                'text/event-stream',
        'Cache-Control':               'no-cache, no-transform',
        'Connection':                  'keep-alive',
        'X-Accel-Buffering':           'no',
        'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
      }
    })
  }
}

// ============================================
// TOOL REGISTRY: src/lib/ai/tool-registry.ts
// ============================================
import type Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'

export interface ToolDefinition {
  name:        string
  description: string
  input_schema: {
    type:       'object'
    properties: Record<string, {
      type:        string
      description: string
      enum?:       string[]
      items?:      { type: string }
    }>
    required:   string[]
  }
  execute(
    input:   Record<string, unknown>,
    context: ToolContext
  ): Promise<unknown>
}

export interface ToolContext {
  userId:    string
  sessionId: string
}

class ToolRegistry {
  private tools = new Map<string, ToolDefinition>()

  register(tool: ToolDefinition): void {
    this.tools.set(tool.name, tool)
  }

  get(name: string): ToolDefinition | undefined {
    return this.tools.get(name)
  }

  getAll(): ToolDefinition[] {
    return Array.from(this.tools.values())
  }

  getAnthropicTools(): Anthropic.Tool[] {
    return this.getAll().map(t => ({
      name:         t.name,
      description:  t.description,
      input_schema: t.input_schema
    }))
  }

  list(): string[] {
    return Array.from(this.tools.keys())
  }
}

export const toolRegistry = new ToolRegistry()

export function registerAllTools(): void {
  toolRegistry.register(searchWebTool)
  toolRegistry.register(getStockPriceTool)
  toolRegistry.register(getCryptoPriceTool)
  toolRegistry.register(scrapeUrlTool)
  toolRegistry.register(analyzeCompetitorsTool)
  toolRegistry.register(generateSeoTool)
  toolRegistry.register(createBusinessPlanTool)
  toolRegistry.register(calculateRoiTool)
}

// ============================================
// TOOL: search_web — src/lib/ai/tools/search-web.ts
// ============================================
import type { ToolDefinition } from '@/lib/ai/tool-registry'

export const searchWebTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name: 'search_web',
  description: 'Cerca informazioni aggiornate su internet. USA SEMPRE per notizie, prezzi, aziende, mercati, trend, eventi recenti, statistiche.',
  input_schema: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      query: {
        type:        'string',
        description: 'Query di ricerca ottimizzata'
      },
      deep: {
        type:        'boolean',
        description: 'True per analisi approfondita con fonti accademiche (più lenta)'
      }
    },
    required: ['query']
  },
  async execute(input) {
    const { query, deep = false } = input as { query: string; deep?: boolean }

    const apiKey  = process.env.TAVILY_API_KEY!
    const baseUrl = 'https://api.tavily.com/search'

    const body = {
      api_key:        apiKey,
      query,
      search_depth:   deep ? 'advanced' : 'basic',
      include_answer: true,
      include_raw_content: false,
      max_results:    deep ? 8 : 5,
      include_domains: [],
      exclude_domains: []
    }

    const response = await fetch(baseUrl, {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body:    JSON.stringify(body),
      signal:  AbortSignal.timeout(15_000)
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Tavily error: ${response.status} ${response.statusText}`)
    }

    const data = await response.json()

    return {
      answer:  data.answer ?? 'Nessuna risposta diretta trovata.',
      results: (data.results ?? []).map((r: {
        title:   string
        url:     string
        content: string
        score:   number
      }) => ({
        title:   r.title,
        url:     r.url,
        content: r.content.slice(0, 500),
        score:   r.score
      })),
      query,
      searchedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }
  }
}

// TOOL: get_stock_price — src/lib/ai/tools/get-stock-price.ts
// ============================================
import type { ToolDefinition } from '@/lib/ai/tool-registry'

export const getStockPriceTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name:        'get_stock_price',
  description: 'Ottieni prezzo live di azioni, ETF, indici di borsa',
  input_schema: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      symbol: {
        type:        'string',
        description: 'Simbolo borsa: AAPL, TSLA, NVDA, SPY, ENI.MI...'
      }
    },
    required: ['symbol']
  },
  async execute(input) {
    const { symbol } = input as { symbol: string }

    const apiKey = process.env.ALPHA_VANTAGE_API_KEY!
    const url    = `https://www.alphavantage.co/query?function=GLOBAL_QUOTE&symbol=${symbol}&apikey=${apiKey}`

    const response = await fetch(url, {
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10_000)
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Alpha Vantage error: ${response.status}`)
    }

    const data  = await response.json()
    const quote = data['Global Quote']

    if (!quote || !quote['05. price']) {
      throw new Error(`Simbolo non trovato: ${symbol}`)
    }

    return {
      symbol,
      price:         parseFloat(quote['05. price']),
      change:        parseFloat(quote['09. change']),
      changePercent: quote['10. change percent'],
      volume:        parseInt(quote['06. volume']),
      high:          parseFloat(quote['03. high']),
      low:           parseFloat(quote['04. low']),
      open:          parseFloat(quote['02. open']),
      prevClose:     parseFloat(quote['08. previous close']),
      updatedAt:     quote['07. latest trading day']
query.json

// ============================================
// TOOL: get_crypto_price — src/lib/ai/tools/get-crypto-price.ts
// ============================================
import type { ToolDefinition } from '@/lib/ai/tool-registry'

export const getCryptoPriceTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name:        'get_crypto_price',
  description: 'Ottieni prezzo live di criptovalute in USD ed EUR',
  input_schema: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      coin: {
        type:        'string',
        description: 'Nome crypto: bitcoin, ethereum, solana, binancecoin...'
      }
    },
    required: ['coin']
  },
  async execute(input) {
    const { coin } = input as { coin: string }
    const coinId   = coin.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-')

    const url = `https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/simple/price?ids=${coinId}&vs_currencies=usd,eur&include_24hr_change=true&include_24hr_vol=true&include_market_cap=true`

    const response = await fetch(url, {
      headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' },
      signal:  AbortSignal.timeout(10_000)
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`CoinGecko error: ${response.status}`)
    }

    const data = await response.json()

    if (!data[coinId]) {
      throw new Error(`Crypto non trovata: ${coin}`)
    }

    const c = data[coinId]

    return {
      coin:          coinId,
      priceUsd:      c.usd,
      priceEur:      c.eur,
      change24h:     c.usd_24h_change,
      volume24h:     c.usd_24h_vol,
      marketCap:     c.usd_market_cap,
      updatedAt:     new Date().toISOString()
    }
  }
}

// ============================================
// TOOL: scrape_url — src/lib/ai/tools/scrape-url.ts
// ============================================
import type { ToolDefinition } from '@/lib/ai/tool-registry'

export const scrapeUrlTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name:        'scrape_url',
  description: 'Leggi e analizza il contenuto di una pagina web o competitor',
  input_schema: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      url: {
        type:        'string',
        description: 'URL completo (https://)'
      }
    },
    required: ['url']
  },
  async execute(input) {
    const { url } = input as { url: string }

    // Usa Jina AI Reader (free, no auth needed)
    const jinaUrl  = `https://r.jina.ai/${url}`

    const response = await fetch(jinaUrl, {
      headers: {
        'Accept':    'application/json',
        'X-Return-Format': 'markdown'
      },
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(20_000)
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Scrape error: ${response.status} per ${url}`)
    }

    const text    = await response.text()
    const trimmed = text.slice(0, 8000) // max 8k chars

    return {
      url,
      content:   trimmed,
      length:    text.length,
      truncated: text.length > 8000,
      scrapedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }
  }
}

// ============================================
// TOOL: generate_seo_content — src/lib/ai/tools/generate-seo.ts
// ============================================
import type { ToolDefinition } from '@/lib/ai/tool-registry'

export const generateSeoTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name:        'generate_seo_content',
  description: 'Genera contenuto SEO-ottimizzato: articolo blog, meta description, title tag, headings, FAQ, post social',
  input_schema: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      topic: {
        type:        'string',
        description: 'Argomento del contenuto'
      },
      type: {
        type:        'string',
        description: 'Tipo: article, meta, title, outline, faq, social_post',
        enum:        ['article', 'meta', 'title', 'outline', 'faq', 'social_post']
      },
      keywords: {
        type:        'string',
        description: 'Keyword target (opzionale)'
      }
    },
    required: ['topic', 'type']
  },
  async execute(input) {
    const { topic, type, keywords } = input as {
      topic:     string
      type:      string
      keywords?: string
    }

    // Template per ogni tipo di contenuto SEO
    const templates: Record<string, string> = {
      article: `
# ${topic}

## Introduzione
[Hook potente con keyword principale: ${keywords ?? topic}]

[Definizione chiara e concisa, 150-200 parole]

[3-5 motivi concreti con dati]

| Vantaggi | Svantaggi |
|----------|-----------|
| ✅ ...   | ❌ ...    |

[CTA + sintesi valore]

**Keyword target:** ${keywords ?? topic}
**Meta description:** ${topic} — guida completa 2025. Scopri come [benefit principale] con strategie pratiche e dati aggiornati.
**Title tag:** ${topic}: Guida Completa 2025 | Aethersy
      `,
      meta: `
**Meta Description (155 char):**
${topic} — scopri ${keywords ?? 'le migliori strategie'} nel 2025. Guida pratica con dati reali
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 14 — TOOLS (analyze_competitors completamento + SEO + business plan + ROI)**

```typescript
        enum: ['pricing', 'marketing', 'prodotto', 'SEO', 'social']
      }
    },
    required: ['business']
  },
  async execute(input) {
    const { business, aspect } = input as { business: string; aspect?: string }

    // Usa Tavily per ricerca competitor
    const apiKey = process.env.TAVILY_API_KEY!
    const query  = aspect
      ? `${business} competitor analysis ${aspect} 2024 2025`
      : `${business} top competitors comparison pricing strategy 2024 2025`

    const body = {
      api_key:        apiKey,
      query,
      search_depth:   'advanced',
      include_answer: true,
      max_results:    8
    }

    const response = await fetch('https://api.tavily.com/search', {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body:    JSON.stringify(body),
      signal:  AbortSignal.timeout(20_000)
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Competitor analysis error: ${response.status}`)
    }

    const data = await response.json()

    return {
      business,
      aspect:    aspect ?? 'generale',
      summary:   data.answer ?? 'Analisi non disponibile',
      sources:   (data.results ?? []).map((r: {
        title:   string
        url:     string
        content: string
      }) => ({
        title:   r.title,
        url:     r.url,
        excerpt: r.content.slice(0, 400)
      })),
      analyzedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }
  }
}

  input_schema: {
    type: 'object',

// ============================================
// TOOL: calculate_roi — src/lib/ai/tools/calculate-roi.ts
// ============================================
import type { ToolDefinition } from '@/lib/ai/tool-registry'

export const calculateRoiTool: ToolDefinition = {
  name:        'calculate_roi',
  description: 'Calcola ROI, ROAS, breakeven, LTV/CAC per campagne marketing o investimenti',
  input_schema: {
    type: 'object',
    properties: {
      investment: {
        type:        'number',
        description: 'Investimento iniziale in EUR'
      },
      revenue: {
        type:        'number',
        description: 'Revenue/ritorno in EUR'
      },
      context: {
        type:        'string',
        description: 'Contesto (ads, prodotto, immobile, ecc.)'
      }
    },
    required: ['investment', 'revenue']
  },
  async execute(input) {
    const { investment, revenue, context = '

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 14 — TOOLS (calculate_roi completo + Tool Registry + Index)**

```typescript
    const { investment, revenue, context = 'generale' } = input as {
      investment: number
      revenue:    number
      context?:   string
    }

    // Calcoli core
    const profit        = revenue - investment
    const roi           = ((revenue - investment) / investment) * 100
    const roas          = revenue / investment
    const breakeven     = investment
    const profitMargin  = (profit / revenue) * 100

    // Valutazione qualitativa ROI
    const roiRating =
      roi >= 200 ? '🚀 Eccellente'  :
      roi >= 100 ? '✅ Ottimo'      :
      roi >= 50  ? '👍 Buono'       :
      roi >= 20  ? '⚠️ Accettabile' :
      roi >= 0   ? '🔴 Marginale'   :
                   '❌ Negativo'

    // Valutazione ROAS (specifico per ads)
    const roasRating =
      roas >= 8  ? '🚀 Eccellente (8x+)'   :
      roas >= 4  ? '✅ Ottimo (4-8x)'       :
      roas >= 2  ? '👍 Buono (2-4x)'        :
      roas >= 1  ? '⚠️ Break-even (1-2x)'  :
                   '❌ In perdita (<1x)'

    // Proiezioni scaled (se si scala l'investimento)
    const projections = [2, 5, 10].map(multiplier => ({
      investmentScaled: investment * multiplier,
      revenueScaled:    revenue * multiplier,
      profitScaled:     profit * multiplier,
      label:            `${multiplier}x investimento`
    }))

    // Suggerimenti contestuali
    const suggestions: string[] = []

    if (context.toLowerCase().includes('ads') || context.toLowerCase().includes('marketing')) {
      if (roas < 2) {
        suggestions.push('⚠️ ROAS sotto 2x: rivedi targeting, creatività e landing page prima di scalare')
        suggestions.push('🔧 Test A/B su headline e CTA — impatto medio +30% CTR')
        suggestions.push('📊 Analizza il funnel: dove perdi utenti? (awareness → consideration → conversion)')
      } else if (roas >= 4) {
        suggestions.push('🚀 ROAS solido: considera di scalare budget del 20-30% ogni settimana')
        suggestions.push('📈 Espandi audience con lookalike 1-2% del tuo best customer list')
        suggestions.push('🔁 Lancia retargeting per chi ha visitato senza convertire')
      }
    }

    if (context.toLowerCase().includes('immobile') || context.toLowerCase().includes('immobiliare')) {
      const annualYield = (profit / investment) * 100
      suggestions.push(`🏠 Rendimento annuo lordo stimato: ${annualYield.toFixed(2)}%`)
      suggestions.push('💡 Considera la leva finanziaria: mutuo al 60-70% può amplificare il ROI sul capitale proprio')
      suggestions.push('📋 Verifica: IMU, manutenzione, gestione PM riducono il netto del 20-30%')
    }

    if (roi < 0) {
      suggestions.push('🔴 Investimento in perdita — analizza i cost driver principali')
      suggestions.push('✂️ Identifica le voci di costo che puoi tagliare del 20% senza impatto su revenue')
      suggestions.push('💡 Esplora canali alternativi con CAC più basso')
    }

    if (suggestions.length === 0) {
      suggestions.push('✅ Performance nella media — ottimizza per raggiungere il prossimo tier')
      suggestions.push('📊 Monitora il trend settimanale: piccoli miglioramenti continui > grandi salti occasionali')
      suggestions.push('🎯 Focus su LTV: un cliente che riacquista 3x vale 3x il CAC originale')
    }

    return {
      input: {
        investment: `€${investment.toLocaleString('it-IT')}`,
        revenue:    `€${revenue.toLocaleString('it-IT')}`,
        context
      },
      results: {
        profit:        `€${profit.toLocaleString('it-IT')}`,
Continuo. 🔥

        roi:           `${roi.toFixed(2)}%`,
        roas:          `${roas.toFixed(2)}x`,
        profitMargin:  `${profitMargin.toFixed(2)}%`,
        breakeven:     `€${breakeven.toLocaleString('it-IT')}`,
        roiRating,
        roasRating
      },
      projections,
      suggestions,
      benchmarks: {
        ads: {
          googleAds:  'ROAS medio settore: 2-4x',
          metaAds:    'ROAS medio e-commerce: 3-5x',
          linkedInAds:'ROAS medio B2B: 2-3x (CAC più alto, LTV più alto)'
        },
        general: {
          goodRoi:      'ROI > 100% = ottimo per la maggior parte dei business',
          greatRoi:     'ROI > 300% = eccellente, valuta reinvestimento aggressivo',
          minimumViable:'ROI > 20% = minimo accettabile per business sostenibile'
        }
      },
      calculatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }

}

// ============================================
// TOOL REGISTRY — src/lib/ai/tool-registry.ts
// ============================================

export interface ToolDefinition {
  name:         string
  description:  string
  input_schema: {
    type:       string
    properties: Record<string, unknown>
    required:   string[]
  }
  execute(input: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<unknown>
}

import { searchWebTool }          from './tools/search-web'
import { getStockPriceTool }       from './tools/get-stock-price'
import { getCryptoPriceTool }      from './tools/get-crypto-price'
import { scrapeUrlTool }           from './tools/scrape-url'
import { analyzeCompetitorsTool }  from './tools/analyze-competitors'
import { generateSeoContentTool }  from './tools/generate-seo-content'
import { createBusinessPlanTool }  from './tools/create-business-plan'
import { calculateRoiTool }        from './tools/calculate-roi'

export const toolRegistry: Record<string, ToolDefinition> = {
  search_web:           searchWebTool,
  get_stock_price:      getStockPriceTool,
  get_crypto_price:     getCryptoPriceTool,
  scrape_url:           scrapeUrlTool,
  analyze_competitors:  analyzeCompetitorsTool,
  generate_seo_content: generateSeoContentTool,
  create_business_plan: createBusinessPlanTool,
  calculate_roi:        calculateRoiTool
}

export const toolDefinitions = Object.values(toolRegistry).map(tool => ({
  name:         tool.name,
  description:  tool.description,
  input_schema: tool.input_schema
}))

export async function executeTool(
  name:  string,
  input: Record<string, unknown>
): Promise<unknown> {
  const tool = toolRegistry[name]
  if (!tool) throw new Error(`Tool "${name}" non trovato nel registry`)
  return tool.execute(input)
}

// ============================================
// INDEX TOOLS — src/lib/ai/tools/index.ts
// ============================================

export { getStockPriceTool }       from './get-stock-price'
export { getCryptoPriceTool }      from './get-crypto-price'

export { analyzeCompetitorsTool }  from './analyze-competitors'
export { generateSeoContentTool }  from './generate-seo-content'
export { createBusinessPlanTool }  from './create-business-plan'
export { calculateRoiTool }        from './calculate-roi'

// ============================================
// AI ENGINE — src/lib/ai/engine.ts

import Anthropic                     from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'
import { toolDefinitions, executeTool } from './tool-registry'
import type { MessageParam }         from '@anthropic-ai/sdk/resources/messages'

const anthropic = new Anthropic({
  apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY!
})

export const LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `
Sei Lara AGENTE AI Aethersy — l'AI agent senior
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 15 — AI ENGINE CORE (continuazione)**

```typescript
di Aethersy-AI, la piattaforma per imprenditori con il motto "Sogna, Realizza, Guadagna."

HAI ACCESSO REALE A INTERNET E AI SEGUENTI STRUMENTI:
🔍 search_web → cerca notizie, prezzi, mercati, aziende, trend, statistiche, qualsiasi dato
📈 get_stock_price → prezzo live azioni (AAPL, ENI.MI, NVDA, qualsiasi simbolo)
🪙 get_crypto_price → prezzo live crypto (bitcoin, ethereum, solana...)
🌐 scrape_url → leggi/analizza qualsiasi sito web o competitor
🏆 analyze_competitors → analisi competitor dettagliata
✍️ generate_seo_content → crea contenuti SEO, articoli, post social
📋 create_business_plan → crea piani di business completi

REGOLE ASSOLUTE:
1. NON dire MAI "non posso cercare su internet" — HAI internet tramite search_web
2. NON dire MAI che hai un knowledge cutoff per dati che puoi cercare — CERCA E BASTA
3. Per qualsiasi dato di mercato, notizia, prezzo, statistica → USA search_web IMMEDIATAMENTE
4. Rispondi in italiano, tono professionale, diretto, concreto con dati reali
5. Per codice → scrivi codice completo e pronto all'uso
6. Sii PROATTIVO: se l'utente chiede "come va il mercato?" → cerca senza aspettare conferma
7. Dopo ogni ricerca → sintetizza i dati in modo actionable per l'imprenditore

SPECIALIZZAZIONI: business growth, digital marketing, finanza d'impresa, sviluppo software,
automazioni, e-commerce, lead generation, SEO, social media, fundraising.

FORMATO RISPOSTE:
- Usa emoji strategicamente per leggibilità
- Usa bullet points per liste actionable
- Usa **grassetto** per concetti chiave
- Concludi sempre con un'azione concreta che l'utente può fare OGGI
- Quando mostri dati finanziari → usa tabelle markdown
`

export interface StreamChunk {
  type:    'text' | 'tool_start' | 'tool_result' | 'error' | 'done'
  content: string
  tool?:   string
  data?:   unknown
}

export async function* runAgentStream(
  messages:     MessageParam[],
  systemPrompt: string = LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT
): AsyncGenerator<StreamChunk> {

  let currentMessages = [...messages]
  let iterations      = 0
  const MAX_ITERATIONS = 10

  while (iterations < MAX_ITERATIONS) {
    iterations++

    // Chiamata ad Anthropic con streaming
    const stream = await anthropic.messages.stream({
      model:      'claude-opus-4-5',
      max_tokens: 8096,
      system:     systemPrompt,
      tools:      toolDefinitions as Anthropic.Tool[],
      messages:   currentMessages
    })

    let fullText       = ''
    let toolUseBlocks: Anthropic.ToolUseBlock[] = []
    let stopReason:    string | null = null

    // Processa lo stream chunk per chunk
    for await (const event of stream) {

      if (event.type === 'content_block_delta') {
        if (event.delta.type === 'text_delta') {
          fullText += event.delta.text
          yield {
            type:    'text',
            content: event.delta.text
          }
        }
      }

      if (event.type === 'content_block_start') {
        if (event.content_block.type === 'tool_use') {
          yield {
            type:    'tool_start',
            content: `🔧 Uso tool: **${event.content_block.name}**...`,
            tool:    event.content_block.name
          }
        }
      }

      if (event.type === 'message_delta') {
        stopReason = event.delta.stop_reason ?? null
      }

      if (event.type === 'message_stop') {
        const finalMessage = await stream.finalMessage()
        toolUseBlocks = finalMessage.content.filter(
          (b): b is Anthropic.ToolUseBlock => b.type === 'tool_use'
        )
        stopReason = finalMessage.stop_reason
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 15 — AI ENGINE (tool execution + loop)**

```typescript
      }
    }

    // Se nessun tool da eseguire → fine conversazione
    if (stopReason === 'end_turn' || toolUseBlocks.length === 0) {
      yield { type: 'done', content: '' }
      return
    }

    // Esegui tutti i tool calls in parallelo
    if (stopReason === 'tool_use' && toolUseBlocks.length > 0) {

      // Aggiungi la risposta dell'assistente ai messaggi
      const finalMessage = await (async () => {
        const content: Anthropic.ContentBlock[] = []
        if (fullText) {
          content.push({ type: 'text', text: fullText })
        }
        for (const block of toolUseBlocks) {
          content.push(block)
        }
        return content
      })()

      currentMessages.push({
        role:    'assistant',
        content: finalMessage
      })

      // Esegui tool in parallelo
      const toolResults = await Promise.allSettled(
        toolUseBlocks.map(async toolBlock => {
          try {
            const result = await executeTool(
              toolBlock.name,
              toolBlock.input as Record<string, unknown>
            )

            yield {
              type:    'tool_result',
              content: `✅ **${toolBlock.name}** completato`,
              tool:    toolBlock.name,
              data:    result
            }

            return {
              type:        'tool_result' as const,
              tool_use_id: toolBlock.id,
              content:     JSON.stringify(result)
            }

          } catch (error) {
            const errMsg = error instanceof Error
              ? error.message
              : 'Errore sconosciuto'

            yield {
              type:    'error',
              content: `❌ Errore tool **${toolBlock.name}**: ${errMsg}`,
              tool:    toolBlock.name
            }

            return {
              type:        'tool_result' as const,
              tool_use_id: toolBlock.id,
              content:     JSON.stringify({ error: errMsg }),
              is_error:    true
            }
          }
        })
      )

      // Raccogli risultati tool
      const toolResultContents = toolResults
        .filter((r): r is PromiseFulfilledResult<{
          type:        'tool_result'
          tool_use_id: string
          content:     string
          is_error?:   boolean
        }> => r.status === 'fulfilled')
        .map(r => r.value)

      // Aggiungi risultati tool ai messaggi
      currentMessages.push({
        role:    'user',
        content: toolResultContents
      })

      // Continua il loop per ottenere la risposta finale
      continue
    }

    // Stop reason inatteso → esci
    yield { type: 'done', content: '' }
    return
  }

  // Max iterations raggiunto
  yield {
    type:    'error',
    content: '⚠️ Numero massimo di iterazioni raggiunto. Riprova con una domanda più specifica.'
  }
  yield { type: 'done', content: '' }
}

// ============================================
// HELPER: converti history DB → MessageParam
// ============================================

export function dbMessagesToParams(
  messages: Array<{
    role:    string
    content: string
  }>
): MessageParam[] {
  return messages
    .filter(m => m.role === 'user' || m.role === 'assistant')
    .map(m => ({
      role:    m.role as 'user' | 'assistant',
      content: m.content
    }))
}

// ============================================
// HELPER: estrai testo finale da stream
// ============================================

export async function runAgentOnce(
  userMessage: string,
  history:     MessageParam[] = []
): Promise<string> {
  const messages: MessageParam[] = [
    ...history,
    { role: 'user', content: userMessage }
  ]

  let fullResponse = ''

  for await (const chunk of runAgentStream(messages)) {
    if (chunk.type === 'text') {
      fullResponse += chunk.content
    }
  }

  return fullResponse
}
```

**PACCHETTO 16 — API ROUTE STREAMING (completo)**

```typescript
import { NextRequest }               from 'next/server'
import { auth }                      from '@clerk/nextjs/server'
import { db }                        from '@/lib/db'
import { messages, conversations }   from '@/lib/db/schema'
import { eq, asc }                   from 'drizzle-orm'
import { runAgentStream, dbMessagesToParams } from '@/lib/ai/engine'
import { nanoid }                    from 'nanoid'

export const runtime  = 'nodejs'
export const maxDuration = 60

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    // 1. Auth check
    const { userId } = await auth()
    if (!userId) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Non autorizzato' }),
        { status: 401, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    // 2. Parse body
    const body = await req.json()
    const {
      message,
      conversationId: existingConvId
    } = body as {
      message:          string
      conversationId?:  string
    }

    if (!message?.trim()) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Messaggio vuoto' }),
        { status: 400, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    // 3. Trova o crea conversazione
    let conversationId = existingConvId

    if (!conversationId) {
      const newConvId = nanoid()
      await db.insert(conversations).values({
        id:        newConvId,
        userId,
        title:     message.slice(0, 60) + (message.length > 60 ? '...' : ''),
        createdAt: new Date(),
        updatedAt: new Date()
      })
      conversationId = newConvId
    } else {
      // Verifica ownership
      const conv = await db.query.conversations.findFirst({
        where: eq(conversations.id, conversationId)
      })
      if (!conv || conv.userId !== userId) {
        return new Response(
          JSON.stringify({ error: 'Conversazione non trovata' }),
          { status: 404, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
        )
      }
      // Aggiorna updatedAt
      await db
        .update(conversations)
        .set({ updatedAt: new Date() })
        .where(eq(conversations.id, conversationId))
    }

    // 4. Salva messaggio utente nel DB
    const userMessageId = nanoid()
    await db.insert(messages).values({
      id:             userMessageId,
      conversationId,
      role:           'user',
      content:        message,
      createdAt:      new Date()
    })

    // 5. Carica history conversazione
    const history = await db.query.messages.findMany({
      where:   eq(messages.conversationId, conversationId),
      orderBy: [asc(messages.createdAt)]
    })

    const messageParams = dbMessagesToParams(
      history.filter(m => m.id !== userMessageId)
    )
    messageParams.push({ role: 'user', content: message })

    // 6. Crea SSE stream
    const encoder = new TextEncoder()
    let   assistantFullText = ''
    const assistantMessageId = nanoid()

    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        try {
          for await (const chunk of runAgentStream(messageParams)) {

            // Accumula testo per salvataggio DB
            if (chunk.type === 'text') {
              assistantFullText += chunk.content
            }

            // Invia chunk al client via SSE
            const sseData = JSON.stringify({
              type:    chunk.type,
              content: chunk.content,
              tool:    chunk.tool    ?? null,
              convId:  conversationId
            })

            controller.enqueue(
              encoder.encode(`data: ${sseData}\n\n`)
            )

            // Al completamento → salva risposta assistente
            if (chunk.type === 'done') {
              if (assistantFullText) {
                await db.insert(messages).values({
                  id:             assistantMessageId,
                  conversationId,
                  role:
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 16 — API ROUTE (fine) + GET history + DELETE**

```typescript
            // Su errore → logga ma non bloccare lo stream
            if (chunk.type === 'error') {
              console.error('[AI Engine Error]', chunk.content)
            }
          }
        } catch (streamError) {
          console.error('[Stream Error]', streamError)

          const errData = JSON.stringify({
            type:    'error',
            content: '❌ Errore interno del server. Riprova tra qualche secondo.',
            convId:  conversationId
          })
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${errData}\n\n`))

          const doneData = JSON.stringify({ type: 'done', content: '' })
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${doneData}\n\n`))
          controller.close()
        }
      }
    })

    return new Response(stream, {
      headers: {
        'Content-Type':                'text/event-stream',
        'Cache-Control':               'no-cache, no-transform',
        'Connection':                  'keep-alive',
        'X-Conversation-Id':           conversationId,
        'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
      }
    })

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[Chat API Error]', error)
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Errore interno del server' }),
      { status: 500, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// GET — Carica history di una conversazione
// ============================================

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { userId } = await auth()
    if (!userId) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Non autorizzato' }),
        { status: 401, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url)
    const conversationId   = searchParams.get('conversationId')

    if (!conversationId) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'conversationId richiesto' }),
        { status: 400, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    // Verifica ownership
    const conv = await db.query.conversations.findFirst({
      where: eq(conversations.id, conversationId)
    })

    if (!conv || conv.userId !== userId) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Conversazione non trovata' }),
        { status: 404, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    // Carica messaggi
    const history = await db.query.messages.findMany({
      where:   eq(messages.conversationId, conversationId),
      orderBy: [asc(messages.createdAt)]
    })

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        conversationId,
        title:    conv.title,
        messages: history.map(m => ({
          id:        m.id,
          role:      m.role,
          content:   m.content,
          createdAt: m.createdAt
        }))
      }),
      {
        status:  200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
      }
    )

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[GET Chat Error]', error)
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Errore interno del server' }),
      { status: 500, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
    )
  }
}

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Non autorizzato' }),
        { status: 401, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url)
    const conversationId   = searchParams.get('conversationId')

    if (!conversationId) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'conversationId richiesto' }),
        { status: 400, headers
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 16 — DELETE (fine) + PACCHETTO 17 — CONVERSATIONS API**

```typescript
      where: eq(conversations.id, conversationId)
    })

    if (!conv || conv.userId !== userId) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Conversazione non trovata' }),
        { status: 404, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    // Elimina messaggi prima (FK constraint)
    await db
      .delete(messages)
      .where(eq(messages.conversationId, conversationId))

    // Elimina conversazione
    await db
      .delete(conversations)
      .where(eq(conversations.id, conversationId))

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ success: true, deleted: conversationId }),
      {
        status:  200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
      }
    )

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[DELETE Chat Error]', error)
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Errore interno del server' }),
      { status: 500, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 17 — CONVERSATIONS LIST API
// src/app/api/conversations/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest }             from 'next/server'
import { auth }                    from '@clerk/nextjs/server'
import { db }                      from '@/lib/db'
import { conversations, messages } from '@/lib/db/schema'
import { eq, desc, count }         from 'drizzle-orm'

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { userId } = await auth()
    if (!userId) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Non autorizzato' }),
        { status: 401, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url)
    const limit  = parseInt(searchParams.get('limit')  ?? '20')
    const offset = parseInt(searchParams.get('offset') ?? '0')

    // Carica conversazioni con count messaggi
    const userConversations = await db
      .select({
        id:           conversations.id,
        title:        conversations.title,
        createdAt:    conversations.createdAt,
        updatedAt:    conversations.updatedAt,
        messageCount: count(messages.id)
      })
      .from(conversations)
      .leftJoin(messages, eq(messages.conversationId, conversations.id))
      .where(eq(conversations.userId, userId))
      .groupBy(conversations.id)
      .orderBy(desc(conversations.updatedAt))
      .limit(limit)
      .offset(offset)

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        conversations: userConversations,
        limit,
        offset,
        hasMore: userConversations.length === limit
      }),
      {
        status:  200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
      }
    )

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[Conversations GET Error]', error)
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Errore interno del server' }),
      { status: 500, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// PATCH — Rinomina conversazione
// ============================================

export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { userId } = await auth()
    if (!userId) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Non autorizzato' }),
        { status: 401, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    const body = await req.json()
    const { conversationId, title } = body as {
      conversationId: string
      title:          string
    }

    if (!conversationId || !title?.trim()) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'conversationId e title richiesti' }),
        { status: 400, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    // Verifica ownership
    const conv = await db.query.conversations.findFirst({
      where:
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 17 — PATCH (fine) + PACCHETTO 18 — DB SCHEMA + CLIENT**

```typescript
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Conversazione non trovata' }),
        { status: 404, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    await db
      .update(conversations)
      .set({
        title:     title.trim().slice(0, 100),
        updatedAt: new Date()
      })
      .where(eq(conversations.id, conversationId))

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ success: true, conversationId, title }),
      {
        status:  200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
      }
    )

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[Conversations PATCH Error]', error)
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Errore interno del server' }),
      { status: 500, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 18 — DB SCHEMA
// src/lib/db/schema.ts
// ============================================

import {
  pgTable,
  text,
  timestamp,
  varchar,
  index
} from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core'

// ─── Conversazioni ───────────────────────────
export const conversations = pgTable(
  'conversations',
  {
    id:        varchar('id', { length: 21 }).primaryKey(),
    userId:    varchar('user_id', { length: 256 }).notNull(),
    title:     varchar('title',   { length: 100 }).notNull().default('Nuova conversazione'),
    createdAt: timestamp('created_at').notNull().defaultNow(),
    updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at').notNull().defaultNow()
  },
  table => ({
    userIdIdx:   index('conv_user_id_idx').on(table.userId),
    updatedAtIdx: index('conv_updated_at_idx').on(table.updatedAt)
  })
)

// ─── Messaggi ────────────────────────────────
export const messages = pgTable(
  'messages',
  {
    id:             varchar('id', { length: 21 }).primaryKey(),
    conversationId: varchar('conversation_id', { length: 21 })
                      .notNull()
                      .references(() => conversations.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
    role:           varchar('role', { length: 20 })
                      .notNull()
                      .$type<'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'>(),
    content:        text('content').notNull(),
    createdAt:      timestamp('created_at').notNull().defaultNow()
  },
  table => ({
    convIdIdx:   index('msg_conv_id_idx').on(table.conversationId),
    createdAtIdx: index('msg_created_at_idx').on(table.createdAt)
  })
)

// ─── Tipi inferiti ───────────────────────────
export type Conversation    = typeof conversations.$inferSelect
export type NewConversation = typeof conversations.$inferInsert
export type Message         = typeof messages.$inferSelect
export type NewMessage      = typeof messages.$inferInsert

const sql = neon(process.env.DATABASE_URL!)

export const db = drizzle(sql, { schema })

export type DB = typeof db

  dbCredentials: {
    url: process.env.DATABASE_URL!
  },
  verbose:   true,
  strict:    true

dotenv.config({ path: '.env.local' })

async function runMigrations() {
  console.log('🔄 Avvio migrazioni database...')

  const sql = neon(process.env.DATABASE_URL!)
  const db  = drizzle(sql)

  try {
    await migrate(db, { migrationsFolder: './drizzle' })
    console.log('✅ Migrazioni completate con successo!')
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('❌ Errore durante le migrazioni:', error)
    process.exit(1)
  }
}
