// PACCHETTO 19 — CHAT STORE
// src/store/chatStore.ts
// ============================================

import { create }     from 'zustand'
import { persist }    from 'zustand/middleware'
import { immer }      from 'zustand/middleware/immer'

// ─── Tipi ────────────────────────────────────
export interface ChatMessage {
  id:        string
  role:      'user' | 'assistant'
  content:   string
  createdAt: Date
  isStreaming?: boolean
  toolsUsed?:  string[]
}

export interface Conversation {
  id:           string
  title:        string
  messages:     ChatMessage[]
  createdAt:    Date
  updatedAt:    Date
  messageCount: number
}

interface ChatState {
  // State
  conversations:       Conversation[]
  activeConversationId: string | null
  isLoading:           boolean
  isStreaming:         boolean
  error:               string | null
  sidebarOpen:         boolean

  // Getters
  activeConversation:  () => Conversation | null
  activeMessages:      () => ChatMessage[]

  // Actions
  setActiveConversation:  (id: string | null) => void
  createConversation:     (id: string, title: string) => void
  addMessage:             (convId: string, message: ChatMessage) => void
  updateLastMessage:      (convId: string, content: string, append?: boolean) => void
  finalizeStreamMessage:  (convId: string, toolsUsed: string[]) => void
  setConversations:       (convs: Conversation[]) => void
  removeConversation:     (id: string) => void
  renameConversation:     (id: string, title: string) => void
  setLoading:             (v: boolean) => void
  setStreaming:           (v: boolean) => void
  setError:               (e: string | null) => void
  toggleSidebar:          () => void
  clearError:             () => void
}

// ─── Store ───────────────────────────────────
export const useChatStore = create<ChatState>()(
  persist(
    immer((set, get) => ({

      // ── Stato iniziale ──
      conversations:        [],
      activeConversationId: null,
      isLoading:            false,
      isStreaming:          false,
      error:                null,
      sidebarOpen:          true,

      // ── Getters ──
      activeConversation: () => {
        const { conversations, activeConversationId } = get()
        return conversations.find(c => c.id === activeConversationId) ?? null
      },

      activeMessages: () => {
        const conv = get().activeConversation()
        return conv?.messages ?? []
      },

      // ── Actions ──
      setActiveConversation: (id) => set(state => {
        state.activeConversationId = id
      }),

      createConversation: (id, title) => set(state => {
        const exists = state.conversations.find(c => c.id === id)
        if (!exists) {
          state.conversations.unshift({
            id,
            title,
            messages:     [],
            createdAt:    new Date(),
            updatedAt:    new Date(),
            messageCount: 0
          })
        }
        state.activeConversationId = id
      }),

      addMessage: (convId, message) => set(state => {
        const conv = state.conversations.find(c => c.id === convId)
        if (conv) {
          conv.messages.push(message)
          conv.messageCount = conv.messages.length
          conv.updatedAt    = new Date()
        }
      }),

      updateLastMessage: (convId, content, append = true) => set(state => {
        const conv = state.conversatio
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 19 — CHAT STORE (fine) + PACCHETTO 20 — useChat HOOK**

```typescript
        const conv = state.conversations.find(c => c.id === convId)
        if (conv && conv.messages.length > 0) {
          const last = conv.messages[conv.messages.length - 1]
          if (last.role === 'assistant') {
            last.content     = append ? last.content + content : content
            last.isStreaming = true
          }
        }
      }),

      finalizeStreamMessage: (convId, toolsUsed) => set(state => {
        const conv = state.conversations.find(c => c.id === convId)
        if (conv && conv.messages.length > 0) {
          const last = conv.messages[conv.messages.length - 1]
          if (last.role === 'assistant') {
            last.isStreaming = false
            last.toolsUsed   = toolsUsed
          }
        }
      }),

      setConversations: (convs) => set(state => {
        // Merge: mantieni messaggi locali già caricati
        const existing = new Map(state.conversations.map(c => [c.id, c]))
        state.conversations = convs.map(c => ({
          ...c,
          messages: existing.get(c.id)?.messages ?? []
        }))
      }),

      removeConversation: (id) => set(state => {
        state.conversations = state.conversations.filter(c => c.id !== id)
        if (state.activeConversationId === id) {
          state.activeConversationId =
            state.conversations[0]?.id ?? null
        }
      }),

      renameConversation: (id, title) => set(state => {
        const conv = state.conversations.find(c => c.id === id)
        if (conv) conv.title = title
      }),

      setLoading:  (v) => set(state => { state.isLoading  = v }),
      setStreaming: (v) => set(state => { state.isStreaming = v }),
      setError:    (e) => set(state => { state.error       = e }),
      clearError:  ()  => set(state => { state.error       = null }),
      toggleSidebar:   ()  => set(state => { state.sidebarOpen = !state.sidebarOpen })
    })),
    {
      name:    'aethersy-chat-store',
      partialize: (state) => ({
        // Persisti solo conversazioni e sidebar state
        // NON persistere isLoading/isStreaming
        conversations:        state.conversations.map(c => ({
          ...c,
          // Limita messaggi persistiti agli ultimi 50 per conv
          messages: c.messages.slice(-50)
        })),
        activeConversationId: state.activeConversationId,
        sidebarOpen:          state.sidebarOpen
      })
    }
  )
)

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 20 — useChat HOOK
// src/hooks/useChat.ts
// ============================================

import { useCallback, useRef }  from 'react'
import { nanoid }               from 'nanoid'
import { useChatStore }         from '@/store/chatStore'
import type { ChatMessage }     from '@/store/chatStore'

interface SendMessageOptions {
  message:         string
  conversationId?: string
}

interface UseChatReturn {
  sendMessage:    (opts: SendMessageOptions) => Promise<void>
  isStreaming:    boolean
  isLoading:      boolean
  error:          string | null
  clearError:     () => void
  stopGeneration: () => void
}

export function useChat(): UseChatReturn {
  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController | null>(null)

  const {
    addMessage,
    updateLastMessage,
    finalizeStreamMessage,
    createConversation,
    setActiveConversation,
    setLoading,
    setStreaming,
    setError,
    clearError,
    activeConversationId
  } = useChatStore()

  const stopGeneration = useCallback(() => {
    abortRef.current?.abort()
  }, [])

  const sendMessage = useCallback(async ({
    message,
    conversationId: passedConvId
  }: SendMessageOptions) => {

    if (!message.trim()) return

    // Cancella eventuale stream precedente
    abortRef.current?.abort()
    abortRef.current = new AbortController()

    const convId    = passedConvId ?? activeConversationId ?? undefined
    const toolsUsed: string[] = []

    setLo
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 20 — useChat HOOK (fine) + PACCHETTO 21 — SIDEBAR COMPONENT**

```typescript
    setLoading(true)
    setError(null)

    // Messaggio utente ottimistico
    const userMsg: ChatMessage = {
      id:        nanoid(),
      role:      'user',
      content:   message,
      createdAt: new Date()
    }

    // Placeholder assistente (streaming)
    const assistantMsg: ChatMessage = {
      id:          nanoid(),
      role:        'assistant',
      content:     '',
      createdAt:   new Date(),
      isStreaming: true
    }

    try {
      const res = await fetch('/api/chat', {
        method:  'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body:    JSON.stringify({ message, conversationId: convId }),
        signal:  abortRef.current.signal
      })

      if (!res.ok) {
        const err = await res.json()
        throw new Error(err.error ?? 'Errore API')
      }

      // Leggi conversationId dall'header
      const newConvId = res.headers.get('X-Conversation-Id') ?? nanoid()

      // Crea/aggiorna conversazione nello store
      createConversation(newConvId, message.slice(0, 60))
      addMessage(newConvId, userMsg)
      addMessage(newConvId, assistantMsg)
      setLoading(false)
      setStreaming(true)

      // Leggi SSE stream
      const reader  = res.body!.getReader()
      const decoder = new TextDecoder()
      let   buffer  = ''

      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read()
        if (done) break

        buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
        const lines = buffer.split('\n')
        buffer = lines.pop() ?? ''

        for (const line of lines) {
          if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue

          try {
            const data = JSON.parse(line.slice(6)) as {
              type:    string
              content: string
              tool?:   string
              convId?: string
            }

            switch (data.type) {
              case 'text':
                updateLastMessage(newConvId, data.content, true)
                break

              case 'tool_start':
                if (data.tool) toolsUsed.push(data.tool)
                updateLastMessage(
                  newConvId,
                  `\n\n🔧 *Uso tool: ${data.tool}...*\n`,
                  true
                )
                break

              case 'tool_result':
                // Tool result già incluso nel testo finale
                break

              case 'done':
                finalizeStreamMessage(newConvId, toolsUsed)
                setStreaming(false)
                break

              case 'error':
                setError(data.content)
                finalizeStreamMessage(newConvId, toolsUsed)
                setStreaming(false)
                break
            }
          } catch {
            // JSON parse error — ignora chunk malformato
          }
        }
      }

    } catch (err: unknown) {
      if ((err as Error).name === 'AbortError') {
        finalizeStreamMessage(convId ?? '', toolsUsed)
        setStreaming(false)
      } else {
        setError((err as Error).message ?? 'Errore sconosciuto')
        setStreaming(false)
      }
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }

  }, [activeConversationId])

  return {
    sendMessage,
    isStreaming: useChatStore(s => s.isStreaming),
    isLoading:   useChatStore(s => s.isLoading),
    error:       useChatStore(s => s.error),
    clearError,
    stopGeneration
  }
}

import {
  PlusIcon,
  TrashIcon,
  PencilIcon,
  CheckIcon,
  XMarkIcon,
  ChevronLeftIcon,
  ChevronRightIcon,
  ChatBubbleLeftRightIcon
} from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns'
import { it }                  from 'date-fns/locale'
import { cn }                  from '@/lib/utils'

export function Sidebar() {
  const router = useRouter()

  const {
    conversations,
    activeConversationId,
    sidebarOpen,
    setActiveConversation,
    setConversations,
    removeConversation,
    renameConversation,
    toggleSidebar,
    createConversation
  } = useChatStore()

  const [editingId, setEditingId]   = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [editTitle, setEditTitle]   = useState('')
  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null)

  // Carica lista conversazioni da API
  useEffect(() => {
    async function loadConversations() {
      try {
        const res  = await fetch('/api/conversations')
        if (!res.ok) return
        const data = await res.json()
        setConversations(data.conversations)
      } catch {
        console.error('Errore caricamento conversazioni')
      }
    }
    loadConversations()
  }, [])

  const handleNewChat = useCallback(() => {
    setActiveConversation(null)
    router.push('/chat')
  }, [])

  const handleSelectConv = useCallback(async (id: string) => {
    setActiveConversation(id)

    // Carica messaggi se non già in store
    const store = useChatStore.getState()
    const conv  = store.conversations.find(c => c.id === id)
    if (conv && conv.messages.length === 0) {
      try {
        const res  = await fetch(`/api/chat?conversationId=${id}`)
        if (!res.ok) return
        const data = await res.json()
        data.messages.forEach((m: any) => {
          useChatStore.getState().addMessage(id, {
            id:        m.id,
            role:      m.role,
            content:   m.content,
            createdAt: new Date(m.createdAt)
          })
        })
      } catch {
        console.error('Errore caricamento messaggi')
      }
    }
  }, [])

  const handleDelete = useCallback(async (id: string) => {
    if (deletingId !== id) {
      setDeletingId(id)
      return
    }
    try {
      await fetch(`/api/chat?conversationId=${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
      removeConversation(id)
    } catch {
      console.error('Errore eliminazione')
    } finally {
      setDeletingId(null)
    }
  }, [deletingId])

  const handleRename = useCallback(async (id: string) => {
    if (!editTitle.trim()) return
    try {
      await fetch('/api/conversations', {
        method:  'PATCH',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body:    JSON.stringify({ conversationId: id, title: editTitle })
      })
      renameConversation(id, editTitle)
    } catch {
      console.error('Errore rinomina')
    } finally {
      setEditingId(null)
      setEditTitle('')
    }
  }, [editTitle])

  return (
    <aside className={cn(
      'flex flex-col h-full bg-[#0A0A0A] border-r border-white/5',
      'transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out',
      sidebarOpen ? 'w-72' : 'w-16'
    )}>

      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/5">
        {sidebarOpen && (
          <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-white/80 tracking-wide">
            Conversazioni
          </span>
        )}
        <button
          onClick={toggleSidebar}
          className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/10 text-white/50
                     hover:text-white transition-colors ml-

**PACCHETTO 21 — SIDEBAR (fine completo) + PACCHETTO 22 — CHAT MESSAGES**

```tsx

                      <div className={cn(
                        'flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100',
                        'transition-opacity duration-150'
                      )}>
                        <button
                          onClick={e => {
                            e.stopPropagation()

                          }}

                            isDelConf

                </>

        <div className="p-4 border-t border-white/5">
          <p className="text-[10px] text-white/20 text-center tracking-widest uppercase">
            Aethersy AI · v1.0
          </p>
        </div>
      )}
    </aside>
  )
}

'use client'

import { useEffect, useRef, memo }  from 'react'
import ReactMarkdown                from 'react-markdown'

// ─── Typing Indicator ────────────────────────
function TypingIndicator() {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 px-1 py-2">
      {[0, 1, 2].map(i => (
        <span
          key={i}
          className="w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-violet-400 rounded-full animate-bounce"
          style={{ animationDelay: `${i * 150}ms` }}
        />
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

// ─── Tool Badge ──────────────────────────────

    create_business_plan:'📋 Business Plan',
    calculate_roi:       '💰 ROI Calculator'
  }
  return (
    <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full

// ─── Copy Button ─────────────────────────────
function CopyButton({ text }: { text: string }) {
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false)

  const handleCopy = useCallback(async () => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text)
    setCopied(true)
    setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000)
  }, [text])

  return (
    <button
      onClick={handleCopy}
      className="p-1.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/10 text-white/40
                 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      title="Copia messaggio"
    >
      {copied
        ? <CheckIcon           className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-green-400" />
        : <ClipboardDocumentIcon className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
      }
    </button>
  )
}

// ─── Single Message ───────────────────────────
const Message = memo(function Message({ msg }: { msg: ChatMessage }) {
  const isUser = msg.role === 'user'

  return (
    <div className={cn(
      'group flex gap-3 px-4 py-3',
      isUser ? 'flex-row-reverse' : 'flex-row'
    )}>

      {/* Avatar */}
      <div className={cn(
        'flex-shrink-0 w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm',
        isUser
          ? 'bg-violet-600 text-white'
          : 'bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-500 to-purple-700 text-white'
      )}>
        {isUser
          ? <UserCircleIcon className="w-5 h-5" />
          : <span className="font-bold text-xs">L</span>
        }
      </div>

      {/* Bubble */}
      <div className={cn(
        'flex flex-col gap-1 max-w-[75%]',
        isUser ? 'items-end' : 'items-start'
      )}>

        {/* Tools Used */}
        {!isUser && msg.toolsUsed && msg.toolsUsed.length > 0 && (
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1 mb-1">
            {msg.toolsUsed.map(t => <ToolBadge key={t} tool={t} />)}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Content */}
        <div className={cn(
          'rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed',
          isUser
            ? 'bg-violet-600 text-white rounded-tr-sm'
            : 'bg-white/5 text-white/90 rounded-tl-sm border border-white/8'
        )}>
          {isUser ? (
            <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap">{msg.content}</p>
          ) : msg.isStreaming && msg.content === '' ? (
            <TypingIndicator />
          ) : (
            <ReactMarkdown
              remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}
              components={{
                code({ node, inline, className, children, ...props }: any) {
                  const match = /language-(\w+)/.exec(className || '')
                  return !inline && match ? (
                    <div className="my-2 rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between
                                      bg-[#1a1a2e] px-4 py-2 text-xs text-white/50">
                        <span>{match[1]}</span>
                        <CopyButton text={String(children)} />
                      </div>
                      <SyntaxHighlighter
                        style={oneDark}
                        language={match[1]}
                        PreTag="div"
                        customStyle={{
                          margin:     0,
                          borderRadius: 0,
                          background: '#0d0d1a',
                          fontSize:   '0.8rem'
                        }}
                        {...props}
                      >
                        {String(children).replace(/\n$/, '')}
                      </SyntaxHighlighter>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <code
                      className="bg-white/10 rounded px-1.5 py-0.5
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 22 — CHAT MESSAGES (fine completo) + PACCHETTO 23 — CHAT INPUT**

```tsx
                      className="bg-white/10 rounded px-1.5 py-0.5

                // Tabelle GFM
                table({ children }) {

                    <div className="overflow-x-auto my-3">
                      <table className="w-full text-xs border-collapse">
                        {children}

                    <th className="border border-white/10 px-3 py-2

                    <td className="border border-white/10 px-3 py-2 text-white/60">
                      {children}

                a({ href, children }) {
                  return (

                      {children}
                    </blockquote>
                  )
                },
                // Strong
                strong({ children }) {
                  return (
                    <strong className="text-white font-semibold">
                      {children}
                    </strong>
                  )
                },
                // Heading
                h1: ({ children }) => <h1 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mt-4 mb-2">{children}</h1>,
                h2: ({ children }) => <h2 className="text-base font-bold text-white mt-3 mb-1">{children}</h2>,
                h3: ({ children }) => <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white/90 mt-2 mb-1">{children}</h3>,
                // Lists
                ul: ({ children }) => <ul className="list-disc list-inside space-y-1 my-2 text-white/80">{children}</ul>,
                ol: ({ children }) => <ol className="list-decimal list-inside space-y-1 my-2 text-white/80">{children}</ol>,
                li: ({ children }) => <li className="text-sm">{children}</li>,
                // Paragraph
                p:  ({ children }) => <p className="mb-2 last:mb-0 text-white/85">{children}</p>,
                // HR
                hr: () => <hr className="border-white/10 my-4" />
              }}
            >
              {msg.content}
            </ReactMarkdown>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Footer: timestamp + copy */}
        <div className={cn(
          'flex items-center gap-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100',
          'transition-opacity duration-150',
          isUser ? 'flex-row-reverse' : 'flex-row'
        )}>
          <span className="text-[10px] text-white/25">
            {format(new Date(msg.createdAt), 'HH:mm', { locale: it })}
          </span>
          {!isUser && <CopyButton text={msg.content} />}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
})

// ─── Suggested Prompt (inner component) ──────
function SuggestedPrompt({ icon, text }: { icon: string; text: string }) {
  const { sendMessage } = useChat()

  return (
    <button
      onClick={() => sendMessage(text)}
      className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl border border-white/8
                 bg-white/3 hover:bg-white/8 hover:border-violet-500/30
                 text-left transition-all duration-200 group"
    >
      <span className="text-lg flex-shrink-0">{icon}</span>
      <span className="text-xs text-white/60 group-hover:text-white/80
                       transition-colors leading-relaxed">
        {text}
      </span>
    </button>
  )
}

'use client'

import {
  useState,
  useRef,
  useCallback,
  useEffect,
  KeyboardEvent
} from 'react'
import { useChat }       from '@/hooks/useChat'
import { useChatStore }  from '@/store/chatStore'
import {
  PaperAirplaneIcon,
  StopIcon,
  MicrophoneIcon
} from '@heroicons/react/24/solid'
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils'

// Tool suggestions
const TOOL_HINTS = [
  { icon: '🔍', label: 'Cerca su web',       placeholder: 'Cerca notizie su...'           },
  { icon: '📈', label: 'Prezzo azione',       placeholder: 'Prezzo di AAPL oggi...'        },
  { icon: '🪙', label: 'Prezzo crypto',       placeholder: 'Quanto vale Bitcoin...'        },
  { icon: '🏆', label: 'Analisi competitor',  placeholder: 'Analizza competitor
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 23 — CHAT INPUT (fine completo) + PACCHETTO 24 — useChat HOOK**

```tsx
  { icon: '🏆', label: 'Analisi competitor',  placeholder: 'Analizza competitor di...'     },
  { icon: '📋', label: 'Business plan',        placeholder: 'Crea un business plan per...' },
  { icon: '💰', label: 'Calcola ROI',          placeholder: 'Calcola ROI di...'            },
  { icon: '✍️', label: 'Contenuto SEO',        placeholder: 'Scrivi articolo su...'        },
]

export function ChatInput() {
  const [input, setInput]           = useState('')
  const [hintIndex, setHintIndex]   = useState(0)
  const [isFocused, setIsFocused]   = useState(false)
  const textareaRef                 = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null)

  const isStreaming = useChatStore(s => s.isStreaming)
  const { sendMessage, stopStreaming } = useChat()

  // Rotate placeholder hints
  useEffect(() => {
    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      setHintIndex(i => (i + 1) % TOOL_HINTS.length)
    }, 3000)
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [])

  // Auto-resize textarea
  useEffect(() => {
    const ta = textareaRef.current
    if (!ta) return
    ta.style.height = 'auto'
    ta.style.height = Math.min(ta.scrollHeight, 200) + 'px'
  }, [input])

  // Focus on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    textareaRef.current?.focus()
  }, [])

  const handleSend = useCallback(() => {
    const trimmed = input.trim()
    if (!trimmed || isStreaming) return
    sendMessage(trimmed)
    setInput('')
    if (textareaRef.current) {
      textareaRef.current.style.height = 'auto'
    }
  }, [input, isStreaming, sendMessage])

  const handleKeyDown = useCallback((e: KeyboardEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault()
      handleSend()
    }
  }, [handleSend])

  const handleToolHint = useCallback((hint: typeof TOOL_HINTS[0]) => {
    setInput(hint.placeholder)
    textareaRef.current?.focus()
  }, [])

  const charCount   = input.length
  const isOverLimit = charCount > 4000
  const canSend     = input.trim().length > 0 && !isStreaming && !isOverLimit

  return (
    <div className="border-t border-white/5 bg-[#0A0A0A] px-4 py-4">
      <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto space-y-3">

        {/* Tool Hint Pills */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 overflow-x-auto
                        scrollbar-none pb-1 -mx-1 px-1">
          {TOOL_HINTS.map((hint, i) => (
            <button
              key={hint.label}
              onClick={() => handleToolHint(hint)}
              className={cn(
                'flex-shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5',
                'rounded-full text-xs font-medium border transition-all duration-200',
                i === hintIndex && !input
                  ? 'bg-violet-500/20 border-violet-500/50 text-violet-300'
                  : 'bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white/40 hover:border-white/20 hover:text-white/70'
              )}
            >
              <span>{hint.icon}</span>
              <span>{hint.label}</span>
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Input Box */}
        <div className={cn(
          'relative flex items-end gap-3 rounded-2xl border px-4 py-3',
          'bg-white/5 transition-all duration-200',
          isFocused
            ? 'border-violet-500/50 shadow-lg shadow-violet-500/10'
            : 'border-white/10',
          isOverLimit && 'border-red-500/50'
        )}>

          {/* Textarea */}
          <textarea
            ref={textareaRef}
            value={input}
            onChange
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 23 — CHAT INPUT (fine) + PACCHETTO 24 — useChat HOOK**

```tsx
            onChange={e => setInput(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
            onFocus={() => setIsFocused(true)}
            onBlur={() => setIsFocused(false)}
            placeholder={TOOL_HINTS[hintIndex].placeholder}
            rows={1}
            disabled={isStreaming}
            className={cn(
              'flex-1 bg-transparent text-white text-sm leading-relaxed',
              'placeholder:text-white/25 resize-none outline-none',
              'min-h-[24px] max-h-[200px] py-0.5',
              'scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-white/10',
              isStreaming && 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed'
            )}
          />

          {/* Right Actions */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-shrink-0">
            {/* Char counter */}
            {input.length > 500 && (
              <span className={cn(
                'text-[10px] font-mono',
                isOverLimit ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-white/30'
              )}>
                {charCount}/4000
              </span>
            )}

            {/* Mic button (placeholder) */}
            <button
              className="p-1.5 rounded-lg text-white/25 hover:text-white/50
                         transition-colors"
              title="Vocale (coming soon)"
            >
              <MicrophoneIcon className="w-4 h-4" />
            </button>

            {/* Send / Stop */}
            {isStreaming ? (
              <button
                onClick={stopStreaming}
                className="p-2 rounded-xl bg-red-500/20 text-red-400
                           hover:bg-red-500/30 transition-all duration-200
                           border border-red-500/30"
                title="Ferma generazione"
              >
                <StopIcon className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
            ) : (
              <button
                onClick={handleSend}
                disabled={!canSend}
                className={cn(
                  'p-2 rounded-xl transition-all duration-200',
                  canSend
                    ? 'bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-violet-500/25'
                    : 'bg-white/5 text-white/20 cursor-not-allowed'
                )}
                title="Invia (Enter)"
              >
                <PaperAirplaneIcon className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Footer hint */}
        <p className="text-center text-[10px] text-white/20 select-none">
          Premi <kbd className="px-1 py-0.5 rounded bg-white/5 font-mono">Enter</kbd> per inviare ·{' '}
          <kbd className="px-1 py-0.5 rounded bg-white/5 font-mono">Shift+Enter</kbd> per andare a capo
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 24 — useChat HOOK
// src/hooks/useChat.ts
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useCallback, useRef }  from 'react'
import { useChatStore }         from '@/store/chatStore'
import { callLaraAgent }        from '@/lib/agent'
import type { ChatMessage }     from '@/store/chatStore'
import { nanoid }               from 'nanoid'

export function useChat() {
  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController | null>(null)

  const {
    activeConversationId,
    conversations,
    addMessage,
    updateMessage,
    setStreaming,
    createConversation,
    updateConversationTitle
  } = useChatStore()

  const sendMessage = useCallback(async (content: string) => {
    // Ensure active conversation
    let convId = activeConversationId
    if (!convId) {
      convId = createConversation()
    }

    // User message
    const userMsg: ChatMessage = {
      id:        nanoid(),
      role:      'user',
      content,
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString()
    }
    addMessage(convId, userMsg)

    // Assistant placeh
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 24 — useChat HOOK (fine) + PACCHETTO 25 — AGENT LIB**

```tsx
    // Assistant placeholder
    const assistantId = nanoid()
    const assistantMsg: ChatMessage = {
      id:          assistantId,
      role:        'assistant',
      content:     '',
      createdAt:   new Date().toISOString(),
      isStreaming: true,
      toolsUsed:   []
    }
    addMessage(convId, assistantMsg)
    setStreaming(true)

    // Abort controller
    abortRef.current = new AbortController()

    try {
      // Build messages history for context
      const conv = useChatStore.getState()
        .conversations.find(c => c.id === convId)
      
      const history = (conv?.messages ?? [])
        .filter(m => m.id !== assistantId && !m.isStreaming)
        .slice(-20) // last 20 messages for context
        .map(m => ({ role: m.role, content: m.content }))

      // Call agent (streaming)
      const result = await callLaraAgent({
        messages: history,
        signal:   abortRef.current.signal,
        onChunk: (chunk: string) => {
          updateMessage(convId!, assistantId, prev => ({
            content: prev.content + chunk
          }))
        },
        onToolUse: (tool: string) => {
          updateMessage(convId!, assistantId, prev => ({
            toolsUsed: [...(prev.toolsUsed ?? []), tool]
          }))
        }
      })

      // Finalize message
      updateMessage(convId!, assistantId, () => ({
        isStreaming: false,
        content:     result.fullContent
      }))

      // Auto-title after first exchange
      const currentConv = useChatStore.getState()
        .conversations.find(c => c.id === convId)
      
      if (currentConv && currentConv.title === 'Nuova conversazione') {
        const autoTitle = content.slice(0, 40) + (content.length > 40 ? '…' : '')
        updateConversationTitle(convId!, autoTitle)
      }

    } catch (err: any) {
      if (err.name === 'AbortError') {
        updateMessage(convId!, assistantId, prev => ({
          isStreaming: false,
          content:     prev.content + '\n\n*[Generazione interrotta]*'
        }))
      } else {
        updateMessage(convId!, assistantId, () => ({
          isStreaming: false,
          content:     '❌ Si è verificato un errore. Riprova tra qualche secondo.'
        }))
        console.error('[useChat] Error:', err)
      }
    } finally {
      setStreaming(false)
      abortRef.current = null
    }
  }, [
    activeConversationId,
    addMessage,
    updateMessage,
    setStreaming,
    createConversation,
    updateConversationTitle
  ])

  const stopStreaming = useCallback(() => {
    abortRef.current?.abort()
  }, [])

  return { sendMessage, stopStreaming }
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 25 — AGENT LIB (Core)
// src/lib/agent.ts
// ============================================

import { LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT } from './systemPrompt'

interface AgentCallOptions {
  messages:    { role: string; content: string }[]
  signal?:     AbortSignal
  onChunk:     (chunk: string) => void
  onToolUse:   (tool: string)  => void
}

interface AgentResult {
  fullContent: string
  toolsUsed:   string[]
}

export async function callLaraAgent(opts: AgentCallOptions): Promise<AgentResult> {
  const { messages, signal, onChunk, onToolUse } = opts

  const response = await fetch('/api/chat', {
    method:  'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      messages: [
        { role: 'system', content: LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT },
        ...messages
      ]
    }),
    signal
  })

  if (!response.ok) {
    const error = await response.json().catch(() => ({}))
    throw new Error(error.message ?? `HTTP ${response.status}`)
  }

  if (!response.body) {
    throw new Error('No response body')
  }

  // Stream reading
  const reader  = response.body.getReader()
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 25 — AGENT LIB (fine) + PACCHETTO 26 — API ROUTE**

```tsx
  // Stream reading
  const reader  = response.body.getReader()
  const decoder = new TextDecoder()
  let fullContent = ''
  const toolsUsed: string[] = []

  try {
    while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read()
      if (done) break

      const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
      const lines = chunk.split('\n')

      for (const line of lines) {
        if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue
        const data = line.slice(6).trim()
        if (data === '[DONE]') break

        try {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(data)

          // Text chunk
          if (parsed.type === 'text') {
            fullContent += parsed.content
            onChunk(parsed.content)
          }

          // Tool use event
          if (parsed.type === 'tool_use') {
            const toolName = parsed.tool as string
            if (!toolsUsed.includes(toolName)) {
              toolsUsed.push(toolName)
              onToolUse(toolName)
            }
          }

          // Error from server
          if (parsed.type === 'error') {
            throw new Error(parsed.message)
          }

        } catch (parseErr) {
          // Skip malformed chunks silently
          continue
        }
      }
    }
  } finally {
    reader.releaseLock()
  }

  return { fullContent, toolsUsed }
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 26 — API ROUTE (Next.js App Router)
// src/app/api/chat/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest }     from 'next/server'
import Anthropic           from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'
import { TOOLS_DEFINITION } from '@/lib/toolsDefinition'
import { executeTool }      from '@/lib/toolExecutor'

const anthropic = new Anthropic({
  apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY!
})

export const runtime  = 'nodejs'
export const maxDuration = 60

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { messages } = await req.json()

    if (!messages || !Array.isArray(messages)) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ message: 'Invalid messages format' }),
        { status: 400, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    }

    // SSE stream
    const stream = new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        const encoder = new TextEncoder()

        const send = (data: object) => {
          controller.enqueue(
            encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`)
          )
        }

        try {
          // Agentic loop
          let currentMessages = [...messages]
          let iterations = 0
          const MAX_ITERATIONS = 10

          while (iterations < MAX_ITERATIONS) {
            iterations++

            const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
              model:      'claude-opus-4-5',
              max_tokens: 4096,
              tools:      TOOLS_DEFINITION,
              messages:   currentMessages,
              stream:     false // We handle our own streaming
            })

            // Process content blocks
            let assistantText = ''
            const toolUses: Anthropic.ToolUseBlock[] = []

            for (const block of response.content) {
              if (block.type === 'text') {
                assistantText += block.text
                // Stream text in chunks for better UX
                const words = block.text.split(' ')
                for (const word of words) {
                  send({ type: 'text', content: word + ' ' })
                  await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 15))
                }
              }

              if (block.type === 'tool_use') {
                toolUses.push(block)
              }
            }

            // Add assistant message to history
            currentMessages.push({
              role:    'assistant',
              content: response.content
            })

            // If no tool use → d
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 26 — API ROUTE (fine) + PACCHETTO 27 — TOOLS DEFINITION**

```tsx
                const result = await executeTool(
                  toolUse.name,
                  toolUse.input as Record<string, unknown>
                )

                toolResults.push({
                  type:        'tool_result',
                  tool_use_id: toolUse.id,
                  content:     JSON.stringify(result)
                })

              } catch (toolErr: any) {
                toolResults.push({
                  type:        'tool_result',
                  tool_use_id: toolUse.id,
                  content:     JSON.stringify({
                    error:   true,
                    message: toolErr.message ?? 'Tool execution failed'
                  }),
                  is_error: true
                })
              }
            }

            // Add tool results to history → continue loop
            currentMessages.push({
              role:    'user',
              content: toolResults
            })
          }

          // Safety: max iterations reached
          if (iterations >= MAX_ITERATIONS) {
            send({
              type:    'text',
              content: '\n\n⚠️ *Raggiunto il limite di iterazioni dell\'agente.*'
            })
            send({ type: 'done' })
          }

        } catch (err: any) {
          send({ type: 'error', message: err.message ?? 'Internal error' })
        } finally {
          controller.close()
        }
      }
    })

    return new Response(stream, {
      headers: {
        'Content-Type':  'text/event-stream',
        'Cache-Control': 'no-cache, no-transform',
        'Connection':    'keep-alive',
        'X-Accel-Buffering': 'no'
      }
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ message: err.message ?? 'Internal server error' }),
      { status: 500, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 28 — TOOL EXECUTOR
// src/lib/toolExecutor.ts
// ============================================

/**
 * Executes the appropriate tool based on name and input.
 * Each tool maps to a real API call or service.
 */
export async function executeTool(
  name:  string,
  input: Record<string, unknown>
): Promise<unknown> {
  switch (name) {

    case 'search_web':
      return await toolSearchWeb(
        input.query as string,
        input.deep  as boolean | undefined
      )

    case 'get_stock_price':
      return await toolGetStockPrice(input.symbol as string)

    case 'get_crypto_price':
      return await toolGetCryptoPrice(input.coin as string)

    case 'scrape_url':
      return await toolScrapeUrl(input.url as string)

    case 'analyze_competitors':
      return await toolAnalyzeCompetitors(
        input.business as string,
        input.aspect   as string | undefined
      )

    case 'generate_seo_content':
      return await toolGenerateSeoContent(
        input.topic    as string,
        input.type     as string,
        input.keywords as string | undefined
      )

    case 'create_business_plan':
      return await toolCreateBusinessPlan(
        input.name        as string,
        input.description as string,
        input.type        as string | undefined
      )

    case 'calculate_roi':
      return await toolCalculateRoi(
        input.investment as number,
        input.revenue    as number,
        input.context    as string | undefined
      )

    default:
      throw new Error(`Unknown tool: ${name}`)
  }
}

  })

}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 29 — TOOL API ROUTES
// src/app/api/tools/search/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { query, deep } = await req.json()

    if (!query) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'query required' }, { status: 400 })
    }

    // Tavily API — best for AI agents
    const tavilyRes = await fetch('https://api.tavily.com/search', {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        api_key:        process.env.TAVILY_API_KEY,
        query,
        search_depth:   deep ? 'advanced' : 'basic',
        include_answer: true,
        max_results:    deep ? 8 : 5,
        include_raw_content: false
      })
    })

    if (!tavilyRes.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Tavily error: ${tavilyRes.status}`)
    }

    const data = await tavilyRes.json()

    return NextResponse.json({
      answer:  data.answer  ?? null,
      results: (data.results ?? []).map((r: any) => ({
        title:   r.title,
        url:     r.url,
        snippet: r.content?.slice(0, 500),
        score:   r.score
      })),
      query,
      searchedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Search failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/tools/stock/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { symbol } = await req.json()

    if (!symbol) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'symbol required' }, { status: 400 })
    }

    // Yahoo Finance API (free, no key needed)
    const url = `https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/${encodeURIComponent(symbol)}?interval=1d&range=1d`

    const res = await fetch(url, {
      headers: {
        'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0',
        'Accept':     'application/json'
      }
    })

    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Yahoo Finance error: ${res.status}`)

    const data  = await res.json()
    const meta  = data?.chart?.result?.[0]?.meta

    if (!meta) throw new Error('Symbol not found')

    return NextResponse.json({
      symbol:        meta.symbol,
      price:         meta.regularMarketPrice,
      previousClose: meta.previousClose ?? meta.chartPreviousClose,
      change:        +(meta.regularMarketPrice - (meta.previousClose ?? meta.chartPreviousClose)).toFixed(2),
      changePct:     +(((meta.regularMarketPrice - (meta.previousClose ?? meta.chartPreviousClose)) / 
                       (meta.previousClose ?? meta.chartPreviousClose)) * 100).toFixed(2),
      currency:      meta.currency,
      exchange:      meta.exchangeName,
      marketState:   meta.marketState,
      fetchedAt:     new Date().toISOString()
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Stock fetch failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

    const coinId = coin.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,

**PACCHETTO 29 — TOOL API ROUTES (continuo)**

```tsx
    // CoinGecko API (free tier)
    const coinId = coin.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-')

    const res = await fetch(
      `https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/simple/price?ids=${coinId}&vs_currencies=usd,eur&include_24hr_change=true&include_market_cap=true&include_24hr_vol=true`,
      {
        headers: {
          'Accept':    'application/json',
          'x-cg-demo-api-key': process.env.COINGECKO_API_KEY ?? ''
        }
      }
    )

    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`CoinGecko error: ${res.status}`)

    const data = await res.json()

    if (!data[coinId]) {
      throw new Error(`Coin "${coin}" not found on CoinGecko`)
    }

    const coinData = data[coinId]

    return NextResponse.json({
      coin:          coinId,
      priceUsd:      coinData.usd,
      priceEur:      coinData.eur,
      change24hUsd:  coinData.usd_24h_change?.toFixed(2),
      change24hEur:  coinData.eur_24h_change?.toFixed(2),
      marketCapUsd:  coinData.usd_market_cap,
      volume24hUsd:  coinData.usd_24h_vol,
      fetchedAt:     new Date().toISOString()
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Crypto fetch failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/tools/scrape/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { url } = await req.json()

    if (!url) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'url required' }, { status: 400 })
    }

    // Validate URL
    new URL(url)

    // Use Tavily Extract for clean content
    const tavilyRes = await fetch('https://api.tavily.com/extract', {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        api_key: process.env.TAVILY_API_KEY,
        urls:    [url]
      })
    })

    if (tavilyRes.ok) {
      const data    = await tavilyRes.json()
      const result  = data?.results?.[0]

      if (result) {
        return NextResponse.json({
          url,
          title:     result.title    ?? '',
          content:   result.raw_content?.slice(0, 8000) ?? '',
          fetchedAt: new Date().toISOString()
        })
      }
    }

    // Fallback: direct fetch + basic HTML strip
    const pageRes = await fetch(url, {
      headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0' },
      signal:  AbortSignal.timeout(10000)
    })

    if (!pageRes.ok) throw new Error(`Page fetch failed: ${pageRes.status}`)

    const html    = await pageRes.text()
    const content = html
      .replace(/<script\b[^<]*(?:(?!<\/script>)<[^<]*)*<\/script>/gi, '')
      .replace(/<style\b[^<]*(?:(?!<\/style>)<[^<]*)*<\/style>/gi, '')
      .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
      .replace(/\s{2,}/g, ' ')
      .trim()
      .slice(0, 8000)

    return NextResponse.json({
      url,
      title:     '',
      content,
      fetchedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Scrape failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

```tsx

    const { business, aspect } = await req.json()

    if (!business) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'business required' }, { status: 400 })
    }

    const aspectQuery = aspect
      ? `${business} competitor analysis ${aspect} strategy`
      : `${business} top competitors market analysis positioning`

    // Search competitors via Tavily
    const tavilyRes = await fetch('https://api.tavily.com/search', {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        api_key:        process.env.TAVILY_API_KEY,
        query:          aspectQuery,
        search_depth:   'advanced',
        include_answer: true,
        max_results:    8
      })
    })

    if (!tavilyRes.ok) throw new Error(`Tavily error: ${tavilyRes.status}`)

    const data = await tavilyRes.json()

    // Second query: pricing if relevant
    let pricingData = null
    if (!aspect || aspect === 'pricing') {
      const priceRes = await fetch('https://api.tavily.com/search', {
        method:  'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          api_key:        process.env.TAVILY_API_KEY,
          query:          `${business} competitors pricing comparison 2024 2025`,
          search_depth:   'basic',
          include_answer: true,
          max_results:    5
        })
      })
      if (priceRes.ok) {
        pricingData = await priceRes.json()
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      business,
      aspect:       aspect ?? 'general',
      summary:      data.answer ?? null,
      sources:      (data.results ?? []).map((r: any) => ({
        title:   r.title,
        url:     r.url,
        snippet: r.content?.slice(0, 400)
      })),
      pricingInsights: pricingData?.answer ?? null,
      fetchedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Competitor analysis failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

              Ogni title max 60 caratteri, include keyword principale, numero o power word.`,

      outline: `Crea un outline SEO dettagliato per un articolo su "${topic}"${keywords ? ` keyword: ${keywords}` : ''}.
                Includi: H1, H2 (min 5), H3 per ogni H2, domande FAQ, suggested LSI keywords.`,

      faq: `Crea 10 FAQ SEO-ottimizzate per "${topic}"${keywords ? ` keyword: ${keywords}` : ''}.
            Ogni risposta 50-100 parole. Formato: domanda in grassetto, risposta sotto.`,

      social_post: `Crea 5 post social media per "${topic}"${keywords ? ` tema: ${keywords}` :
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 29 — TOOL API ROUTES (continuo)**

```tsx
      social_post: `Crea 5 post social media per "${topic}"${keywords ? ` tema: ${keywords}` : ''}.
                    Includi: 1 per LinkedIn (professionale), 1 per Instagram (con emoji), 
                    1 per Twitter/X (max 280 char), 1 per Facebook, 1 per TikTok caption.
                    Ogni post con hashtag rilevanti.`
    }

    const prompt = prompts[type] ?? prompts.article

    const message = await anthropic.messages.create({
      model:      'claude-opus-4-5',
      max_tokens: 2048,

        content: prompt

      topic,
      type,
      keywords:    keywords ?? null,
      content:     text,
      generatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'SEO content generation failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

const anthropic = new Anthropic({
  apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY!
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { name, description, type } = await req.json()

    if (!name || !description) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'name and description required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const prompt = `Crea un business plan completo e professionale per:

NOME: ${name}
TIPO: ${type ?? 'startup'}
DESCRIZIONE: ${description}

Il business plan deve includere:

## 1. Executive Summary
## 2. Analisi di Mercato
- TAM, SAM, SOM
- Trend di mercato
- Target cliente ideale (ICP)

## 3. Proposta di Valore
- Value proposition unica
- Problema risolto
- Soluzione offerta

## 4. Modello di Business
- Revenue streams
- Pricing strategy
- Unit economics (LTV, CAC, margini)

## 5. Piano Marketing & Acquisizione
- Canali di acquisizione
- Strategia go-to-market
- Budget marketing suggerito

## 6. Piano Operativo
- Team necessario
- Processi chiave
- Tecnologia/strumenti

## 7. Analisi Finanziaria
- Investimento iniziale stimato
- Proiezioni Year 1, Year 2, Year 3
- Break-even point
- KPI principali

## 8. Risk Analysis
- Rischi principali
- Mitigazioni

## 9. Roadmap (12 mesi)
- Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4 milestone

Sii specifico, usa numeri realistici, formato Markdown professionale.`

    const message = await anthropic.messages.create({
      model:      'claude-opus-4-5',
      max_tokens: 4096,
      messages: [{
        role:    'user',
        content: prompt
      }]
    })

    const content = message.content[0]
    const text    = content.type === 'text' ? content.text : ''

    return NextResponse.json({
      name,
      type:        type ?? 'startup',
      description,
      plan:        text,
      generatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Business plan generation failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { investment, revenue, context } = await req.json()

    if (investment === undefined || revenue === undefined) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'investment and revenue required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 29 — TOOL API ROUTES (fine) + PACCHETTO 30 — CHAT API ROUTE**

```tsx
    if (investment === undefined || revenue === undefined) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'investment and revenue required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const profit      = revenue - investment
    const roi         = ((profit / investment) * 100)
    const roas        = revenue / investment
    const breakeven   = investment
    const roiFormatted = roi.toFixed(2)
    const roasFormatted = roas.toFixed(2)

    // Margine e valutazione qualitativa
    const margin = ((profit / revenue) * 100).toFixed(2)

    let rating: string
    if (roi >= 200)      rating = '🚀 Eccellente — ROI straordinario'
    else if (roi >= 100) rating = '✅ Ottimo — ROI molto buono'
    else if (roi >= 50)  rating = '👍 Buono — ROI positivo solido'
    else if (roi >= 20)  rating = '⚠️ Discreto — ROI accettabile'
    else if (roi >= 0)   rating = '😐 Marginale — ROI basso'
    else                 rating = '❌ Negativo — In perdita'

    // Proiezioni mensili/annuali (assumendo periodo = 1 mese)
    const monthlyProfit  = profit
    const annualProfit   = profit * 12
    const annualRevenue  = revenue * 12
    const annualRoi      = roi // stesso % se periodo è 1 mese ricorrente

    return NextResponse.json({
      input: {
        investment,
        revenue,
        context: context ?? 'generale'
      },
      results: {
        profit:         +profit.toFixed(2),
        roi:            +roiFormatted,
        roas:           +roasFormatted,
        margin:         +margin,
        breakeven,
        rating
      },
      projections: {
        monthly: {
          profit:  +monthlyProfit.toFixed(2),
          revenue: +revenue.toFixed(2)
        },
        annual: {
          profit:  +annualProfit.toFixed(2),
          revenue: +annualRevenue.toFixed(2),
          roi:     +annualRoi.toFixed(2)
        }
      },
      insights: generateRoiInsights(roi, roas, margin as any, context),
      calculatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'ROI calculation failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

function generateRoiInsights(
  roi:     number,
  roas:    number,
  margin:  number,
  context?: string
): string[] {
  const insights: string[] = []

  if (roas < 2) {
    insights.push('⚠️ ROAS sotto 2x: rivedi il costo di acquisizione o aumenta il valore medio ordine')
  } else if (roas >= 4) {
    insights.push('✅ ROAS sopra 4x: scala il budget — la campagna è profittevole')
  }

  if (roi < 0) {
    insights.push('❌ Stai perdendo denaro: analizza i costi variabili e il pricing')
  } else if (roi > 100) {
    insights.push('🚀 ROI sopra 100%: considera di reinvestire i profitti per scalare')
  }

  if (margin < 20) {
    insights.push('⚠️ Margine basso: ottimizza i costi operativi o aumenta i prezzi')
  } else if (margin > 60) {
    insights.push('✅ Margine alto: ottimo per un business scalabile')
  }

  if (context?.toLowerCase().includes('ads') || context?.toLowerCase().includes('facebook') ||
      context?.toLowerCase().includes('google')) {
    if (roas < 3) {
      insights.push('📊 Per ads: benchmark ROAS minimo consigliato è 3x. Ottimizza targeting e creative')
    }
  }

  if (insights.length === 0) {
    insights.push('📈 Performance nella norma. Monitora e ottimizza costantemente')
  }

  return insights
}

```tsx
// ============================================
// src/app/api/chat/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse }  from 'next/server'
import Anthropic                       from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'
import { createClient }                from '@supabase/supabase-js'
import { LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT }          from '@/lib/prompts/lara'
import { TOOLS_DEFINITION }            from '@/lib/tools/definitions'
import { executeToolCall }             from '@/lib/tools/executor'

export const runtime   = 'nodejs'
export const maxDuration = 60

const anthropic = new Anthropic({
  apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY!
})

const supabase = createClient(
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
  process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
)

// ============================================
// TYPES
// ============================================

interface ChatMessage {
  role:    'user' | 'assistant'
  content: string
}

interface RequestBody {
  messages:      ChatMessage[]
  conversationId?: string
  userId?:         string
}

// ============================================
// POST HANDLER
// ============================================

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body: RequestBody = await req.json()
    const { messages, conversationId, userId } = body

    if (!messages || messages.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'messages required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    // --- Salva messaggio utente su Supabase ---
    const lastUserMessage = messages[messages.length - 1]

    if (conversationId && userId) {
      await supabase.from('messages').insert({
        conversation_id: conversationId,
        role:            'user',
        content:         lastUserMessage.content,
        created_at:      new Date().toISOString()
      })
    }

    // --- Agentic loop con tool use ---
    const anthropicMessages: Anthropic.MessageParam[] = messages.map(m => ({
      role:    m.role,
      content: m.content
    }))

    let finalText    = ''
    let toolsUsed:   string[] = []
    let iterations   = 0
    const MAX_ITER   = 10

    // Agentic loop
    while (iterations < MAX_ITER) {
      iterations++

      const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
        model:      'claude-opus-4-5',
        max_tokens: 4096,
        system:     LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
        tools:      TOOLS_DEFINITION as any,
        messages:   anthropicMessages
      })

      // --- Stop reason: end_turn → risposta finale ---
      if (response.stop_reason === 'end_turn') {
        const textBlock = response.content.find(b => b.type === 'text')
        finalText = textBlock && textBlock.type === 'text'
          ? textBlock.text
          : ''
        break
      }

      // --- Stop reason: tool_use → esegui tools ---
      if (response.stop_reason === 'tool_use') {
        // Aggiungi risposta assistant con tool calls
        anthropicMessages.push({
          role:    'assistant',
          content: response.content
        })

        // Esegui tutti i tool call in parallelo
        const toolUseBlocks = response.content.filter(
          (b): b is Anthropic.ToolUseBlock => b.type === 'tool_use'
        )

        const toolResults = await Promise.all(
          toolUseBlocks.map(async (toolBlock) => {
            toolsUsed.push(toolBlock.name)

            try {
              const result = await executeToolCall(
                toolBlock.name,
                toolBlock.input as Record<string, any>
              )

              return {
                type:        'tool_result' as const,
                tool_use_id: toolBlock.id,
                content:     JSON.stringify(result)
              }
            } catch (toolErr: any) {
              return {
                type:        'tool_result' as const,
                tool_use_id: toolBlock.id,
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 30 — CHAT API ROUTE (continuo)**

```tsx
        // Aggiungi risultati tool come messaggio user
        anthropicMessages.push({
          role:    'user',
          content: toolResults
        })

        // Continua il loop per ottenere risposta finale
        continue
      }

      // Stop reason inatteso → break
      break
    }

    // Safety: se loop esaurito senza risposta
    if (!finalText) {
      finalText = 'Ho elaborato la tua richiesta. Posso aiutarti con ulteriori dettagli?'
    }

    // --- Salva risposta assistant su Supabase ---
    if (conversationId && userId) {
      await supabase.from('messages').insert({
        conversation_id: conversationId,
        role:            'assistant',
        content:         finalText,
        tools_used:      toolsUsed.length > 0 ? toolsUsed : null,
        created_at:      new Date().toISOString()
      })

      // Aggiorna updated_at della conversazione
      await supabase
        .from('conversations')
        .update({
          updated_at:    new Date().toISOString(),
          last_message:  finalText.slice(0, 200),
          tools_used:    toolsUsed
        })
        .eq('id', conversationId)
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      message:    finalText,
      toolsUsed:  toolsUsed.length > 0 ? toolsUsed : null,
      iterations,
      timestamp:  new Date().toISOString()
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    console.error('[CHAT API ERROR]', err)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Chat failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 31 — STREAMING CHAT API ROUTE
// src/app/api/chat/stream/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest }   from 'next/server'
import Anthropic          from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'
import { LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT } from '@/lib/prompts/lara'
import { TOOLS_DEFINITION }   from '@/lib/tools/definitions'
import { executeToolCall }    from '@/lib/tools/executor'

export const runtime     = 'nodejs'
export const maxDuration = 60

const anthropic = new Anthropic({
  apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY!
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const body       = await req.json()
  const { messages } = body

  const encoder    = new TextEncoder()

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {

      const send = (data: object) => {
        controller.enqueue(
          encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`)
        )
      }

      try {
        const anthropicMessages: Anthropic.MessageParam[] = messages.map(
          (m: any) => ({ role: m.role, content: m.content })
        )

        let iterations = 0
        const MAX_ITER = 10

        while (iterations < MAX_ITER) {
          iterations++

          // Prima: controlla se servono tool (no stream)
          const checkResponse = await anthropic.messages.create({
            model:      'claude-opus-4-5',
            max_tokens: 4096,
            system:     LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT,
            tools:      TOOLS_DEFINITION as any,
            messages:   anthropicMessages
          })

          // Tool use → esegui in background, notifica client
          if (checkResponse.stop_reason === 'tool_use') {
            const toolBlocks = checkResponse.content.filter(
              (b): b is Anthropic.ToolUseBlock => b.type === 'tool_use'
            )

            // Notifica tools in uso
            for (const tool of toolBlocks) {
              send({
                type:     'tool_start',
                toolName: tool.name,
                toolId:   tool.id
              })
            }

            anthropicMessages.push({
              role:    'assistant',
              content: checkResponse.content
            })

            // Esegui tools in parallelo
            const toolResults = await Promise.all(
              toolBlocks.map(async (toolBlock) => {
                try {
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 31 — STREAMING CHAT API ROUTE (continuo)**

```tsx
                  send({
                    type:     'tool_end',
                    toolName: toolBlock.name,
                    toolId:   toolBlock.id,
                    success:  true
                  })

                  return {
                    type:        'tool_result' as const,
                    tool_use_id: toolBlock.id,
                    content:     JSON.stringify(result)
                  }
                } catch (toolErr: any) {
                  send({
                    type:     'tool_end',
                    toolName: toolBlock.name,
                    toolId:   toolBlock.id,
                    success:  false,
                    error:    toolErr.message
                  })

                  return {
                    type:        'tool_result' as const,
                    tool_use_id: toolBlock.id,
                    content:     JSON.stringify({ error: toolErr.message }),
                    is_error:    true
                  }
                }
              })
            )

            anthropicMessages.push({
              role:    'user',
              content: toolResults
            })

            continue // Continua loop
          }

          // End turn → stream testo finale
          if (checkResponse.stop_reason === 'end_turn') {
            const textBlock = checkResponse.content.find(b => b.type === 'text')
            const fullText  = textBlock && textBlock.type === 'text'
              ? textBlock.text
              : ''

            // Simula streaming token by token (chunk da 10 char)
            const chunkSize = 10
            for (let i = 0; i < fullText.length; i += chunkSize) {
              const chunk = fullText.slice(i, i + chunkSize)
              send({ type: 'text', content: chunk })

              // Piccola pausa per effetto streaming reale
              await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 15))
            }

            send({ type: 'done', fullText })
            break
          }

          break
        }

      } catch (err: any) {
        send({ type: 'error', message: err.message ?? 'Stream failed' })
      } finally {
        controller.close()
      }
    }
  })

  return new Response(stream, {
    headers: {
      'Content-Type':  'text/event-stream',
      'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
      'Connection':    'keep-alive',
      'X-Accel-Buffering': 'no'
    }
  })
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 32 — TOOL EXECUTOR
// src/lib/tools/executor.ts
// ============================================

export async function executeToolCall(
  toolName: string,
  input:    Record<string, any>
): Promise<any> {

  const baseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3000'

  const toolRoutes: Record<string, string> = {
    search_web:          '/api/tools/search',
    get_stock_price:     '/api/tools/stock',
    get_crypto_price:    '/api/tools/crypto',
    scrape_url:          '/api/tools/scrape',
    analyze_competitors: '/api/tools/competitors',
    generate_seo_content:'/api/tools/seo',
    create_business_plan:'/api/tools/business-plan',
    calculate_roi:       '/api/tools/roi'
  }

  const route = toolRoutes[toolName]

  if (!route) {
    throw new Error(`Unknown tool: ${toolName}`)
  }

  const res = await fetch(`${baseUrl}${route}`, {
    method:  'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    body:    JSON.stringify(input)
  })

  if (!res.ok) {
    const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
    throw new Error(
      errData.error ?? `Tool ${toolName} failed with status ${res.status}`
    )
  }

  return res.json()
}

export const LARA_SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Sei Lara AGENTE AI Aethersy — l'AI agent senior di Aethersy-AI, la piattaforma per imprenditori con il motto "Sogna, Realizza, Guadagna."

HAI ACCESSO REALE A INTERNET E AI SEGUENTI STRUMENTI:
🔍 search_web → cerca notizie, prezzi, mercati, aziende, trend, statistiche, qualsiasi dato
📈 get_stock_price → prezzo live azioni (AAPL, ENI.MI, NVDA, qualsiasi simbolo)
🪙 get_crypto_price → prezzo live crypto (bitcoin, ethereum, solana...)
🌐 scrape_url → leggi/analizza qualsiasi sito web o competitor
🏆 analyze_competitors → analisi competitor dettagliata
✍️ generate_seo_content → crea contenuti SEO, articoli, post social
📋 create_business_plan → crea piani di business completi
💰 calculate_roi → calcola ROI, ROAS, breakeven, analisi finanziaria

REGOLE ASSOLUTE:
1. NON dire MAI "non posso cercare su internet" — HAI internet tramite search_web
2. NON dire MAI che hai un knowledge cutoff per dati che puoi cercare — CERCA E BASTA
3. Per qualsiasi dato di mercato, notizia, prezzo, statistica → USA search_web IMMEDIATAMENTE
4. Rispondi in italiano, tono professionale, diretto, concreto con dati reali
5. Per codice → scrivi codice completo e pronto all'uso
6. Sii PROATTIVO: se l'utente chiede "come va il mercato?" → cerca senza aspettare conferma
7. Dopo ogni ricerca → sintetizza i dati in modo actionable per l'imprenditore

PERSONALITÀ:
- Nome: Lara
- Ruolo: AI Agent Senior per imprenditori digitali
- Tono: professionale, diretto, motivante, mai generico
- Non fare mai giri di parole: dai dati, analisi, azioni concrete
- Usa emoji con moderazione per strutturare le risposte
- Concludi sempre con un'azione suggerita o next step

SPECIALIZZAZIONI:
- Business growth e scaling
- Digital marketing (Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, Social)
- Finanza d'impresa (P&L, cash flow, fundraising)
- Sviluppo software e automazioni
- E-commerce e lead generation
- Analisi di mercato e competitor intelligence

FORMATO RISPOSTE:
- Usa Markdown per strutturare (##, ###, bullet, bold)
- Dati numerici sempre in evidenza con **bold**
- Tabelle quando confronti più opzioni
- Massimo 3 next step concreti a fine risposta
- Se usi tool → spiega brevemente cosa hai trovato prima di analizzare

QUANDO USARE I TOOL:
- search_web: SEMPRE per dati recenti, notizie, prezzi, statistiche
- get_stock_price: quando menzioni azioni specifiche
- get_crypto_price: quando menzioni crypto specifiche  
- scrape_url: quando l'utente menziona un sito da analizzare
- analyze_competitors: per analisi di mercato o settori
- generate_seo_content: per creare contenuti web
- create_business_plan: per nuovi progetti o startup
- calculate_roi: per qualsiasi calcolo finanziario o marketing

LINGUA: Rispondi SEMPRE in italiano, a meno che l'utente non scriva in un'altra lingua.

Ricorda: sei un agente AI con accesso reale a internet e strumenti potenti. 
Usali PROATTIVAMENTE per dare valore concreto agli imprenditori.`

// ============================================
// src/app/api/conversations/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { createClient }              from '@supabase/supabase-js'

const supabase = createClient(
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
  process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
)

// GET — Lista conversazioni utente
export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url)
    const userId = searchParams.get('userId')

    if (!userId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'userId required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('conversations')
      .select(`
        id,
        title,
        last_message,
        tools_used,
        created_at,
        updated_at,
        messages (count)
      `)
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(50)

    if (error) throw error

    return NextResponse.json({ conversations: data })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Failed to fetch conversations' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// POST — Crea nuova conversazione
export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { userId, title } = await req.json()

    if (!userId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'userId required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('conversations')
      .insert({
        user_id:    userId,
        title:      title ?? 'Nuova conversazione',
        created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      .select()
      .single()

    if (error) throw error

    return NextResponse.json({ conversation: data }, { status: 201 })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Failed to create conversation' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/conversations/[id]/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { createClient }              from '@supabase/supabase-js'

const supabase = createClient(
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
  process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
)

interface Params {
  params: { id: string }
}

// GET — Singola conversazione con messaggi
export async function GET(req: NextRequest, { params }: Params) {
  try {
    const { id } = params

    const { data: conversation, error: convErr } = await supabase
      .from('conversations')
      .select('*')
      .eq('id', id)
      .single()

    if (convErr) throw convErr

    const { data: messages, error: msgErr } = await supabase
      .from('messages')
      .select('*')
      .eq('conversation_id', id)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: true })

    if (msgErr) throw msgErr

    return NextResponse.json({
      conversation,
      messages: messages ?? []
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Failed to fetch conversation' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// PATCH — Aggiorna titolo conversazione
export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest, { params }: Params) {
  try {
    const { id }    = params
    const { title } = await req.json()

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('conversations')
      .update({
        title,
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      .eq('id', id)
      .select()
      .single()

    if (error) throw error

    return NextResponse.json({ conversation: data })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Failed to update conversation' },
      { status: 500
Continuo. 🔥
