**PACCHETTO 35 — CONVERSATIONS API (fine) + PACCHETTO 36 — MESSAGES API**

```tsx
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Failed to update conversation' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// DELETE — Elimina conversazione
export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest, { params }: Params) {
  try {
    const { id } = params

    // Elimina prima i messaggi (cascade)
    await supabase
      .from('messages')
      .delete()
      .eq('conversation_id', id)

    // Poi elimina la conversazione
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('conversations')
      .delete()
      .eq('id', id)

    if (error) throw error

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Failed to delete conversation' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 36 — MESSAGES API
// src/app/api/messages/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { createClient }              from '@supabase/supabase-js'

const supabase = createClient(
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
  process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
)

// GET — Messaggi di una conversazione
export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { searchParams }   = new URL(req.url)
    const conversationId     = searchParams.get('conversationId')
    const limit              = parseInt(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '100')
    const before             = searchParams.get('before') // cursor pagination

    if (!conversationId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'conversationId required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    let query = supabase
      .from('messages')
      .select('*')
      .eq('conversation_id', conversationId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: true })
      .limit(limit)

    if (before) {
      query = query.lt('created_at', before)
    }

    const { data, error } = await query

    if (error) throw error

    return NextResponse.json({
      messages: data ?? [],
      count:    data?.length ?? 0
    })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Failed to fetch messages' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// DELETE — Elimina singolo messaggio
export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url)
    const messageId        = searchParams.get('id')

    if (!messageId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'id required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('messages')
      .delete()
      .eq('id', messageId)

    if (error) throw error

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true })

  } catch (err: any) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: err.message ?? 'Failed to delete message' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

-- Enable UUID extension
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp";

-- ----------------------------------------
-- USERS (gestito da Supabase Auth)
-- ----------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.profiles (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  email         TEXT,
  full_name     TEXT,
  avatar_url    TEXT,
  plan          TEXT DEFAULT 'free',       -- free | pro | enterprise
  credits       INTEGER DEFAULT 100,
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- CONVERSATIONS
-- ----------------------------------------

  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id       UUID NO

  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),

-- ----------------------------------------
-- MESSAGES
-- ----------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.messages (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  conversation_id   UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.conversations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  role              TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (role IN ('user', 'assistant', 'system')),
  content           TEXT NOT NULL,
  tools_used        TEXT[],
  tokens_used       INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ----------------------------------------
-- TOOL USAGE LOGS
-- ----------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.tool_logs (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id           UUID REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  conversation_id   UUID REFERENCES public.conversations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  tool_name         TEXT NOT NULL,
  input             JSONB,
  output            JSONB,
  duration_ms       INTEGER,
  success           BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  error             TEXT,
  created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ----------------------------------------
-- SUBSCRIPTIONS
-- ----------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.subscriptions (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id           UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  stripe_customer_id      TEXT UNIQUE,
  stripe_subscription_id  TEXT UNIQUE,
  plan              TEXT DEFAULT 'free',  -- free | pro | enterprise
  status            TEXT DEFAULT 'active', -- active | canceled | past_due
  current_period_start  TIMESTAMPTZ,
  current_period_end    TIMESTAMPTZ,
  cancel_at_period_end  BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ----------------------------------------
-- CREDITS TRANSACTIONS
-- ----------------------------------------
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.credits_transactions (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id       UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  amount        INTEGER NOT NULL,          -- positivo = aggiunta, negativo = consumo
  type          TEXT NOT NULL,             -- purchase | usage | bonus | refund
  description   TEXT,
  balance_after INTEGER NOT NULL,
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- ----------------------------------------
-- INDEXES
-- ----------------------------------------
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_conversations_user_id
  ON public.conversations(user_id);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_conversations_updated_at
  ON public.conversations(updated_at DESC);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_conversation_id
  ON public.messages(conversation_id);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_messages_created_at
  ON public.messages(created_at);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tool_logs_user_id
  ON public.tool_logs(user_id);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tool_logs_created_at
  ON public.tool_logs(created_at DESC);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_subscriptions_user_id
  ON public.subscriptions(user_id);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_credits_user_id
  ON public.credits_transactions(user_id);

-- ----------------------------------------
-- ROW LEVEL SECURITY (RLS)
-- ----------------------------------------
ALTER TABLE public.profiles              ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE public.conversations         ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE public.messages              ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE public.tool_logs             ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE public.subscriptions         ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE public.credits_transactions  ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

**PACCHETTO 37 — SCHEMA SQL (fine) + PACCHETTO 38 — TRIGGERS & FUNCTIONS**

```sql
-- Subscriptions: utente vede solo la sua
CREATE POLICY "subscriptions_own" ON public.subscriptions
  FOR ALL USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- Credits: utente vede solo le sue transazioni
CREATE POLICY "credits_own" ON public.credits_transactions
  FOR ALL USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- ----------------------------------------
-- FUNCTIONS & TRIGGERS
-- ----------------------------------------

-- Auto-crea profilo quando si registra un utente
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO public.profiles (id, email, full_name, avatar_url)
  VALUES (
    NEW.id,
    NEW.email,
    NEW.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name',
    NEW.raw_user_meta_data->>'avatar_url'
  );

  -- Crea subscription free di default
  INSERT INTO public.subscriptions (user_id, plan, status)
  VALUES (NEW.id, 'free', 'active');

  -- Aggiungi 100 credits di benvenuto
  INSERT INTO public.credits_transactions (
    user_id,
    amount,
    type,
    description,
    balance_after
  )
  VALUES (
    NEW.id,
    100,
    'bonus',
    'Credits di benvenuto',
    100
  );

  RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

-- Trigger su auth.users
CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER on_auth_user_created
  AFTER INSERT ON auth.users
  FOR EACH ROW
  EXECUTE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user();

-- ----------------------------------------
-- Auto-aggiorna updated_at
-- ----------------------------------------
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.update_updated_at()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
  NEW.updated_at = NOW();
  RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE TRIGGER conversations_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON public.conversations
  FOR EACH ROW
  EXECUTE FUNCTION public.update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER subscriptions_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON public.subscriptions
  FOR EACH ROW
  EXECUTE FUNCTION public.update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER profiles_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON public.profiles
  FOR EACH ROW
  EXECUTE FUNCTION public.update_updated_at();

-- PACCHETTO 38 — SUPABASE CLIENT
-- src/lib/supabase/client.ts

import { createBrowserClient } from '@supabase/ssr'

export function createClient() {
  return createBrowserClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!
  )
}

-- ----------------------------------------
-- src/lib/supabase/server.ts
-- ----------------------------------------

import { createServerClient, type CookieOptions } from '@supabase/ssr'
import { cookies }                                  from 'next/headers'

export function createClient() {
  const cookieStore = cookies()

  return createServerClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
    {
      cookies: {
        get(name: string) {
          return cookieStore.get(name)?.value
        },
        set(name: string, value: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          try {
            cookieStore.set({ name, value, ...options })
          } catch {}
        },
        remove(name: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          try {
            cookieStore.set({ name, value: '', ...options })
          } catch {}
        }
      }
    }
  )
}

      cookies: {
        get(name: string) {
          return re

        get(name: string) {
          return request.cookies.get(name)?.value
        },
        set(name: string, value: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          request.cookies.set({ name, value, ...options })
          response = NextResponse.next({
            request: { headers: request.headers }
          })
          response.cookies.set({ name, value, ...options })
        },
        remove(name: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          request.cookies.set({ name, value: '', ...options })
          response = NextResponse.next({
            request: { headers: request.headers }
          })
          response.cookies.set({ name, value: '', ...options })
        }
      }
    }
  )

  // Refresh session se scaduta
  await supabase.auth.getUser()

  return response
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 39 — AUTH HOOKS
// src/hooks/useAuth.ts
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
import { createClient }                      from '@/lib/supabase/client'
import { User, Session }                     from '@supabase/supabase-js'
import { useRouter }                         from 'next/navigation'

interface AuthState {
  user:       User | null
  session:    Session | null
  loading:    boolean
  profile:    Profile | null
}

interface Profile {
  id:         string
  email:      string
  full_name:  string
  avatar_url: string
  plan:       string
  credits:    number
}

export function useAuth() {
  const supabase = createClient()
  const router   = useRouter()

  const [state, setState] = useState<AuthState>({
    user:    null,
    session: null,
    loading: true,
    profile: null
  })

  // Carica profilo utente
  const loadProfile = useCallback(async (userId: string) => {
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('profiles')
      .select('*')
      .eq('id', userId)
      .single()

    return data as Profile | null
  }, [supabase])

  useEffect(() => {
    // Sessione iniziale
    const initSession = async () => {
      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession()

      if (session?.user) {
        const profile = await loadProfile(session.user.id)
        setState({
          user:    session.user,
          session,
          loading: false,
          profile
        })
      } else {
        setState(prev => ({ ...prev, loading: false }))
      }
    }

    initSession()

    // Listener auth state changes
    const { data: { subscription } } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange(
      async (event, session) => {
        if (session?.user) {
          const profile = await loadProfile(session.user.id)
          setState({
            user:    session.user,
            session,
            loading: false,
            profile
          })
        } else {
          setState({
            user:    null,
            session: null,
            loading: false,
            profile: null
          })
        }

        // Redirect dopo login/logout
        if (event === 'SIGNED_IN')  router.push('/dashboard')
        if (event === 'SIGNED_OUT') router.push('/login')
      }
    )

    return () => subscription.unsubscribe()
  }, [supabase, router, loadProfile])

  // Login con email/password
  const signIn = useCallback(async (email: string, password: string) => {
    const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({
      ema
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 39 — AUTH HOOKS (fine) + PACCHETTO 40 — CHAT HOOK**

```tsx
  const signUp = useCallback(async (
    email:    string,
    password: string,
    fullName: string
  ) => {
    const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({
      email,
      password,
      options: {
        data: { full_name: fullName }
      }
    })
    if (error) throw error
    return data
  }, [supabase])

  // Login con Google
  const signInWithGoogle = useCallback(async () => {
    const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({
      provider: 'google',
      options: {
        redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/auth/callback`
      }
    })
    if (error) throw error
  }, [supabase])

  // Logout
  const signOut = useCallback(async () => {
    const { error } = await supabase.auth.signOut()
    if (error) throw error
  }, [supabase])

  // Reset password
  const resetPassword = useCallback(async (email: string) => {
    const { error } = await supabase.auth.resetPasswordForEmail(email, {
      redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/auth/reset-password`
    })
    if (error) throw error
  }, [supabase])

  // Aggiorna profilo
  const updateProfile = useCallback(async (updates: Partial<Profile>) => {
    if (!state.user) throw new Error('Not authenticated')

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('profiles')
      .update(updates)
      .eq('id', state.user.id)
      .select()
      .single()

    if (error) throw error

    setState(prev => ({ ...prev, profile: data as Profile }))
    return data
  }, [supabase, state.user])

  return {
    ...state,
    signIn,
    signUp,
    signInWithGoogle,
    signOut,
    resetPassword,
    updateProfile,
    isAuthenticated: !!state.user
  }
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 40 — CHAT HOOK
// src/hooks/useChat.ts
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'
import { createClient }                              from '@/lib/supabase/client'

export interface Message {
  id:              string
  role:            'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'
  content:         string
  tools_used?:     string[]
  tokens_used?:    number
  created_at:      string
  isStreaming?:    boolean
}

export interface Conversation {
  id:           string
  title:        string
  last_message: string
  tools_used:   string[]
  updated_at:   string
}

interface UseChatOptions {
  userId:         string
  conversationId?: string
}

export function useChat({ userId, conversationId: initialConvId }: UseChatOptions) {
  const supabase              = createClient()
  const abortControllerRef    = useRef<AbortController | null>(null)

  const [messages, setMessages]           = useState<Message[]>([])
  const [conversations, setConversations] = useState<Conversation[]>([])
  const [conversationId, setConversationId] = useState<string | null>(
    initialConvId ?? null
  )
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading]         = useState(false)
  const [isStreaming, setIsStreaming]     = useState(false)
  const [error, setError]                 = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [activeTools, setActiveTools]     = useState<string[]>([])

  // Carica lista conversazioni
  const loadConversations = useCallback(async () => {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('conversations')
      .select('*')
      .eq('user_id', userId)
      .order('updated_at', { ascending: false })
      .limit(50)

    if (!error && data) {
      setConversations(data as Conversation[])
    }
  }, [supabase, userId])

  // Carica messaggi di una conversazione
  const loadMessages = useCallback(async (convId: string) => {
    setIsLoading(true)
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('messages')
      .select('*')
      .eq('conversation_id', convId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: true })


   if (!

**PACCHETTO 40 — CHAT HOOK (continuo)**

```tsx
    if (!error && data) {
      setMessages(data as Message[])
    }
    setIsLoading(false)
  }, [supabase])

  // Carica conversazione iniziale
  useEffect(() => {
    loadConversations()
    if (initialConvId) {
      loadMessages(initialConvId)
    }
  }, [initialConvId, loadConversations, loadMessages])

  // Crea nuova conversazione
  const createConversation = useCallback(async (firstMessage: string) => {
    const title = firstMessage.slice(0, 50) + (firstMessage.length > 50 ? '...' : '')

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('conversations')
      .insert({
        user_id:    userId,
        title,
        created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
      })
      .select()
      .single()

    if (error) throw error

    setConversationId(data.id)
    setConversations(prev => [data as Conversation, ...prev])
    return data.id
  }, [supabase, userId])

  // Salva messaggio su Supabase
  const saveMessage = useCallback(async (
    convId:     string,
    role:       'user' | 'assistant',
    content:    string,
    toolsUsed?: string[],
    tokens?:    number
  ) => {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('messages')
      .insert({
        conversation_id: convId,
        role,
        content,
        tools_used:  toolsUsed ?? [],
        tokens_used: tokens   ?? 0,
        created_at:  new Date().toISOString()
      })
      .select()
      .single()

    if (error) throw error

    // Aggiorna last_message nella conversazione
    await supabase
      .from('conversations')
      .update({
        last_message: content.slice(0, 100),
        tools_used:   toolsUsed ?? [],
        updated_at:   new Date().toISOString()
      })
      .eq('id', convId)

    return data
  }, [supabase])

  // Invia messaggio con streaming
  const sendMessage = useCallback(async (content: string) => {
    if (!content.trim() || isLoading) return

    setError(null)
    setIsLoading(true)
    setActiveTools([])

    // Crea conversazione se non esiste
    let convId = conversationId
    if (!convId) {
      convId = await createConversation(content)
    }

    // Aggiungi messaggio utente alla UI
    const userMessage: Message = {
      id:         crypto.randomUUID(),
      role:       'user',
      content,
      created_at: new Date().toISOString()
    }
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage])

    // Salva messaggio utente su DB
    await saveMessage(convId, 'user', content)

    // Placeholder messaggio assistant con streaming
    const assistantId = crypto.randomUUID()
    const assistantPlaceholder: Message = {
      id:          assistantId,
      role:        'assistant',
      content:     '',
      created_at:  new Date().toISOString(),
      isStreaming: true
    }
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, assistantPlaceholder])
    setIsStreaming(true)

    try {
      // Abort controller per cancellare stream
      abortControllerRef.current = new AbortController()

      const response = await fetch('/api/chat', {
        method:  'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          message:        content,
          conversationId: convId,
          userId,
          history:        messages.slice(-10).map(m => ({
            role:    m.role,
            content: m.content
          }))
        }),
        signal: abortControllerRef.current.signal
      })

      if (!response.ok) {
        const err = await response.json()
        throw new Error(err.error ?? 'Chat request failed')
      }

      // Leggi stream
      const reader  = response.body!.getReader()
      const decoder = new TextDecoder()
      let fullContent  = ''
      let toolsUsed:   string[] = []
      let tokensUsed   = 0

      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read()
        if
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 40 — CHAT HOOK (fine) + PACCHETTO 41 — CONVERSATIONS HOOK**

```tsx
        if (done) break

        const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
        const lines = chunk.split('\n').filter(line => line.trim())

        for (const line of lines) {
          if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue

          const data = line.slice(6)
          if (data === '[DONE]') continue

          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(data)

            // Token di testo
            if (parsed.type === 'text') {
              fullContent += parsed.content
              setMessages(prev =>
                prev.map(m =>
                  m.id === assistantId
                    ? { ...m, content: fullContent }
                    : m
                )
              )
            }

            // Tool chiamato
            if (parsed.type === 'tool_start') {
              setActiveTools(prev => [...new Set([...prev, parsed.tool])])
            }

            // Tool completato
            if (parsed.type === 'tool_end') {
              setActiveTools(prev => prev.filter(t => t !== parsed.tool))
              toolsUsed.push(parsed.tool)
            }

            // Metadata finali
            if (parsed.type === 'metadata') {
              tokensUsed = parsed.tokens ?? 0
            }

            // Errore dal server
            if (parsed.type === 'error') {
              throw new Error(parsed.message)
            }

          } catch (parseErr) {
            // Ignora errori di parsing JSON parziale
            continue
          }
        }
      }

      // Finalizza messaggio assistant
      setMessages(prev =>
        prev.map(m =>
          m.id === assistantId
            ? {
                ...m,
                content:     fullContent,
                tools_used:  toolsUsed,
                tokens_used: tokensUsed,
                isStreaming: false
              }
            : m
        )
      )

      // Salva messaggio assistant su DB
      await saveMessage(convId, 'assistant', fullContent, toolsUsed, tokensUsed)

      // Aggiorna lista conversazioni
      await loadConversations()

    } catch (err: any) {
      if (err.name === 'AbortError') {
        // Stream cancellato dall'utente
        setMessages(prev =>
          prev.map(m =>
            m.id === assistantId
              ? { ...m, content: m.content + '\n\n*[Risposta interrotta]*', isStreaming: false }
              : m
          )
        )
      } else {
        setError(err.message ?? 'Errore durante la risposta')
        // Rimuovi placeholder se errore
        setMessages(prev => prev.filter(m => m.id !== assistantId))
      }
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
      setIsStreaming(false)
      setActiveTools([])
    }
  }, [
    conversationId,
    isLoading,
    messages,
    userId,
    createConversation,
    saveMessage,
    loadConversations
  ])

  // Cancella stream in corso
  const stopStreaming = useCallback(() => {
    abortControllerRef.current?.abort()
  }, [])

  // Nuova chat
  const newChat = useCallback(() => {
    setConversationId(null)
    setMessages([])
    setError(null)
    setActiveTools([])
  }, [])

  // Seleziona conversazione esistente
  const selectConversation = useCallback(async (convId: string) => {
    setConversationId(convId)
    await loadMessages(convId)
  }, [loadMessages])

  // Elimina conversazione
  const deleteConversation = useCallback(async (convId: string) => {
    await supabase
      .from('conversations')
      .delete()
      .eq('id', convId)

    setConversations(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== convId))

    if (conversationId === convId) {
      newChat()
    }
  }, [supabase, conversationId, newChat])

  return {
    messages,
    conversations,
    conversationId,
    isLoading,
    isStreaming,
    error,
    activeTools,
    sendMessage,
    stopStreaming,
    newChat,
    selectConversation,
    deleteConversation,
    loadConversations
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 41 — AUTH CALLBACK + PACCHETTO 42 — API CHAT ROUTE**

```tsx
// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 41 — AUTH CALLBACK ROUTE
// src/app/auth/callback/route.ts
// ============================================

import { createClient }   from '@/lib/supabase/server'
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const { searchParams, origin } = new URL(request.url)
  const code  = searchParams.get('code')
  const next  = searchParams.get('next') ?? '/dashboard'

  if (code) {
    const supabase = createClient()
    const { error } = await supabase.auth.exchangeCodeForSession(code)

    if (!error) {
      return NextResponse.redirect(`${origin}${next}`)
    }
  }

  // Redirect a pagina di errore
  return NextResponse.redirect(`${origin}/auth/error`)
}

// Executor dei tool
async function executeTool(
  toolName:  string,
  toolInput: Record<string, any>
): Promise<string> {
  const baseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3000'

  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/tools/${toolName}`, {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body:    JSON.stringify(toolInput)
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Tool ${toolName} failed: ${response.statusText}`)
    }

    const result = await response.json()
    return JSON.stringify(result)

  } catch (err: any) {
    return JSON.stringify({
      error:   true,
      message: err.message ?? `Errore nel tool ${toolName}`
    })
  }
}

  // Verifica autenticazione
  const supabase = createClient()
  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser()

  if (authError

// Executor dei tool
async function executeTool(
  toolName:  string,
  toolInput: Record<string, any>
): Promise<string> {
  const baseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3000'

  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/tools/${toolName}`, {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body:    JSON.stringify(toolInput)
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Tool ${toolName} failed: ${response.statusText}`)
    }

    const result = await response.json()
    return JSON.stringify(result)

  } catch (err: any) {
    return JSON.stringify({
      error:   true,
      message: err.message ?? `Errore nel tool ${toolName}`
    })
  }
}

const SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Sei Lara, l'AI Agent senior di Aethersy-AI — la piattaforma per imprenditori con il motto "Sogna, Realizza, Guadagna."

HAI ACCESSO REALE A INTERNET E AI SEGUENTI STRUMENTI:
🔍 search_web → cerca notizie, prezzi, mercati, aziende, trend, statistiche
📈 get_stock_price → prezzo live azioni
🪙 get_crypto_price → prezzo live crypto
🌐 scrape_url → leggi/analizza qualsiasi sito web
🏆 analyze_competitors → analisi competitor dettagliata
✍️ generate_seo_content → crea contenuti SEO, articoli, post social
📋 create_business_plan → crea piani di business completi
💰 calculate_roi → calcola ROI, ROAS, breakeven

REGOLE ASSOLUTE:
1. NON dire MAI "non posso cercare su internet" — HAI internet tramite search_web
2. NON dire MAI che hai un knowledge cutoff — CERCA SEMPRE dati aggiornati
3. Per qualsiasi dato di mercato, notizia, prezzo → USA search_web IMMEDIATAMENTE
4. Rispondi in italiano, tono professionale, diretto, concreto con dati reali
5. Sii PROATTIVO: usa i tool senza aspettare conferma dell'utente
6. Dopo ogni ricerca → sintetizza in modo actionable per l'imprenditore
7. Usa emoji per strutturare le risposte e renderle più leggibili
8. Formatta con markdown: **grassetto**, tabelle, liste, headers

SPECIALIZZAZIONI: business growth, digital marketing, finanza d'impresa, sviluppo software, automazioni, e-commerce, lead generation, SEO, social media, fundraising.`

// Executor dei tool
async function executeTool(
  toolName:  string,
  toolInput: Record<string, any>
): Promise<string> {
  const baseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3000'

  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/tools/${toolName}`, {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body:    JSON.stringify(toolInput)
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Tool ${toolName} failed: ${response.statusText}`)
    }

    const result = await response.json()
    return JSON.stringify(result)

  } catch (err: any) {
    return JSON.stringify({
      error:   true,
      message: err.message ?? `Errore nel tool ${toolName}`
    })
  }
}

// System prompt di Lara
const SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Sei Lara, l'AI Agent senior di Aethersy-AI — la piattaforma per imprenditori con il motto "Sogna, Realizza, Guadagna."

HAI ACCESSO REALE A INTERNET E AI SEGUENTI STRUMENTI:
🔍 search_web → cerca notizie, prezzi, mercati, aziende, trend, statistiche
📈 get_stock_price → prezzo live azioni
🪙 get_crypto_price → prezzo live crypto
🌐 scrape_url → leggi/analizza qualsiasi sito web
🏆 analyze_competitors → analisi competitor dettagliata
✍️ generate_seo_content → crea contenuti SEO, articoli, post social
📋 create_business_plan → crea piani di business completi
💰 calculate_roi → calcola ROI, ROAS, breakeven

REGOLE ASSOLUTE:
1. NON dire MAI "non posso cercare su internet" — HAI internet tramite search_web
2. NON dire MAI che hai un knowledge cutoff — CERCA SEMPRE dati aggiornati
3. Per qualsiasi dato di mercato, notizia, prezzo → USA search_web IMMEDIATAMENTE
4. Rispondi in italiano, tono professionale, diretto, concreto con dati reali
5. Sii PROATTIVO: usa i tool senza aspettare conferma dell'utente
6. Dopo ogni ricerca → sintetizza in modo actionable per l'imprenditore
7. Usa emoji per strutturare le risposte e renderle più leggibili
8. Formatta con markdown: **grassetto**, tabelle, liste, headers

SPECIALIZZAZIONI: business growth, digital marketing, finanza d'impresa, sviluppo software, automazioni, e-commerce, lead generation, SEO, social media, fundraising.`

// Executor dei tool
async function executeTool(
  toolName:  string,
  toolInput: Record<string, any>
): Promise<string> {
  const baseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3000'

  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/tools/${toolName}`, {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body:    JSON.stringify(toolInput)
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error(`Tool ${toolName} failed: ${response.statusText}`)
    }

    const result = await response.json()
    return JSON.stringify(result)

  } catch (err: any) {
    return JSON.stringify({
      error:   true,
      message: err.message ?? `Errore nel tool ${toolName}`
    })
  }
}

  const supabase = createClient()
  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser()

  if (authError

**PACCHETTO 42 — API CHAT ROUTE (fine) + PACCHETTO 43 — TOOLS API ROUTES**

```tsx
  if (authError || !user) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Unauthorized' }),
      { status: 401, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
    )
  }

  const { message, history, conversationId } = await request.json()

  if (!message?.trim()) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Message is required' }),
      { status: 400, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
    )
  }

  // Costruisci messaggi history
  const messages: Anthropic.MessageParam[] = [
    ...( history ?? []).map((m: any) => ({
      role:    m.role as 'user' | 'assistant',
      content: m.content
    })),
    { role: 'user', content: message }
  ]

  // Crea stream SSE
  const encoder = new TextEncoder()

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      const send = (data: object) => {
        controller.enqueue(
          encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`)
        )
      }

      try {
        let totalTokens  = 0
        let toolsUsed:   string[] = []
        let continueLoop = true

        // Agentic loop — continua finché Claude non smette di chiamare tool
        while (continueLoop) {
          const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
            model:      'claude-opus-4-5',
            max_tokens: 8096,
            system:     SYSTEM_PROMPT,
            tools:      TOOLS,
            messages
          })

          totalTokens += response.usage.input_tokens + response.usage.output_tokens

          // Processa ogni content block
          for (const block of response.content) {

            // Testo da inviare in streaming
            if (block.type === 'text') {
              // Simula streaming carattere per carattere
              const words = block.text.split(' ')
              for (const word of words) {
                send({ type: 'text', content: word + ' ' })
                // Piccolo delay per effetto streaming realistico
                await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 15))
              }
            }

            // Claude vuole usare un tool
            if (block.type === 'tool_use') {
              const toolName  = block.name
              const toolInput = block.input as Record<string, any>

              // Notifica UI: tool in esecuzione
              send({ type: 'tool_start', tool: toolName })

              // Esegui il tool
              const toolResult = await executeTool(toolName, toolInput)

              // Notifica UI: tool completato
              send({ type: 'tool_end', tool: toolName })
              toolsUsed.push(toolName)

              // Aggiungi risposta di Claude ai messaggi
              messages.push({
                role:    'assistant',
                content: response.content
              })

              // Aggiungi risultato tool ai messaggi
              messages.push({
                role: 'user',
                content: [{
                  type:        'tool_result',
                  tool_use_id: block.id,
                  content:     toolResult
                }]
              })
            }
          }

          // Controlla stop reason
          if (
            response.stop_reason === 'end_turn' ||
            response.stop_reason === 'stop_sequence'
          ) {
            continueLoop = false
          } else if (response.stop_reason !== 'tool_use') {
            continueLoop = false
          }
        }

        // Metadata finali
        send({
          type:       'metadata',
          tokens:     totalTokens,
          tools_used: toolsUsed
        })

        // Fine stream
        send('[DONE]')
        controller.close()

      } catch (err: any) {
        send({ type: 'error', message: err.message ?? 'Errore interno' })
        controller.close()
      }
    }
  })

  return new Response(stream, {
    headers: {
      'Content-Type':  'text/eve

**PACCHETTO 43 — TOOLS API ROUTES (completo)**

```tsx
// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 43 — TOOLS API ROUTES
// src/app/api/tools/[tool]/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import Exa                           from 'exa-js'
import Anthropic                     from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'

const exa       = new Exa(process.env.EXA_API_KEY!)
const anthropic = new Anthropic({ apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY! })

// ── search_web ──────────────────────────────
async function searchWeb(input: { query: string; deep?: boolean }) {
  const { query, deep = false } = input

  const result = await exa.searchAndContents(query, {
    numResults:      deep ? 10 : 5,
    useAutoprompt:   true,
    type:            'neural',
    highlights:      { numSentences: 3, highlightsPerUrl: 2 },
    summary:         { query },
    livecrawl:       'always'
  })

  return {
    query,
    results: result.results.map(r => ({
      title:     r.title,
      url:       r.url,
      summary:   r.summary,
      highlight: r.highlights?.[0] ?? '',
      published: r.publishedDate
    }))
  }
}

// ── get_stock_price ─────────────────────────
async function getStockPrice(input: { symbol: string }) {
  const { symbol } = input
  const apiKey     = process.env.ALPHA_VANTAGE_KEY!

  const url = `https://www.alphavantage.co/query?function=GLOBAL_QUOTE&symbol=${symbol}&apikey=${apiKey}`
  const res  = await fetch(url)
  const data = await res.json()

  const quote = data['Global Quote']
  if (!quote || !quote['05. price']) {
    // Fallback: cerca su Exa
    const fallback = await exa.searchAndContents(
      `${symbol} stock price today`,
      { numResults: 3, livecrawl: 'always', summary: { query: 'current stock price' } }
    )
    return {
      symbol,
      source:  'web_search',
      results: fallback.results.map(r => ({ title: r.title, summary: r.summary, url: r.url }))
    }
  }

  return {
    symbol,
    price:          parseFloat(quote['05. price']),
    change:         parseFloat(quote['09. change']),
    change_percent: quote['10. change percent'],
    volume:         parseInt(quote['06. volume']),
    latest_day:     quote['07. latest trading day'],
    open:           parseFloat(quote['02. open']),
    high:           parseFloat(quote['03. high']),
    low:            parseFloat(quote['04. low']),
    prev_close:     parseFloat(quote['08. previous close'])
  }
}

// ── get_crypto_price ────────────────────────
async function getCryptoPrice(input: { coin: string }) {
  const { coin } = input
  const coinId   = coin.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-')

  const url = `https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3/simple/price?ids=${coinId}&vs_currencies=usd,eur&include_24hr_change=true&include_market_cap=true&include_24hr_vol=true`
  const res  = await fetch(url, {
    headers: process.env.COINGECKO_API_KEY
      ? { 'x-cg-pro-api-key': process.env.COINGECKO_API_KEY }
      : {}
  })
  const data = await res.json()

  if (!data[coinId]) {
    return { error: `Crypto "${coin}" non trovata`, coin }
  }

  const c = data[coinId]
  return {
    coin:           coinId,
    price_usd:      c.usd,
    price_eur:      c.eur,
    change_24h:     c.usd_24h_change?.toFixed(2),
    market_cap_usd: c.usd_market_cap,
    volume_24h_usd: c.usd_24h_vol
  }
}

// ── scrape_url ──────────────────────────────

  const { url } = input
query.json

```tsx
  const result = await exa.getContents([url], {
    text:       { maxCharacters: 5000 },
    highlights: { numSentences: 5, highlightsPerUrl: 3 },
    summary:    { query: 'main content and key information' }
  })

  const page = result.results[0]
  if (!page) {
    return { error: `Impossibile leggere la pagina: ${url}` }
  }

  return {
    url,
    title:      page.title,
    summary:    page.summary,
    highlights: page.highlights,
    text:       page.text?.slice(0, 3000),
    published:  page.publishedDate,
    author:     page.author
  }
}

// ── analyze_competitors ─────────────────────
async function analyzeCompetitors(input: { business: string; aspect?: string }) {
  const { business, aspect = 'generale' } = input

  const query = `${business} competitor analysis ${aspect} 2024 2025`

  const [searchResult, directResult] = await Promise.all([
    exa.searchAndContents(query, {
      numResults:    8,
      useAutoprompt: true,
      livecrawl:     'always',
      summary:       { query: `competitor analysis ${aspect}` }
    }),
    exa.searchAndContents(`${business} vs competitor pricing features`, {
      numResults:    5,
      useAutoprompt: true,
      livecrawl:     'always',
      summary:       { query: 'pricing and features comparison' }
    })
  ])

  // Usa Claude per sintetizzare l'analisi
  const rawData = [
    ...searchResult.results.map(r => `${r.title}\n${r.summary}`),
    ...directResult.results.map(r => `${r.title}\n${r.summary}`)
  ].join('\n\n---\n\n')

  const synthesis = await anthropic.messages.create({
    model:      'claude-haiku-4-5',
    max_tokens: 2000,
    messages: [{
      role:    'user',
      content: `Analizza i competitor di "${business}" con focus su "${aspect}".

Dati raccolti:
${rawData}

Fornisci:
1. Top 3-5 competitor principali
2. Positioning e differenziatori
3. Punti di forza e debolezza di ciascuno
4. Opportunità di mercato
5. Raccomandazioni strategiche

Formato: strutturato con emoji e markdown.`
    }]
  })

  return {
    business,
    aspect,
    analysis:  synthesis.content[0].type === 'text' ? synthesis.content[0].text : '',
    sources:   searchResult.results.map(r => ({ title: r.title, url: r.url }))
  }
}

// ── generate_seo_content ────────────────────
async function generateSeoContent(input: {
  topic:     string
  type:      string
  keywords?: string
}) {
  const { topic, type, keywords } = input

  // Prima cerca dati aggiornati sull'argomento
  const research = await exa.searchAndContents(
    `${topic} ${keywords ?? ''} 2025`,
    {
      numResults:    5,
      useAutoprompt: true,
      livecrawl:     'always',
      summary:       { query: topic }
    }
  )

  const contextData = research.results
    .map(r => `${r.title}: ${r.summary}`)
    .join('\n\n')

  const prompts: Record<string, string> = {
    article: `Scrivi un articolo SEO completo su "${topic}".
Keywords: ${keywords ?? topic}
Contesto aggiornato: ${contextData}

Includi: H1, H2, H3, introduzione coinvolgente, corpo dell'articolo (1500+ parole), FAQ, conclusione con CTA.
Ottimizzato per SEO: keyword density 1-2%, LSI keywords, meta description finale.`,

    meta: `Crea 3 varianti di meta description per "${topic}".
Keywords: ${keywords ?? topic}
Ogni meta: max 155 caratteri, include keyword principale, CTA, vantaggio chiaro.`,

    title: `Crea 10 title tag SEO per "${topic}".
Keywords: ${keywords ?? topic}
Ogni title: max 60 caratteri, include keyword, numero o power word dove
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 44 — TOOLS AVANZATI (continuo)**

```tsx
    title: `Crea 10 title tag SEO per "${topic}".
Keywords: ${keywords ?? topic}
Ogni title: max 60 caratteri, include keyword, numero o power word dove possibile.
Formato: lista numerata con spiegazione breve per ciascuno.`,

    outline: `Crea un outline dettagliato per un articolo su "${topic}".
Keywords: ${keywords ?? topic}
Contesto: ${contextData}

Includi: H1 principale, 5-7 sezioni H2 con 2-3 H3 ciascuna, punti chiave per ogni sezione, 
keyword placement suggerito, internal/external link opportunities.`,

    faq: `Crea 10 FAQ ottimizzate SEO su "${topic}".
Keywords: ${keywords ?? topic}
Contesto aggiornato: ${contextData}

Per ogni FAQ: domanda naturale (come la cercherebbero su Google), risposta concisa 50-100 parole,
include keyword varianti. Formato schema markup ready.`,

    social_post: `Crea 5 post social su "${topic}" per diversi canali.
Keywords: ${keywords ?? topic}

Crea per:
1. LinkedIn (professionale, 150-200 parole, insight + CTA)
2. Instagram (coinvolgente, emoji, hashtag x15, 100-150 parole)
3. Twitter/X (max 280 caratteri, hook forte, hashtag x3)
4. Facebook (conversazionale, 100-150 parole, domanda finale)
5. TikTok caption (trendy, hook nei primi 3 secondi, hashtag x10)`
  }

  const prompt = prompts[type] ?? prompts['article']

  const content = await anthropic.messages.create({
    model:      'claude-opus-4-5',
    max_tokens: 4000,
    messages: [{
      role:    'user',
      content: prompt
    }]
  })

  return {
    topic,
    type,
    keywords,
    content:  content.content[0].type === 'text' ? content.content[0].text : '',
    sources:  research.results.map(r => ({ title: r.title, url: r.url })),
    tokens:   content.usage.input_tokens + content.usage.output_tokens
  }
}

// ── create_business_plan ────────────────────
async function createBusinessPlan(input: {
  name:         string
  description:  string
  type?:        string
}) {
  const { name, description, type = 'startup' } = input

  // Ricerca di mercato automatica
  const [marketResearch, competitorData] = await Promise.all([
    exa.searchAndContents(
      `${name} ${description} market size trends 2025`,
      {
        numResults:    6,
        useAutoprompt: true,
        livecrawl:     'always',
        summary:       { query: 'market size, trends, opportunities' }
      }
    ),
    exa.searchAndContents(
      `${description} competitor landscape pricing model`,
      {
        numResults:    5,
        useAutoprompt: true,
        livecrawl:     'always',
        summary:       { query: 'competitors and business models' }
      }
    )
  ])

  const marketData     = marketResearch.results.map(r => `${r.title}: ${r.summary}`).join('\n\n')
  const competitorInfo = competitorData.results.map(r => `${r.title}: ${r.summary}`).join('\n\n')

  const plan = await anthropic.messages.create({
    model:      'claude-opus-4-5',
    max_tokens: 6000,
    messages: [{
      role:    'user',
      content: `Crea un business plan professionale e dettagliato per:

Nome: ${name}
Tipo: ${type}
Descrizione: ${description}

Dati di mercato aggiornati:
${marketData}

Panoramica competitor:
${competitorInfo}

Il business plan deve includere:

## 1. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
## 2. ANALISI DI MERCATO
- Dimensione mercato (TAM/SAM/SOM)
- Trend e opportunità
- Target audience dettagliato

## 3. MODELLO DI BUSINESS
- Value proposition unica
- Revenue streams
- Pricing strategy
- Unit economics (LTV, CAC, margins)

## 4. ANALISI COMPETITIVA
- Competitor diretti e indiretti
- Matrice di posizionamento

- Vantaggi competitivi e moat

## 5. STRATEGIA GO-TO-MARKET
- Canali di acquisizione
- Marketing funnel

## 6. PIANO OPERATIVO

- Obiettivi Anno 2-3

    plan:    plan.content[0].type === 'text' ? plan.content[0].text : '',

// ── calculate_roi ───────────────────────────
async function calculateRoi(input: {
  investment: number
  revenue:    number
  context?:   string
}) {
  const { investment, revenue, context = 'generico' } = input

  const profit       = revenue - investment
  const roi          = ((profit / investment) * 100).toFixed(2)
  const roas         = (revenue / investment).toFixed(2)
  const breakevenPct = ((investment / revenue) * 100).toFixed(2)
  const margin       = ((profit / revenue) * 100).toFixed(2)

  // Benchmark di settore via ricerca
  const benchmarks = await exa.searchAndContents(
    `${context} ROI benchmark average 2025 marketing`,
    {
      numResults:    4,
      useAutoprompt: true,
      livecrawl:     'always',
      summary:       { query: 'average ROI and ROAS benchmarks' }
    }
  )

  const analysis = await anthropic.messages.create({
    model:      'claude-haiku-4-5',
    max_tokens: 1000,
    messages: [{
      role:    'user',
      content: `Analizza questi dati ROI per il contesto "${context}":

Investimento: €${investment.toLocaleString('it-IT')}
Revenue:      €${revenue.toLocaleString('it-IT')}
Profitto:     €${profit.toLocaleString('it-IT')}
ROI:          ${roi}%
ROAS:         ${roas}x
Margin:       ${margin}%

Benchmark di settore:
${benchmarks.results.map(r => r.summary).join('\n')}

Fornisci:
1. Valutazione della performance (ottima/buona/da migliorare)
2. Confronto con benchmark di settore
3. 3 raccomandazioni concrete per migliorare il ROI
4. Proiezioni se si scala l'investimento x2 e x5

Formato: conciso, dati chiari, emoji.`
    }]
  })

  return {
    input: { investment, revenue, context },
    metrics: {
      profit:       profit,
      roi_percent:  parseFloat(roi),
      roas:         parseFloat(roas),
      margin:       parseFloat(margin),
      breakeven_at: `${breakevenPct}% del revenue`
    },

      scale_2x: {
        investment: investment * 2,
        revenue:    revenue    * 2,
        profit:     profit     * 2
      },
      scale_5x: {
        investment: investment * 5,
        revenue:    revenue    * 5,
        profit:     profit     * 5
      }
    },

// ============================================
// ROUTE HANDLER PRINCIPALE
// ============================================

const toolHandlers: Record<string, (input: any) => Promise<any>> = {
  search_web:           searchWeb,
  get_stock_price:      getStockPrice,
  get_crypto_price:     getCryptoPrice,
  scrape_url:           scrapeUrl,
  analyze_competitors:  analyzeCompetitors,
  generate_seo_content: generateSeoContent,
  create_business_plan: createBusinessPlan,
  calculate_roi:        calculateRoi
}

export async function POST(
  request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: { tool: string } }
) {
  try {
    const toolName = params.tool

    if (!toolHandlers[toolName]) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: `Tool "${toolName}" non trovato` },
        { status: 404 }
      )
    }

    const input  = await request.json()
    const result = await toolHandlers[toolName](input)

    return NextResponse.json(result)

  } catch (err: any) {
    console.error(`[Tool Error]`, err)
    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        error:   true,
        message: err.message ?? 'Errore interno del tool'
      },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 46 — MIDDLEWARE AUTH
// src/middleware.ts
// ============================================

import { createServerClient, type CookieOptions } from '@supabase/ssr'
import { NextResponse, type NextRequest }          from 'next/server'

export async function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  let response = NextResponse.next({
    request: { headers: request.headers }
  })

  const supabase = createServerClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
    {
      cookies: {
        get(name: string) {
          return request.cookies.get(name)?.value
        },
        set(name: string, value: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          request.cookies.set({ name, value, ...options })
          response = NextResponse.next({
            request: { headers: request.headers }
          })
          response.cookies.set({ name, value, ...options })
        },
        remove(name: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          request.cookies.set({ name, value: '', ...options })
          response = NextResponse.next({
            request: { headers: request.headers }
          })
          response.cookies.set({ name, value: '', ...options })
        }
      }
    }
  )

  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
  const { pathname }       = request.nextUrl

  // Rotte protette
  const protectedRoutes = [
    '/dashboard',
    '/chat',
    '/settings',
    '/billing',
    '/api/chat',
    '/api/tools'
  ]

  // Rotte pubbliche (sempre accessibili)
  const publicRoutes = [
    '/',
    '/login',
    '/signup',
    '/forgot-password',
    '/reset-password',
    '/pricing',
    '/about',
    '/api/auth'
  ]

  const isProtected = protectedRoutes.some(r => pathname.startsWith(r))
  const isPublic    = publicRoutes.some(r    => pathname.startsWith(r))
  const isApiRoute  = pathname.startsWith('/api/')

  // Redirect a login se non autenticato su rotta protetta
  if (isProtected && !user) {
    if (isApiRoute) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Unauthorized' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url)
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname)
    return NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl)
  }

  // Redirect a dashboard se già loggato su login/signup
  if (user && (pathname === '/login' || pathname === '/signup')) {
    return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/dashboard', request.url))
  }

  // Rate limiting base per API routes
  if (isApiRoute && user) {
    // Header per identificare l'utente nelle API
Continuo. 🔥

    response.headers.set('x-user-id',    user.id)
    response.headers.set('x-user-email', user.email ?? '')
  }

  // Security headers
  response.headers.set('X-Frame-Options',           'DENY')
  response.headers.set('X-Content-Type-Options',    'nosniff')
  response.headers.set('Referrer-Policy',            'strict-origin-when-cross-origin')
  response.headers.set('Permissions-Policy',         'camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()')
  response.headers.set(
    'Content-Security-Policy',
    [
      "default-src 'self'",
      "script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'",
      "style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com",
      "font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com",
      "img-src 'self' data: https: blob:",
      "connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://api.anthropic.com"
    ].join('; ')
  )

  return response
}

// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 47 — SUPABASE CLIENT UTILS
// src/lib/supabase/client.ts
// ============================================

import { createBrowserClient } from '@supabase/ssr'
import type { Database }       from '@/types/supabase'

let client: ReturnType<typeof createBrowserClient<Database>> | null = null

export function getSupabaseBrowserClient() {
  if (!client) {
    client = createBrowserClient<Database>(
      process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
      process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!
    )
  }
  return client
}

// ============================================
// src/lib/supabase/server.ts
// ============================================

import { createServerClient, type CookieOptions } from '@supabase/ssr'
import { cookies }                                 from 'next/headers'
import type { Database }                           from '@/types/supabase'

export function getSupabaseServerClient() {
  const cookieStore = cookies()

  return createServerClient<Database>(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
    {
      cookies: {
        get(name: string) {
          return cookieStore.get(name)?.value
        },
        set(name: string, value: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          try { cookieStore.set({ name, value, ...options }) } catch {}
        },
        remove(name: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          try { cookieStore.set({ name, value: '', ...options }) } catch {}
        }
      }
    }
  )
}

export function getSupabaseServerAdminClient() {
  const cookieStore = cookies()

  return createServerClient<Database>(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,      // Admin key — solo server
    {
      cookies: {
        get(name: string) {
          return cookieStore.get(name)?.value
        },
        set(name: string, value: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          try { cookieStore.set({ name, value, ...options }) } catch {}
        },
        remove(name: string, options: CookieOptions) {
          try { cookieStore.set({ name, value: '', ...options }) } catch {}
        }
      },
      auth: {
        autoRefreshToken:   false,
        persistSession:     false
      }
    }
  )
}

// PACCHETTO 49 — AUTH HOOKS
// src/hooks/useAuth.ts
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
import { useRouter }                         from 'next/navigation'
import { getSupabaseBrowserClient }          from '@/lib/supabase/client'
import type { User, Session }                from '@supabase/supabase-js'
import type { Profile }                      from '@/types/supabase'

interface AuthState {
  user:        User    | null
  session:     Session | null
  profile:     Profile | null
  loading:     boolean
  initialized: boolean
}

interface AuthActions {
  signIn:       (email: string, password: string) => Promise<{ error: string | null }>
  signUp:       (email: string, password: string, fullName: string) => Promise<{ error: string | null }>
  signOut:      () => Promise<void>
  signInGoogle: () => Promise<void>
  updateProfile:(data: Partial<Profile>) => Promise<{ error: string | null }>
  refreshProfile: () => Promise<void>
}

export function useAuth(): AuthState & AuthActions {
  const router   = useRouter()
  const supabase = getSupabaseBrowserClient()

  const [state, setState] = useState<AuthState>({
    user:        null,
    session:     null,
    profile:     null,
    loading:     true,
    initialized: false
  })

  // Fetch profile dal DB
  const fetchProfile = useCallback(async (userId: string) => {
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('profiles')
      .select('*')
      .eq('id', userId)
      .single()
    return data as Profile | null
  }, [supabase])

  const refreshProfile = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!state.user) return
    const profile = await fetchProfile(state.user.id)
    setState(prev => ({ ...prev, profile }))
  }, [state.user, fetchProfile])

  // Init auth state
  useEffect(() => {
    supabase.auth.getSession().then(async ({ data: { session } }) => {
      const profile = session?.user
        ? await fetchProfile(session.user.id)
        : null

      setState({
        user:        session?.user    ?? null,
        session:     session          ?? null,
        profile,
        loading:     false,
        initialized: true
      })
    })

    // Listener per cambi auth
    const { data: { subscription } } = supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange(
      async (event, session) => {
        const profile = session?.user
          ? await fetchProfile(session.user.id)
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 49 — AUTH HOOKS (fine) + PACCHETTO 50 — CHAT HOOK**

```tsx
        if (event === 'SIGNED_IN')  router.refresh()
        if (event === 'SIGNED_OUT') router.push('/login')
      }
    )

    return () => subscription.unsubscribe()
  }, [supabase, router, fetchProfile])

  // ── Actions ───────────────────────────────

  const signIn = useCallback(async (email: string, password: string) => {
    setState(prev => ({ ...prev, loading: true }))
    const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password })
    setState(prev => ({ ...prev, loading: false }))
    if (error) return { error: error.message }
    router.push('/dashboard')
    return { error: null }
  }, [supabase, router])

  const signUp = useCallback(async (
    email:    string,
    password: string,
    fullName: string
  ) => {
    setState(prev => ({ ...prev, loading: true }))
    const { error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({
      email,
      password,
      options: {
        data:        { full_name: fullName },
        emailRedirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/auth/callback`
      }
    })
    setState(prev => ({ ...prev, loading: false }))
    if (error) return { error: error.message }
    return { error: null }
  }, [supabase])

  const signOut = useCallback(async () => {
    await supabase.auth.signOut()
    router.push('/login')
  }, [supabase, router])

  const signInGoogle = useCallback(async () => {
    await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({
      provider: 'google',
      options: {
        redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/auth/callback`,
        queryParams: {
          access_type: 'offline',
          prompt:      'consent'
        }
      }
    })
  }, [supabase])

  const updateProfile = useCallback(async (data: Partial<Profile>) => {
    if (!state.user) return { error: 'Non autenticato' }
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from('profiles')
      .update({ ...data, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
      .eq('id', state.user.id)
    if (error) return { error: error.message }
    await refreshProfile()
    return { error: null }
  }, [supabase, state.user, refreshProfile])

  return {
    ...state,
    signIn,
    signUp,
    signOut,
    signInGoogle,
    updateProfile,
    refreshProfile
  }
}

// PACCHETTO 50 — CHAT HOOK
// src/hooks/useChat.ts

'use client'

import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react'
import { getSupabaseBrowserClient }                  from '@/lib/supabase/client'
import type { Message, Conversation }                from '@/types/supabase'

interface UseChatOptions {
  conversationId?: string
  onError?:        (err: string) => void
}

interface ChatState {
  messages:       Message[]
  conversation:   Conversation | null
  loading:        boolean
  streaming:      boolean
  streamingText:  string
  error:          string | null
}

interface ChatActions {
  sendMessage:       (content: string) => Promise<void>
  loadConversation:  (id: string) => Promise<void>
  newConversation:   () => void
  clearError:        () => void
  stopStreaming:      () => void
}

export function useChat(options: UseChatOptions = {}): ChatState & ChatActions {
  const supabase   = getSupabaseBrowserClient()
  const abortRef   = useRef<AbortController | null>(null)

  const [state, setState] = useState<ChatState>({
    messages:      [],
    conversation:  null,
    loading:       false,
    streaming:     false,
    streamingText: '',
    error:         null
  })

  // Carica conversazione esistente
  const loadConversation = useCallback(async (id: string) => {
    setState(prev => ({ ...prev, loading: true }))

    const [{ data: conv }, { data: msgs }] = await Promise.all([
      supabase.from('conversations').select('*').eq('id', id).single(),
      supabase.from('messages')
        .select('*')
        .eq
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 50 — CHAT HOOK (fine) + PACCHETTO 51 — STORE ZUSTAND**

```tsx
        .eq('conversation_id', id)
        .order('created_at', { ascending: true })
    ])

    setState(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      conversation: conv  as Conversation | null,
      messages:     (msgs as Message[]) ?? [],
      loading:      false
    }))
  }, [supabase])

  // Init con conversationId opzionale
  useEffect(() => {
    if (options.conversationId) {
      loadConversation(options.conversationId)
    }
  }, [options.conversationId, loadConversation])

  // Nuova conversazione
  const newConversation = useCallback(() => {
    abortRef.current?.abort()
    setState({
      messages:      [],
      conversation:  null,
      loading:       false,
      streaming:     false,
      streamingText: '',
      error:         null
    })
  }, [])

  // Stop streaming
  const stopStreaming = useCallback(() => {
    abortRef.current?.abort()
    setState(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      streaming:     false,
      streamingText: ''
    }))
  }, [])

  // Invia messaggio
  const sendMessage = useCallback(async (content: string) => {
    if (!content.trim() || state.streaming) return

    // Messaggio utente ottimistico
    const userMsg: Partial<Message> = {
      id:         crypto.randomUUID(),
      role:       'user',
      content,
      created_at: new Date().toISOString()
    }

    setState(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      messages:  [...prev.messages, userMsg as Message],
      streaming: true,
      error:     null
    }))

    abortRef.current = new AbortController()

    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/chat', {
        method:  'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        signal:  abortRef.current.signal,
        body: JSON.stringify({
          messages: [
            ...state.messages.map(m => ({
              role:    m.role,
              content: m.content
            })),
            { role: 'user', content }
          ],
          conversationId: state.conversation?.id
        })
      })

      if (!response.ok) {
        const err = await response.json()
        throw new Error(err.error ?? 'Errore API')
      }

      // Leggi stream SSE
      const reader  = response.body!.getReader()
      const decoder = new TextDecoder()
      let   fullText = ''
      let   convId   = state.conversation?.id ?? null

      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read()
        if (done) break

        const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
        const lines = chunk.split('\n').filter(l => l.startsWith('data: '))

        for (const line of lines) {
          const data = line.replace('data: ', '').trim()
          if (data === '[DONE]') break

          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(data)

            if (parsed.type === 'conversation_id') {
              convId = parsed.id
              continue
            }
            if (parsed.type === 'text') {
              fullText += parsed.content
              setState(prev => ({
                ...prev,
                streamingText: fullText
              }))
            }
          } catch {}
        }
      }

      // Messaggio assistant finale
      const assistantMsg: Partial<Message> = {
        id:              crypto.randomUUID(),
        role:            'assistant',
        content:         fullText,
        created_at:      new Date().toISOString(),
        conversation_id: convId ?? undefined
      }

      setState(prev => ({
        ...prev,
        messages:      [...prev.messages, assistantMsg as Message],
        streaming:     false,
        streamingText: '',
        conversation:  convId
          ? { ...(prev.conversation ?? {}), id: convId } as Conversation
          : prev.conversation
      }))

    } catch (err: any) {
      if (err.name === 'AbortError') return
      const msg = err.message ?? 'Errore sconosciuto'
      setState(prev => ({
        ...prev
Continuo. 🔥

    stopStreaming
  }
}

import { create }               from 'zustand'
import { persist, devtools }    from 'zustand/middleware'
import { immer }                from 'zustand/middleware/immer'
import type { Profile }         from '@/types/supabase'

// ── Tipi ──────────────────────────────────────

interface Conversation {
  id:         string
  title:      string | null
  created_at: string
  pinned:     boolean
  archived:   boolean
}

type Theme      = 'dark' | 'light' | 'system'
type SidebarTab = 'chat' | 'history' | 'settings'

interface AppState {
  // UI
  theme:            Theme
  sidebarOpen:      boolean
  sidebarTab:       SidebarTab
  commandPaletteOpen: boolean

  // User
  profile:          Profile | null
  isProUser:        boolean

  // Conversations
  conversations:    Conversation[]
  activeConvId:     string | null

  // Notifications
  notifications:    Notification[]
  unreadCount:      number
}

interface Notification {
  id:        string
  type:      'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'
  title:     string
  message:   string
  read:      boolean
  timestamp: string
}

interface AppActions {
  // UI
  setTheme:              (theme: Theme) => void
  toggleSidebar:         () => void
  setSidebarOpen:        (open: boolean) => void
  setSidebarTab:         (tab: SidebarTab) => void
  toggleCommandPalette:  () => void

  // User
  setProfile:            (profile: Profile | null) => void

  // Conversations
  setConversations:      (convs: Conversation[]) => void
  addConversation:       (conv: Conversation) => void
  updateConversation:    (id: string, data: Partial<Conversation>) => void
  deleteConversation:    (id: string) => void
  setActiveConvId:       (id: string | null) => void
  pinConversation:       (id: string) => void
  archiveConversation:   (id: string) => void

  // Notifications
  addNotification:       (n: Omit<Notification, 'id' | 'read' | 'timestamp'>) => void
  markNotificationRead:  (id: string) => void
  clearNotifications:    () => void

  // Reset
  reset:                 () => void
}

// ── Initial State ─────────────────────────────

const initialState: AppState = {
  theme:              'dark',
  sidebarOpen:        true,
  sidebarTab:         'chat',
  commandPaletteOpen: false,
  profile:            null,
  isProUser:          false,
  conversations:      [],
  activeConvId:       null,
  notifications:      [],
  unreadCount:        0
}

// ── Store ─────────────────────────────────────

export const useAppStore = create<AppState & AppActions>()(
  devtools(
    persist(
      immer((set, get) => ({
        ...initialState,

        // ── UI ──────────────────────────────
        setTheme: (theme) => set(state => {
          state.theme = theme
        }),

        toggleSidebar: () => set(state => {
          state.sidebarOpen = !state.sidebarOpen
        }),

        setSidebarOpen: (open) => set(state => {
          state.sidebarOpen = open
        }),

        setSidebarTab: (tab) => set(state => {
          state.sidebarTab = tab
        }),

        toggleCommandPalette: () => set(state => {
          state.commandPaletteOpen = !state.commandPaletteOpen
        }),

        // ── User ────────────────────────────
        setProfile: (profile) => set(state => {
          state.profile   = profile
          state.isProUser = profile?.plan === 'pro' ||
                            profile?.plan === 'enterprise'
        }),

        // ── Conversations ────────────────────
        setConversations: (convs
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 51 — STORE ZUSTAND (fine) + PACCHETTO 52 — API CHAT ROUTE**

```tsx
        setConversations: (convs) => set(state => {
          state.conversations = convs
        }),

        addConversation: (conv) => set(state => {
          state.conversations.unshift(conv)
          state.activeConvId = conv.id
        }),

        updateConversation: (id, data) => set(state => {
          const idx = state.conversations.findIndex(c => c.id === id)
          if (idx !== -1) {
            Object.assign(state.conversations[idx], data)
          }
        }),

        deleteConversation: (id) => set(state => {
          state.conversations  = state.conversations.filter(c => c.id !== id)
          if (state.activeConvId === id) {
            state.activeConvId = state.conversations[0]?.id ?? null
          }
        }),

        setActiveConvId: (id) => set(state => {
          state.activeConvId = id
        }),

        pinConversation: (id) => set(state => {
          const conv = state.conversations.find(c => c.id === id)
          if (conv) conv.pinned = !conv.pinned
        }),

        archiveConversation: (id) => set(state => {
          const conv = state.conversations.find(c => c.id === id)
          if (conv) conv.archived = !conv.archived
        }),

        // ── Notifications ────────────────────
        addNotification: (n) => set(state => {
          const notification: Notification = {
            ...n,
            id:        crypto.randomUUID(),
            read:      false,
            timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
          }
          state.notifications.unshift(notification)
          state.unreadCount += 1
        }),

        markNotificationRead: (id) => set(state => {
          const n = state.notifications.find(n => n.id === id)
          if (n && !n.read) {
            n.read = true
            state.unreadCount = Math.max(0, state.unreadCount - 1)
          }
        }),

        clearNotifications: () => set(state => {
          state.notifications = []
          state.unreadCount   = 0
        }),

        // ── Reset ────────────────────────────
        reset: () => set(() => ({ ...initialState }))
      })),
      {
        name:    'aethersy-store',
        partialize: (state) => ({
          theme:         state.theme,
          sidebarOpen:   state.sidebarOpen,
          sidebarTab:    state.sidebarTab,
          activeConvId:  state.activeConvId
        })
      }
    ),
    { name: 'AethersyStore' }
  )
)

// ── Selectors ─────────────────────────────────

export const selectPinnedConversations = (state: AppState) =>
  state.conversations.filter(c => c.pinned && !c.archived)

export const selectRecentConversations = (state: AppState) =>
  state.conversations
    .filter(c => !c.pinned && !c.archived)
    .slice(0, 20)

export const selectArchivedConversations = (state: AppState) =>
  state.conversations.filter(c => c.archived)

import { NextRequest, NextResponse }  from 'next/server'
import Anthropic                       from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'
import { getSupabaseServerClient }     from '@/lib/supabase/server'
import { rateLimit }                   from '@/lib/rate-limit'
import { z }                           from 'zod'

const client = new Anthropic({
  apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY!
})

// ── Schema validazione ────────────────────────
const ChatSchema = z.object({
  messages: z.array(z.object({
    role:    z.enum(['user', 'assistant']),
    content: z.string().min(1).max(32_000)
  })).min(1).max(100),
  conversationId: z.string().uuid().optional()
})

// ── System prompt ─────────────────────────────
const SYSTEM_PROMPT = `Sei Lara, l'AI Agent senior di Aethersy-AI.
Sei esperta in: business growth, digital marketing, finanza d'
Continuo. 🔥
