// ============================================
// PACCHETTO 71 — CUSTOM HOOKS
// src/hooks/use-chat.ts
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useState, useCallback, useRef }  from 'react'
import { useRouter }                       from 'next/navigation'
import { useChatStore }                    from '@/store/chat-store'
import { useUserStore }                    from '@/store/user-store'
import { apiClient }                       from '@/lib/api-client'
import { API, ROUTES }                     from '@/lib/constants'
import { generateId }                      from '@/lib/utils'
import { toast }                           from 'sonner'
import type { Message, Conversation }      from '@/types'

interface UseChatOptions {
  conversationId?: string
  onResponse?:     (message: Message) => void
  onError?:        (error: string)    => void
}

export function useChat(options: UseChatOptions = {}) {
  const { conversationId, onResponse, onError } = options
  const router = useRouter()

  const {
    activeConversation,
    addMessage,
    updateMessage,
    setStreaming,
    setLoading,
    setActiveConversation,
    addConversation,
  } = useChatStore()

  const { user, deductCredits } = useUserStore()

  const [isStreaming, setIsStreamingLocal] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError]                  = useState<string | null>(null)
  const abortRef                           = useRef<AbortController | null>(null)

  const sendMessage = useCallback(
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 71 — HOOKS (continua)**

```tsx
  const sendMessage = useCallback(
    async (content: string, model?: string) => {
      if (!content.trim()) return
      if (!user) { toast.error('Devi essere autenticato'); return }

      // Abort precedente se in corso
      abortRef.current?.abort()
      abortRef.current = new AbortController()

      const userMessage: Message = {
        id:        generateId('msg'),
        role:      'user',
        content:   content.trim(),
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      }

      const assistantMessage: Message = {
        id:        generateId('msg'),
        role:      'assistant',
        content:   '',
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        isStreaming: true,
      }

      // Aggiungi messaggi localmente
      addMessage(userMessage)
      addMessage(assistantMessage)
      setIsStreamingLocal(true)
      setStreaming(true)
      setError(null)

      try {
        const res = await fetch(API.chat.stream, {
          method:  'POST',
          signal:  abortRef.current.signal,
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            conversationId: conversationId ?? activeConversation?.id,
            message:        content.trim(),
            model:          model ?? user.preferences?.defaultModel ?? 'gpt-4o-mini',
          }),
        })

        if (!res.ok) {
          const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Errore del server' }))
          throw new Error(err.error ?? 'Errore del server')
        }

        // ── STREAM READER ────────────────────────────
        const reader  = res.body?.getReader()
        const decoder = new TextDecoder()
        let accumulated = ''

        if (!reader) throw new Error('Stream non disponibile')

        while (true) {
          const { done, value } = await reader.read()
          if (done) break

          const chunk = decoder.decode(value, { stream: true })
          const lines = chunk.split('\n')

          for (const line of lines) {
            if (!line.startsWith('data: ')) continue
            const data = line.slice(6).trim()
            if (data === '[DONE]') break

            try {
              const parsed = JSON.parse(data)

              // Delta di testo
              if (parsed.type === 'text') {
                accumulated += parsed.content
                updateMessage(assistantMessage.id, {
                  content:     accumulated,
                  isStreaming: true,
                })
              }

              // Tool call iniziato
              if (parsed.type === 'tool_start') {
                updateMessage(assistantMessage.id, {
                  toolCalls: [
                    ...(assistantMessage.toolCalls ?? []),
                    {
                      id:     parsed.toolCallId,
                      name:   parsed.tool,
                      status: 'running',
                      input:  parsed.input,
                    },
                  ],
                })
              }

              // Tool call completato
              if (parsed.type === 'tool_result') {
                updateMessage(assistantMessage.id, {
                  toolCalls: assistantMessage.toolCalls?.map(tc =>
                    tc.id === parsed.toolCallId
                      ? { ...tc, status: 'done', output: parsed.output }
                      : tc
                  ),
                })
                // Scala crediti per tool
                deductCredits(parsed.creditCost ?? 0)
              }

              // Metadata finali
              if (parsed.type === 'done') {
                updateMessage(assistantMessage.id, {
                  content:     accumulated,
                  isStreaming: false,
                  usage:       parsed.usage,
                  model:       parsed.model,
                })
                deductCredits(parsed.creditCost ?? 0)
                onResponse?.({ ..
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 71 — HOOKS (continua)**

```tsx
                  router.replace(ROUTES.conversation(parsed.conversationId))
                }
              }

              // Errore dal server
              if (parsed.type === 'error') {
                throw new Error(parsed.error ?? 'Errore streaming')
              }

            } catch (parseErr) {
              // Ignora linee non-JSON (keep-alive ecc.)
              if (parseErr instanceof SyntaxError) continue
              throw parseErr
            }
          }
        }

      } catch (err) {
        if (err instanceof DOMException && err.name === 'AbortError') return

        const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Errore sconosciuto'
        setError(message)
        onError?.(message)
        toast.error(message)

        // Segna messaggio come errore
        updateMessage(assistantMessage.id, {
          content:    '❌ ' + message,
          isStreaming: false,
          error:      true,
        })

      } finally {
        setIsStreamingLocal(false)
        setStreaming(false)
        setLoading(false)
      }
    },
    [
      user, conversationId, activeConversation,
      addMessage, updateMessage, setStreaming,
      setLoading, setActiveConversation, addConversation,
      deductCredits, router, onResponse, onError,
    ]
  )

  const stopStreaming = useCallback(() => {
    abortRef.current?.abort()
    setIsStreamingLocal(false)
    setStreaming(false)
  }, [setStreaming])

  const regenerate = useCallback(async () => {
    const messages = activeConversation?.messages ?? []
    const lastUser = [...messages].reverse().find(m => m.role === 'user')
    if (lastUser) await sendMessage(lastUser.content)
  }, [activeConversation, sendMessage])

  return {
    sendMessage,
    stopStreaming,
    regenerate,
    isStreaming: isStreaming,
    error,
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/hooks/use-conversation.ts
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react'
import { useChatStore }                      from '@/store/chat-store'
import { apiClient }                         from '@/lib/api-client'
import { API }                               from '@/lib/constants'
import { toast }                             from 'sonner'
import type { Conversation }                 from '@/types'

export function useConversation(id?: string) {
  const {
    conversations,
    activeConversation,
    setActiveConversation,
    updateConversation,
    removeConversation,
    setLoading,
    isLoading,
  } = useChatStore()

  const [isFetching, setIsFetching] = useState(false)

  // Carica conversazione specifica
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!id) return
    const cached = conversations.find(c => c.id === id)
    if (cached) {
      setActiveConversation(cached)
      return
    }
    fetchConversation(id)
  }, [id]) // eslint-disable-line

  const fetchConversation = useCallback(async (convId: string) => {
    setIsFetching(true)
    const { data, error } = await apiClient.get<Conversation>(
      API.chat.conversation(convId)
    )
    if (error) {
      toast.error('Impossibile caricare la conversazione')
    } else if (data) {
      setActiveConversation(data)
    }
    setIsFetching(false)
  }, [setActiveConversation])

  const pinConversation = useCallback(async (convId: string, pinned: boolean) => {
    updateConversation(convId, { pinned })
    const { error } = await apiClient.patch(API.chat.pin(convId), { pinned })
    if (error) {
      updateConversation(convId, { pinned: !pinned }) // rollback
      toast.error('Errore nel pinning')
    }
  }, [updateConversation])

  const archiveConversation = useCallback(async (convId: string) => {
    updateConversation(convId, { archived: true })
    const { error } = await apiClient.patch(API.chat.archive(convId))
    if (error) {
      updateConversation(convId, { archived: false }) // rollback
Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 71 — HOOKS (continua)**

```tsx
      toast.success('Conversazione archiviata')
    }
  }, [updateConversation])

  const deleteConversation = useCallback(async (convId: string) => {
    const backup = conversations.find(c => c.id === convId)
    removeConversation(convId)

    const { error } = await apiClient.delete(API.chat.conversation(convId))
    if (error) {
      if (backup) {
        // rollback ottimistico
        useChatStore.getState().addConversation(backup)
      }
      toast.error('Errore nella cancellazione')
    } else {
      toast.success('Conversazione eliminata')
    }
  }, [conversations, removeConversation])

  const renameConversation = useCallback(async (convId: string, title: string) => {
    if (!title.trim()) return
    const old = conversations.find(c => c.id === convId)?.title
    updateConversation(convId, { title: title.trim() })

    const { error } = await apiClient.patch(
      API.chat.title(convId),
      { title: title.trim() }
    )
    if (error) {
      if (old) updateConversation(convId, { title: old }) // rollback
      toast.error('Errore nel rinominare')
    }
  }, [conversations, updateConversation])

  const shareConversation = useCallback(async (convId: string) => {
    const { data, error } = await apiClient.post<{ shareUrl: string }>(
      API.chat.share(convId)
    )
    if (error || !data) {
      toast.error('Errore nella condivisione')
      return null
    }
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(data.shareUrl).catch(() => {})
    toast.success('Link copiato negli appunti!')
    return data.shareUrl
  }, [])

  const exportConversation = useCallback(async (
    convId: string,
    format: 'json' | 'markdown' | 'pdf' = 'markdown'
  ) => {
    const { data, error } = await apiClient.post<{ url: string }>(
      API.chat.export(convId),
      { format }
    )
    if (error || !data) {
      toast.error('Errore nell\'esportazione')
      return
    }
    window.open(data.url, '_blank')
    toast.success(`Conversazione esportata in ${format.toUpperCase()}`)
  }, [])

  return {
    conversation:        activeConversation,
    conversations,
    isLoading:           isLoading || isFetching,
    pinConversation,
    archiveConversation,
    deleteConversation,
    renameConversation,
    shareConversation,
    exportConversation,
    refetch:             () => id ? fetchConversation(id) : undefined,
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/hooks/use-credits.ts
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useCallback }      from 'react'
import { useUserStore }     from '@/store/user-store'
import { apiClient }        from '@/lib/api-client'
import { API, CREDIT_COSTS } from '@/lib/constants'
import { toast }            from 'sonner'

export function useCredits() {
  const { user, deductCredits, addCredits } = useUserStore()

  const credits        = user?.credits        ?? 0
  const maxCredits     = user?.maxCredits     ?? 100
  const percentageUsed = maxCredits > 0
    ? Math.round(((maxCredits - credits) / maxCredits) * 100)
    : 0

  const isLow      = credits < 50
  const isExhausted = credits <= 0

  const canAfford = useCallback(
    (tool: keyof typeof CREDIT_COSTS) => {
      const cost = CREDIT_COSTS[tool] ?? 1
      return credits >= cost
    },
    [credits]
  )

  const getCost = useCallback(
    (tool: keyof typeof CREDIT_COSTS) => CREDIT_COSTS[tool] ?? 1,
    []
  )

  const fetchBalance = useCallback(async () => {
    const { data, error } = await apiClient.get<{
      credits:    number
      maxCredits: number
    }>(API.credits.base)

    if (!error && data) {
      // Sincronizza store con server
      useUserStore.getState().setUser({
        ...useUserStore.getState().user!,
        credits

Continuo. 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 71 — HOOKS (continua)**

```tsx
        credits:    data.credits,
        maxCredits: data.maxCredits,
      })
    }
  }, [])

  const purchaseCredits = useCallback(async (amount: number) => {
    const { data, error } = await apiClient.post<{ checkoutUrl: string }>(
      API.credits.add,
      { amount }
    )
    if (error || !data) {
      toast.error('Errore nel processo di acquisto')
      return
    }
    window.location.href = data.checkoutUrl
  }, [])

  const getHistory = useCallback(async (page = 1, limit = 20) => {
    const { data, error } = await apiClient.get<{
      items: Array<{
        id:          string
        type:        'deduct' | 'add'
        amount:      number
        description: string
        createdAt:   string
      }>
      total:   number
      page:    number
      pages:   number
    }>(`${API.credits.history}?page=${page}&limit=${limit}`)

    if (error) {
      toast.error('Impossibile caricare la cronologia')
      return null
    }
    return data
  }, [])

  // Mostra warning se crediti bassi
  const checkAndWarn = useCallback(() => {
    if (isExhausted) {
      toast.error('Crediti esauriti! Acquista un piano per continuare.', {
        action: {
          label:   'Acquista',
          onClick: () => window.location.href = '/settings/billing',
        },
      })
      return false
    }
    if (isLow) {
      toast.warning(`Crediti in esaurimento: ${credits} rimasti`, {
        action: {
          label:   'Ricarica',
          onClick: () => window.location.href = '/settings/billing',
        },
      })
    }
    return !isExhausted
  }, [isExhausted, isLow, credits])

  return {
    credits,
    maxCredits,
    percentageUsed,
    isLow,
    isExhausted,
    canAfford,
    getCost,
    fetchBalance,
    purchaseCredits,
    getHistory,
    checkAndWarn,
    deductCredits,
    addCredits,
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/hooks/use-user.ts
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useState, useCallback }  from 'react'
import { useUserStore }           from '@/store/user-store'
import { apiClient }              from '@/lib/api-client'
import { API }                    from '@/lib/constants'
import { toast }                  from 'sonner'
import type { User, UserProfile } from '@/types'

export function useUser() {
  const { user, setUser, clearUser } = useUserStore()
  const [isUpdating, setIsUpdating]  = useState(false)

  const updateProfile = useCallback(async (data: Partial<UserProfile>) => {
    if (!user) return
    setIsUpdating(true)

    const previous = { ...user }
    // Ottimistic update
    setUser({ ...user, ...data })

    const { error } = await apiClient.patch(API.user.update, data)
    if (error) {
      setUser(previous)
      toast.error('Errore nell\'aggiornamento del profilo')
    } else {
      toast.success('Profilo aggiornato con successo')
    }
    setIsUpdating(false)
  }, [user, setUser])

  const updateAvatar = useCallback(async (file: File) => {
    if (!user) return
    setIsUpdating(true)

    const formData = new FormData()
    formData.append('avatar', file)

    const { data, error } = await apiClient.upload<{ avatarUrl: string }>(
      API.user.avatar,
      formData
    )

    if (error || !data) {
      toast.error('Errore nel caricamento dell\'avatar')
    } else {
      setUser({ ...user, avatarUrl: data.avatarUrl })
      toast.success('Avatar aggiornato!')
    }
    setIsUpdating(false)
  }, [user, setUser])

  const changePassword = useCallback(async (
    currentPassword: string,
    newPassword:     string
  ) => {
    setIsUpdating(true)
    const { error } = await apiClient.post(API.user.password, {
      currentPassword,
      newPassword,
    })

    if (error) {
Continuo. 🔥

**PACCHETTO 71 — HOOKS (fine) + PACCHETTO 72 — API CLIENT**

```tsx
      toast.error('Password attuale non corretta')
      setIsUpdating(false)
      return false
    }

    toast.success('Password aggiornata con successo')
    setIsUpdating(false)
    return true
  }, [])

  const updatePreferences = useCallback(async (
    prefs: Partial<User['preferences']>
  ) => {
    if (!user) return
    const previous = { ...user }
    setUser({ ...user, preferences: { ...user.preferences, ...prefs } })

    const { error } = await apiClient.patch(API.user.preferences, prefs)
    if (error) {
      setUser(previous)
      toast.error('Errore nel salvataggio delle preferenze')
    }
  }, [user, setUser])

  const deleteAccount = useCallback(async (password: string) => {
    setIsUpdating(true)
    const { error } = await apiClient.delete(API.user.delete, { password })
    if (error) {
      toast.error('Errore nella cancellazione dell\'account')
      setIsUpdating(false)
      return false
    }
    clearUser()
    toast.success('Account eliminato')
    window.location.href = '/'
    return true
  }, [clearUser])

  const fetchMe = useCallback(async () => {
    const { data, error } = await apiClient.get<User>(API.user.me)
    if (!error && data) setUser(data)
    return data ?? null
  }, [setUser])

  const isAdmin   = user?.role === 'admin'
  const isPro     = ['pro', 'enterprise'].includes(user?.plan ?? '')
  const isStarter = user?.plan === 'starter'
  const isFree    = !user?.plan || user.plan === 'free'

  const initials = user
    ? `${user.name?.charAt(0) ?? ''}${user.surname?.charAt(0) ?? ''}`.toUpperCase()
    : '?'

  const fullName  = user ? `${user.name} ${user.surname}`.trim() : ''
  const avatarUrl = user?.avatarUrl ?? null

  return {
    user,
    isAdmin,
    isPro,
    isStarter,
    isFree,
    isUpdating,
    initials,
    fullName,
    avatarUrl,
    updateProfile,
    updateAvatar,
    changePassword,
    updatePreferences,
    deleteAccount,
    fetchMe,
  }
}

'use client'

import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
import { useRouter }             from 'next/navigation'
import { useUserStore }          from '@/store/user-store'
import { apiClient }             from '@/lib/api-client'
import { API, ROUTES }           from '@/lib/constants'
import { toast }                 from 'sonner'
import type { User }             from '@/types'

interface LoginPayload    { email: string; password: string; remember?: boolean }
interface RegisterPayload { name: string; surname: string; email: string; password: string }

export function useAuth() {
  const router                    = useRouter()
  const { setUser, clearUser }    = useUserStore()
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
  const [error, setError]         = useState<string | null>(null)

  const login = useCallback(async (payload: LoginPayload) => {
    setIsLoading(true)
    setError(null)

    const { data, error: err } = await apiClient.post<{
      user:         User
      accessToken:  string
      refreshToken: string
    }>(API.auth.login, payload)

    if (err || !data) {
      const msg = err ?? 'Credenziali non valide'
      setError(msg)
      toast.error(msg)
      setIsLoading(false)
      return false
    }

    // Salva token
    localStorage.setItem('accessToken',  data.accessToken)
    if (payload.remember) {
      localStorage.setItem('refreshToken', data.refreshToken)
    }

    setUser(data.user)
    toast.success(`Bentornato, ${data.user.name}! 👋`)
    router.push(ROUTES.dashboard)
    setIsLoading(false)
    return true
  }, [setUser, router])

  const register = useCallback(async (payload: RegisterPayload) => {
    setIsLoading(true)
    setError(null)

    const { data,

```tsx
// ============================================
// src/lib/api-client.ts
// ============================================

const BASE_URL = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL ?? '/api'

type ApiResponse<T> = {
  data:  T | null
  error: string | null
}

class ApiClient {
  private baseUrl: string

  constructor(baseUrl: string) {
    this.baseUrl = baseUrl
  }

  private getHeaders(extra?: HeadersInit): HeadersInit {
    const token = typeof window !== 'undefined'
      ? localStorage.getItem('accessToken')
      : null

    return {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      ...(token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {}),
      ...extra,
    }
  }

  private async handleResponse<T>(res: Response): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
    if (res.status === 401) {
      // Token scaduto → prova refresh
      const refreshed = await this.refreshToken()
      if (!refreshed) {
        localStorage.removeItem('accessToken')
        localStorage.removeItem('refreshToken')
        window.location.href = '/login'
        return { data: null, error: 'Sessione scaduta' }
      }
    }

    if (!res.ok) {
      const body = await res.json().catch(() => ({}))
      return { data: null, error: body.error ?? `Errore ${res.status}` }
    }

    if (res.status === 204) return { data: null, error: null }

    const data = await res.json().catch(() => null)
    return { data, error: null }
  }

  private async refreshToken(): Promise<boolean> {
    const refreshToken = localStorage.getItem('refreshToken')
    if (!refreshToken) return false

    try {
      const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}/auth/refresh`, {
        method:  'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body:    JSON.stringify({ refreshToken }),
      })

      if (!res.ok) return false

      const { accessToken } = await res.json()
      localStorage.setItem('accessToken', accessToken)
      return true
    } catch {
      return false
    }
  }

  async get<T>(path: string): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
    const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${path}`, {
      method:  'GET',
      headers: this.getHeaders(),
    })
    return this.handleResponse<T>(res)
  }

  async post<T>(path: string, body?: unknown): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
    const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${path}`, {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: this.getHeaders(),
      body:    body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
    })
    return this.handleResponse<T>(res)
  }

  async patch<T>(path: string, body?: unknown): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
    const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${path}`, {
      method:  'PATCH',
      headers: this.getHeaders(),
      body:    body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
    })
    return this.handleResponse<T>(res)
  }

  async put<T>(path: string, body?: unknown): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
    const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${path}`, {
      method:  'PUT',
      headers: this.getHeaders(),
      body:    body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
    })
    return this.handleResponse<T>(res)
  }

  async delete<T>(path: string, body?: unknown): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
    const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${path}`, {
      method:  'DELETE',
      headers: this.getHeaders(),
      body:    body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,
    })
    return this.handleResponse<T>(res)
  }

  async upload<T>(path: string, formData: FormData): Promise<ApiResponse<T>> {
    const token = typeof window !== 'undefined'
      ? localStorage.getItem('accessToken')
      : null

    const res = await fetch(`${this.baseUrl}${path}`, {
      method:  'POST',
      headers: {
        ...(token ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } : {}),
        // NON impostare Content-Type → il browser lo fa con boundary
      },
      body: formData,
    })
    return this.handleResponse<T>(res)
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/middleware.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

const PUBLIC_PATHS = [
  '/',
  '/login',
  '/register',
  '/forgot-password',
  '/reset-password',
  '/share',
  '/privacy',
  '/terms',
  '/pricing',
]

const ADMIN_PATHS = ['/admin']

function isPublicPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PUBLIC_PATHS.some(p =>
    pathname === p || pathname.startsWith(`${p}/`)
  )
}

function isAdminPath(pathname: string): boolean {
  return ADMIN_PATHS.some(p =>
    pathname === p || pathname.startsWith(`${p}/`)
  )
}

export async function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = request.nextUrl
  const token        = request.cookies.get('accessToken')?.value

  // --- Percorsi pubblici: passa sempre ---
  if (isPublicPath(pathname)) {
    // Se loggato e va su /login o /register → redirect dashboard
    if (token && (pathname === '/login' || pathname === '/register')) {
      return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/dashboard', request.url))
    }
    return NextResponse.next()
  }

  // --- Perc

> Lara AgentAIForce:

**PACCHETTO 74 — MIDDLEWARE (fine) + PACCHETTO 75 — BACKEND AUTH ROUTES**

```tsx
  // --- Percorsi protetti: richiede token ---
  if (!token) {
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', request.url)
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname)
    return NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl)
  }

  // --- Verifica JWT lato edge ---
  try {
    const payload = await verifyJWT(token)

    // --- Percorsi admin: richiede ruolo admin ---
    if (isAdminPath(pathname) && payload.role !== 'admin') {
      return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/dashboard', request.url))
    }

    // --- Passa headers utente alle API routes ---
    const requestHeaders = new Headers(request.headers)
    requestHeaders.set('x-user-id',   payload.sub)
    requestHeaders.set('x-user-role', payload.role)
    requestHeaders.set('x-user-plan', payload.plan)

    return NextResponse.next({ request: { headers: requestHeaders } })
  } catch {
    // Token invalido → logout
    const response = NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/login', request.url))
    response.cookies.delete('accessToken')
    response.cookies.delete('refreshToken')
    return response
  }
}

// Edge-compatible JWT verify
async function verifyJWT(token: string): Promise<{
  sub:  string
  role: string
  plan: string
  exp:  number
}> {
  const secret  = new TextEncoder().encode(process.env.JWT_SECRET!)
  const [headerB64, payloadB64, signatureB64] = token.split('.')

  const data      = `${headerB64}.${payloadB64}`
  const signature = base64UrlDecode(signatureB64)

  const key = await crypto.subtle.importKey(
    'raw', secret,
    { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' },
    false, ['verify']
  )

  const valid = await crypto.subtle.verify(
    'HMAC', key,
    signature,
    new TextEncoder().encode(data)
  )

  if (!valid) throw new Error('Invalid signature')

  const payload = JSON.parse(
    new TextDecoder().decode(base64UrlDecode(payloadB64))
  )

  if (payload.exp && Date.now() / 1000 > payload.exp) {
    throw new Error('Token expired')
  }

  return payload
}

function base64UrlDecode(str: string): Uint8Array {
  const base64 = str.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/')
  const padded  = base64.padEnd(base64.length + (4 - base64.length % 4) % 4, '=')
  const binary  = atob(padded)
  return Uint8Array.from(binary, c => c.charCodeAt(0))
}

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|api/auth/refresh|api/health).*)',
  ],
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { comparePassword, signJWT }  from '@/lib/auth-utils'
import { z }                         from 'zod'

const LoginSchema = z.object({
  email:    z.string().email(),
  password: z.string().min(8),
  remember: z.boolean().optional(),
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body   = await req.json()
    const parsed = LoginSchema.safeParse(body)

    if (!parsed.success) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Dati non validi', details: parsed.error.flatten() },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { email, password, remember } = parsed.data

    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where:  { email: email.toLowerCase() },
      select: {
        id:           true,
        email:        true,
        name:         true,
        surname:      true,
        passwordHash: true,
        role:         true,
        plan:         true,
        avatarUrl:    true,
        isVerified:   true,
        credits:      true,
        maxCredits:   true,
        preferences:  true,
        createdAt:    true,
      },

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 75 — BACKEND AUTH ROUTES (continua)**

```tsx
    })

    if (!user) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Credenziali non valide' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    if (!user.isVerified) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Email non verificata. Controlla la tua casella di posta.' },
        { status: 403 }
      )
    }

    const isValid = await comparePassword(password, user.passwordHash)
    if (!isValid) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Credenziali non valide' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    // Genera tokens
    const accessToken = await signJWT(
      { sub: user.id, role: user.role, plan: user.plan },
      '15m'
    )
    const refreshToken = await signJWT(
      { sub: user.id, type: 'refresh' },
      remember ? '30d' : '7d'
    )

    // Salva refresh token in DB
    await prisma.refreshToken.create({
      data: {
        token:     refreshToken,
        userId:    user.id,
        expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + (remember ? 30 : 7) * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),
      },
    })

    // Log accesso
    await prisma.activityLog.create({
      data: {
        userId: user.id,
        action: 'LOGIN',
        ip:     req.headers.get('x-forwarded-for') ?? 'unknown',
        ua:     req.headers.get('user-agent') ?? 'unknown',
      },
    })

    const { passwordHash: _, ...safeUser } = user

    const response = NextResponse.json({
      user:         safeUser,
      accessToken,
      refreshToken,
    })

    // Imposta anche cookie http-only per il middleware
    response.cookies.set('accessToken', accessToken, {
      httpOnly: true,
      secure:   process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
      sameSite: 'lax',
      maxAge:   15 * 60, // 15 minuti
      path:     '/',
    })

    return response
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('[AUTH/LOGIN]', err)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { hashPassword, signJWT }     from '@/lib/auth-utils'
import { sendVerificationEmail }     from '@/lib/mailer'

import { z }                         from 'zod'

const RegisterSchema = z.object({
  name:     z.string().min(2).max(50),
  surname:  z.string().min(2).max(50),
  email:    z.string().email(),
  password: z.string()
    .min(8)
    .regex(/[A-Z]/, 'Deve contenere almeno una maiuscola')
    .regex(/[0-9]/, 'Deve contenere almeno un numero'),
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body   = await req.json()
    const parsed = RegisterSchema.safeParse(body)

    if (!parsed.success) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Dati non validi', details: parsed.error.flatten() },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { name, surname, email, password } = parsed.data

    // Controlla email già esistente
    const existing = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { email: email.toLowerCase() },
    })

    if (existing) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Email già registrata' },
        { status: 409 }
      )
    }

    const passwordHash      = await hashPassword(password)
    const verificationToken = await signJWT({ email }, '24h')

    const user = await prisma.user.create({
      data: {
        name,
        surname,
        email:      email.toLowerCase(),
        passwordHash,
        verificationToken,
        plan:       'free',
        credits:

      { status: 500 }

}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/auth/refresh/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { verifyJWT, signJWT }        from '@/lib/auth-utils'

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { refreshToken } = await req.json()

    if (!refreshToken) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Refresh token mancante' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    // Verifica token
    const payload = await verifyJWT(refreshToken)
    if (payload.type !== 'refresh') {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Token non valido' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    // Controlla DB
    const stored = await prisma.refreshToken.findFirst({
      where: {
        token:     refreshToken,
        userId:    payload.sub,
        expiresAt: { gt: new Date() },
        revokedAt: null,
      },
      include: { user: true },
    })

    if (!stored) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Sessione scaduta. Effettua di nuovo il login.' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    // Genera nuovo access token
    const accessToken = await signJWT(
      { sub: stored.user.id, role: stored.user.role, plan: stored.user.plan },
      '15m'
    )

    const response = NextResponse.json({ accessToken })

    response.cookies.set('accessToken', accessToken, {
      httpOnly: true,
      secure:   process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
      sameSite: 'lax',
      maxAge:   15 * 60,
      path:     '/',
    })

    return response
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('[AUTH/REFRESH]', err)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Token non valido o scaduto' },
      { status: 401 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/auth/logout/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { refreshToken } = await req.json()

    if (refreshToken) {
      await prisma.refreshToken.updateMany({
        where:  { token: refreshToken },
        data:   { revokedAt: new Date() },
      })
    }

    const response = NextResponse.json({ message: 'Logout effettuato' })
    response.cookies.delete('accessToken')
    response.cookies.delete('refreshToken')

    return response
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('[AUTH/LOGOUT]', err)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

  return bcrypt.hash(password, 12)
}

  password: string,
  hash:     string
): Promise<boolean> {
  return bcrypt.compare(password,

// -------------------------------------------
// JWT
// -------------------------------------------
export async function signJWT(
  payload: Record<string, unknown>,
  expiresIn: string
): Promise<string> {
  const secret  = new TextEncoder().encode(JWT_SECRET)
  const now     = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)
  const expMap: Record<string, number> = {
    '15m': 15 * 60,
    '7d':  7  * 24 * 60 * 60,
    '30d': 30 * 24 * 60 * 60,
    '24h': 24 * 60 * 60,
    '1h':  60 * 60,
  }

  const exp = now + (expMap[expiresIn] ?? 900)

  const header  = base64UrlEncode(JSON.stringify({ alg: 'HS256', typ: 'JWT' }))
  const body    = base64UrlEncode(JSON.stringify({ ...payload, iat: now, exp }))
  const data    = `${header}.${body}`

  const key = await crypto.subtle.importKey(
    'raw', secret,
    { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' },
    false, ['sign']
  )

  const signature = await crypto.subtle.sign('HMAC', key, new TextEncoder().encode(data))
  const sigB64    = base64UrlEncode(Buffer.from(signature).toString('base64'))

  return `${data}.${sigB64}`
}

export async function verifyJWT(token: string): Promise<Record<string, any>> {
  const secret  = new TextEncoder().encode(JWT_SECRET)
  const [headerB64, payloadB64, signatureB64] = token.split('.')

  if (!headerB64 || !payloadB64 || !signatureB64) {
    throw new Error('Token malformato')
  }

  const data      = `${headerB64}.${payloadB64}`
  const signature = base64UrlDecode(signatureB64)

  const key = await crypto.subtle.importKey(
    'raw', secret,
    { name: 'HMAC', hash: 'SHA-256' },
    false, ['verify']
  )

  const valid = await crypto.subtle.verify(
    'HMAC', key, signature,
    new TextEncoder().encode(data)
  )

  if (!valid) throw new Error('Firma non valida')

  const payload = JSON.parse(
    new TextDecoder().decode(base64UrlDecode(payloadB64))
  )

  if (payload.exp && Date.now() / 1000 > payload.exp) {
    throw new Error('Token scaduto')
  }

  return payload
}

function base64UrlEncode(str: string): string {
  return Buffer.from(str)
    .toString('base64')
    .replace(/\+/g, '-')
    .replace(/\//g, '_')
    .replace(/=/g, '')
}

function base64UrlDecode(str: string): Uint8Array {
  const base64 = str.replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/')
  const padded  = base64.padEnd(base64.length + (4 - base64.length % 4) % 4, '=')
  const binary  = atob(padded)
  return Uint8Array.from(binary, c => c.charCodeAt(0))
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/chat/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse }   from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                      from '@/lib/prisma'
import { streamAIResponse }            from '@/lib/ai-providers'
import { getToolHandler }              from '@/lib/tools'
import { deductCredits, checkCredits } from '@/lib/credits'
import { z }                           from 'zod'

const ChatSchema = z.object({
  conversationId: z.string().optional(),
  message:        z.string().min(1).max(10000),
  model:          z.string().default('gpt-4o'),
  toolId:         z.string().optional(),
  attachments:    z.array(z.object({
    name: z.string(),
    type: z.string(),
    url:  z.string(),
    size: z.number(),
  })).optional(),
  stream:         z.boolean().default(true),
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get('x-user-id')
  const plan   = req.headers.get('x-user-plan') as string

  if (!userId) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Non autorizzato' }, { status: 401 })
  }

  try {
    const body   = await req.json()
    const parsed = ChatSchema.safeParse(body)

    if (!parsed.success) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Dati non validi', details: parsed.error.flatten() },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { conversationId, message, model, toolId, attachments, stream } = parsed.data

    // --- Controlla crediti ---
    const hasCredits = await checkCredits(userId, model)
    if (!hasCredits) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Crediti insufficienti. Aggiorna il tuo piano per continuare.' },
        { status: 402 }
      )
    }

    // --- Recupera o crea conversazione ---
    let conversation
    if (conversationId) {
      conversation = await prisma.conversation.findFirst({
        where:   { id: conversationId, userId },
        include: { messages: { orderBy: {

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 77 — CHAT API ROUTE (continua)**

```tsx
          createdAt: 'asc' }, take: 50 } },
      })

      if (!conversation) {
        return NextResponse.json(
          { error: 'Conversazione non trovata' },
          { status: 404 }
        )
      }
    } else {
      // Crea nuova conversazione
      conversation = await prisma.conversation.create({
        data: {
          userId,
          title:   message.slice(0, 60) + (message.length > 60 ? '...' : ''),
          model,
          toolId:  toolId ?? null,
          preview: message.slice(0, 120),
        },
        include: { messages: true },
      })
    }

    // --- Salva messaggio utente ---
    const userMessage = await prisma.message.create({
      data: {
        conversationId: conversation.id,
        role:           'user',
        content:        message,
        attachments:    attachments ? JSON.stringify(attachments) : null,
        model,
      },
    })

    // --- Costruisci history per AI ---
    const history = conversation.messages.map(m => ({
      role:    m.role as 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system',
      content: m.content,
    }))

    // --- Tool handler (se presente) ---
    const toolHandler = toolId ? getToolHandler(toolId) : null
    const systemPrompt = toolHandler
      ? toolHandler.systemPrompt(plan)
      : getDefaultSystemPrompt(plan)

    // --- STREAMING RESPONSE ---
    if (stream) {
      const encoder    = new TextEncoder()
      let   fullOutput = ''

      const readable = new ReadableStream({
        async start(controller) {
          try {
            const streamGen = streamAIResponse({
              model,
              messages: [
                { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
                ...history,
                { role: 'user',   content: message },
              ],
              plan,
            })

            for await (const chunk of streamGen) {
              fullOutput += chunk
              controller.enqueue(
                encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ chunk })}\n\n`)
              )
            }

            // Salva risposta AI
            const aiMessage = await prisma.message.create({
              data: {
                conversationId: conversation.id,
                role:           'assistant',
                content:        fullOutput,
                model,
                tokens:         estimateTokens(fullOutput),
              },
            })

            // Aggiorna preview conversazione
            await prisma.conversation.update({
              where: { id: conversation.id },
              data:  {
                preview:   fullOutput.slice(0, 120),
                updatedAt: new Date(),
              },
            })

            // Scala crediti
            await deductCredits(userId, model, estimateTokens(message + fullOutput))

            // Invia evento finale con metadata
            controller.enqueue(
              encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({
                done:           true,
                messageId:      aiMessage.id,
                conversationId: conversation.id,
                tokensUsed:     aiMessage.tokens,
              })}\n\n`)
            )

            controller.close()
          } catch (err) {
            console.error('[CHAT/STREAM]', err)
            controller.enqueue(
              encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({
                error: 'Errore durante la generazione della risposta'
              })}\n\n`)
            )
            controller.close()
          }
        },
      })

      return new Response(readable, {
        headers: {
          'Content-Type':  'text/event-stream',
          'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
          'Connection':    'keep-alive',
          'X-Conversation-Id': conversation.id,
        },
      })
    }

    // --- NON-STREAMING RESPONSE ---
    const { content: aiContent, tokens } = await streamAIResponse({
      model,
      messages: [

> Lara AgentAIForce:

**PACCHETTO 77 — CHAT API ROUTE (fine) + PACCHETTO 78 — AI PROVIDERS + CREDITS**

```tsx
      tokensUsed:     tokens,
    })

  } catch (err) {
    console.error('[CHAT]', err)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// -------------------------------------------
// HELPERS
// -------------------------------------------
function estimateTokens(text: string): number {
  // Stima approssimativa: ~4 caratteri per token
  return Math.ceil(text.length / 4)
}

function getDefaultSystemPrompt(plan: string): string {
  const isPro = plan === 'pro' || plan === 'enterprise'
  return `Sei Lara, l'AI agent senior di Aethersy AI.
Il tuo motto è "Sogna, Realizza, Guadagna."
Sei un'esperta di business growth, digital marketing, finanza d'impresa,
sviluppo software, automazioni, e-commerce, lead generation, SEO e social media.
Rispondi sempre in italiano, con tono professionale, diretto e concreto.
${isPro ? 'L\'utente ha accesso Pro: fornisci analisi approfondite e dati avanzati.' : ''}
Formatta le risposte con Markdown quando utile.`
}

// ============================================
// src/lib/ai-providers.ts
// ============================================

import OpenAI   from 'openai'
import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk'

const openai    = new OpenAI({ apiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY })
const anthropic = new Anthropic({ apiKey: process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY })

export type AIMessage = {
  role:    'system' | 'user' | 'assistant'
  content: string
}

export type StreamOptions = {
  model:    string
  messages: AIMessage[]
  plan:     string
  stream?:  boolean
}

// -------------------------------------------
// MODEL ROUTING
// -------------------------------------------
const MODEL_MAP: Record<string, { provider: 'openai' | 'anthropic'; id: string }> = {
  'gpt-4o':          { provider: 'openai',    id: 'gpt-4o'                    },
  'gpt-4o-mini':     { provider: 'openai',    id: 'gpt-4o-mini'               },
  'gpt-4-turbo':     { provider: 'openai',    id: 'gpt-4-turbo'               },
  'gpt-3.5-turbo':   { provider: 'openai',    id: 'gpt-3.5-turbo'             },
  'claude-3-opus':   { provider: 'anthropic', id: 'claude-3-opus-20240229'    },
  'claude-3-sonnet': { provider: 'anthropic', id: 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022'},
  'claude-3-haiku':  { provider: 'anthropic', id: 'claude-3-haiku-20240307'   },
}

// -------------------------------------------
// STREAM AI RESPONSE (generator)
// -------------------------------------------
export async function* streamAIResponse(
  opts: StreamOptions
): AsyncGenerator<string> {
  const { model, messages, stream = true } = opts
  const mapped = MODEL_MAP[model] ?? MODEL_MAP['gpt-4o']

  if (mapped.provider === 'openai') {
    yield* streamOpenAI(mapped.id, messages, stream)
  } else {
    yield* streamAnthropic(mapped.id, messages, stream)
  }
}

// -------------------------------------------
// OPENAI STREAMING
// -------------------------------------------
async function* streamOpenAI(
  model:    string,
  messages: AIMessage[],
  stream:   boolean
): AsyncGenerator<string> {
  if (!stream) {
    const res = await openai.chat.completions.create({
      model,
      messages,
      temperature: 0.7,
      max_tokens:  4096,
    })
    yield res.choices[0]?.message?.content ?? ''
    return
  }

  const res = await openai.chat.completions.create({
    model,
    messages,
    temperature: 0.7,
    max_tokens:  4096,
    stream:      true,
  })

  for await (const chunk of res) {
    const delta = chunk.choices[0]?.delta?.content
    if (delta) yield delta
  }
}

// ANTHROPIC STREAMING
// ---

**PACCHETTO 78 — AI PROVIDERS (fine) + CREDITS + TOOLS**

```tsx
async function* streamAnthropic(
  model:    string,
  messages: AIMessage[],
  stream:   boolean
): AsyncGenerator<string> {
  // Separa system da messages
  const systemMsg = messages.find(m => m.role === 'system')?.content ?? ''
  const chatMsgs  = messages
    .filter(m => m.role !== 'system')
    .map(m => ({ role: m.role as 'user' | 'assistant', content: m.content }))

  if (!stream) {
    const res = await anthropic.messages.create({
      model,
      system:     systemMsg,
      messages:   chatMsgs,
      max_tokens: 4096,
    })
    const block = res.content[0]
    yield block.type === 'text' ? block.text : ''
    return
  }

  const res = await anthropic.messages.create({
    model,
    system:     systemMsg,
    messages:   chatMsgs,
    max_tokens: 4096,
    stream:     true,
  })

  for await (const event of res) {
    if (
      event.type === 'content_block_delta' &&
      event.delta.type === 'text_delta'
    ) {
      yield event.delta.text
    }
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/lib/credits.ts
// ============================================

import { prisma } from '@/lib/prisma'

// Costo in crediti per modello
const MODEL_COSTS: Record<string, number> = {
  'gpt-4o':          10,
  'gpt-4o-mini':     2,
  'gpt-4-turbo':     12,
  'gpt-3.5-turbo':   1,
  'claude-3-opus':   15,
  'claude-3-sonnet': 8,
  'claude-3-haiku':  2,
}

const FREE_DAILY_LIMIT = 50

// -------------------------------------------
// CHECK CREDITS
// -------------------------------------------
export async function checkCredits(
  userId: string,
  model:  string
): Promise<boolean> {
  const cost = MODEL_COSTS[model] ?? 10

  const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
    where:  { id: userId },
    select: { credits: true, plan: true, creditsResetAt: true },
  })

  if (!user) return false

  // Pro/Enterprise: crediti illimitati
  if (user.plan === 'pro' || user.plan === 'enterprise') return true

  // Free: controlla reset giornaliero
  const now       = new Date()
  const resetAt   = user.creditsResetAt ? new Date(user.creditsResetAt) : null
  const needReset = !resetAt || now > resetAt

  if (needReset) {
    await prisma.user.update({
      where: { id: userId },
      data:  {
        credits:        FREE_DAILY_LIMIT,
        creditsResetAt: new Date(now.setHours(24, 0, 0, 0)),
      },
    })
    return FREE_DAILY_LIMIT >= cost
  }

  return user.credits >= cost
}

// -------------------------------------------
// DEDUCT CREDITS
// -------------------------------------------
export async function deductCredits(
  userId:    string,
  model:     string,
  tokens:    number
): Promise<void> {
  const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
    where:  { id: userId },
    select: { plan: true },
  })

  if (!user) return
  if (user.plan === 'pro' || user.plan === 'enterprise') return

  const cost = MODEL_COSTS[model] ?? 10

  await prisma.user.update({
    where: { id: userId },
    data:  { credits: { decrement: cost } },
  })

  // Salva log utilizzo
  await prisma.usageLog.create({
    data: {
      userId,
      model,
      tokens,
      credits: cost,
      action:  'chat',
    },
  })
}

// -------------------------------------------
// GET CREDITS INFO
// -------------------------------------------
export async function getCreditsInfo(userId: string) {
  const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
    where:  { id: userId },
    select: {
      credits:        true,
      plan:           true,
      creditsResetAt: true,
      maxCredits:     true,
    },
  })

  if (!user) return null

  const isPro = user.plan ===

> Lara AgentAIForce:

```tsx
    'pro' || user.plan === 'enterprise'

  return {
    current:     isPro ? Infinity : user.credits,
    max:         isPro ? Infinity : (user.maxCredits ?? FREE_DAILY_LIMIT),
    resetAt:     user.creditsResetAt,
    isPro,
    plan:        user.plan,
    percentage:  isPro ? 100 : Math.round((user.credits / (user.maxCredits ?? FREE_DAILY_LIMIT)) * 100),
  }
}

// -------------------------------------------
// EXPORTS
// -------------------------------------------
export function getToolHandler(toolId: string): ToolHandler | null {
  return TOOLS[toolId] ?? null
}

export function getAllTools(): ToolHandler[] {
  return Object.values(TOOLS)
}

export function getToolsByCategory(category: string): ToolHandler[] {
  return Object.values(TOOLS).filter(t => t.category === category)
}

export function getToolsByPlan(plan: string): ToolHandler[] {
  return Object.values(TOOLS).filter(t =>
    t.plans.includes(plan as 'free' | 'pro' | 'enterprise')
  )
}

// ============================================
// src/middleware.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { jwtVerify }                 from 'jose'

const JWT_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(
  process.env.JWT_SECRET ?? 'fallback-secret-change-in-production'
)

// Route pubbliche (no auth required)
const PUBLIC_ROUTES = [
  '/',
  '/login',
  '/register',
  '/verify-email',
  '/reset-password',
  '/forgot-password',
  '/pricing',
  '/api/auth/login',
  '/api/auth/register',
  '/api/auth/verify-email',
  '/api/auth/forgot-password',
  '/api/auth/reset-password',
  '/api/webhooks/stripe',
]

// Route solo per utenti NON autenticati
const GUEST_ONLY_ROUTES = ['/login', '/register']

export async function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = req.nextUrl
  const token        = req.cookies.get('auth-token')?.value

  // Bypass per assets statici e _next
  if (
    pathname.startsWith('/_next') ||
    pathname.startsWith('/favicon') ||
    pathname.startsWith('/images

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 79 — MIDDLEWARE (fine) + PRISMA SCHEMA COMPLETO**

```tsx
') ||
    pathname.startsWith('/fonts') ||
    pathname.includes('.')
  ) {
    return NextResponse.next()
  }

  // Verifica JWT
  let userId: string | null = null
  let userPlan: string | null = null

  if (token) {
    try {
      const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, JWT_SECRET)
      userId   = payload.sub as string
      userPlan = payload.plan as string
    } catch {
      // Token invalido → rimuovi cookie
      const response = NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/login', req.url))
      response.cookies.delete('auth-token')
      return response
    }
  }

  // Route solo guest → redirect a dashboard se già loggato
  if (userId && GUEST_ONLY_ROUTES.some(r => pathname.startsWith(r))) {
    return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/dashboard', req.url))
  }

  // Route protette → redirect a login se non autenticato
  const isPublic = PUBLIC_ROUTES.some(r => pathname === r || pathname.startsWith(r))
  if (!userId && !isPublic) {
    const loginUrl = new URL('/login', req.url)
    loginUrl.searchParams.set('redirect', pathname)
    return NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl)
  }

  // Route Pro/Enterprise only
  const PRO_ROUTES = ['/dashboard/fundraising', '/dashboard/advanced']
  if (
    userId &&
    PRO_ROUTES.some(r => pathname.startsWith(r)) &&
    userPlan === 'free'
  ) {
    return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/pricing?upgrade=true', req.url))
  }

  // Aggiungi headers utili
  const response = NextResponse.next()
  if (userId) {
    response.headers.set('x-user-id',   userId)
    response.headers.set('x-user-plan', userPlan ?? 'free')
  }

  return response
}

export const config = {
  matcher: ['/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico).*)'],
}

// prisma/schema.prisma

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// -------------------------------------------
// USER
// -------------------------------------------
model User {
  id                String    @id @default(cuid())
  email             String    @unique
  password          String
  name              String?
  avatar            String?
  plan              String    @default("free")
  credits           Int       @default(50)
  maxCredits        Int       @default(50)
  creditsResetAt    DateTime?
  emailVerified     Boolean   @default(false)
  verifyToken       String?
  resetToken        String?
  resetTokenExpiry  DateTime?
  stripeCustomerId  String?   @unique
  stripeSubId       String?   @unique
  createdAt         DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  conversations     Conversation[]
  usageLogs         UsageLog[]
  payments          Payment[]
  apiKeys           ApiKey[]

  @@index([email])
  @@index([stripeCustomerId])
}

// -------------------------------------------
// CONVERSATION
// -------------------------------------------
model Conversation {
  id        String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  title     String    @default("Nuova conversazione")
  preview   String?
  model     String    @default("gpt-4o")
  toolId    String?
  pinned    Boolean   @default(false)
  archived  Boolean   @default(false)
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime  @updatedAt

  // Relations
  user      User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  messages  Message[]

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([userId, updatedAt])
  @@index([toolId])
}

// -------------------------------------------
// MESSAGE
// -------------------------------------------
model Message {
  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
  conversationId String
  role           String       // user | assistant | system
  content        String       @db.Text
  model          String?
  tokens         Int?
  attachments

// -------------------------------------------
// USAGE LOG
// -------------------------------------------
model UsageLog {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  model     String
  tokens    Int      @default(0)
  credits   Int      @default(0)
  action    String   // chat | tool | api
  metadata  String?  @db.Text  // JSON
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  // Relations
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([userId, createdAt])
  @@index([action])
}

// -------------------------------------------
// PAYMENT
// -------------------------------------------
model Payment {
  id                String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId            String
  stripePaymentId   String   @unique
  stripeInvoiceId   String?
  amount            Int      // in centesimi
  currency          String   @default("eur")
  status            String   // succeeded | failed | pending | refunded
  plan              String
  interval          String?  // month | year
  description       String?
  receiptUrl        String?
  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())

  // Relations
  user              User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([stripePaymentId])
  @@index([status])
}

// -------------------------------------------
// API KEY
// -------------------------------------------
model ApiKey {
  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId      String
  name        String
  key         String    @unique
  prefix      String    // prime 8 chars per display
  lastUsedAt  DateTime?
  expiresAt   DateTime?
  revokedAt   DateTime?
  permissions String    @default("read,write")  // CSV
  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())

  // Relations
  user        User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([key])
}

// -------------------------------------------
// WAITLIST (per early access / beta)
// -------------------------------------------
model Waitlist {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  email     String   @unique
  name      String?
  source    String?  // utm_source
  plan      String?  // piano di interesse
  invited   Boolean  @default(false)
  invitedAt DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([email])
  @@index([invited])
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/auth/register/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { hashPassword, generateToken } from '@/lib/auth-utils'
import { sendVerificationEmail }     from '@/lib/email'
import { z }                         from 'zod'

const RegisterSchema = z.object({
  name:     z.string().min(2).max(50),
  email:    z.string().email(),
  password: z.string()
    .min(8)
    .regex(/[A-Z]/, 'Deve contenere almeno una maiuscola')
    .regex(/[0-9]/, 'Deve contenere almeno un numero'),
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body   = await req.json()
    const parsed = RegisterSchema.safeParse(body)

    if (!parsed.success) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: parsed.error.errors[0].message },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { name, email, password } = parsed.data

    // Check email esistente
    const existing = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { email: email.toLowerCase() },
    })

    if (existing) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Email già registrata' },
        { status: 409 }
      )
    }

    // Hash password
    const hashedPassword = await hashPassword(password)

    // Genera tok

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

**PACCHETTO 80 — AUTH ROUTES (continua)**

```tsx
Password,
        verifyToken,
        plan:          'free',
        credits:       50,
        maxCredits:    50,
        creditsResetAt: new Date(new Date().setHours(24, 0, 0, 0)),
      },
      select: {
        id:    true,
        name:  true,
        email: true,
        plan:  true,
      },
    })

    // Invia email di verifica
    await sendVerificationEmail({
      to:    email,
      name,
      token: verifyToken,
    })

    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        success: true,
        message: 'Registrazione completata! Controlla la tua email per verificare l\'account.',
        user:    { id: user.id, name: user.name, email: user.email },
      },
      { status: 201 }
    )
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[REGISTER ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/auth/login/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { verifyPassword, signJWT }   from '@/lib/auth-utils'
import { z }                         from 'zod'

const LoginSchema = z.object({
  email:      z.string().email(),
  password:   z.string().min(1),
  rememberMe: z.boolean().optional(),
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body   = await req.json()
    const parsed = LoginSchema.safeParse(body)

    if (!parsed.success) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Dati non validi' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { email, password, rememberMe } = parsed.data

    // Trova utente
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { email: email.toLowerCase() },
      select: {
        id:            true,
        name:          true,
        email:         true,
        password:      true,
        plan:          true,
        credits:       true,
        emailVerified: true,
        avatar:        true,
      },
    })

    if (!user) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Email o password non corretti' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    // Verifica password
    const isValid = await verifyPassword(password, user.password)
    if (!isValid) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Email o password non corretti' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    // Check email verificata
    if (!user.emailVerified) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        {
          error: 'Email non verificata. Controlla la tua casella di posta.',
          code:  'EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED',
        },
        { status: 403 }
      )
    }

    // Genera JWT
    const expiresIn = rememberMe ? '30d' : '7d'
    const token     = await signJWT({
      sub:   user.id,
      email: user.email,
      plan:  user.plan,
    }, expiresIn)

    // Risposta con cookie
    const response = NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      user: {
        id:      user.id,
        name:    user.name,
        email:   user.email,
        plan:    user.plan,
        credits: user.credits,
        avatar:  user.avatar,
      },
    })

    response.cookies.set('auth-token', token, {
      httpOnly: true,
      secure:   process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
      sameSite: 'lax',
      maxAge:   rememberMe ? 60 * 60 * 24 * 30 : 60 * 60 * 24 * 7,
      path:     '/',
    })

    return response

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[LOGIN ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

export async function POST() {
  const response = NextResponse.json({ success: true, message: 'Logout effettuato' })
  
  response.cookies.set('auth-token', '', {
    httpOnly: true,
    secure:   process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    sameSite: 'lax',
    maxAge:   0,
    path:     '/',
  })

  return response
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/auth/verify-email/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const token = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get('token')

    if (!token) {
      return NextResponse.redirect(
        new URL('/login?error=token_missing', req.url)
      )
    }

    // Trova utente con questo token
    const user = await prisma.user.findFirst({
      where: { verifyToken: token },
    })

    if (!user) {
      return NextResponse.redirect(
        new URL('/login?error=token_invalid', req.url)
      )
    }

    if (user.emailVerified) {
      return NextResponse.redirect(
        new URL('/login?info=already_verified', req.url)
      )
    }

    // Verifica email
    await prisma.user.update({
      where: { id: user.id },
      data: {
        emailVerified: true,
        verifyToken:   null,
      },
    })

    return NextResponse.redirect(
      new URL('/login?success=email_verified', req.url)
    )

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[VERIFY EMAIL ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.redirect(
      new URL('/login?error=server_error', req.url)
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/auth/forgot-password/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { generateToken }             from '@/lib/auth-utils'
import { sendPasswordResetEmail }    from '@/lib/email'
import { z }                         from 'zod'

const ForgotSchema = z.object({
  email: z.string().email(),
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body   = await req.json()
    const parsed = ForgotSchema.safeParse(body)

    if (!parsed.success) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Email non valida' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { email } = parsed.data

    // Risposta generica per sicurezza (non rivela se email esiste)
    const genericResponse = NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      message: 'Se l\'email esiste, riceverai le istruzioni per il reset.',
    })

    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { email: email.toLowerCase() },
    })

    if (!user) return genericResponse

    // Genera reset token (valido 1 ora)
    const resetToken  = generateToken()
    const resetExpiry = new Date(Date.now() + 60 * 60 * 1000)

    await prisma.user.update({
      where: { id: user.id },
      data: {
        resetToken,
        resetTokenExpiry: resetExpiry,
      },
    })

    // Invia email
    await sendPasswordResetEmail({
      to:    email,
      name:  user.name ?? 'Utente',
      token: resetToken,
    })

    return genericResponse

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[FORGOT PASSWORD ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// src/app/api/auth/reset-password/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { hashPassword }              from '@/lib/auth-utils'
import { z }

> Lara AgentAIForce:

**PACCHETTO 81 — RESET PASSWORD (fine) + PACCHETTO 82 — AUTH UTILS + EMAIL LIB**

```tsx
Schema = z.object({
  token:    z.string().min(1),
  password: z.string()
    .min(8)
    .regex(/[A-Z]/, 'Deve contenere almeno una maiuscola')
    .regex(/[0-9]/, 'Deve contenere almeno un numero'),
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body   = await req.json()
    const parsed = ResetSchema.safeParse(body)

    if (!parsed.success) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: parsed.error.errors[0].message },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { token, password } = parsed.data

    // Trova utente con token valido
    const user = await prisma.user.findFirst({
      where: {
        resetToken:       token,
        resetTokenExpiry: { gt: new Date() },
      },
    })

    if (!user) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Token non valido o scaduto. Richiedi un nuovo reset.' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    // Hash nuova password
    const hashedPassword = await hashPassword(password)

    // Aggiorna password e rimuovi token
    await prisma.user.update({
      where: { id: user.id },
      data: {
        password:         hashedPassword,
        resetToken:       null,
        resetTokenExpiry: null,
      },
    })

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      message: 'Password aggiornata con successo. Ora puoi effettuare il login.',
    })

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[RESET PASSWORD ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/lib/auth-utils.ts
// ============================================

import bcrypt      from 'bcryptjs'
import { SignJWT } from 'jose'
import crypto      from 'crypto'

const JWT_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(
  process.env.JWT_SECRET ?? 'fallback-secret-change-in-production'
)

// -------------------------------------------
// PASSWORD
// -------------------------------------------
export async function hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string> {
  return bcrypt.hash(password, 12)
}

export async function verifyPassword(
  password: string,
  hash:     string
): Promise<boolean> {
  return bcrypt.compare(password, hash)
}

// -------------------------------------------
// JWT
// -------------------------------------------
export async function signJWT(
  payload:   Record<string, unknown>,
  expiresIn: string = '7d'
): Promise<string> {
  return new SignJWT(payload)
    .setProtectedHeader({ alg: 'HS256' })
    .setIssuedAt()
    .setExpirationTime(expiresIn)
    .sign(JWT_SECRET)
}

// -------------------------------------------
// TOKEN GENERATOR
// -------------------------------------------
export function generateToken(bytes: number = 32): string {
  return crypto.randomBytes(bytes).toString('hex')
}

// -------------------------------------------
// RATE LIMIT (semplice in-memory per dev)
// -------------------------------------------
const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetAt: number }>()

export function checkRateLimit(
  key:      string,
  limit:    number = 5,
  windowMs: number = 15 * 60 * 1000
): { allowed: boolean; remaining: number } {
  const now    = Date.now()
  const record = rateLimitMap.get(key)

  if (!record || now > record.resetAt) {
    rateLimitMap.set(key, { count: 1, resetAt: now + windowMs })
    return { allowed: true, remaining: limit - 1 }
  }

  if (record.count >= limit) {
    return { allowed: false, remaining: 0 }
  }

  record.count++
  return { allowed: true, remaining: limit - record.count }
}
