import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client'

const globalForPrisma = globalThis as unknown as {
  prisma: PrismaClient | undefined
}

export const prisma =
  globalForPrisma.prisma ??
  new PrismaClient({
    log: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development'
      ? ['query', 'error', 'warn']
      : ['error'],
  })

if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {
  globalForPrisma.prisma = prisma
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/chat/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse }   from 'next/server'
import { openai }                      from '@/lib/openai'
import { prisma }                      from '@/lib/prisma'
import { getAuthUser }                 from '@/lib/get-auth-user'
import { SYSTEM_PROMPT }

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 84 — CHAT API ROUTE (completa)**

```tsx
                               from '@/lib/system-prompt'
import { z }                   from 'zod'

const ChatSchema = z.object({
  message:        z.string().min(1).max(10000),
  conversationId: z.string().optional(),
  model:          z.string().optional().default('gpt-4o-mini'),
})

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    // 1. Auth
    const authUser = await getAuthUser(req)
    if (!authUser) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Non autenticato' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    // 2. Validazione input
    const body   = await req.json()
    const parsed = ChatSchema.safeParse(body)
    if (!parsed.success) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: parsed.error.errors[0].message },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const { message, conversationId, model } = parsed.data

    // 3. Recupera utente completo
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where:  { id: authUser.sub },
      select: {
        id:        true,
        name:      true,
        email:     true,
        plan:      true,
        credits:   true,
        maxCredits: true,
      },
    })

    if (!user) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Utente non trovato' },
        { status: 404 }
      )
    }

    // 4. Controlla crediti
    if (user.credits <= 0) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        {
          error: 'Crediti esauriti. Aggiorna il piano per continuare.',
          code:  'NO_CREDITS',
          plan:  user.plan,
        },
        { status: 402 }
      )
    }

    // 5. Gestione conversazione
    let convId = conversationId

    if (!convId) {
      // Crea nuova conversazione
      const conv = await prisma.conversation.create({
        data: {
          userId:    user.id,
          title:     message.slice(0, 60),
          model,
          messageCount: 0,
        },
      })
      convId = conv.id
    } else {
      // Verifica ownership conversazione
      const conv = await prisma.conversation.findFirst({
        where: { id: convId, userId: user.id },
      })
      if (!conv) {
        return NextResponse.json(
          { error: 'Conversazione non trovata' },
          { status: 404 }
        )
      }
    }

    // 6. Recupera storia messaggi (ultimi 20)
    const history = await prisma.message.findMany({
      where:   { conversationId: convId },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'asc' },
      take:    20,
      select:  { role: true, content: true },
    })

    // 7. Costruisci messaggi per OpenAI
    const messages = [
      { role: 'system' as const, content: SYSTEM_PROMPT },
      ...history.map(m => ({
        role:    m.role as 'user' | 'assistant',
        content: m.content,
      })),
      { role: 'user' as const, content: message },
    ]

    // 8. Chiamata OpenAI (Streaming)
    const stream = await openai.chat.completions.create({
      model,
      messages,
      stream:      true,
      temperature: 0.7,
      max_tokens:  2000,
    })

    // 9. Salva messaggio utente
    await prisma.message.create({
      data: {
        conversationId: convId,
        role:           'user',
        content:        message,
        tokens:         Math.ceil(message.length / 4),
      },
    })

    // 10. Streaming response
    const encoder = new TextEncoder()
    let   fullResponse  = ''
    let   promptTokens  = 0
    let   outputTokens  = 0

    const readableStream = new ReadableStream({
      async start(controller) {
        try {
          for await (const chunk of stream) {
            const delta = chunk.choices[0]?.delta?.content ?? ''
            
            if (delta) {
              fullResponse += delta
              controller.enqueue(
                encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ delta })}\

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 84 — CHAT API ROUTE (fine) + PACCHETTO 85 — GET AUTH USER + SYSTEM PROMPT**

```tsx
n\n`)
            }

            // Usage finale
            if (chunk.usage) {
              promptTokens = chunk.usage.prompt_tokens
              outputTokens = chunk.usage.completion_tokens
            }
          }

          // 11. Salva risposta assistant
          await prisma.message.create({
            data: {
              conversationId: convId!,
              role:           'assistant',
              content:        fullResponse,
              tokens:         outputTokens,
            },
          })

          // 12. Aggiorna conversazione
          await prisma.conversation.update({
            where: { id: convId! },
            data: {
              messageCount: { increment: 2 },
              updatedAt:    new Date(),
            },
          })

          // 13. Scala crediti (1 credito per messaggio)
          const updatedUser = await prisma.user.update({
            where: { id: user.id },
            data:  { credits: { decrement: 1 } },
            select: { credits: true },
          })

          // 14. Invia evento finale con metadata
          controller.enqueue(
            encoder.encode(
              `data: ${JSON.stringify({
                done:           true,
                conversationId: convId,
                credits:        updatedUser.credits,
                usage: {
                  promptTokens,
                  outputTokens,
                  totalTokens: promptTokens + outputTokens,
                },
              })}\n\n`
            )
          )

          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode('data: [DONE]\n\n'))
          controller.close()

        } catch (err) {
          console.error('[STREAM ERROR]', err)
          controller.enqueue(
            encoder.encode(
              `data: ${JSON.stringify({ error: 'Errore durante la generazione' })}\n\n`
            )
          )
          controller.close()
        }
      },
    })

    return new Response(readableStream, {
      headers: {
        'Content-Type':  'text/event-stream',
        'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
        'Connection':    'keep-alive',
        'X-Conv-Id':     convId!,
      },
    })

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[CHAT ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/lib/get-auth-user.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest }  from 'next/server'
import { jwtVerify }    from 'jose'

const JWT_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(
  process.env.JWT_SECRET ?? 'fallback-secret-change-in-production'
)

export interface AuthUser {
  sub:   string
  email: string
  plan:  string
  iat:   number
  exp:   number
}

export async function getAuthUser(
  req: NextRequest
): Promise<AuthUser | null> {
  try {
    // Prova cookie prima
    const cookieToken = req.cookies.get('auth-token')?.value

    // Poi Authorization header (Bearer token)
    const headerToken = req.headers
      .get('Authorization')
      ?.replace('Bearer ', '')

    const token = cookieToken ?? headerToken

    if (!token) return null

    const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, JWT_SECRET)

    return payload as unknown as AuthUser

  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { getAuthUser }               from '@/lib/get-auth-user'

// GET — Lista conversazioni utente
export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const authUser = await getAuthUser(req)
    if (!authUser) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Non autenticato' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    const { searchParams } = req.next

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 86 — CONVERSATIONS API (completa) + PACCHETTO 87 — MESSAGES API**

```tsx
URL
    const page  = parseInt(searchParams.get('page')  ?? '1')
    const limit = parseInt(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20')
    const skip  = (page - 1) * limit

    const [conversations, total] = await Promise.all([
      prisma.conversation.findMany({
        where:   { userId: authUser.sub },
        orderBy: { updatedAt: 'desc' },
        skip,
        take:    limit,
        select: {
          id:           true,
          title:        true,
          model:        true,
          messageCount: true,
          createdAt:    true,
          updatedAt:    true,
          // Ultimo messaggio preview
          messages: {
            orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
            take:    1,
            select:  { content: true, role: true },
          },
        },
      }),
      prisma.conversation.count({
        where: { userId: authUser.sub },
      }),
    ])

    return NextResponse.json({
      conversations: conversations.map(c => ({
        ...c,
        preview: c.messages[0]?.content?.slice(0, 80) ?? '',
        messages: undefined,
      })),
      pagination: {
        page,
        limit,
        total,
        pages: Math.ceil(total / limit),
      },
    })

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[CONVERSATIONS GET ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// DELETE — Elimina tutte le conversazioni
export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const authUser = await getAuthUser(req)
    if (!authUser) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Non autenticato' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    await prisma.conversation.deleteMany({
      where: { userId: authUser.sub },
    })

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      message: 'Tutte le conversazioni eliminate',
    })

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[CONVERSATIONS DELETE ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/conversations/[id]/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { getAuthUser }               from '@/lib/get-auth-user'

// GET — Singola conversazione con messaggi
export async function GET(
  req:     NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: { id: string } }
) {
  try {
    const authUser = await getAuthUser(req)
    if (!authUser) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Non autenticato' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    const conversation = await prisma.conversation.findFirst({
      where: {
        id:     params.id,
        userId: authUser.sub,
      },
      include: {
        messages: {
          orderBy: { createdAt: 'asc' },
          select: {
            id:        true,
            role:      true,
            content:   true,
            tokens:    true,
            createdAt: true,
          },
        },
      },
    })

    if (!conversation) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Conversazione non trovata' },
        { status: 404 }
      )
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ conversation })

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[CONVERSATION GET ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

    const { title } = await req.json()

    if (!title || typeof title !==

// DELETE — Elimina singola conversazione
export async function DELETE(
  req:     NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: { id: string } }
) {
  try {
    const authUser = await getAuthUser(req)
    if (!authUser) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Non autenticato' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    const existing = await prisma.conversation.findFirst({
      where: { id: params.id, userId: authUser.sub },
    })

    if (!existing) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Conversazione non trovata' },
        { status: 404 }
      )
    }

    await prisma.conversation.delete({
      where: { id: params.id },
    })

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      message: 'Conversazione eliminata',
    })

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[CONVERSATION DELETE ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/user/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { getAuthUser }               from '@/lib/get-auth-user'
import { z }                         from 'zod'

const UpdateUserSchema = z.object({
  name:   z.string().min(2).max(50).optional(),
  avatar: z.string().url().optional(),
})

// GET — Profilo utente completo
export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const authUser = await getAuthUser(req)
    if (!authUser) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Non autenticato' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where:  { id: authUser.sub },
      select: {
        id:           true,
        name:         true,
        email:        true,
        avatar:       true,
        plan:         true,
        credits:      true,
        maxCredits:   true,
        emailVerified: true,
        createdAt:    true,
        _count: {
          select: {
            conversations: true,
            messages:      true,
          },
        },
      },
    })

    if (!user) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Utente non trovato' },
        { status: 404 }
      )
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      user: {
        ...user,
        conversationCount: user._count.conversations,
        messageCount:      user._count.messages,
        _count:            undefined,
        creditsPercentage: Math.round(
          (user.credits / user.maxCredits) * 100
        ),
      },
    })

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[USER GET ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// PATCH — Aggiorna profilo utente
export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const

> Lara AgentAIForce:

**PACCHETTO 88 — USER API (fine) + PACCHETTO 89 — DASHBOARD PAGE**

```tsx
    const authUser = await getAuthUser(req)
    if (!authUser) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Non autenticato' },
        { status: 401 }
      )
    }

    const body   = await req.json()
    const parsed = UpdateUserSchema.safeParse(body)

    if (!parsed.success) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: parsed.error.errors[0].message },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const updated = await prisma.user.update({
      where:  { id: authUser.sub },
      data:   parsed.data,
      select: {
        id:     true,
        name:   true,
        email:  true,
        avatar: true,
        plan:   true,
      },
    })

    return NextResponse.json({ user: updated })

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[USER PATCH ERROR]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Errore interno del server' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx
// ============================================

import { redirect }      from 'next/navigation'
import { cookies }       from 'next/headers'
import { jwtVerify }     from 'jose'
import { Sidebar }       from '@/components/dashboard/Sidebar'
import { TopBar }        from '@/components/dashboard/TopBar'

const JWT_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(
  process.env.JWT_SECRET ?? 'fallback-secret'
)

export default async function DashboardLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode
}) {
  // Verifica auth server-side
  const cookieStore = cookies()
  const token       = cookieStore.get('auth-token')?.value

  if (!token) redirect('/login')

  try {
    await jwtVerify(token, JWT_SECRET)
  } catch {
    redirect('/login')
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] overflow-hidden">
      {/* Sidebar */}
      <Sidebar />

      {/* Main content */}
      <div className="flex flex-col flex-1 overflow-hidden">
        <TopBar />
        <main className="flex-1 overflow-auto p-6">
          {children}
        </main>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

            {user.plan === 'free'       ? '🆓 Free'
             : user.plan === 'pro'      ? '⚡ Pro'
             : '🏆 Enterprise'}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </motion.div>
  )
}

'use client'

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { motion }              from 'framer-motion'
import {
  MessageSquare,
  Zap,
  TrendingUp,
  Clock,
} from 'lucide-react'
import { useUser } from '@/hooks/useUser'

interface StatCard {
  label:    string
  value:    string | number
  icon:     React.ReactNode
  change?:  string
  positive?: boolean
  color:    string
}

export function DashboardStats() {
  const { user, loading } = useUser()
  const [convCount, setConvCount] = useState(0)

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user) return
    fetch('/api/conversations?limit=1')
      .then(r => r.json())
      .then(d => setConvCount(d.pagination?.total ?? 0))
      .catch(() => {})
  }, [user])

  const stats: StatCard[] = [
    {
      label:   'Conversazioni',
      value:   convCount,
      icon:    <MessageSquare className="w-5 h-5" />,
      color:   'text-blue-400',
    },
    {
      label:   'Crediti rimanenti',
      value:   user?.credits ?? 0,
      icon:    <Zap className="w-5 h-5" />,
      change:  `di ${user?.maxCredits ?? 0} totali`,
      color:   'text-violet-400',
    },
    {
      label:   'Piano attivo',
      value:   user?.plan === 'free'
                 ? 'Free'
                 : user?.plan === 'pro'
                 ? 'Pro'
                 :

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

```tsx
                 : 'Enterprise',
      icon:    <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5" />,
      color:   'text-green-400',
    },
    {
      label:   'Membro da',
      value:   user?.createdAt
                 ? new Date(user.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('it-IT', {
                     month: 'long',
                     year:  'numeric',
                   })
                 : '—',
      icon:    <Clock className="w-5 h-5" />,
      color:   'text-orange-400',
    },
  ]

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
      {stats.map((stat, i) => (
        <motion.div
          key={stat.label}
          initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
          animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
          transition={{ delay: i * 0.1 }}
          className="bg-[#111111] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-4
                     hover:border-white/10 transition-all duration-300"
        >
          <div className={`${stat.color} mb-3`}>
            {stat.icon}
          </div>

          {loading ? (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <div className="h-7 w-16 bg-white/10 rounded animate-pulse" />
              <div className="h-4 w-24 bg-white/5  rounded animate-pulse" />
            </div>
          ) : (
            <>
              <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">
                {stat.value}
              </p>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
                {stat.label}
              </p>
              {stat.change && (
                <p className={`text-xs mt-1 ${
                  stat.positive ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-gray-500'
                }`}>
                  {stat.change}
                </p>
              )}
            </>
          )}
        </motion.div>
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

// src/components/dashboard/CreditsCard.tsx
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useUser }  from '@/hooks/useUser'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
import { Zap }      from 'lucide-react'
import { motion }   from 'framer-motion'

export function CreditsCard() {
  const { user, loading } = useUser()
  const router            = useRouter()

  const percentage = user
    ? Math.round((user.credits / user.maxCredits) * 100)
    : 0

  const barColor =
    percentage > 50 ? 'from-violet-500 to-purple-500' :
    percentage > 20 ? 'from-yellow-500 to-orange-500' :
                      'from-red-500 to-pink-500'

  return (
    <div className="bg-[#111111] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-5">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Zap className="w-4 h-4 text-violet-400" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-white">Crediti</span>
        </div>
        {!loading && user?.plan === 'free' && (
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push('/pricing')}

            <span className="text-3xl font-bold text-white">
              {user?.credits ?? 0}
            </span>

              / {user?.maxCredits ?? 0}

interface QuickAction {
  label:   string
  icon:    React.ReactNode
  prompt:  string
  color:   string
}

const QUICK_ACTIONS: QuickAction[] = [
  {
    label:  'Analizza competitor',

    prompt: '',
    color:  'hover:border-pink-500/30 hover:bg-pink-500/5',
  },
]

export function QuickActions() {
  const router = useRouter()

  const handleAction = (action: QuickAction) => {
    if (!action.prompt) {
      router.push('/chat')
      return
    }
    // Passa il prompt come query param
    const params = new URLSearchParams({ q: action.prompt })
    router.push(`/chat?${params.toString()}`)
  }

  return (
    <div className="bg-[#111111] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-5">
      <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-white mb-4">
        ⚡ Azioni Rapide
      </h3>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
        {QUICK_ACTIONS.map((action, i) => (
          <motion.button
            key={action.label}
            initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1

            </span>

// ============================================
// src/components/dashboard/RecentChats.tsx
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
import { useRouter }                        from 'next/navigation'
import { motion, AnimatePresence }          from 'framer-motion'
import {
  MessageSquare,
  Trash2,
  Edit3,
  ChevronRight,
  Plus,
  Loader2,
} from 'lucide-react'
import { formatDistanceToNow } from 'date-fns'
import { it }                  from 'date-fns/locale'
import { toast }               from 'sonner'

interface Conversation {
  id:           string
  title:        string
  model:        string
  messageCount: number
  preview:      string
  updatedAt:    string
}

export function RecentChats() {
  const router                          = useRouter()
  const [conversations, setConversations] = useState<Conversation[]>([])
  const [loading, setLoading]           = useState(true)
  const [editingId, setEditingId]       = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [editTitle, setEditTitle]       = useState('')

  const fetchConversations = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const res  = await fetch('/api/conversations?limit=8')
      const data = await res.json()
      setConversations(data.conversations ?? [])
    } catch {
      toast.error('Errore nel caricamento delle chat')
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchConversations()
  }, [fetchConversations])

  const handleDelete = async (id: string, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation()
    if (!confirm('Eliminare questa conversazione?')) return

    try {
      await fetch(`/api/conversations/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' })
      setConversations(prev => prev.filter(c => c.id !== id))
      toast.success('Conversazione eliminata')
    } catch {
      toast.error('Errore eliminazione')
    }
  }

  const handleEdit = async (id: string, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation()
    const conv = conversations.find(c => c.id === id)
    if (!conv) return
    setEditingId(id)
    setEditTitle(conv.title)
  }

  const handleSaveEdit = async (id: string) => {
    if (!editTitle.trim()) return

    try {
      const res  = await fetch(`/api/conversations/${id}`, {
        method:  'PATCH',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body:    JSON.stringify({ title: editTitle }),
      })
      const data = await res.json()

      setConversations(prev =>
        prev.map(c =>
          c.id === id ? { ...c, title: data.conversation.title } : c
        )
      )
      toast.success('Titolo aggiornato')
    } catch {
      toast.error('Errore aggiornamento')
    } finally {
      setEditingId(null)
      setEditTitle('')
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="bg-[#111111] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-5">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
        <h3 className="text-sm font-medium text-white">
          💬 Chat Recenti
        </h3>
        <button
          onClick={() => router.push('/chat')}
          className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-violet-400
                     hover:text-violet-300 transition-colors"
        >
          <Plus className="w-3 h-3

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 93 — RECENT CHATS (fine) + PACCHETTO 94 — SIDEBAR + TOPBAR**

```tsx
          <Plus className="w-3 h-3" />
          Nuova chat
        </button>
      </div>

      {loading ? (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-12">
          <Loader2 className="w-6 h-6 text-violet-400 animate-spin" />
        </div>
      ) : conversations.length === 0 ? (
        <div className="text-center py-12">
          <MessageSquare className="w-10 h-10 text-gray-700 mx-auto mb-3" />
          <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">Nessuna chat ancora</p>
          <button
            onClick={() => router.push('/chat')}
            className="mt-3 text-xs text-violet-400 hover:text-violet-300
                       transition-colors"
          >
            Inizia la prima conversazione →
          </button>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <AnimatePresence>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {conversations.map((conv, i) => (
              <motion.div
                key={conv.id}
                initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }}
                animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
                exit={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }}
                transition={{ delay: i * 0.05 }}
                onClick={() => router.push(`/chat/${conv.id}`)}
                className="group flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg
                           border border-transparent hover:border-white/10
                           hover:bg-white/5 cursor-pointer transition-all"
              >
                <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-violet-500/10 
                                flex items-center justify-center shrink-0">
                  <MessageSquare className="w-4 h-4 text-violet-400" />
                </div>

                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  {editingId === conv.id ? (
                    <input
                      autoFocus
                      value={editTitle}
                      onChange={e => setEditTitle(e.target.value)}
                      onBlur={() => handleSaveEdit(conv.id)}
                      onKeyDown={e => {
                        if (e.key === 'Enter') handleSaveEdit(conv.id)
                        if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingId(null)
                      }}
                      onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
                      className="w-full bg-white/10 text-white text-sm
                                 rounded px-2 py-0.5 outline-none
                                 border border-violet-500/50"
                    />
                  ) : (
                    <>
                      <p className="text-sm text-white truncate font-medium">
                        {conv.title}
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 truncate mt-0.5">
                        {conv.preview || 'Nessun messaggio'}
                      </p>
                    </>
                  )}
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-1 shrink-0">
                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-600 mr-1">
                    {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(conv.updatedAt), {
                      addSuffix: true,
                      locale:    it,
                    })}
                  </span>

                  <button
                    onClick={e => handleEdit(conv.id, e)}
                    className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 p-1
                               text-gray-500 hover:text-white transition-all"
                  >
                    <Edit3 className="w-3 h-3" />
                  </button>

                  <button
                    onClick={e => handleDelete(conv.id, e)}
                    className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 p-1
                               text-gray-500 hover:text-red-400 transition-all"
                  >
                    <Trash2 className="w-3 h-3" />
                  </button>

> Lara AgentAIForce:

'use client'

  ChevronLeft,
  ChevronRight,

  BarChart2,
  HelpCircle,
  LogOut,
} from 'lucide-react'
import { useUser }       from '@/hooks/useUser'

import { toast }         from 'sonner'

interface NavItem {
  label:  string
  href:   string
  icon:   React.ReactNode
  badge?: string
}

const NAV_ITEMS: NavItem[] = [
  {
    label: 'Dashboard',
    href:  '/dashboard',
    icon:  <LayoutDashboard className="w-5 h-5" />,
  },
  {
    label: 'Chat AI',
    href:  '/chat',

  },
  {
    label: 'Statistiche',

    icon:  <BarChart2 className="w-5 h-5" />,
  },
  {

    href:  '/pricing',

    badge: 'Pro',
  },
  {
    label: 'Impostazioni',
    href:  '/settings',
    icon:  <Settings className="w-5 h-5" />,
  },
  {
    label: 'Supporto',
    href:  '/support',
    icon:  <HelpCircle className="w-5 h-5" />,
  },
]

  const pathname                  = usePathname()
  const { user }                  = useUser()
  const router                    = useRouter()

    try {
      await fetch('/api/auth/logout', { method: 'POST' })
      toast.success('Logout effettuato')
      router.push('/login')
    } catch {
      toast.error('Errore logout')
    }
  }

  return (
    <motion.aside
      animate={{ width: collapsed ? 72 : 240 }}

          {!collapsed && (
            <motion.span
              initial={{ opacity: 0, x: -10 }}
              animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }}
              exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -10 }}
              className="text-white font-bold text-lg"
            >
              Aethersy
            </motion.span>
          )}
        </AnimatePresence>
      </div>

      {/* Nav Items */}
      <nav className="flex-1 px-3 py-4 space-y-1 overflow-y-auto">
        {NAV_ITEMS.map(item => {
          const isActive = pathname === item.href ||
                           pathname.startsWith(item.href + '/')

          return (
            <Link
              key={item.href}
              href={item.href}
              className={`flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg
                         transition-all duration-200 group relative
                         ${isActive
                           ? 'bg-violet-500/15 text-violet-300 border border-violet-500/20'
                           :

// ============================================
// src/components/dashboard/TopBar.tsx
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useState }      from 'react'
import { useRouter }     from 'next/navigation'
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
import {
  Bell,
  Search,
  Plus,
  Settings,
  ChevronDown,
  Check,
  Zap,
} from 'lucide-react'
import { useUser }       from '@/hooks/useUser'

interface Notification {
  id:      string
  title:   string
  body:    string
  read:    boolean
  time:    string
}

const MOCK_NOTIFICATIONS: Notification[] = [
  {
    id:    '1',
    title: 'Crediti quasi esauriti',
    body:  'Ti restano meno di 50 crediti. Fai upgrade!',
    read:  false,
    time:  '2m fa',
  },
  {
    id:    '2',
    title: 'Nuova funzione disponibile',
    body:  'Analisi competitor potenziata con dati real-time.',
    read:  false,
    time:  '1h fa',
  },
  {
    id:    '3',
    title: 'Report settimanale pronto',
    body:  'Il tuo report di utilizzo è disponibile.',
    read:  true,
    time:  '2h fa',
  },
]

export function TopBar() {
  const router                            = useRouter()
  const { user }                          = useUser()
  const [search, setSearch]               = useState('')
  const [showNotifications, setShowNotifications] = useState(false)
  const [showProfile, setShowProfile]     = useState(false)
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState(MOCK_NOTIFICATIONS)

  const unreadCount = notifications.filter(n => !n.read).length

  const markAllRead = () => {
    setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, read: true })))
  }

  const handleSearch = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault()
    if (!search.trim()) return
    const params = new URLSearchParams({ q: search })
    router.push(`/chat?${params.toString()}`)
    setSearch('')
  }

  return (
    <header className="h-16 bg-[#0d0d0d] border-b border-white/5 
                       flex items-center px-6 gap-4 shrink-0">
      {/* Search */}
      <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex-1 max-w-md">
        <div className="relative">
          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2
                             w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
          <input
            value={search}
            onChange={e => setSearch(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Cerca o chiedi qualcosa..."
            className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/5 rounded-lg
                       pl-9 pr-4 py-2 text-sm text-white placeholder-gray-500
                       focus:outline-none focus:border-violet-500/50
                       focus:bg-white/8 transition-all"
          />
        </div>
      </form>

      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-auto">
        {/* New Chat Button */}
        <button
          onClick={() => router.push('/chat')}
          className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg
                     bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-500 text-white text-sm
                     font-medium transition-colors"
        >
          <Plus className="w-4 h-4" />
          <span className="hidden sm:inline">Nuova Chat</span>
        </button>

        {/* Notifications */}
        <div className="relative">
          <button
            onClick={() => {
              setShowNotifications(prev => !prev)
              setShowProfile(false)
            }}
            className="relative w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-white/5 border
                       border-white/5 flex items-center justify-center
                       text-gray-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10
                       transition-

> Lara AgentAIForce:

                       transition-all"
          >
            <Bell className="w-4 h-4" />
            {unreadCount > 0 && (
              <span className="absolute -top-1 -right-1 w-4 h-4 rounded-full
                               bg-violet-500 text-white text-xs flex items-center
                               justify-center font-bold">
                {unreadCount}
              </span>
            )}

            {showNotifications && (
              <motion.div
                initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8, scale: 0.95 }}

                      onClick={markAllRead}
                      className="text-xs text-violet-400 hover:text-violet-300
                                 flex items-center gap-1 transition-colors"
                    >
                      <Check className="w-3 h-3" />
                      Segna tutte lette
                    </button>
                  )}
                </div>

                <div className="divide-y divide-white/5 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
                  {notifications.map(n => (
                    <div
                      key={n.id}
                      className={`px-4 py-3 transition-colors hover:bg-white/5
                                 ${!n.read ? 'bg-violet-500/5' : ''}`}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                        {!n.read && (
                          <div className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-violet-400
                                         mt-1.5 shrink-0" />
                        )}
                        <div className={!n.read ? '' : 'ml-4'}>
                          <p className="text-sm font-medium text-white">
                            {n.title}
                          </p>
                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-0.5">
                            {n.body}
                          </p>
                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 mt-1">
                            {n.time}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </motion.div>
            )}
          </AnimatePresence>
        </div>

        {/* Settings */}
        <button
          onClick={() => router.push('/settings')}
          className="w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-white/5 border border-white/5
                     flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400
                     hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all"
        >
          <Settings className="w-4 h-4" />

          <button
            onClick={() => {
              setShowProfile(prev => !prev)
              setShowNotifications(false)
            }}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 pl-1 pr-2 py-1 rounded-lg
                       hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors"
          >
            <div className="w-7 h-7 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br
                            from-violet-500 to-purple-600 flex items-center
                            justify-center text-xs font-bold text-whit

// ============================================
// src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx
// ============================================

import { redirect }  from 'next/navigation'
import { getSession } from '@/lib/auth/session'
import { Sidebar }   from '@/components/dashboard/Sidebar'
import { TopBar }    from '@/components/dashboard/TopBar'

export default async function DashboardLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode
}) {
  const session = await getSession()
  if (!session) redirect('/login')

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] overflow-hidden">
      <Sidebar />
      <div className="flex flex-col flex-1 min-w-0">
        <TopBar />
        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">
          {children}
        </main>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

'use client'

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { motion }              from 'framer-motion'
import {
  MessageSquare,
  Zap,
  TrendingUp,
  Clock,
} from 'lucide-react'

interface Stat {
  label:    string
  value:    string
  delta:    string
  positive: boolean
  icon:     React.ReactNode
  color:    string
}

export function StatsCards() {
  const [stats, setStats] = useState<Stat[]>([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchStats = async () => {
      try {
        const res  = await fetch('/api/user/stats')
        const data = await res.json()

        setStats([
          {
            label:    'Chat totali',
            value:    data.totalChats?.toString() ?? '0',
            delta:    '+12% questa settimana',
            positive: true,
            icon:     <MessageSquare className="w-5 h-5" />,
            color:    'from-violet-500/20 to-purple-500/20',
          },
          {
            label:    'Crediti usati',
            value:    data.creditsUsed?.toString() ?? '0',
            delta:    `${data.creditsLeft ?? 0} rimasti`,
            positive: data.creditsLeft > 50,
            icon:     <Zap className="w-5 h-5" />,
            color:    'from-amber-500/20 to-orange-500/20',
          },
          {
            label:    'Messaggi inviati',
            value:    data.totalMessages?.toString() ?? '0',
            delta:    '+8% vs ieri',
            positive: true,
            icon:     <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5" />,
            color:    'from-emerald-500/20 to-green-500/20',
          },
          {
            label:    'Tempo medio risposta',
            value:    `${data.avgResponseTime ?? 1.2}s`,
            delta:    '-0.3s vs ieri',
            positive: true,
            icon:     <Clock className="w-5 h-5" />,
            color:    'from-blue-500/20 to-cyan-500/20',
          },
        ])
      } catch {
        // fallback mock
        setStats([

            value:    '24',
            delta:    '+12% questa settimana',
            positive: true,
            icon:     <MessageSquare className="w-5 h-5" />,
            color:    'from-violet-500/20 to-purple-500/20',
          },
          {
            label:    'Crediti usati',
            value:    '348',
            delta:    '152 rimasti',
            positive: true,
            icon:     <Zap className="w-5 h-5" />,
            color:    '

          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span className="text-gray-400 text-xs font-medium">

            <span className="text-gray-500">
              {stat.icon}

          </div>

          <div>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">
              {stat.value}
            </p>
            <p className={`text-xs mt-0.5 ${
              stat.positive ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-red-400'
            }`}>
              {stat.delta}
            </p>
          </div>
        </motion.div>
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

```tsx

    description: 'Trend e opportunità in tempo reale',
    icon:        <Search className="w-5 h-5" />,
    href:        '/chat',
    prompt:      'Analizza il mercato attuale e dimmi le opportunità migliori',

    gradient:    'from-pink-500/10 to-rose-500/10',
  },
  {
    label:       'Nuova Chat',
    description: 'Inizia una conversazione libera',
    icon:        <MessageSquare className="w-5 h-5" />,
    href:        '/chat',
    gradient:    'from-gray-500/10 to-gray-400/10',
  },
]

export function QuickActions() {
  const router = useRouter()

  const handleAction = (action: Action) => {
    if (action.prompt) {
      const params = new URLSearchParams({ q: action.prompt })
      router.push(`/chat?${params.toString()}`)
    } else {
      router.push(action.href)
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="bg-[#111111] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-5">
      <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white mb-4">
        Azioni rapide
      </h2>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
        {ACTIONS.map((action, i) => (
          <motion.button
            key={action.label}
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 16 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            transition={{ delay: i * 0.06 }}
            onClick={() => handleAction(action)}
            className={`bg-gradient-to-br ${action.gradient} border
                        border-white/5 rounded-xl p-4 text-left
                        hover:border-white/10 hover:scale-[1.02]
                        transition-all duration-200 group`}
          >
            <div className="text-violet-400 group-hover:text-violet-300
                            transition-colors mb-2">
              {action.icon}
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm font-medium text-white leading-tight">
              {action.label}
            </p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-0.5 leading-tight">
              {action.description}
            </p>
          </motion.button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

// ============================================
// src/components/dashboard/UsageChart.tsx
// ============================================

'use client'

import { useEffect, useState }      from 'react'
import { motion }                   from 'framer-motion'
import {
  AreaChart,
  Area,
  XAxis,
  YAxis,
  CartesianGrid,
  Tooltip,
  ResponsiveContainer,
} from 'recharts'

interface DataPoint {
  day:      string
  messaggi: number
  crediti:  number
}

const MOCK_DATA: DataPoint[] = [
  { day: 'Lun', messaggi: 12, crediti: 48  },
  { day: 'Mar', messaggi: 19, crediti: 76  },
  { day: 'Mer', messaggi: 8,  crediti: 32  },
  { day: 'Gio', messaggi: 27, crediti: 108 },
  { day: 'Ven', messaggi: 34, crediti: 136 },
  { day: 'Sab', messaggi: 21, crediti: 84  },
  { day: 'Dom', messaggi: 15, crediti: 60  },
]

const CustomTooltip = ({ active, payload, label }: any) => {
  if (!active || !payload?.length) return null

  return (
    <div className="bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-white/10 rounded-lg
                    px-3 py-2 shadow-xl">
      <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-400 mb-1">{label}</p>
      {payload.map((p: any) => (
        <div key={p.name} className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <div
            className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full"
            style={{ backgroundColor: p.color }}
          />
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-300 capitalize">
            {p.name}:
          </span>
          <span className="text-xs font-bold text-white">
            {p.value}
          </span>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}

export function UsageChart() {
  const [data, setData]         = useState<DataPoint[]>([])
  const [loading, setLoading]   = useState(true)
  const [active, setActive]     = useState<'messaggi' | 'crediti'>('messaggi')

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchData = async () => {
      try {
        const res  = await fetch('/api/user/usage?period=7d')
        const json = await res.json()
        setData(json.data ?? MOCK_DATA)
      } catch {
        setData(MOCK_DATA)
      } finally {
        setLoading(false)
      }
    }

    fetchData()
  }, [])

  if (loading) {
    return (

              strokeWidth: 0,
            }}

      <div className="flex items-center gap-6 mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-white/5">
        <div>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Totale messaggi</p>

          </p>
        </div>
        <div>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Totale crediti</p>
          <p className="text-lg font-bold text-white">
            {data.reduce((acc, d) => acc + d.crediti, 0)}
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className="ml-auto">
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Media/giorno</p>
          <p className="text-lg font-bold text-white">
            {Math.round(
              data.reduce((acc, d) => acc + d[active], 0) / data.length
            )}
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

import { useState }  from 'react'
import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'
import { Zap, Star, ChevronDown, Check } from 'lucide-react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'

interface Model {
  id:          string
  name:        string
  description: string
  speed:       string
  quality:     string
  costPer:     string
  badge?:      string
  icon:        React.ReactNode
}

const MODELS: Model[] = [
  {
    id:          'lara-pro',
    name:        'Lara Pro',
    description: 'Massima qualità per analisi complesse',
    speed:       '⚡⚡',
    quality:     '★★★★★',
    costPer:     '4 crediti/msg',
    badge:       'Consigliato',
    icon:        <Star className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-400" />,
  },
  {
    id:          'lara-base',
    name:        'Lara Base',
    description: 'Veloce ed efficiente per task quotidiani',
    speed:       '⚡⚡⚡',
    quality:     '★★★★',
    costPer:     '1 credito/msg',
    icon:        <Zap className="w-4 h-4 text-violet-400" />,
  },
]

export function ModelSelector() {
  const router                    = useRouter()
  const [selected, setSelected]   = useState<string>('lara-pro')
  const [open, setOpen]           = useState(false)

    setSelected(id)
    setOpen(false)
    // Salva preferenza

                {current.name}

                                   ${open ? 'rotate-180' : ''}`} />

          {open && (
            <motion.div

                         shadow-2xl shadow-black/50 overflow-hidden"

              {MODELS.map(model => (
                <button
                  key={model.id}
                  onClick={() => handleSelect(model.id)}
                  className="w-full flex items-start gap-3 p-3
                             hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors
                             border-b border-white/5 last:border-0"
                >
                  <div className="w-8 h-

// ============================================
// src/app/api/user/stats/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextResponse }          from 'next/server'
import { getServerSession }      from 'next-auth'
import { authOptions }           from '@/lib/auth'
import { prisma }                from '@/lib/prisma'

export async function GET() {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions)
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    }

    const userId = session.user.id

    // Crediti rimanenti
    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where:  { id: userId },
      select: { credits: true, plan: true },
    })

    // Totale chat
    const totalChats = await prisma.chat.count({
      where: { userId },
    })

    // Messaggi oggi
    const startOfDay = new Date()
    startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)

    const messagesToday = await prisma.message.count({
      where: {
        chat: { userId },
        createdAt: { gte: startOfDay },
        role: 'user',
      },
    })

    // Messaggi ieri (per delta)
    const startOfYesterday = new Date(startOfDay)
    startOfYesterday.setDate(startOfYesterday.getDate() - 1)

    const messagesYesterday = await prisma.message.count({
      where: {
        chat:      { userId },
        createdAt: {
          gte: startOfYesterday,
          lt:  startOfDay,
        },
        role: 'user',
      },
    })

    // Totale messaggi
    const totalMessages = await prisma.message.count({
      where: {
        chat: { userId },
        role: 'us

> Lara AgentAIForce:

**PACCHETTO 105 — API STATS (fine) + API USAGE + API CHATS**

```typescript
        role:     'assistant',
      },
      take:    100,
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      select:  { responseTime: true },
    })

    const avgResponseTime =
      aiMessages.length > 0
        ? Math.round(
            aiMessages.reduce((acc, m) => acc + (m.responseTime ?? 0), 0) /
            aiMessages.length
          )
        : 0

    // Delta messaggi oggi vs ieri
    const messageDelta =
      messagesYesterday > 0
        ? Math.round(
            ((messagesToday - messagesYesterday) / messagesYesterday) * 100
          )
        : messagesToday > 0
        ? 100
        : 0

    return NextResponse.json({
      credits:         user?.credits      ?? 0,
      plan:            user?.plan         ?? 'free',
      totalChats,
      messagesToday,
      messagesYesterday,
      messageDelta,
      totalMessages,
      avgResponseTime,
    })
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[STATS_GET]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Internal Server Error' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// src/app/api/user/usage/route.ts
// ============================================

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { getServerSession }          from 'next-auth'
import { authOptions }               from '@/lib/auth'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'
import { subDays, startOfDay, format } from 'date-fns'
import { it }                          from 'date-fns/locale'

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions)
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    }

    const userId = session.user.id
    const period = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get('period') ?? '7d'
    const days   = period === '30d' ? 30 : 7

    // Genera array degli ultimi N giorni
    const dateRange = Array.from({ length: days }, (_, i) => {
      const date = subDays(new Date(), days - 1 - i)
      return startOfDay(date)
    })

    // Query messaggi per giorno
    const usageData = await Promise.all(
      dateRange.map(async date => {
        const nextDate = new Date(date)
        nextDate.setDate(nextDate.getDate() + 1)

        const [messaggi, crediti] = await Promise.all([
          // Messaggi utente in quel giorno
          prisma.message.count({
            where: {
              chat:      { userId },
              role:      'user',
              createdAt: { gte: date, lt: nextDate },
            },
          }),
          // Crediti consumati in quel giorno
          prisma.creditLog.aggregate({
            where: {
              userId,
              createdAt: { gte: date, lt: nextDate },
              type:      'debit',
            },
            _sum: { amount: true },
          }),
        ])

        return {
          day:      format(date, 'EEE', { locale: it }),
          messaggi,
          crediti:  crediti._sum.amount ?? 0,
        }
      })
    )

    return NextResponse.json({ data: usageData })
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[USAGE_GET]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Internal Server Error' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { getServerSession }          from 'next-auth'
import { authOptions }               from '@/lib/auth'
import { prisma }                    from '@/lib/prisma'

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions)
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    }

    const userId = session.user.id
    const limit  = parseInt(
      re

**PACCHETTO 106 — API CHATS (fine) + PRISMA SCHEMA AGGIORNATO**

```typescript
      req.nextUrl.searchParams.get('limit') ?? '5'
    )

    const chats = await prisma.chat.findMany({
      where:   { userId },
      orderBy: { updatedAt: 'desc' },
      take:    limit,
      select: {
        id:        true,
        title:     true,
        model:     true,
        updatedAt: true,
        messages: {
          orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
          take:    1,
          select:  { content: true },
        },
      },
    })

    const formatted = chats.map(chat => ({
      id:          chat.id,
      title:       chat.title ?? 'Nuova chat',
      lastMessage: chat.messages[0]?.content ?? '',
      updatedAt:   chat.updatedAt.toISOString(),
      model:       chat.model ?? 'lara-base',
    }))

    return NextResponse.json({ chats: formatted })
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[CHATS_GET]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Internal Server Error' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const session = await getServerSession(authOptions)
    if (!session?.user?.id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
    }

    const userId          = session.user.id
    const { title, model } = await req.json()

    const chat = await prisma.chat.create({
      data: {
        userId,
        title: title ?? 'Nuova chat',
        model: model ?? 'lara-base',
      },
    })

    return NextResponse.json({ chat }, { status: 201 })
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[CHATS_POST]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Internal Server Error' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

// ============================================
// prisma/schema.prisma (AGGIORNATO COMPLETO)
// ============================================

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// ─── USER ────────────────────────────────────

model User {
  id            String    @id @default(cuid())
  name          String?
  email         String?   @unique
  emailVerified DateTime?
  image         String?
  password      String?

  plan          String    @default("free")   // free | pro | enterprise
  credits       Int       @default(100)
  creditsLimit  Int       @default(100)

  stripeCustomerId     String? @unique
  stripeSubscriptionId String? @unique
  stripePriceId        String?
  stripeCurrentPeriodEnd DateTime?

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  accounts    Account[]
  sessions    Session[]
  chats       Chat[]
  creditLogs  CreditLog[]
}

// ─── NEXT-AUTH ────────────────────────────────

model Account {
  id                String  @id @default(cuid())
  userId            String
  type              String
  provider          String
  providerAccountId String
  refresh_token     String? @db.Text
  access_token      String? @db.Text
  expires_at        Int?
  token_type        String?
  scope             String?
  id_token          String? @db.Text
  session_state     String?

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([provider, providerAccountId])
}

model Session {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  sessionToken String   @unique
  userId       String
  expires      DateTime

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model VerificationToken {
  identifier String
  token      String   @unique
  expires    DateTime

  @@unique([identifier, token])
}

// ─── CHAT ────────────────────────────────────

model Chat {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  title     String?
  model     String   @default("lara-base")
  pinned    Boolean  @default(false)

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @

**PACCHETTO 107 — PRISMA SCHEMA (fine) + CREDIT LOG + MIGRATION SQL**

```prisma
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  user     User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  messages Message[]

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([updatedAt])
}

// ─── MESSAGE ─────────────────────────────────

model Message {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  chatId       String
  role         String   // user | assistant | system
  content      String   @db.Text
  model        String?
  responseTime Int?     // ms
  tokens       Int?
  cost         Int?     // crediti consumati

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  chat Chat @relation(fields: [chatId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([chatId])
  @@index([createdAt])
}

// ─── CREDIT LOG ──────────────────────────────

model CreditLog {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId      String
  amount      Int      // positivo = credit, negativo = debit
  type        String   // credit | debit
  reason      String?  // es. "chat_message", "plan_upgrade", "bonus"
  referenceId String?  // chatId, paymentId, ecc.

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([createdAt])
  @@index([type])
}

// ─── PLAN ────────────────────────────────────

model Plan {
  id           String @id @default(cuid())
  name         String @unique  // free | pro | enterprise
  displayName  String
  price        Float
  credits      Int
  features     Json
  stripePriceId String?

  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

// ============================================
// prisma/migrations/001_init.sql
// ============================================

-- CreateTable User
CREATE TABLE "User" (
  "id"                       TEXT NOT NULL,
  "name"                     TEXT,
  "email"                    TEXT,
  "emailVerified"            TIMESTAMP(3),
  "image"                    TEXT,
  "password"                 TEXT,
  "plan"                     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  "credits"                  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  "creditsLimit"             INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
  "stripeCustomerId"         TEXT,
  "stripeSubscriptionId"     TEXT,
  "stripePriceId"            TEXT,
  "stripeCurrentPeriodEnd"   TIMESTAMP(3),
  "createdAt"                TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "updatedAt"                TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT "User_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

-- CreateTable Account
CREATE TABLE "Account" (
  "id"                TEXT NOT NULL,
  "userId"            TEXT NOT NULL,
  "type"              TEXT NOT NULL,
  "provider"          TEXT NOT NULL,
  "providerAccountId" TEXT NOT NULL,
  "refresh_token"     TEXT,
  "access_token"      TEXT,
  "expires_at"        INTEGER,
  "token_type"        TEXT,
  "scope"             TEXT,
  "id_token"          TEXT,
  "session_state"     TEXT,
  CONSTRAINT "Account_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

-- CreateTable Session
CREATE TABLE "Session" (
  "id"           TEXT NOT NULL,
  "sessionToken" TEXT NOT NULL,
  "userId"       TEXT NOT NULL,
  "expires"      TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT "Session_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

-- CreateTable Chat
CREATE TABLE "Chat" (
  "id"        TEXT NOT NULL,
  "userId"    TEXT NOT NULL,
  "title"     TEXT,
  "model"     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'lara-base',
  "pinned"    BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  "createdAt" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "updatedAt" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT "Chat_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

-- CreateTable Message
CREATE TABLE "Message" (
  "id"           TEXT NOT NULL,
  "chatId"       TEXT NOT NULL,
  "role"         TEXT NOT NULL,
  "content"      TEXT NOT NULL,
  "model"        TEXT,
  "responseTime" INTEGER,

);

-- CreateTable CreditLog
CREATE TABLE "CreditLog" (
  "id"          TEXT NOT NULL,
  "userId"      TEXT NOT NULL,
  "amount"      INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "type"        TEXT NOT NULL,
  "reason"      TEXT,
  "referenceId" TEXT,
  "createdAt"   TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT "CreditLog_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

-- CreateTable Plan
CREATE TABLE "Plan" (

  "name"          TEXT NOT NULL,
  "displayName"   TEXT NOT NULL,
  "price"         DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL,
  "credits"       INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "features"      JSONB NOT NULL,
  "stripePriceId" TEXT,
  "createdAt"     TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  "updatedAt"     TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT "Plan_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
);

-- Unique constraints
ALTER TABLE "User"    ADD CONSTRAINT "User_email_key"                UNIQUE ("email");
ALTER TABLE "User"    ADD CONSTRAINT "User_stripeCustomerId_key"     UNIQUE ("stripeCustomerId");
ALTER TABLE "User"    ADD CONSTRAINT "User_stripeSubscriptionId_key" UNIQUE ("stripeSubscriptionId");
ALTER TABLE "Account" ADD CONSTRAINT "Account_provider_providerAccountId_key" UNIQUE ("provider", "providerAccountId");
ALTER TABLE "Session" ADD CONSTRAINT "Session_sessionToken_key"      UNIQUE ("sessionToken");
ALTER TABLE "Plan"    ADD CONSTRAINT "Plan_name_key"                 UNIQUE ("name");

-- Foreign keys
ALTER TABLE "Account"   ADD CONSTRAINT "Account_userId_fkey"   FOREIGN KEY ("userId")  REFERENCES "User"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE "Session"   ADD CONSTRAINT "Session_userId_fkey"   FOREIGN KEY ("userId")  REFERENCES "User"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE "Chat"      ADD CONSTRAINT "Chat_userId_fkey"      FOREIGN KEY ("userId")  REFERENCES "User"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE "Message"   ADD CONSTRAINT "Message_chatId_fkey"   FOREIGN KEY ("chatId")  REFERENCES "Chat"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE "CreditLog" ADD CONSTRAINT "CreditLog_userId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("userId")  REFERENCES "User"("id") ON DELETE CASCADE;

-- Indexes
CREATE INDEX "Chat_userId_idx"       ON "Chat"("userId");
CREATE INDEX "Chat_updatedAt_idx"    ON "Chat"("updatedAt");
CREATE INDEX "Message_chatId_idx"    ON "Message"("chatId");
CREATE INDEX "Message_createdAt_idx" ON "Message"("createdAt");
CREATE INDEX "CreditLog_userId_idx"  ON "CreditLog"("userId");
CREATE INDEX "CreditLog_type_idx"    ON "CreditLog"("type");
CREATE INDEX "CreditLog_createdAt_idx" ON "CreditLog"("createdAt");

import bcrypt           from 'bcryptjs'

const prisma = new PrismaClient()

async function main() {
  console.log('🌱 Seeding database...')

  // ── Piani ──────────────────────────────────
  await prisma.plan.upsert({
    where:  { name: 'free' },
    update: {},

      displayName: 'Free',

      credits:     100,
      features:    {
        maxChats:    5,
        models:      ['lara-base'],
        history:     '7 giorni',
        support:     'community',
      },
    },
  })

  await prisma.plan.upsert({
    where:  { name: 'pro' },
    update: {},
    create: {
      name:         'pro',
      displayName:  'Pro',
      price:        19.99,
      credits:      2000,
      stripePriceId: process.env.STRIPE_PRICE_PRO ?? '',
      features:     {
        maxChats:   -1,
        models:     ['lara

        history:    '90 giorni',
        support:    'email',

        export:     true,
      },
    },
  })

  await prisma.plan.upsert({
    where:  { name: 'enterprise' },
    update: {},
    create: {
      name:          'enterprise',
      displayName:   'Enterprise',
      price:         99.99,
      credits:       20000,
      stripePriceId: process.env.STRIPE_PRICE_ENTERPRISE ?? '',
      features:      {
        maxChats:    -1,
        models:      ['lara-base', 'lara-pro'],
        history:     'illimitata',
        support:     'priorità 24/7',
        tools:       true,
        export:      true,
        api:         true,
        whiteLabel:  true,
        team:        true,
      },
    },
  })

  // ── Admin user (solo dev) ──────────────────
  if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {
    const hashedPassword = await bcrypt.hash('Admin1234!', 12)

    await prisma.user.upsert({
      where:  { email: 'admin@aethersy.ai' },
      update: {},
      create: {
        name:    'Admin Aethersy',
        email:   'admin@aethersy.ai',
        password: hashedPassword,
        plan:     'enterprise',
        credits:  99999,
      },
    })

    console.log('✅ Admin user: admin@aethersy.ai / Admin1234!')
  }

  console.log('✅ Seed completato!')
}

main()
  .catch(e => {
    console.error('❌ Seed error:', e)
    process.exit(1)
  })
  .finally(() => prisma.$disconnect())

// ============================================
// src/middleware.ts
// ============================================

import { withAuth }       from 'next-auth/middleware'
import { NextResponse }   from 'next/server'
import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'

export default withAuth(
  function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
    const { pathname } = req.nextUrl
    const token        = (req as any).nextauth?.token

    // ── Redirect root → /chat se autenticato ──
    if (pathname === '/' && token) {
      return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/chat', req.url))
    }

    // ── Redirect /login se già autenticato ────
    if (pathname.startsWith('/login') && token) {
      return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/chat', req.url))
    }

    // ── Enterprise guard ──────────────────────
    if (pathname.startsWith('/api/enterprise') && token?.plan !== 'enterprise') {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Enterprise plan required' },
        { status: 403 }
      )
    }

    return NextResponse.next()
  },
  {
    callbacks: {
      authorized: ({ token, req }) => {
        const { pathname } = req.nextUrl

        // Rotte pubbliche
        const publicRoutes = ['/', '/login', '/register', '/pricing', '/about']
        if (publicRoutes.some(r => pathname.startsWith(r))) return true

        // API pubbliche
        if (pathname.startsWith('/api/auth'))    return true
        if (pathname.startsWith('/api/webhook')) return true
        if (pathname.startsWith('/api/public'))  return true

        // Tutto il resto → autenticazione richiesta
        return !!token
      },
    },
  }
)

    '/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|.*\\.png$|

import type { User, Chat, Message, CreditLog, Plan } from '@prisma/client'

// ─── Auth ────────────────────────────────────

export interface SessionUser {
  id:       string
  name:     string | null
  email:    string | null
  image:    string | null
  plan:     string
  credits:  number
}

export interface ExtendedSession {
  user:    SessionUser
  expires: string
}

// ─── Chat ────────────────────────────────────

export type MessageRole = 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'

export interface ChatMessage {
  id:        string
  role:      MessageRole
  content:   string
  createdAt: string
  model?:    string
  tokens?:   number
  cost?:     number
}

export interface ChatWithMessages extends Chat {
  messages: Message[]
}

export interface ChatPreview {
  id:          string
  title:       string
  lastMessage: string
  updatedAt:   string
  model:       string
}

// ─── API Requests ────────────────────────────

export interface SendMessageRequest {
  chatId:   string
  content:  string
  model:    string
  tools?:   string[]
  stream?:  boolean
}

export interface SendMessageResponse {
  message:     ChatMessage
  creditsUsed: number
  creditsLeft: number
}

export interface CreateChatRequest {
  title?: string
  model?: string
}

// ─── Models ──────────────────────────────────

export interface AIModel {
  id:          string
  name:        string
  description: string
  icon:        string
  plan:        'free' | 'pro' | 'enterprise'
  maxTokens:   number
  costPerMsg:  number
  badge?:      string
  tools?:      boolean
}

// ─── Plans ───────────────────────────────────

export interface PlanFeatures {
  maxChats:   number
  models:     string[]
  history:    string
  support:    string
  tools?:     boolean
  export?:    boolean
  api?:       boolean
  whiteLabel?: boolean
  team?:       boolean
}

export interface PlanWithFeatures extends Plan {
  features: PlanFeatures
}

// ─── Credits ─────────────────────────────────

export interface CreditTransaction {
  id:        string
  amount:    number
  type:      'credit' | 'debit'
  reason:    string
  createdAt: string
}

// ─── UI ──────────────────────────────────────

export type Theme      = 'light' | 'dark' | 'system'
export type SidebarTab = 'chats' | 'tools' | 'settings'

export interface Toast {
  id:       string
  type:     'success' | 'error' | 'warning' | 'info'
  title:    string
  message?: string
  duration?: number
}

export interface ModalState {
  isOpen:    boolean
  type:      string | null
  data?:     any
}

// ─── Tool Results ────────────────────────────

export interface ToolResult {
  tool:    string
  input:   Record<string, any>
  output:  any
  error?:  string
}

  // eslint-disable-next-line no-var
  var prisma: PrismaClient | undefined

  global.prisma ??
  new PrismaClient({
    log:
      process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development'
        ? ['query', 'error', 'warn']
        : ['error'],
  })

if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {
  global.prisma = prisma
}

// ============================================
// src/lib/auth.ts
// ============================================

import { NextAuthOptions }       from 'next-auth'
import { PrismaAdapter }         from '@auth/prisma-adapter'
import GoogleProvider            from 'next-auth/providers/google'
import GitHubProvider            from 'next-auth/providers/github'
import CredentialsProvider       from 'next-auth/providers/credentials'
import bcrypt                    from 'bcryptjs'
import { prisma }                from '@/lib/prisma'
import { CREDIT_ACTIONS
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 114 — AUTH CONFIG (fine) + AUTH HELPERS + OPENAI CLIENT**

```typescript
import { CREDIT_ACTIONS } from '@/lib/constants'

export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {
  adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma) as any,

  providers: [
    // ── Google ──────────────────────────────
    GoogleProvider({
      clientId:     process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID!,
      clientSecret: process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET!,
      allowDangerousEmailAccountLinking: true,
    }),

    // ── GitHub ──────────────────────────────
    GitHubProvider({
      clientId:     process.env.GITHUB_CLIENT_ID!,
      clientSecret: process.env.GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET!,
      allowDangerousEmailAccountLinking: true,
    }),

    // ── Credentials ─────────────────────────
    CredentialsProvider({
      name: 'credentials',
      credentials: {
        email:    { label: 'Email',    type: 'email'    },
        password: { label: 'Password', type: 'password' },
      },
      async authorize(credentials) {
        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) {
          throw new Error('Email e password richiesti')
        }

        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
          where: { email: credentials.email },
        })

        if (!user || !user.password) {
          throw new Error('Credenziali non valide')
        }

        const isValid = await bcrypt.compare(credentials.password, user.password)
        if (!isValid) {
          throw new Error('Credenziali non valide')
        }

        return {
          id:      user.id,
          email:   user.email,
          name:    user.name,
          image:   user.image,
          plan:    user.plan,
          credits: user.credits,
        }
      },
    }),
  ],

  session: {
    strategy: 'jwt',
    maxAge:   30 * 24 * 60 * 60, // 30 giorni
  },

  callbacks: {
    async jwt({ token, user, trigger, session }) {
      // Primo login
      if (user) {
        token.id      = user.id
        token.plan    = (user as any).plan    ?? 'free'
        token.credits = (user as any).credits ?? 0
      }

      // Update session manuale
      if (trigger === 'update' && session) {
        token.name    = session.name    ?? token.name
        token.plan    = session.plan    ?? token.plan
        token.credits = session.credits ?? token.credits
      }

      // Aggiorna credits dal DB ogni richiesta
      if (token.id) {
        const dbUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({
          where:  { id: token.id as string },
          select: { credits: true, plan: true },
        })
        if (dbUser) {
          token.credits = dbUser.credits
          token.plan    = dbUser.plan
        }
      }

      return token
    },

    async session({ session, token }) {
      if (session.user) {
        session.user.id      = token.id      as string
        session.user.plan    = token.plan    as string
        session.user.credits = token.credits as number
      }
      return session
    },

    async signIn({ user, account }) {
      // Bonus signup per OAuth
      if (account?.type === 'oauth') {
        const dbUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({
          where: { email: user.email! },
        })

        if (!dbUser) {
          // Nuovo utente → bonus applicato dopo creazione
          setTimeout(async () => {
            await prisma.user.update({
              where: { email: user.email! },
              data:  { credits: { increment: CREDIT_ACTIONS.SIGNUP_BONUS } },
            })
            await prisma.creditLog.create({
              data: {
                userId: user.id!,
                amount: CREDIT_ACTIONS.SIGNUP_BONUS,
                type:   'credit',
                reason: 'Bonus iscrizione',
              },
            })
          }, 2000)
        }
      }
      return true
    },
  },

  pages: {
    signIn:  '/login',
    signOut: '/login',
    error:   '/login',
  },

  events: {
    async createUser({ user }) {
      console.log(`✅ Nuovo utente: ${user.ema
Continuo! 🔥
