## 📋 COMANDI UTILI — CHEAT SHEET

```bash
# ═══════════════════════════════════
# SVILUPPO
# ═══════════════════════════════════

# Avvio dev server
npm run dev

# Build produzione
npm run build

# Avvio produzione
npm run start

# Type check
npm run type-check

# Linting
npm run lint

# ═══════════════════════════════════
# DATABASE
# ═══════════════════════════════════

# Crea migration
npx prisma migrate dev --name nome_migration

# Applica migrations
npx prisma migrate deploy

# Reset database (⚠️ cancella tutto)
npx prisma migrate reset

# Seed database
npx prisma db seed

# Apri Prisma Studio
npx prisma studio

# Genera Prisma Client
npx prisma generate

# Visualizza schema
npx prisma db pull

# ═══════════════════════════════════
# DOCKER
# ═══════════════════════════════════

# Avvia tutti i servizi
docker compose up -d

# Avvia solo DB e Redis
docker compose up -d postgres redis

# Stop tutti i servizi
docker compose down

# Stop + rimuovi volumi (⚠️)
docker compose down -v

# Logs tutti i servizi
docker compose logs -f

# Logs servizio specifico
docker compose logs -f app
docker compose logs -f postgres

# Rebuild immagine
docker compose build --no-cache

# Entra nel container
docker compose exec app sh
docker compose exec postgres psql -U aethersy_user -d a

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 146 — CHEAT SHEET (fine) + TROUBLESHOOTING COMPLETO**

```bash
# ═══════════════════════════════════
# DOCKER (fine)
# ═══════════════════════════════════

# Entra nel container PostgreSQL
docker compose exec postgres psql -U aethersy_user -d aethersy_db

# Backup database
docker compose exec postgres pg_dump \
  -U aethersy_user aethersy_db > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d).sql

# Restore database
docker compose exec -T postgres psql \
  -U aethersy_user -d aethersy_db < backup_20240101.sql

# Stato containers
docker compose ps

# Utilizzo risorse
docker stats

# ═══════════════════════════════════
# STRIPE
# ═══════════════════════════════════

# Ascolta webhook in locale
stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/webhooks/stripe

# Testa evento specifico
stripe trigger checkout.session.completed
stripe trigger invoice.payment_succeeded
stripe trigger customer.subscription.deleted

# Lista prodotti
stripe products list

# Lista prezzi
stripe prices list

# ═══════════════════════════════════
# GIT
# ═══════════════════════════════════

# Setup iniziale
git init
git add .
git commit -m "feat: initial Aethersy setup"
git remote add origin https://github.com/tuonome/aethersy.git
git push -u origin main

# Branch per feature
git checkout -b feature/voice-input
git push origin feature/voice-input

# Merge con squash
git checkout main
git merge --squash feature/voice-input
git commit -m "feat: add voice input"

# Tag release
git tag -a v1.0.0 -m "Release v1.0.0"
git push origin v1.0.0

# ═══════════════════════════════════
# DEPLOYMENT
# ═══════════════════════════════════

# Deploy su VPS
./scripts/deploy.sh production

# Rollback
./scripts/deploy.sh rollback

# Check health
curl https://tuodominio.com/api/health

# Monitor logs produzione
ssh user@server "docker compose -f /app/docker-compose.yml logs -f"
```

---

## 🔧 TROUBLESHOOTING — PROBLEMI COMUNI

### ❌ Problema 1: Database connection refused
```bash
# Sintomo
Error: Can't reach database server at localhost:5432

# Soluzione
docker compose up -d postgres
sleep 5
npx prisma migrate deploy

# Se persiste
docker compose down -v
docker compose up -d postgres
npx prisma migrate reset
```

### ❌ Problema 2: NextAuth session error
```bash
# Sintomo
[next-auth][error][JWT_SESSION_ERROR]

# Soluzione
# 1. Verifica NEXTAUTH_SECRET in .env.local
openssl rand -base64 32  # genera nuovo secret

# 2. Verifica NEXTAUTH_URL
NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000  # dev
NEXTAUTH_URL=https://tuodominio.com # prod

# 3. Pulisci cookies browser e riprova
```

### ❌ Problema 3: OpenAI API error
```bash
# Sintomo
OpenAIError: 401 Incorrect API key

# Soluzione
# 1. Verifica chiave in .env.local
echo $OPENAI_API_KEY

# 2. Verifica crediti OpenAI
# https://platform.openai.com/usage

# 3. Verifica rate limits
# Sintomo 429: troppi requests → aggiungi retry logic
```

### ❌ Problema 4: Stripe webhook error
```bash
# Sintomo
Webhook signature verification failed

# Soluzione
# 1. In sviluppo: usa stripe CLI
stripe listen --forward-to localhost:3000/api/webhooks/stripe
# Copia il webhook secret che mostra nella console

# 2. In produzione: verifica endpoint su dashboard Stripe
# Settings → Webhooks → tuo endpoint → Signing secret
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET=whsec_xxxxx
```

### ❌ Problema 5: Build error TypeScript
```bash
# Sintomo
Type error: Property 'X' does not exist on type 'Y'

# Soluzione rapida (non per produzione)
# tsconfig.json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "strict": false  # ⚠️ solo temporaneo
  }
}

# Soluzione corretta
npx prisma generate  #

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

**PACCHETTO 147 — TROUBLESHOOTING (fine) + FILE .ENV.EXAMPLE COMPLETO + PRISMA SEED**

```bash
### ❌ Problema 5: Build error TypeScript (fine)

# Soluzione corretta
npx prisma generate  # rigenera types Prisma
npm run type-check   # identifica tutti gli errori
# Correggi uno per uno seguendo i messaggi

### ❌ Problema 6: Redis connection error
# Sintomo
Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:6379

# Soluzione
docker compose up -d redis

# Verifica connessione
docker compose exec redis redis-cli ping
# Risposta attesa: PONG

# Se usi Redis Cloud invece di locale
REDIS_URL=redis://default:password@host:port

### ❌ Problema 7: Out of memory Docker
# Sintomo
Container killed due to OOM

# Soluzione docker-compose.yml
services:
  app:
    mem_limit: 1g
    memswap_limit: 2g
  postgres:
    mem_limit: 512m
  redis:
    mem_limit: 256m

### ❌ Problema 8: CORS error API
# Sintomo
Access-Control-Allow-Origin error

# Soluzione — next.config.js
async headers() {
  return [
    {
      source: '/api/:path*',
      headers: [
        { key: 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin', value: '*' },
        { key: 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods', value: 'GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,OPTIONS' },
        { key: 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers', value: 'Content-Type, Authorization' },
      ],
    },
  ]
}

### ❌ Problema 9: Streaming non funziona
# Sintomo
AI response arriva tutta in una volta

# Soluzione — verifica headers
return new Response(stream, {
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',
    'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
    'Connection': 'keep-alive',
    'X-Accel-Buffering': 'no', // 👈 CRITICO per Nginx
  },
})

### ❌ Problema 10: Prisma P2002 unique constraint
# Sintomo
Unique constraint failed on the fields: ('email')

# Soluzione
try {
  await prisma.user.create({ data })
} catch (error) {
  if (error.code === 'P2002') {
    return { error: 'Email già registrata' }
  }
  throw error
}
```

**PACCHETTO 152 — SEED (fine) + PACKAGE.JSON + NEXT.CONFIG.JS COMPLETI**

```typescript
// prisma/seed.ts (fine)

  const demo = await prisma.user.upsert({
    where: { email: 'demo@aethersy.com' },
    update: {},
    create: {
      name: 'Demo User',
      email: 'demo@aethersy.com',
      password: demoPassword,
      role: 'USER',
      emailVerified: new Date(),
      planId: freePlanData!.id,
      credits: 50,
      creditsResetAt: new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000),
    },
  })
  console.log(`✅ Demo user creato: ${demo.email}`)

  // ─────────────────────────────────────
  // 6. CONVERSAZIONE DEMO
  // ─────────────────────────────────────
  const conversation = await prisma.conversation.create({
    data: {
      title: 'Prima conversazione demo',
      userId: demo.id,
      modelId: 'gpt-4o-mini',
      messages: {
        create: [
          {
            role: 'user',
            content: 'Ciao! Come puoi aiutarmi con il mio business?',
            tokens: 12,
            cost: 0.001,
          },
          {
            role: 'assistant',
            content: `Ciao! Sono Lara, la tua AI agent di Aethersy 🚀

Posso aiutarti con:
- **Business Strategy** → piani, analisi mercato, competitor
- **Marketing** → copy, social media, email campaigns  
- **SEO** → ottimizzazione contenuti, keyword research
- **Finance** → calcoli ROI, business plan, proiezioni
- **Coding** → sviluppo web, automazioni, integrazioni

Come possiamo iniziare?`,
            tokens: 89,
            cost: 0.004,
          },
        ],
      },
    },
  })
  console.log(`✅ Conversazione demo creata: ${conversation.id}`)

  console.log('\n🎉 Seed completato con successo!')
  console.log('─────────────────────────────────')
  console.log('👤 Admin:  admin@aethersy.com / Admin@2024!')
  console.log('👤 Demo:   demo@aethersy.com  / Demo@2024!')
  console.log('─────────────────────────────────')
}

main()
  .catch((e) => {
    console.error('❌ Seed error:', e)
    process.exit(1)
  })
  .finally(async () => {
    await prisma.$disconnect()
  })
```

```typescript
    ]);

    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        messages,
        pagination: {
          total,
          page,
          limit,
          pages:   Math.ceil(total / limit),
          hasMore: page * limit < total,
        },
        source: "db",
      },

    console.error("Chat GET error:", err);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: { code: "INTERNAL_ERROR", message: "Errore server" } },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}

// ─── DELETE — Cancella sessione ───────────────────────────────
export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId    = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const sessionId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get("sessionId");
  const all       = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get("all") === "true";

  try {
    if (all) {
      // Cancella tutta la storia
      await Promise.all([
        db.chatMessage.deleteMany({ where: { userId } }),
        redis.eval(
          `local keys = redis.call('keys', ARGV[1]) for i,k in ipairs(keys) do redis.call('del', k) end`,
          0,
          `session:${userId}:*`
        ),
      ]);

      return NextResponse.json(
        { message: "Tutta la cronologia cancellata" },
        { status: 200 }
      );
    }

    if (sessionId) {
      await Promise.all([
        db.chatMessage.deleteMany({ where: { userId, sessionId } }),
        redis.del(`session:${userId}:${sessionId}`),
      ]);

      return NextResponse.json(
        { message: `Sessione ${sessionId} cancellata` },
        { status: 200 }
      );
    }

    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: { code: "MISSING_PARAM", message: "Specifica sessionId o all=true" } },
      { status: 400 }
    );

  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Chat DELETE error:", err);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: { code: "INTERNAL_ERROR", message: "Errore server" } },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}
```

```typescript
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// lib/auth.ts
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
import { SignJWT, jwtVerify }  from "jose";
import { db }                  from "@/lib/db";
import { redis }               from "@/lib/redis";
import bcrypt                  from "bcryptjs";
import { randomBytes, createHash } from "crypto";

const JWT_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(process.env.JWT_SECRET!);

// ─── PASSWORD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function hashPassword(password: string): Promise<string> {
  return bcrypt.hash(password, 12);
}

export async function comparePassword(
  password: string,
  hash: string
): Promise<boolean> {
  return bcrypt.compare(password, hash);
}

// ─── ACCESS TOKEN ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function signAccessToken(
  payload: Record<string, unknown>,
  expiresIn: string = "15m"
): Promise<string> {
  return new SignJWT(payload)
    .setProtectedHeader({ alg: "HS256" })
    .setIssuedAt()
    .setExpirationTime(expiresIn)
    .setIssuer("aethersy")
    .setAudience("aethersy-api")
    .sign(JWT_SECRET);
}

export async function verifyAccessToken(token: string) {
  // ─── CHECK BLACKLIST ────────────────────────────────────────
  const isBlacklisted = await redis.get(`bl:at:${token}`);

```typescript
  if (isBlacklisted) {
    throw new Error("TOKEN_BLACKLISTED");
  }

  const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, JWT_SECRET, {
    issuer:   "aethersy",
    audience: "aethersy-api",
  });

  return payload;
}

// ─── REFRESH TOKEN ────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function createRefreshToken(
  userId:    string,
  userAgent?: string,
  ip?:        string,
  remember:   boolean = false
): Promise<string> {
  const raw    = randomBytes(64).toString("hex");
  const hashed = await hashToken(raw);

  const expiresAt = new Date(
    Date.now() + (remember
      ? 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30  // 30 giorni
      : 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 7)  // 7 giorni
  );

  await db.refreshToken.create({
    data: {
      token:     hashed,
      userId,
      expiresAt,
      userAgent: userAgent ?? null,
      ip:        ip        ?? null,
      revoked:   false,
    },
  });

  return raw; // restituisce il token in chiaro da mettere nel cookie
}

// ─── HASH TOKEN ───────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function hashToken(token: string): Promise<string> {
  return createHash("sha256").update(token).digest("hex");
}

// ─── CLEANUP SCADUTI ──────────────────────────────────────────
export async function cleanupExpiredTokens(): Promise<void> {
  await db.refreshToken.deleteMany({
    where: {
      OR: [
        { expiresAt: { lt: new Date() } },
        { revoked: true, updatedAt: { lt: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 7) } },
      ],
    },
  });
}

```typescript
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// lib/ratelimit.ts
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { redis }                     from "@/lib/redis";
import { Plan }                      from "@prisma/client";

// ─── PLAN LIMITS ──────────────────────────────────────────────
const RATE_LIMITS: Record<Plan, { requests: number; window: number }> = {
  FREE:       { requests: 10,  window: 60 },       // 10 req/min
  PRO:        { requests: 60,  window: 60 },        // 60 req/min
  ENTERPRISE: { requests: 300, window: 60 },        // 300 req/min
};

interface RateLimitResult {
  success:   boolean;
  limit:     number;
  remaining: number;
  reset:     number;
}

// ─── SLIDING WINDOW RATE LIMITER ──────────────────────────────
export async function checkRateLimit(
  identifier: string,
  plan:        Plan
): Promise<RateLimitResult> {
  const { requests, window } = RATE_LIMITS[plan];
  const key   = `rl:${identifier}`;
  const now   = Date.now();
  const start = now - window * 1000;

  // Pipeline Redis atomica
  const pipeline = redis.pipeline();
  pipeline.zremrangebyscore(key, 0, start);           // rimuovi vecchi
  pipeline.zadd(key, now, `${now}-${Math.random()}`); // aggiungi corrente
  pipeline.zcard(key);                                 // conta totale
  pipeline.expire(key, window);                        // reset TTL

  const results = await pipeline.exec();
  const count   = (results?.[2]?.[1] as number) ?? 0;

  return {
    success:   count <= requests,
    limit:     requests,
    remaining: Math.max(0, requests - count),
    reset:     Math.floor((now + window * 1000) / 1000),
  };
}

// ─── MIDDLEWARE WRAPPER ───────────────────────────────────────
export async function withRateLimit(
  req:        NextRequest,
  identifier: string,
  plan:        Plan,
  handler:    () => Promise<NextResponse>
): Promise<NextResponse> {
  const result = await checkRateLimit(identifier, plan);

  const headers = {
    "X

> Matthew:
.

> Lara AgentAIForce:
Continuo! 🔥

---

```typescript
    "X-RateLimit-Limit":     String(result.limit),
    "X-RateLimit-Remaining": String(result.remaining),
    "X-RateLimit-Reset":     String(result.reset),
    "X-RateLimit-Policy":    `${result.limit};w=60`,
  };

  if (!result.success) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        error: {
          code:    "RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED",
          message: `Troppe richieste. Limite: ${result.limit} req/min. Riprova dopo ${new Date(result.reset * 1000).toISOString()}`,
          retryAfter: result.reset,
        },
      },
      {
        status:  429,
        headers: {
          ...headers,
          "Retry-After": String(result.reset),
        },
      }
    );
  }

  const response = await handler();

  // Inietta headers rate limit nella response
  Object.entries(headers).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    response.headers.set(key, value);
  });

  return response;
}

// ─── IP-BASED LIMITER (per auth endpoints) ────────────────────
export async function checkIpRateLimit(
  ip:       string,
  action:   string,
  max:      number = 5,
  windowSec: number = 60 * 15  // 15 min default
): Promise<RateLimitResult> {
  const key   = `rl:ip:${action}:${ip}`;
  const now   = Date.now();
  const start = now - windowSec * 1000;

  const pipeline = redis.pipeline();
  pipeline.zremrangebyscore(key, 0, start);
  pipeline.zadd(key, now, `${now}-${Math.random()}`);
  pipeline.zcard(key);
  pipeline.expire(key, windowSec);

  const results = await pipeline.exec();
  const count   = (results?.[2]?.[1] as number) ?? 0;

  return {
    success:   count <= max,
    limit:     max,
    remaining: Math.max(0, max - count),
    reset:     Math.floor((now + windowSec * 1000) / 1000),
  };
}

// ─── PROGRESSIVE BACKOFF (per brute force) ───────────────────
export async function checkBruteForce(
  identifier: string,  // email o IP
  action:     string   // "login", "register", ecc.
): Promise<{ blocked: boolean; attempts: number; unlockAt?: number }> {
  const key      = `bf:${action}:${identifier}`;
  const attempts = await redis.incr(key);

  if (attempts === 1) {
    await redis.expire(key, 60 * 60); // 1 ora
  }

  // Progressive backoff
  if (attempts >= 10) {
    const lockKey  = `bf:lock:${action}:${identifier}`;
    const lockTime = Math.min(attempts * 60, 60 * 60); // max 1 ora
    await redis.setex(lockKey, lockTime, "1");

    return {
      blocked:  true,
      attempts,
      unlockAt: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + lockTime,
    };
  }

  const locked = await redis.get(`bf:lock:${action}:${identifier}`);
  if (locked) {
    const ttl = await redis.ttl(`bf:lock:${action}:${identifier}`);
    return {
      blocked:  true,
      attempts,
      unlockAt: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + ttl,
    };
  }

  return { blocked: false, attempts };
}

// ─── RESET BRUTE FORCE (dopo login ok) ───────────────────────
export async function resetBruteForce(
  identifier: string,
  action:     string
): Promise<void> {
  await Promise.all([
    redis.del(`bf:${action}:${identifier}`),
    redis.del(`bf:lock:${action}:${identifier}`),
  ]);
}
```

// ─── MODELLI DISPONIBILI ──────────────────────────────────────
export const MODELS = {
  MINI:   "gpt-4o-mini",
  GPT4O:  "gpt-4o",
  GPT35:  "gpt-3.5-turbo",
} as const;

export type ModelId = typeof MODELS[keyof typeof MODELS];

// ─── EMBEDDING ────────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function createEmbedding(text: string): Promise<number[]> {
  const response = await openai.embeddings.create({
    model: "text-embedding-3-small",
    input: text.slice(0, 8191), // max tokens
  });
  return response.data[0].embedding;
}

// ─── MODERAZIONE CONTENUTO ────────────────────────────────────
export async function moderateContent(
  input: string
): Promise<{ flagged: boolean; categories: Record<string, boolean> }> {
  const response = await openai.moderations.create({ input });
  const result   = response.results[0];

  return {
    flagged:    result.flagged,
    categories: result.categories as unknown as Record<string, boolean>,
  };
}

// ─── TOKEN ESTIMATOR ──────────────────────────────────────────
export function estimateTokens(text: string): number {
  // ~4 chars per token (stima veloce, non usa tiktoken)
  return Math.ceil(text.length / 4);
}

// ─── COMPLETION CON RETRY AUTOMATICO ─────────────────────────
export async function safeCompletion(
  options: OpenAI.Chat.ChatCompletionCreateParamsNonStreaming,
  retries: number = 3
): Promise<OpenAI.Chat.ChatCompletion | null> {
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < retries; attempt++) {
    try {
      return await openai.chat.completions.create(options);
    } catch (err: any) {
      if (err?.status === 429 && attempt < retries - 1) {
        // Exponential backoff
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000 * Math.pow(2, attempt)));
        continue;
      }
      throw err;
    }
  }
  return null;
}

// ─── FUNCTION CALLING HELPER ──────────────────────────────────
export async function callWithFunctions<T = unknown>(
  messages:  OpenAI.Chat.ChatCompletionMessageParam[],
  tools:     OpenAI.Chat.ChatCompletionTool[],
  model:     ModelId = MODELS.MINI
): Promise<{ content: string | null; toolCalls: T[] }> {
  const response = await openai.chat.completions.create({
    model,
    messages,
    tools,
    tool_choice: "auto",
  });

  const choice    = response.choices[0];
  const content   = choice.message.content;
  const toolCalls = (choice.message.tool_calls ?? []) as T[];

  return { content, toolCalls };
}

// ─── IMAGE GENERATION ─────────────────────────────────────────
export async function generateImage(
  prompt:  string,
  size:    "256x256" | "512x512" | "1024x1024" = "1024x1024",
  quality: "standard" | "hd"                   = "standard"
): Promise<string> {
  const response = await openai.images.generate({
    model:   "dall-e-3",
    prompt,
    n:       1,
    size,
    quality,
  });

  return response.data[0].url!;
}

// ─── AUDIO TRANSCRIPTION ──────────────────────────────────────
export async function transcribeAudio(
  file:     File | Blob,
  language: string = "it"
): Promise<string> {
  const response = await openai.audio.transcriptions.create({
    model:    "whisper-1",
    file:     file as File,
    language,
  });

  return response.text;
}

// ─── TEXT TO SPEECH ───────────────────────────────────────────
export async function textToSpeech(
  text:  string,
  voice: "alloy" | "echo" | "fable" | "onyx" | "nova" | "shimmer" = "nova"
): Promise<ArrayBuffer> {
  const response = await openai.audio

// lib/db.ts
import { PrismaClient } from "@prisma/client";

const globalForPrisma = globalThis as unknown as { prisma: PrismaClient };

export const db = globalForPrisma.prisma ?? new PrismaClient({
  log: process.env.NODE_ENV === "development" ? ["query", "error"] : ["error"],
});

if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") globalForPrisma.prisma = db;

// lib/redis.ts
import { Redis } from "@upstash/redis";

  url:   process.env.UPSTASH_REDIS_URL!,
  token: process.env.UPSTASH_REDIS_TOKEN!,
});

// lib/stripe.ts
import Stripe from "stripe";

export const stripe = new Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY!, {
  apiVersion: "2024-04-10",
  typescript:  true,
});

export const PLANS = {
  FREE:       { priceId: null,                                      credits: 100  },
  PRO:        { priceId: process.env.STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID!,         credits: 1000 },
  ENTERPRISE: { priceId: process.env.STRIPE_ENTERPRISE_PRICE_ID!,  credits: 9999 },
} as const;

## P11 — `middleware.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { verifyAccessToken }         from "@/lib/auth";

const PUBLIC = ["/api/auth/login", "/api/auth/register", "/api/auth/refresh", "/api/webhooks"];

export async function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = req.nextUrl;

  if (PUBLIC.some(p => pathname.startsWith(p))) return NextResponse.next();
  if (!pathname.startsWith("/api/")) return NextResponse.next();

  const token = req.headers.get("authorization")?.replace("Bearer ", "");
  if (!token) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Non autorizzato" }, { status: 401 });

  try {
    const payload = await verifyAccessToken(token);
    const res = NextResponse.next();
    res.headers.set("x-user-id",   payload.sub as string);
    res.headers.set("x-user-plan", payload.plan as string);
    res.headers.set("x-user-email",payload.email as string);
    return res;
  } catch {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Token non valido" }, { status: 401 });
  }
}

export const config = {
  matcher: ["/api/:path*"],
};
```

---

## P13 — `app/api/auth/register/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { hashPassword, createAccessToken, createRefreshToken } from "@/lib/auth";
import { checkIpRateLimit }          from "@/lib/ratelimit";
import { z }                         from "zod";

const schema = z.object({
  email:    z.string().email(),
  password: z.string().min(8).max(100),
  name:     z.string().min(2).max(50).optional(),
});

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const ip     = req.headers.get("x-forwarded-for") ?? "unknown";
  const limit  = await checkIpRateLimit(ip, "register", 5, 900);
  if (!limit.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Troppi tentativi" }, { status: 429 });

  const body   = await req.json();
  const parsed = schema.safeParse(body);
  if (!parsed.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: parsed.error.flatten() }, { status: 400 });

  const { email, password, name } = parsed.data;
  const exists = await db.user.findUnique({ where: { email } });
  if (exists) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email già registrata" }, { status: 409 });

  const user = await db.user.create({
    data: { email, name, passwordHash: await hashPassword(password) },
  });

  const accessToken  = await createAccessToken({ sub: user.id, email, plan: user.plan });
  const refreshToken = await createRefreshToken(user.id, req.headers.get("user-agent") ?? undefined, ip);

  const res = NextResponse.json({ accessToken, user: { id: user.id, email, name, plan: user.plan } }, { status: 201 });
  res.cookies.set("refresh_token", refreshToken, { httpOnly: true, secure: true, sameSite: "lax", path: "/api/auth", maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7 });
  return res;
}
```

## P14 — `app/api/auth/login/route.ts`

const schema = z.object({
  email:    z.string().email(),
  password: z.string().min(1),

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {

  if (!parsed.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: parsed.error.flatten() }, { status: 400 });

  const { email, password, remember } = parsed.data;
  const bf = await

  const bf = await checkBruteForce(email, "login");
  if (bf.blocked) return NextResponse.json({ error: `Account bloccato. Riprova dopo ${new Date(bf.unlockAt! * 1000).toLocaleTimeString()}` }, { status: 429 });

## P15 — `app/api/auth/refresh/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse }          from "next/server";
import { db }                                 from "@/lib/db";
import { createAccessToken, hashToken }       from "@/lib/auth";
import { redis }                              from "@/lib/redis";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const token = req.cookies.get("refresh_token")?.value;
  if (!token) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Token mancante" }, { status: 401 });

  const hashed  = await hashToken(token);
  const blocked = await redis.get(`rt:blacklist:${hashed}`);
  if (blocked)  return NextResponse.json({ error: "Token revocato" }, { status: 401 });

  const record = await db.refreshToken.findUnique({
    where: { token: hashed },
    include: { user: true },
  });

  if (!record || record.revoked || record.expiresAt < new Date())
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Token non valido" }, { status: 401 });

  // Rotate token
  await db.refreshToken.update({ where: { id: record.id }, data: { revoked: true } });
  await redis.setex(`rt:blacklist:${hashed}`, 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, "1");

  const { user } = record;
  const newRefresh  = await createRefreshToken(user.id, req.headers.get("user-agent") ?? undefined);
  const accessToken = await createAccessToken({ sub: user.id, email: user.email, plan: user.plan });

  const res = NextResponse.json({ accessToken });
  res.cookies.set("refresh_token", newRefresh, { httpOnly: true, secure: true, sameSite: "lax", path: "/api/auth", maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7 });
  return res;
}
```

## P16 — `app/api/auth/logout/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { hashToken }                 from "@/lib/auth";
import { redis }                     from "@/lib/redis";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const token = req.cookies.get("refresh_token")?.value;

  if (token) {
    const hashed = await hashToken(token);
    await Promise.all([
      db.refreshToken.updateMany({ where: { token: hashed }, data: { revoked: true } }),
      redis.setex(`rt:blacklist:${hashed}`, 60 * 60 * 24 * 7, "1"),
    ]);
  }

  const res = NextResponse.json({ success: true });
  res.cookies.delete("refresh_token");
  return res;
}
```

## P17 — `app/api/chat/route.

> Matthew:
.

> Lara AgentAIForce:
🔥

```typescript
// app/api/chat/route.ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse }  from "next/server";
import { db }                         from "@/lib/db";
import { openai, MODELS }             from "@/lib/openai";
import { checkCredits, deductCredits } from "@/lib/credits";
import { z }                          from "zod";

const schema = z.object({
  messages: z.array(z.object({ role: z.enum(["user","assistant","system"]), content: z.string() })).min(1),
  model:    z.enum([MODELS.MINI, MODELS.GPT4O]).default(MODELS.MINI),
  stream:   z.boolean().default(true),
});

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const body   = schema.safeParse(await req.json());
  if (!body.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: body.error.flatten() }, { status: 400 });

  const { messages, model, stream } = body.data;
  const ok = await checkCredits(userId, model);
  if (!ok) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Crediti esauriti" }, { status: 402 });

  if (!stream) {
    const res = await openai.chat.completions.create({ model, messages });
    const txt = res.choices[0].message.content ?? "";
    const tok = res.usage?.total_tokens ?? 0;
    await Promise.all([
      deductCredits(userId, model, tok),
      db.chatMessage.createMany({ data: [
        { userId, role: "user",      content: messages.at(-1)!.content, model, tokens: 0 },
        { userId, role: "assistant", content: txt, model, tokens: tok },
      ]}),
    ]);
    return NextResponse.json({ content: txt, tokens: tok });
  }

  // Streaming
  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const readable = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      let full = "", tok = 0;
      const s = await openai.chat.completions.create({ model, messages, stream: true });
      for await (const chunk of s) {
        const delta = chunk.choices[0]?.delta?.content ?? "";
        if (delta) { full += delta; controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify({ delta })}\n\n`)); }
        if (chunk.usage) tok = chunk.usage.total_tokens;
      }
      controller.enqueue(encoder.encode("data: [DONE]\n\n"));
      controller.close();
      await Promise.all([
        deductCredits(userId, model, tok),
        db.chatMessage.createMany({ data: [
          { userId, role: "user",      content: messages.at(-1)!.content, model, tokens: 0 },
          { userId, role: "assistant", content: full, model, tokens: tok },
        ]}),
      ]);
    },
  });

  return new NextResponse(readable, {
    headers: { "Content-Type": "text/event-stream", "Cache-Control": "no-cache", "Connection": "keep-alive" },
  });
}
```

## P18 — `lib/credits.ts`

```typescript
import { db }    from "@/lib/db";
import { redis } from "@/lib/redis";

const COST: Record<string, number> = {
  "gpt-4o-mini": 1,
  "gpt-4o":      10,
};

export async function checkCredits(userId: string, model: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const cached = await redis.get(`credits:${userId}`);
  const credits = cached ? Number(cached) : (await db.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId }, select: { credits: true } }))?.credits ?? 0;
  return credits >= (COST[model] ?? 1);
}

export async function deductCredits(userId: string, model: string, tokens: number): Promise<void> {
  const cost = COST[model] ?? 1;
  await Promise.all([
    db.user.update({ where: { id: userId }, data: { credits: { decrement: cost } } }),
    redis.decrby(`credits:${userId}`, cost),
    db.usageLog.create({ data: { userId, action: `chat:${model}`, tokens, cost } }),
  ]);
}
```

---

## P19 — `lib/ratelimit.ts`

```typescript
import { redis } from "@/lib/redis";

export async function checkIpRateLimit(ip: string, action: string, max: number, window: number) {

> Matthew:
.

> Lara AgentAIForce:
🔥

```typescript
  const key   = `rl:${action}:${ip}`;
  const count = await redis.incr(key);
  if (count === 1) await redis.expire(key, window);
  return { success: count <= max, remaining: Math.max(0, max - count) };
}

export async function checkBruteForce(identifier: string, action: string) {
  const key    = `bf:${action}:${identifier}`;
  const count  = await redis.incr(key);
  if (count === 1) await redis.expire(key, 900);
  if (count >= 5) {
    const ttl = await redis.ttl(key);
    return { blocked: true, attempts: count, unlockAt: Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + ttl };
  }
  return { blocked: false, attempts: count, unlockAt: null };
}

export async function resetBruteForce(identifier: string, action: string) {
  await redis.del(`bf:${action}:${identifier}`);
}
```

## P20 — `app/api/stripe/checkout/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { stripe, PLANS }             from "@/lib/stripe";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { z }                         from "zod";

const schema = z.object({ plan: z.enum(["PRO", "ENTERPRISE"]) });

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const email  = req.headers.get("x-user-email")!;
  const body   = schema.safeParse(await req.json());
  if (!body.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Piano non valido" }, { status: 400 });

  const { plan } = body.data;
  const priceId  = PLANS[plan].priceId;

  let user = await db.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Utente non trovato" }, { status: 404 });

  // Crea customer Stripe se non esiste
  if (!user.stripeId) {
    const customer = await stripe.customers.create({ email, metadata: { userId } });
    user = await db.user.update({ where: { id: userId }, data: { stripeId: customer.id } });
  }

  const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
    customer:             user.stripeId!,
    mode:                 "subscription",
    payment_method_types: ["card"],
    line_items:           [{ price: priceId, quantity: 1 }],
    success_url:          `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_URL}/dashboard?upgraded=true`,
    cancel_url:           `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_URL}/pricing`,
    metadata:             { userId, plan },
  });

  return NextResponse.json({ url: session.url });
}
```

## P21 — `app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { stripe, PLANS }             from "@/lib/stripe";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import Stripe                        from "stripe";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const sig  = req.headers.get("stripe-signature")!;
  const body = await req.text();

  let event: Stripe.Event;
  try {
    event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(body, sig, process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET!);
  } catch {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Webhook invalido" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  switch (event.type) {
    case "checkout.session.completed": {
      const s    = event.data.object as Stripe.CheckoutSession;
      const plan = s.metadata?.plan as keyof typeof PLANS;
      await db.user.update({
        where: { stripeId: s.customer as string },
        data:  { plan, credits: PLANS[plan].credits },
      });
      break;
    }
    case "customer.subscription.deleted": {
      const s = event.data.object as Stripe.Subscription;
      await db.user.update({
        where: { stripeId: s.customer as string },
        data:  { plan: "FREE", credits: PLANS.FREE.credits },
      });
      break;
    }
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ received: true });
}

export const config = { api: { bodyParser: false } };
```

## P22 — `app/api/user/me/route.ts` + `app/api/user/credits/route.ts`

```typescript
// app/api/user/me/route.ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const user   = await db.user.findUnique({
    where:  { id: userId },
    select: { id: true, email: true, name: true, plan: true, credits: true, createdAt: true },
  });
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Utente non trovato" }, { status: 404 });
  return NextResponse.json(user);
}

export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const { name } = await req.json();
  const user = await db.user.update({ where: { id: userId }, data: { name } });
  return NextResponse.json({ id: user.id, name: user.name });
}

// app/api/user/credits/route.ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { redis }                     from "@/lib/redis";

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId  = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const cached  = await redis.get(`credits:${userId}`);
  if (cached)   return NextResponse.json({ credits: Number(cached) });
  const user    = await db.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId }, select: { credits: true } });
  if (!user)    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Utente non trovato" }, { status: 404 });
  await redis.setex(`credits:${userId}`, 60, user.credits);
  return NextResponse.json({ credits: user.credits });
}
```

## P23 — `app/api/user/history/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
  const page  = Number(searchParams.get("page")  ?? 1);
  const limit = Number(searchParams.get("limit") ?? 20);
  const skip  = (page - 1) * limit;

  const [messages, total] = await Promise.all([
    db.chatMessage.findMany({
      where:   { userId },
      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      skip, take: limit,
      select:  { id: true, role: true, content: true, model: true, tokens: true, createdAt: true },
    }),
    db.chatMessage.count({ where: { userId } }),
  ]);

  return NextResponse.json({ messages, total, page, pages: Math.ceil(total / limit) });
}

export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  await db.chatMessage.deleteMany({ where: { userId } });
  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}
```

## P24 — `lib/auth.ts` (completo)

```typescript
import { SignJWT, jwtVerify }  from "jose";
import { db }                  from "@/lib/db";
import bcrypt                  from "bcryptjs";
import { createHash }          from "crypto";

const ACCESS_SECRET  = new TextEncoder().encode(process.env.JWT_ACCESS_SECRET!);
const REFRESH_SECRET = new TextEncoder().encode(process.env.JWT_REFRESH_SECRET!);

export const hashPassword    = (p: string) => bcrypt.hash(p, 12);
export const verifyPassword  = (p: string, h: string) => bcrypt.compare(p, h);
export const hashToken       = (t: string) => createHash("sha256").update(t).digest("hex");

export async function createAccessToken(payload: Record<string, unknown>) {
  return new SignJWT(payload)
    .setProtectedHeader({ alg: "HS256" })
    .setIssuedAt()
    .setExpirationTime("15m")
    .sign(ACCESS_SECRET);
}

export async function verifyAccessToken(token: string) {
  const { payload } = await jwtVerify(token, ACCESS_SECRET);
  return payload;
}

export async function createRef

> Matthew:

> Lara AgentAIForce:
🔥

```typescript
export async function createRefreshToken(
  userId:    string,
  userAgent?: string,
  ip?:        string
): Promise<string> {
  const raw    = crypto.randomUUID() + crypto.randomUUID();
  const hashed = hashToken(raw);
  const exp    = new Date(Date.now() + 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 7); // 7 giorni

  await db.refreshToken.create({
    data: { token: hashed, userId, userAgent, ip, expiresAt: exp },
  });

  return raw;
}

export async function revokeAllTokens(userId: string): Promise<void> {
  await db.refreshToken.updateMany({ where: { userId }, data: { revoked: true } });
}
```

## P25 — `app/api/image/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse }    from "next/server";
import { generateImage }                from "@/lib/openai";
import { checkCredits, deductCredits }  from "@/lib/credits";
import { db }                           from "@/lib/db";
import { z }                            from "zod";

const schema = z.object({
  prompt:  z.string().min(3).max(1000),
  size:    z.enum(["256x256","512x512","1024x1024"]).default("1024x1024"),
  quality: z.enum(["standard","hd"]).default("standard"),
});

const COST = { "256x256": 5, "512x512": 10, "1024x1024": 20, "1024x1024:hd": 40 };

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const body   = schema.safeParse(await req.json());
  if (!body.success) return NextResponse.json({ error: body.error.flatten() }, { status: 400 });

  const { prompt, size, quality } = body.data;
  const costKey = quality === "hd" ? `${size}:hd` : size;
  const credits = COST[costKey as keyof typeof COST] ?? 20;

  const ok = await checkCredits(userId, "gpt-4o-mini");
  if (!ok) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Crediti insufficienti" }, { status: 402 });

  const url = await generateImage(prompt, size, quality);

  await Promise.all([
    deductCredits(userId, "gpt-4o-mini", credits),
    db.usageLog.create({ data: { userId, action: `image:${size}:${quality}`, tokens: credits, cost: credits } }),
  ]);

  return NextResponse.json({ url, credits });
}
```

// app/api/audio/transcribe/route.ts
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { transcribeAudio }           from "@/lib/openai";
import { deductCredits }             from "@/lib/credits";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId  = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const form    = await req.formData();

  await deductCredits(userId, "gpt-4o-mini", 5);
  return NextResponse.json({ text });
}

## P27 — `lib/openai.ts` (completo)

```typescript
import OpenAI from "openai";

export const openai = new OpenAI({ apiKey: process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY! });

export const MODELS = {
  MINI:  "gpt-4o-mini",
  GPT4O: "gpt-4o",
} as const;

export async function generateImage(
  prompt:  string,
  size:    "256x256" | "512x512" | "1024x1024" = "1024x1024",
  quality: "standard" | "hd"                   = "standard"
): Promise<string> {
  const res = await openai.images.generate({
    model:   "dall-e-3",
    prompt,
    n:       1,
    size,
    quality,
  });
  return res.data[0].url!;
}

export async function transcribeAudio(
  file: File,
  language = "it"
): Promise<string> {
  const res = await openai.audio.transcriptions.create({
    model:    "whisper-1",
    file,
    language,
  });
  return res.text;
}

export async function textToSpeech(
  text:  string,
  voice: "alloy" | "echo" | "fable" | "onyx" | "nova" | "shimmer" = "nova"
): Promise<ArrayBuffer> {
  const res = await openai.audio.speech.create({
    model: "tts-1",
    input: text,
    voice,
  });
  return res.arrayBuffer();
}
```

## P29 — `middleware.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { verifyAccessToken }         from "@/lib/auth";

const PUBLIC_ROUTES = [
  "/api/auth/register",
  "/api/auth/login",
  "/api/auth/refresh",
  "/api/stripe/webhook",
];

export async function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = req.nextUrl;

  // Passa le rotte pubbliche
  if (PUBLIC_ROUTES.some(r => pathname.startsWith(r)))
    return NextResponse.next();

  // Solo rotte /api/* protette
  if (!pathname.startsWith("/api/"))
    return NextResponse.next();

  const auth  = req.headers.get("authorization") ?? "";
  const token = auth.startsWith("Bearer ") ? auth.slice(7) : null;
  if (!token)  return NextResponse.json({ error: "Non autorizzato" }, { status: 401 });

  try {
    const payload = await verifyAccessToken(token);
    const res     = NextResponse.next();
    res.headers.set("x-user-id",    payload.sub as string);
    res.headers.set("x-user-email", payload.email as string);
    res.headers.set("x-user-plan",  payload.plan  as string);
    return res;
  } catch {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Token scaduto o non valido" }, { status: 401 });
  }
}

export const config = {
  matcher: ["/api/:path*"],
};
```

## P31 — `prisma/schema.prisma`

```prisma
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

model User {
  id            String         @id @default(cuid())
  email         String         @unique
  name          String?
  passwordHash  String?
  plan          String         @default("FREE")
  credits       Int            @default(100)
  stripeId      String?        @unique
  createdAt     DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt     DateTime       @updatedAt

  refreshTokens RefreshToken[]
  chatMessages  ChatMessage[]
  usageLogs     UsageLog[]

  @@index([email])
  @@index([stripeId])
}

model RefreshToken {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  token     String   @unique
  userId    String
  userAgent String?
  ip        String?
  revoked   Boolean  @default(false)
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([token])
}

model ChatMessage {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  role      String
  content   String   @db.Text
  model     String
  tokens    Int      @default(0)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([createdAt])
}

model UsageLog {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  action    String
  tokens    Int      @default(0)
  cost      Int      @default(0)
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([createdAt])
}
```

## P35 — `prisma/seed.ts`

```typescript
import { PrismaClient } from "@prisma/client";
import bcrypt           from "bcryptjs";

const db = new PrismaClient();

async function main() {
  // Admin user
  const hash = await bcrypt.hash("Admin@2024!", 12);
  await db.user.upsert({
    where:  { email: "admin@aethersy.com" },
    update: {},
    create: {
      email:        "admin@aethersy.com",
      name:         "Admin Aethersy",
      passwordHash: hash,
      plan:         "ENTERPRISE",
      credits:      999999,
    },
  });

  // Demo user
  const demoHash = await bcrypt.hash("Demo@2024!", 12);
  await db.user.upsert({
    where:  { email: "demo@aethersy.com" },
    update: {},
    create: {
      email:        "demo@aethersy.com",
      name:         "Demo User",
      passwordHash: demoHash,
      plan:         "PRO",
      credits:      2000,
    },
  });

  console.log("✅ Seed completato");
}

main()
  .catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })
  .finally(() => db.$disconnect());
```

## P39 — `app/api/admin/stats/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { redis }                     from "@/lib/redis";

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const plan = req.headers.get("x-user-plan");
  if (plan !== "ENTERPRISE")
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Accesso negato" }, { status: 403 });

  const cacheKey = "admin:stats";
  const cached   = await redis.get(cacheKey);
  if (cached)    return NextResponse.json(JSON.parse(cached));

  const [totalUsers, totalMessages, planStats, dailyUsage] = await Promise.all([
    db.user.count(),
    db.chatMessage.count(),
    db.user.groupBy({ by: ["plan"], _count: { id: true } }),
    db.usageLog.groupBy({
      by:      ["action"],
      _sum:    { tokens: true, cost: true },
      _count:  { id: true },
      orderBy: { _sum: { cost: "desc" } },
      take:    10,
    }),
  ]);

  const stats = {
    totalUsers,
    totalMessages,
    planStats: planStats.map(p => ({ plan: p.plan, count: p._count.id })),
    topActions: dailyUsage.map(d => ({
      action:    d.action,
      calls:     d._count.id,

> Matthew:

> Lara AgentAIForce:
🔥

```typescript
      tokens:    d._sum.tokens ?? 0,
      cost:      d._sum.cost   ?? 0,
    })),
    generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  };

  await redis.setex(cacheKey, 300, JSON.stringify(stats));
  return NextResponse.json(stats);
}

## P40 — `app/api/admin/users/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const plan = req.headers.get("x-user-plan");
  if (plan !== "ENTERPRISE")
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Accesso negato" }, { status: 403 });

  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
  const page    = Number(searchParams.get("page")   ?? 1);
  const limit   = Number(searchParams.get("limit")  ?? 20);
  const search  =        searchParams.get("search") ?? "";
  const skip    = (page - 1) * limit;

  const where = search
    ? { OR: [
        { email: { contains: search, mode: "insensitive" as const } },
        { name:  { contains: search, mode: "insensitive" as const } },
      ]}
    : {};

  const [users, total] = await Promise.all([
    db.user.findMany({
      where,
      skip,
      take:    limit,
      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      select:  {
        id:        true,
        email:     true,
        name:      true,
        plan:      true,
        credits:   true,
        createdAt: true,
        _count:    { select: { chatMessages: true, usageLogs: true } },
      },
    }),
    db.user.count({ where }),
  ]);

  return NextResponse.json({ users, total, page, pages: Math.ceil(total / limit) });
}

export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {
  const plan = req.headers.get("x-user-plan");
  if (plan !== "ENTERPRISE")
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Accesso negato" }, { status: 403 });

  const { userId, credits, newPlan } = await req.json();
  if (!userId)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "userId richiesto" }, { status: 400 });

  const updated = await db.user.update({
    where: { id: userId },
    data:  {
      ...(credits  !== undefined && { credits  }),
      ...(newPlan  !== undefined && { plan: newPlan }),
    },
    select: { id: true, email: true, plan: true, credits: true },
  });

  return NextResponse.json(updated);
}
```

## P41 — `lib/rate-limit.ts`

```typescript
import { redis } from "@/lib/redis";

interface RateLimitOptions {
  key:      string;
  limit:    number;
  window:   number; // secondi
}

interface RateLimitResult {
  allowed:    boolean;
  remaining:  number;
  resetAt:    number;
}

export async function rateLimit({
  key,
  limit,
  window,
}: RateLimitOptions): Promise<RateLimitResult> {
  const now     = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
  const redisKey = `rl:${key}`;

  const pipeline = redis.pipeline();
  pipeline.incr(redisKey);
  pipeline.ttl(redisKey);

  const [[, count], [, ttl]] = await pipeline.exec() as [[null, number], [null, number]];

  if (ttl === -1) await redis.expire(redisKey, window);

  const remaining = Math.max(0, limit - count);
  const resetAt   = now + (ttl > 0 ? ttl : window);

  return { allowed: count <= limit, remaining, resetAt };
}

export function rateLimitMiddleware(
  identifier: string,
  limit  = 60,
  window = 60
) {
  return rateLimit({ key: identifier, limit, window });
}
```

    case "warn":  console.warn(output);  break;
    case "debug":
      if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") console.debug(output);
      break;
    default:      console.log(output);
  }
}

  warn:  (msg: string, data?: unknown) => log("warn",  msg, data),
  error: (msg: string, data?: unknown) => log("error", msg, data),

## P43 — `app/api/health/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextResponse }  from "next/server";
import { db }            from "@/lib/db";
import { redis }         from "@/lib/redis";

export const dynamic = "force-dynamic";

interface ServiceStatus {
  status:  "ok" | "error";
  latency: number;
  error?:  string;
}

async function checkDb(): Promise<ServiceStatus> {
  const start = Date.now();
  try {
    await db.$queryRaw`SELECT 1`;
    return { status: "ok", latency: Date.now() - start };
  } catch (e) {
    return { status: "error", latency: Date.now() - start, error: String(e) };
  }
}

async function checkRedis(): Promise<ServiceStatus> {
  const start = Date.now();
  try {
    await redis.ping();
    return { status: "ok", latency: Date.now() - start };
  } catch (e) {
    return { status: "error", latency: Date.now() - start, error: String(e) };
  }
}

export async function GET() {
  const [db_status, redis_status] = await Promise.all([checkDb(), checkRedis()]);

  const allOk   = db_status.status === "ok" && redis_status.status === "ok";
  const status  = allOk ? 200 : 503;

  return NextResponse.json(
    {
      status:    allOk ? "healthy" : "degraded",
      version:   process.env.npm_package_version ?? "1.0.0",
      uptime:    process.uptime(),
      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      services:  { db: db_status, redis: redis_status },
    },
    { status }
  );
}
```

## P44 — `app/api/stripe/checkout/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { stripe, PLANS, PlanKey }    from "@/lib/stripe";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { z }                         from "zod";

const schema = z.object({
  plan: z.enum(["PRO", "ENTERPRISE"]),
});

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
  const email  = req.headers.get("x-user-email")!;
  const body   = schema.safeParse(await req.json());
  if (!body.success)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: body.error.flatten() }, { status: 400 });

  const { plan } = body.data;
  const planData  = PLANS[plan as PlanKey];
  if (!planData.priceId)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Piano non disponibile" }, { status: 400 });

  let user = await db.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Utente non trovato" }, { status: 404 });

  // Crea/recupera customer Stripe
  let customerId = user.stripeId;
  if (!customerId) {
    const customer = await stripe.customers.create({ email, metadata: { userId } });
    customerId = customer.id;
    await db.user.update({ where: { id: userId }, data: { stripeId: customerId } });
  }

  const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
    customer:             customerId,
    mode:                 "subscription",
    payment_method_types: ["card"],
    line_items: [{ price: planData.priceId, quantity: 1 }],
    success_url: `${process.env

> Matthew:
.

> Lara AgentAIForce:
🔥

```typescript
    success_url: `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_URL}/dashboard?upgrade=success&plan=${plan}`,
    cancel_url:  `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_URL}/dashboard?upgrade=cancelled`,
    metadata:    { userId, plan },
    subscription_data: {
      metadata: { userId, plan },
    },
    allow_promotion_codes: true,
  });

  return NextResponse.json({ url: session.url });
}
```

## P45 — `app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { stripe, PLANS, PlanKey }    from "@/lib/stripe";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { logger }                    from "@/lib/logger";
import Stripe                        from "stripe";

export const dynamic = "force-dynamic";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const body      = await req.text();
  const signature = req.headers.get("stripe-signature")!;

  let event: Stripe.Event;
  try {
    event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(
      body,
      signature,
      process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET!
    );
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error("Webhook signature verification failed", err);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid signature" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    switch (event.type) {

      case "checkout.session.completed": {
        const session  = event.data.object as Stripe.CheckoutSession;
        const userId   = session.metadata?.userId;
        const plan     = session.metadata?.plan as PlanKey;
        if (!userId || !plan) break;

        const planData = PLANS[plan];
        await db.user.update({
          where: { id: userId },
          data:  {
            plan,
            credits: { increment: planData.credits },
          },
        });
        logger.info("Checkout completed", { userId, plan });
        break;
      }

      case "customer.subscription.updated": {
        const sub      = event.data.object as Stripe.Subscription;
        const userId   = sub.metadata?.userId;
        const plan     = sub.metadata?.plan as PlanKey;
        if (!userId || !plan) break;

        await db.user.update({
          where: { id: userId },
          data:  { plan },
        });
        logger.info("Subscription updated", { userId, plan, status: sub.status });
        break;
      }

      case "customer.subscription.deleted": {
        const sub    = event.data.object as Stripe.Subscription;
        const userId = sub.metadata?.userId;
        if (!userId) break;

        await db.user.update({
          where: { id: userId },
          data:  { plan: "FREE", credits: 100 },
        });
        logger.info("Subscription cancelled", { userId });
        break;
      }

      case "invoice.payment_failed": {
        const invoice  = event.data.object as Stripe.Invoice;
        const subId    = invoice.subscription as string;
        const sub      = await stripe.subscriptions.retrieve(subId);
        const userId   = sub.metadata?.userId;
        logger.warn("Payment failed", { userId, invoiceId: invoice.id });
        break;
      }

      default:
        logger.debug("Unhandled webhook event", { type: event.type });
    }
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error("Webhook handler error", err);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Handler error" }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ received: true });
}
```

    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Nessun abbonamento attivo" },
      { status: 404 }
    );

  const session = await stripe.billingPortal.sessions.create({
    customer:

import Stripe from "stripe";

export const stripe = new Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY!, {
  apiVersion: "2024-04-10",
  typescript:  true,
});

export type PlanKey = "FREE" | "PRO" | "ENTERPRISE";

export const PLANS: Record<PlanKey, {
  name:     string;
  credits:  number;
  priceId:  string | null;
  price:    number;
  features: string[];
}> = {
  FREE: {
    name:     "Free",
    credits:  100,
    priceId:  null,
    price:    0,
    features: [
      "100 crediti/mese",
      "Chat AI base",
      "Accesso limitato agli strumenti",
    ],
  },
  PRO: {
    name:     "Pro",
    credits:  2000,
    priceId:  process.env.STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID ?? null,
    price:    29,
    features: [
      "2.000 crediti/mese",
      "Tutti gli strumenti AI",
      "Analisi competitor",
      "SEO content generator",
      "Supporto prioritario",
    ],
  },
  ENTERPRISE: {
    name:     "Enterprise",
    credits:  999999,
    priceId:  process.env.STRIPE_ENT_PRICE_ID ?? null,
    price:    99,
    features: [
      "Crediti illimitati",
      "API access",
      "Dashboard admin",
      "SLA garantito",
      "Onboarding dedicato",
    ],
  },
};

## P48 — `lib/db.ts`

```typescript
import { PrismaClient } from "@prisma/client";
import { logger }       from "@/lib/logger";

const globalForPrisma = globalThis as unknown as {
  prisma: PrismaClient | undefined;
};

export const db =
  globalForPrisma.prisma ??
  new PrismaClient({
    log: [
      { emit: "event", level: "query"   },
      { emit: "event", level: "error"   },
      { emit: "event", level: "warn"    },
    ],
  });

if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
  db.$on("query", (e) => logger.debug("DB Query", { query: e.query, duration: e.duration }));
  db.$on("error", (e) => logger.error("DB Error", { message: e.message }));
  db.$on("warn",  (e) => logger.warn ("DB Warn",  { message: e.message }));
  globalForPrisma.prisma = db;
}
```

## P49 — `lib/redis.ts`

```typescript
import IORedis from "ioredis";
import { logger } from "@/lib/logger";

const globalForRedis = globalThis as unknown as {
  redis: IORedis | undefined;
};

function createRedisClient(): IORedis {
  const client = new IORedis(process.env.REDIS_URL!, {
    maxRetriesPerRequest:    3,
    retryStrategy(times) {
      if (times > 5) return null;
      return Math.min(times * 200, 2000);
    },
    lazyConnect: true,
  });

  client.on("connect",        () => logger.info("Redis connected"));
  client.on("reconnecting",   () => logger.warn("Redis reconnecting..."));
  client.on("error",  (err)  => logger.error("Redis error", err));

  return client;
}

export const redis: IORedis =
  globalForRedis.redis ?? createRedisClient();

if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production")
  globalForRedis.redis = redis;
```

  SMART:   "gpt-4o",
  EMBED:   "text-

> Matthew:

> Lara AgentAIForce:

```typescript
  EMBED:   "text-embedding-3-small",
  VISION:  "gpt-4o",
} as const;

export type ModelKey = keyof typeof MODELS;

export function getModel(plan: string): string {
  switch (plan) {
    case "ENTERPRISE": return MODELS.SMART;
    case "PRO":        return MODELS.SMART;
    default:           return MODELS.FAST;
  }
}

export function estimateTokens(text: string): number {
  return Math.ceil(text.length / 4);
}

export function estimateCost(tokens: number, model: string): number {
  const pricing: Record<string, { input: number; output: number }> = {
    "gpt-4o":      { input: 0.000005, output: 0.000015 },
    "gpt-4o-mini": { input: 0.00000015, output: 0.0000006 },
  };
  const p = pricing[model] ?? pricing["gpt-4o-mini"];
  return tokens * p.input;
}
```

## P51 — `prisma/schema.prisma`

```prisma
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

enum Plan {
  FREE
  PRO
  ENTERPRISE
}

enum Role {
  USER
  ADMIN
}

model User {
  id           String    @id @default(cuid())
  email        String    @unique
  name         String?
  passwordHash String
  plan         Plan      @default(FREE)
  credits      Int       @default(100)
  stripeId     String?   @unique
  role         Role      @default(USER)
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt

  chatSessions ChatSession[]
  chatMessages ChatMessage[]
  usageLogs    UsageLog[]
  apiKeys      ApiKey[]

  @@index([email])
  @@index([stripeId])
}

model ChatSession {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  title     String   @default("Nuova conversazione")
  model     String   @default("gpt-4o-mini")
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt

  user     User          @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  messages ChatMessage[]

  @@index([userId])
}

model ChatMessage {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  sessionId String
  userId    String
  role      String
  content   String   @db.Text
  tokens    Int      @default(0)
  toolUsed  String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  session ChatSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user    User        @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([userId])
}

model UsageLog {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  action    String
  tokens    Int      @default(0)
  cost      Float    @default(0)
  metadata  Json?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([action])
  @@index([createdAt])
}

model ApiKey {
  id        String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  name      String
  key       String    @unique
  lastUsed  DateTime?
  expiresAt DateTime?
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())

  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([key])
  @@index([userId])
}

model Session {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  token     String   @unique
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([token])
  @@index([userId])
}
```

## P53 — `Dockerfile`

```dockerfile
# ── Stage 1: deps ──────────────────────────────────────────────
FROM node:20-alpine AS deps
WORKDIR /app

RUN apk add --no-cache libc6-compat openssl

COPY package.json package-lock.json ./
COPY prisma ./prisma/

RUN npm ci --legacy-peer-deps
RUN npx prisma generate

# ── Stage 2: builder ───────────────────────────────────────────
FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app

COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY . .

ENV NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1
ENV NODE_ENV=production

RUN npm run build

# ── Stage 3: runner ────────────────────────────────────────────
FROM node:20-alpine AS runner
WORKDIR /app

ENV NODE_ENV=production
ENV NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1

RUN addgroup --system --gid 1001 nodejs
RUN adduser  --system --uid 1001 nextjs

COPY --from=builder /app/public           ./public
COPY --from=builder /app/prisma           ./prisma
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/.next/standalone ./
COPY --from=builder --chown=nextjs:nodejs /app/.next/static     ./.next/static

USER nextjs

EXPOSE 3000
ENV PORT=3000
ENV HOSTNAME="0.0.0.0"

CMD ["node", "server.js"]
```

```nginx
  # ── Rate limiting ───────────────────────────────────────────
  limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=api:10m    rate=30r/m;
  limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=auth:10m   rate=10r/m;
  limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=general:10m rate=100r/m;

  # ── Upstream ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  upstream nextjs {
    server app:3000;
    keepalive 32;
  }

  # ── HTTP → HTTPS redirect ───────────────────────────────────
  server {
    listen      80;
    server_name _;
    return      301 https://$host$request_uri;
  }

  # ── HTTPS main server ───────────────────────────────────────
  server {
    listen              443 ssl http2;
    server_name         aethersy.ai www.aethersy.ai;

    ssl_certificate     /etc/nginx/ssl/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/nginx/ssl/privkey.pem;
    ssl_protocols       TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;
    ssl_ciphers         HIGH:!aNULL:!MD5;
    ssl_session_cache   shared:SSL:10m;
    ssl_session_timeout 10m;

    # ── Security headers ──────────────────────────────────────
    add_header X-Frame-Options          "SAMEORIGIN"           always;
    add_header X-Content-Type-Options   "nosniff"              always;
    add_header X-XSS-Protection         "1; mode=block"        always;
    add_header Referrer-Policy          "strict-origin"        always;
    add_header Permissions-Policy       "camera=(), mic=()"    always;
    add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000"    always;

    # ── Client limits ─────────────────────────────────────────
    client_max_body_size 10M;

    # ── Auth routes (strict rate limit) ───────────────────────
    location ~ ^/api/auth/ {
      limit_req zone=auth burst=5 nodelay;
      proxy_pass         http://nextjs;
      proxy_http_version 1.1;
      proxy_set_header   Upgrade          $http_upgrade;
      proxy_set_header   Connection       "upgrade";
      proxy_set_header   Host             $host;
      proxy_set_header   X-Real-IP        $remote_addr;
      proxy_set_header   X-Forwarded-For  $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
      proxy_set_header   X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }

    # ── API routes ────────────────────────────────────────────
    location /api/ {
      limit_req zone=api burst=20 nodelay;
      proxy_pass         http://nextjs;
      proxy_http_version 1.1;
      proxy_set_header   Upgrade          $http_upgrade;
      proxy_set_header   Connection       "upgrade";
      proxy_set_header   Host             $host;
      proxy_set_header   X-Real-IP        $remote_addr;
      proxy_set_header   X-Forwarded-For  $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
      proxy_set_header   X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
      proxy_read_timeout 120s;
      proxy_send_timeout 120s;
    }

    # ── Static assets ─────────────────────────────────────────
    location /_next/static/ {
      proxy_pass http://nextjs;
      proxy_cache_valid 200 365d;
      add_header Cache-Control "public, max-age=31536000, immutable";
    }

    # ── General ───────────────────────────────────────────────
    location / {
      limit_req zone=general burst=50 nodelay;
      proxy_pass         http://nextjs;
      proxy_http_version 1.1;
      proxy_set_header   Upgrade          $http_upgrade;
      proxy_set_header   Connection       "upgrade";
      proxy_set_header   Host             $host;
      proxy_set_header   X-Real-IP        $remote_addr;
      proxy_set_header   X-Forwarded-For  $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
      proxy_set_header   X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
  }
}

## P56 — `scripts/migrate.sh`

```bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

echo "🚀 Aethersy — DB Migration Script"
echo "─────────────────────────────────"

# Controlla variabili
if [[ -z "${DATABASE_URL:-}" ]]; then
  echo "❌ ERROR: DATABASE_URL non impostata"
  exit 1
fi

echo "📦 Generazione Prisma Client..."
npx prisma generate

echo "🔄 Applicazione migrations..."
npx prisma migrate deploy

echo "🌱 Seed database (se presente)..."
if [[ -f "prisma/seed.ts" ]]; then
  npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
fi

echo "✅ Migration completata con successo!"
```

## P57 — `prisma/seed.ts`

```typescript
import { db }   from "@/lib/db";
import bcrypt   from "bcryptjs";

async function main() {
  console.log("🌱 Seeding database...");

  // Admin user
  const adminHash = await bcrypt.hash("Admin@123!", 12);
  const admin = await db.user.upsert({
    where:  { email: "admin@aethersy.ai" },
    update: {},
    create: {
      email:        "admin@aethersy.ai",
      name:         "Admin Aethersy",
      passwordHash: adminHash,
      plan:         "ENTERPRISE",
      credits:      999999,
      role:         "ADMIN",
    },
  });
  console.log("✅ Admin creato:", admin.email);

  // Demo user
  const demoHash = await bcrypt.hash("Demo@123!", 12);
  const demo = await db.user.upsert({
    where:  { email: "demo@aethersy.ai" },
    update: {},
    create: {
      email:        "demo@aethersy.ai",
      name:         "Demo User",
      passwordHash: demoHash,
      plan:         "PRO",
      credits:      2000,
      role:         "USER",
    },
  });
  console.log("✅ Demo user creato:", demo.email);

  // Demo chat session
  const session = await db.chatSession.create({
    data: {
      userId: demo.id,
      title:  "Prima conversazione",
      model:  "gpt-4o-mini",
    },
  });

  await db.chatMessage.createMany({
    data: [
      {
        sessionId: session.id,
        userId:    demo.id,
        role:      "user",
        content:   "Ciao Lara! Come posso far crescere il mio business?",
        tokens:    15,
      },
      {
        sessionId: session.id,
        userId:    demo.id,
        role:      "

        tokens:    42,
        toolUsed:  null,
      },
    ],
  });
  console.log("✅ Demo chat session creata:", session.id);

  console.log("🎉 Seed completato!");
}

main()
  .catch((e) => {

    process.exit(1);

    await db.$disconnect();

## P58 — `lib/logger.ts`

```typescript
type LogLevel = "debug" | "info" | "warn" | "error";

interface LogEntry {
  level:     LogLevel;
  message:   string;
  timestamp: string;
  data?:     unknown;
}

function formatEntry(entry: LogEntry): string {
  const icons: Record<LogLevel, string> = {
    debug: "🔍",
    info:  "ℹ️ ",
    warn:  "⚠️ ",
    error: "❌",
  };
  return `${icons[entry.level]} [${entry.timestamp}] ${entry.message}${
    entry.data ? " | " + JSON.stringify(entry.data) : ""
  }`;
}

function log(level: LogLevel, message: string, data?: unknown) {
  const entry: LogEntry = {
    level,
    message,
    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
    data,
  };

  const formatted = formatEntry(entry);

  switch (level) {
    case "debug": console.debug(formatted); break;
    case "info":  console.info(formatted);  break;
    case "warn":  console.warn(formatted);  break;
    case "error": console.error(formatted); break;
  }

  // In produzione → invia a servizio esterno (Sentry, Logtail, ecc.)
  if (process.env.NODE_ENV === "production" && level === "error") {
    sendToExternalService(entry).catch(() => {});
  }
}

async function sendToExternalService(entry: LogEntry): Promise<void> {
  if (!process.env.LOG_WEBHOOK_URL) return;
  try {
    await fetch(process.env.LOG_WEBHOOK_URL, {
      method:  "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body:    JSON.stringify(entry),
    });
  } catch { /* silent fail */ }
}

export const logger = {
  debug: (msg: string, data?: unknown) => log("debug", msg, data),
  info:  (msg: string, data?: unknown) => log("info",  msg, data),
  warn:  (msg: string, data?: unknown) => log("warn",  msg, data),
  error: (msg: string, data?: unknown) => log("error", msg, data),
};
```

## P59 — `lib/credits.ts`

```typescript
import { db }     from "@/lib/db";
import { redis }  from "@/lib/redis";
import { logger } from "@/lib/logger";

const CREDIT_COSTS: Record<string, number> = {
  chat_message:       1,
  seo_content:        10,
  business_plan:      25,
  competitor_analysis:20,
  roi_calculation:    5,
  web_scrape:         8,
  stock_price:        1,
  crypto_price:       1,
  search_web:         3,
};

export function getCreditCost(action: string): number {
  return CREDIT_COSTS[action] ?? 1;
}

export async function checkCredits(
  userId: string,
  action: string
): Promise<{ ok: boolean; credits: number; cost: number }> {
  const cost = getCreditCost(action);

  // Cache check su Redis (TTL 60s)
  const cacheKey = `credits:${userId}`;
  const cached   = await redis.get(cacheKey);

  let credits: number;

  if (cached) {
    credits = parseInt(cached, 10);
  } else {
    const user = await db.user.findUnique({
      where:  { id: userId },
      select: { credits: true },
    });
    credits = user?.credits ?? 0;
    await redis.setex(cacheKey, 60, credits.toString());
  }

  return { ok: credits >= cost, credits, cost };
}

export async

```typescript
export async function deductCredits(
  userId: string,
  action: string,
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>
): Promise<{ success: boolean; remaining: number }> {
  const cost = getCreditCost(action);

  try {
    const user = await db.user.update({
      where: { id: userId },
      data:  { credits: { decrement: cost } },
      select: { credits: true },
    });

    // Invalida cache Redis
    await redis.del(`credits:${userId}`);

    // Log utilizzo
    await db.usageLog.create({
      data: {
        userId,
        action,
        tokens:   0,
        cost:     cost,
        metadata: metadata ?? {},
      },
    });

    logger.info("Credits deducted", { userId, action, cost, remaining: user.credits });

    return { success: true, remaining: user.credits };
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error("Failed to deduct credits", { userId, action, err });
    return { success: false, remaining: 0 };
  }
}

export async function addCredits(
  userId: string,
  amount: number,
  reason: string
): Promise<{ success: boolean; total: number }> {
  try {
    const user = await db.user.update({
      where:  { id: userId },
      data:   { credits: { increment: amount } },
      select: { credits: true },
    });

    await redis.del(`credits:${userId}`);

    await db.usageLog.create({
      data: {
        userId,
        action:   `credits_added:${reason}`,
        tokens:   0,
        cost:     -amount,
        metadata: { reason, amount },
      },
    });

    logger.info("Credits added", { userId, amount, reason, total: user.credits });

    return { success: true, total: user.credits };
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error("Failed to add credits", { userId, amount, err });
    return { success: false, total: 0 };
  }
}

export async function resetMonthlyCredits(userId: string): Promise<void> {
  const user = await db.user.findUnique({
    where:  { id: userId },
    select: { plan: true },
  });

  const planCredits: Record<string, number> = {
    FREE:       100,
    PRO:        2000,
    ENTERPRISE: 999999,
  };

  const credits = planCredits[user?.plan ?? "FREE"];

  await db.user.update({
    where: { id: userId },
    data:  { credits },
  });

  await redis.del(`credits:${userId}`);

  logger.info("Monthly credits reset", { userId, credits });
}
```
