## P60 — `lib/rate-limit.ts`

```typescript
import { redis }  from "@/lib/redis";
import { logger } from "@/lib/logger";

interface RateLimitConfig {
  windowMs:  number;   // finestra in ms
  max:       number;   // max richieste
  keyPrefix: string;
}

interface RateLimitResult {
  allowed:    boolean;
  remaining:  number;
  resetAt:    number;
  retryAfter: number;
}

const PRESETS: Record<string, RateLimitConfig> = {
  auth:    { windowMs: 60_000,  max: 10,  keyPrefix: "rl:auth"    },
  api:     { windowMs: 60_000,  max: 60,  keyPrefix: "rl:api"     },
  chat:    { windowMs: 60_000,  max: 30,  keyPrefix: "rl:chat"    },
  search:  { windowMs: 60_000,  max: 20,  keyPrefix: "rl:search"  },
  webhook: { windowMs: 60_000,  max: 100, keyPrefix: "rl:webhook" },
};

export async function rateLimit(
  identifier: string,
  preset: keyof typeof PRESETS = "api"
): Promise<RateLimitResult> {
  const config  = PRESETS[preset];
  const key     = `${config.keyPrefix}:${identifier}`;
  const now     = Date.now();
  const windowS = Math.ceil(config.windowMs / 1000);

  try {
    const pipeline = redis.pipeline();
    pipeline.incr(key);
    pipeline.expire(key, windowS);
    pipeline.ttl(key);

    const results = await pipeline.exec();
    const count   = (results?.[0]?.[1] as number) ?? 1;
    const ttl     = (results?.[2]?.[

> Matthew:
.

> Lara AgentAIForce:
🔥

```typescript
    const ttl     = (results?.[2]?.[1] as number) ?? windowS;
    const resetAt = now + ttl * 1000;

    const allowed   = count <= config.max;
    const remaining = Math.max(0, config.max - count);
    const retryAfter = allowed ? 0 : ttl;

    if (!allowed) {
      logger.warn("Rate limit exceeded", { identifier, preset, count, max: config.max });
    }

    return { allowed, remaining, resetAt, retryAfter };
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error("Rate limit error — allowing request", { identifier, err });
    // Fail open: se Redis è giù, lascia passare
    return { allowed: true, remaining: 1, resetAt: now + config.windowMs, retryAfter: 0 };
  }
}

export function rateLimitHeaders(result: RateLimitResult): Record<string, string> {
  return {
    "X-RateLimit-Remaining":  result.remaining.toString(),
    "X-RateLimit-Reset":      result.resetAt.toString(),
    ...(result.retryAfter > 0 && { "Retry-After": result.retryAfter.toString() }),
  };
}

## P61 — `middleware.ts`

```typescript
import { NextResponse }  from "next/server";
import type { NextRequest } from "next/server";
import { verifyToken }   from "@/lib/auth";

const PUBLIC_PATHS = [
  "/",
  "/login",
  "/register",
  "/forgot-password",
  "/reset-password",
  "/api/auth/login",
  "/api/auth/register",
  "/api/auth/refresh",
  "/api/stripe/webhook",
  "/pricing",
  "/about",
];

const ADMIN_PATHS = ["/admin", "/api/admin"];

function isPublic(pathname: string): boolean {
  return PUBLIC_PATHS.some((p) =>
    pathname === p || pathname.startsWith(p + "/")
  );
}

function isAdmin(pathname: string): boolean {
  return ADMIN_PATHS.some((p) =>
    pathname === p || pathname.startsWith(p + "/")
  );
}

export async function middleware(req: NextRequest) {
  const { pathname } = req.nextUrl;

  // ── Bypass public paths ──────────────────────────────────────
  if (isPublic(pathname)) return NextResponse.next();

  // ── Leggi token ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  const token =
    req.cookies.get("auth-token")?.value ??
    req.headers.get("authorization")?.replace("Bearer ", "");

  if (!token) {
    // API → 401
    if (pathname.startsWith("/api/")) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { success: false, error: "Non autorizzato" },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }
    // Pages → redirect login
    return NextResponse.redirect(new URL("/login", req.url));
  }

  // ── Verifica token ───────────────────────────────────────────
  const payload = await verifyToken(token);

  if (!payload) {
    if (pathname.startsWith("/api/")) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { success: false, error: "Token non valido o scaduto" },
        { status: 401 }
      );
    }
    const res = NextResponse.redirect(new URL("/login", req.url));
    res.cookies.delete("auth-token");
    return res;
  }

  // ── Admin guard ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (isAdmin(pathname) && payload.role !== "ADMIN") {
    if (pathname.startsWith("/api/")) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { success: false, error: "Accesso negato" },
        { status: 403 }
      );
    }
    return NextResponse.redirect(new URL("/dashboard", req.url));
  }

  // ── Inject headers ────────────────────────────────────────────
  const res = NextResponse.next();
  res.headers.set("x-user-id",   payload.userId);
  res.headers.set("x-user-role", payload.role);
  res.headers.set("x-user-plan", payload.plan);

  return res;
}

export const config = {
  matcher: [
    "/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|public/).*)",
  ],
};
```

```typescript
import Stripe from "stripe";

export const stripe = new Stripe(process.env.STRIPE_SECRET_KEY!, {
  apiVersion: "2024-06-20",
  typescript:  true,
});

// ── Piani ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const PLANS = {
  FREE: {
    name:        "Free",
    credits:     100,
    priceId:     null,
    price:       0,
    features:    ["100 crediti/mese", "Chat AI base", "3 tool disponibili"],
  },
  PRO: {
    name:        "Pro",
    credits:     2000,
    priceId:     process.env.STRIPE_PRO_PRICE_ID!,
    price:       29,
    features:    ["2.000 crediti/mese", "Tutti i tool AI", "Storico illimitato", "Supporto prioritario"],
  },
  ENTERPRISE: {
    name:        "Enterprise",
    credits:     999999,
    priceId:     process.env.STRIPE_ENT_PRICE_ID!,
    price:       99,
    features:    ["Crediti illimitati", "API access", "SLA garantito", "Onboarding dedicato"],
  },
} as const;

export type PlanKey = keyof typeof PLANS;

// ── Crea checkout session ──────────────────────────────────────
export async function createCheckoutSession(
  userId:     string,
  userEmail:  string,
  plan:       Exclude<PlanKey, "FREE">,
  returnUrl:  string
): Promise<string> {
  const priceId = PLANS[plan].priceId;

  const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
    mode:                "subscription",
    payment_method_types: ["card"],
    customer_email:      userEmail,
    line_items: [
      { price: priceId, quantity: 1 },
    ],
    metadata: {
      userId,
      plan,
    },
    success_url: `${returnUrl}/dashboard?upgrade=success&plan=${plan}`,
    cancel_url:  `${returnUrl}/pricing?upgrade=cancelled`,
    subscription_data: {
      metadata: { userId, plan },
    },
    allow_promotion_codes: true,
  });

  return session.url!;
}

// ── Crea portal session ────────────────────────────────────────
export async function createPortalSession(
  customerId: string,
  returnUrl:  string
): Promise<string> {
  const session = await stripe.billingPortal.sessions.create({
    customer:   customerId,
    return_url: `${returnUrl}/dashboard/settings`,
  });
  return session.url;
}

// ── Recupera subscription ──────────────────────────────────────
export async function getSubscription(
  subscriptionId: string
): Promise<Stripe.Subscription> {
  return stripe.subscriptions.retrieve(subscriptionId);
}

// ── Cancella subscription ──────────────────────────────────────
export async function cancelSubscription(
  subscriptionId: string
): Promise<Stripe.Subscription> {
  return stripe.subscriptions.update(subscriptionId, {
    cancel_at_period_end: true,
  });
}
```

## P63 — `app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts`

```typescript
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { stripe }                    from "@/lib/stripe";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { addCredits }                from "@/lib/credits";
import { logger }                    from "@/lib/logger";
import type Stripe                   from "stripe";

export const runtime = "nodejs";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const body      = await req.text();
  const signature = req.headers.get("stripe-signature")!;

  let event: Stripe.Event;

  try {
    event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(
      body,
      signature,
      process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET!
    );
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error("Webhook signature invalid", { err });
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid signature" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  logger.info("Stripe webhook received", { type: event.type });

  try {
    switch (event.type) {

      // ── Checkout completato ──────────────────────────────────
      case "checkout.session.completed": {
        const session  = event.data.object as Stripe.CheckoutSession;
        const userId   = session.metadata?.userId;
        const plan     = session.

> Matthew:
.

> Lara AgentAIForce:
🔥

```typescript
        const plan     = session.metadata?.plan as string;
        const customerId = session.customer as string;
        const subscriptionId = session.subscription as string;

        if (!userId || !plan) break;

        const planCredits: Record<string, number> = {
          PRO:        2000,
          ENTERPRISE: 999999,
        };

        await db.user.update({
          where: { id: userId },
          data: {
            plan:           plan as any,
            stripeCustomerId:    customerId,
            stripeSubscriptionId: subscriptionId,
            credits:        planCredits[plan] ?? 100,
          },
        });

        await addCredits(userId, planCredits[plan] ?? 0, `upgrade_to_${plan}`);

        logger.info("User upgraded", { userId, plan, customerId });
        break;
      }

      // ── Rinnovo mensile ──────────────────────────────────────
      case "invoice.payment_succeeded": {
        const invoice      = event.data.object as Stripe.Invoice;
        const subId        = invoice.subscription as string;
        const isBillingCycle = invoice.billing_reason === "subscription_cycle";

        if (!isBillingCycle) break;

        const user = await db.user.findFirst({
          where:  { stripeSubscriptionId: subId },
          select: { id: true, plan: true },
        });

        if (!user) break;

        const resetCredits: Record<string, number> = {
          PRO:        2000,
          ENTERPRISE: 999999,
        };

        await db.user.update({
          where: { id: user.id },
          data:  { credits: resetCredits[user.plan] ?? 100 },
        });

        logger.info("Credits reset on renewal", { userId: user.id, plan: user.plan });
        break;
      }

      // ── Pagamento fallito ─────────────────────────────────────
      case "invoice.payment_failed": {
        const invoice = event.data.object as Stripe.Invoice;
        const subId   = invoice.subscription as string;

        const user = await db.user.findFirst({
          where:  { stripeSubscriptionId: subId },
          select: { id: true },
        });

        if (!user) break;

        await db.user.update({
          where: { id: user.id },
          data:  { plan: "FREE", credits: 100 },
        });

        logger.warn("Payment failed — downgraded to FREE", { userId: user.id });
        break;
      }

      // ── Subscription cancellata ───────────────────────────────
      case "customer.subscription.deleted": {
        const sub    = event.data.object as Stripe.Subscription;
        const userId = sub.metadata?.userId;

        if (!userId) break;

        await db.user.update({
          where: { id: userId },
          data:  {
            plan:                 "FREE",
            credits:              100,
            stripeSubscriptionId: null,
          },
        });

        logger.info("Subscription cancelled — downgraded to FREE", { userId });
        break;
      }

      default:
        logger.debug("Unhandled webhook event", { type: event.type });
    }
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error("Webhook handler error", { type: event.type, err });
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Handler failed" }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ received: true });
}
```

// ── app/api/stripe/portal/route.ts ───────────────────────────
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createPortalSession }       from "@/lib/stripe";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;
    const user   = await db.user.findUnique({
      where:  { id: userId },
      select: { stripeCustomerId: true },
    });

    if (!user?.stripeCustomerId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { success: false, error: "Nessun abbonamento attivo" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const url = await createPortalSession(
      user.stripeCustomerId,
      process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_URL!
    );

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, url });
  } catch (err) {
    return NextResponse.json({ success: false, error: "Errore interno" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

// ── app/api/chat/route.ts ─────────────────────────────────────
import { NextRequest, NextResponse }  from "next/server";
import { openai }                     from "@/lib/openai";
import { db }                         from "@/lib/db";
import { checkCredits, deductCredits } from "@/lib/credits";
import { rateLimit, rateLimitHeaders } from "@/lib/rate-limit";
import { logger }                      from "@/lib/logger";
import { SYSTEM_PROMPT }               from "@/lib/system-prompt";
import { runTool }                     from "@/lib/tools/runner";
import type { ChatMessage }            from "@/types";

export const runtime = "nodejs";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const userId = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;

  // Rate limit
  const rl = await rateLimit(userId, "chat");
  if (!rl.allowed) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { success: false, error: "Troppe richieste. Riprova tra poco." },
      { status: 429, headers: rateLimitHeaders(rl) }
    );
  }

  // Crediti
  const { ok, credits, cost } = await checkCredits(userId, "chat_message");
  if (!ok) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { success: false, error: `Crediti insufficienti. Hai ${credits} crediti, servono ${cost}.` },
      { status: 402 }
    );
  }

  const { sessionId, message } = await req.json() as {
    sessionId: string;
    message:   string;
  };

  if (!message?.trim()) {
    return NextResponse.json({ success: false, error: "Messaggio vuoto" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    // Salva messaggio utente
    await db.chatMessage.create({
      data: { sessionId, userId, role: "user", content: message, tokens: 0 },
    });

    // Carica storico (ultimi 20 messaggi)
    const history = await db.chatMessage.findMany({
      where:   { sessionId },
      orderBy: { createdAt: "asc" },
      take:    20,
    });

    const messages = [
      { role: "system" as const, content: SYSTEM_PROMPT },
      ...history.map((m: ChatMessage) => ({
        role:    m.role as "user" | "assistant",
        content: m.content,
      })),
    ];

    // Prima call OpenAI con tool definitions
    const firstResponse = await openai.chat.completions.create({
      model:       "gpt-4o-mini",
      messages,

> Matthew:
.

> Lara AgentAIForce:
## BLOCCO 2 — Tool Runner + OpenAI Loop + Frontend Components

```typescript
      tools:       getToolDefinitions(),
      tool_choice: "auto",
      max_tokens:  2000,
      temperature: 0.7,
    });

    let finalContent = "";
    let totalTokens  = firstResponse.usage?.total_tokens ?? 0;
    const toolsUsed: string[] = [];

    const assistantMsg = firstResponse.choices[0].message;

    // ── Tool execution loop ───────────────────────────────────
    if (assistantMsg.tool_calls?.length) {
      const toolResults = await Promise.all(
        assistantMsg.tool_calls.map(async (tc) => {
          const args   = JSON.parse(tc.function.arguments);
          const result = await runTool(tc.function.name, args, userId);
          toolsUsed.push(tc.function.name);
          return {
            tool_call_id: tc.id,
            role:         "tool" as const,
            content:      JSON.stringify(result),
          };
        })
      );

      // Seconda call con risultati tool
      const secondResponse = await openai.chat.completions.create({
        model:    "gpt-4o-mini",
        messages: [...messages, assistantMsg, ...toolResults],
        max_tokens:  2000,
        temperature: 0.7,
      });

      finalContent  = secondResponse.choices[0].message.content ?? "";
      totalTokens  += secondResponse.usage?.total_tokens ?? 0;
    } else {
      finalContent = assistantMsg.content ?? "";
    }

    // Salva risposta assistant
    await db.chatMessage.create({
      data: {
        sessionId,
        userId,
        role:     "assistant",
        content:  finalContent,
        tokens:   totalTokens,
        toolUsed: toolsUsed[0] ?? null,
      },
    });

    // Deduce crediti
    await deductCredits(userId, "chat_message", { sessionId, toolsUsed });

    // Aggiorna timestamp sessione
    await db.chatSession.update({
      where: { id: sessionId },
      data:  { updatedAt: new Date() },
    });

    return NextResponse.json({
      success:   true,
      message:   finalContent,
      toolsUsed,
      tokens:    totalTokens,
    }, { headers: rateLimitHeaders(rl) });

  } catch (err) {
    logger.error("Chat error", { userId, sessionId, err });
    return NextResponse.json({ success: false, error: "Errore interno" }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

// ── lib/tools/runner.ts ───────────────────────────────────────
import { searchWeb }         from "./search-web";
import { getStockPrice }     from "./stock-price";
import { getCryptoPrice }    from "./crypto-price";
import { scrapeUrl }         from "./scrape-url";
import { analyzeCompetitors } from "./competitors";
import { generateSeoContent } from "./seo-content";
import { createBusinessPlan } from "./business-plan";
import { calculateRoi }      from "./calculate-roi";

const TOOL_MAP: Record<string, (args: any, userId: string) => Promise<any>> = {
  search_web:          (a, u) => searchWeb(a.query, a.deep, u),
  get_stock_price:     (a, u) => getStockPrice(a.symbol, u),
  get_crypto_price:    (a, u) => getCryptoPrice(a.coin, u),
  scrape_url:          (a, u) => scrapeUrl(a.url, u),
  analyze_competitors: (a, u) => analyzeCompetitors(a.business, a.aspect, u),
  generate_seo_content:(a, u) => generateSeoContent(a.topic, a.type, a.keywords, u),
  create_business_plan:(a, u) => createBusinessPlan(a.name, a.description, a.type, u),
  calculate_roi:       (a, u) => calculateRoi(a.investment, a.revenue, a.context, u),
};

export async function runTool(name: string, args: any, userId: string): Promise<any> {
  const fn = TOOL_MAP[name];
  if (!fn) return { error: `Tool "${name}" non trovato` };
  try {
    return await fn(args, userId);
  } catch (err: any) {
    return { error: err.message ?? "Tool error" };
  }
}

// ── components/chat/ChatWindow.tsx ────────────────────────────
"use client";

> Lara AgentAIForce:

```typescript
import { useState, useRef, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { Send, Loader2, Sparkles, StopCircle }       from "lucide-react";
import { Message }                                    from "./Message";
import { ToolBadge }                                  from "./ToolBadge";
import { useCredits }                                 from "@/hooks/useCredits";
import { useChatSession }                             from "@/hooks/useChatSession";
import type { ChatMessage }                           from "@/types";

interface ChatWindowProps {
  sessionId: string;
}

export function ChatWindow({ sessionId }: ChatWindowProps) {
  const [messages,  setMessages]  = useState<ChatMessage[]>([]);
  const [input,     setInput]     = useState("");
  const [loading,   setLoading]   = useState(false);
  const [toolsUsed, setToolsUsed] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const bottomRef  = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const inputRef   = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null);
  const abortRef   = useRef<AbortController | null>(null);
  const { credits, refresh: refreshCredits } = useCredits();
  const { loadHistory }                      = useChatSession(sessionId);

  // Carica storico al mount
  useEffect(() => {
    loadHistory().then(setMessages);
  }, [sessionId]);

  // Auto-scroll
  useEffect(() => {
    bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
  }, [messages]);

  // Auto-resize textarea
  useEffect(() => {
    const ta = inputRef.current;
    if (!ta) return;
    ta.style.height = "auto";
    ta.style.height = Math.min(ta.scrollHeight, 160) + "px";
  }, [input]);

  const sendMessage = useCallback(async () => {
    const text = input.trim();
    if (!text || loading) return;

    const userMsg: ChatMessage = {
      id:        crypto.randomUUID(),
      sessionId,
      role:      "user",
      content:   text,
      tokens:    0,
      toolUsed:  null,
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, userMsg]);
    setInput("");
    setLoading(true);
    setToolsUsed([]);

    // Placeholder assistant
    const placeholderId = crypto.randomUUID();
    setMessages((prev) => [
      ...prev,
      { id: placeholderId, sessionId, role: "assistant",
        content: "", tokens: 0, toolUsed: null,
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), isLoading: true },
    ]);

    abortRef.current = new AbortController();

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/chat", {
        method:  "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body:    JSON.stringify({ sessionId, message: text }),
        signal:  abortRef.current.signal,
      });

      const data = await res.json();

      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error ?? "Errore sconosciuto");
      }

      const assistantMsg: ChatMessage = {
        id:        crypto.randomUUID(),
        sessionId,
        role:      "assistant",
        content:   data.message,
        tokens:    data.tokens,
        toolUsed:  data.toolsUsed?.[0] ?? null,
        createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      };

      setMessages((prev) =>
        prev.map((m) => m.id === placeholderId ? assistantMsg : m)
      );
      setToolsUsed(data.toolsUsed ?? []);
      await refreshCredits();

    } catch (err: any) {
      if (err.name === "AbortError") {
        setMessages((prev) => prev.filter((m) => m.id !== placeholderId));
        return;
      }
      setMessages((prev) =>
        prev.map((m) =>
          m.id === placeholderId
            ? { ...m, content: `❌ ${err.message}`, isLoading: false }
            : m
        )
      );
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
      abortRef.current = null;
      inputRef.current?.focus();
    }
  }, [input, loading, sessionId]);

  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      sendMessage();
    }
  };

            onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
            placeholder="Scrivi un messaggio... (Invio per inviare, Shift+Invio per a capo)"
            rows={1}
            disabled={loading}

              {credits} crediti
            </span>
            {/* Stop / Send */}
            {loading ? (
              <button
                onClick={() => abortRef.current?.abort()}
                className="p-2 rounded-xl bg-red-500/20 hover:bg-red-500/30
                           text-red-400 transition"
              >
                <StopCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
            ) : (
              <button
                onClick={sendMessage}
                disabled={!input.trim()}
                className="p-2 rounded-xl bg-violet-600 hover:bg-violet-500
                           disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
                           text-white transition"
              >
                <Send className="w-4 h-4" />
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
        <p className="text-center text-xs text-white/20 mt-2">
          Lara può commettere errori. Verifica sempre le informazioni importanti.
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── components/chat/Message.tsx ───────────────────────────────
"use client";

import { memo }              from "react";
import ReactMarkdown         from "react-markdown";
import remarkGfm             from "remark-gfm";
import { Prism as SyntaxHighlighter } from "react-syntax-highlighter";
import { oneDark }           from "react-syntax-highlighter/dist/esm/styles/prism";
import { Bot, User, Loader2, Copy, Check } from "lucide-react";
import { useState }          from "react";
import type { ChatMessage }  from "@/types";

interface MessageProps { message: ChatMessage & { isLoading?: boolean } }

export const Message = memo(function Message({ message }: MessageProps) {
  const isUser = message.role === "user";
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);

  const copyContent = async () => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(message.content);
    setCopied(true);
    setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
  };

  return (
    <div className={`flex gap-3 group ${isUser ? "flex-row-reverse" : "flex-row"}`}>
      {/* Avatar */}
      <div className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0
        ${isUser
          ? "bg-violet-600"
          : "bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600 to-fuchsia-600"
        }`}>
        {isUser
          ? <User className="w-4 h-4 text-white" />
          : <Bot  className="w-4 h-4 text-white" />
        }
      </div>

      {/* Bubble */}
      <div className={`relative max-w-[80%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm
        ${isUser
          ? "bg-violet-600 text-white rounded-tr-sm"
          : "bg-white/5 text-white/90 rounded-tl-sm border border-white/10"
        }`}>

        {message.isLoading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-white/40">
            <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" />
            <span>Lara sta pensando...</span>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <ReactMarkdown
            remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}
            components={{
              code({ node, inline, className, children, ...props }: any) {
                const match = /language-(\w+)/.exec(className || "");
                return !inline && match ? (
                  <SyntaxHighlighter
                    style={oneDark}
                    language={match[1]}
                    PreTag="div"
                    className="rounded-lg my-2 text-xs"
                    {...props}
                  >
                    {String(children).replace(/\n$/, "")}
                  </SyntaxHighlighter>
                ) : (
                  <code className="bg-white/10 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-mono" {...props}>
                    {children}
                  </code>
                );
              },
              table({ children }) {
                return (
                  <div className="overflow-x-auto my-2">
                    <table className="w-full text-xs border-collapse">{children}</table>
                  </div>
                );
              },
              th({ children }) {
                return <th className="border border-white/20 px-3 py-1.5 bg-white/10 text-left font-semibold">{children}</th>;
              },
              td({ children }) {
                return <td className="border border-white/10 px-3 py-1.5">{children}</td>;
              },
              a({ href, children }) {
                return <a href={href} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"
                  className="text-violet-400 hover:text-violet-300 underline underline-offset-2">{children}</a>;
              },
              ul({ children })

const TOOL_META: Record<string, { label: string; icon: string; color: string }> = {

// ── hooks/useChatSession.ts ───────────────────────────────────
import { useCallback } from "react";
import type { ChatMessage } from "@/types";

export function useChatSession(sessionId: string) {
  const loadHistory = useCallback(async (): Promise<ChatMessage[]> => {
    try {
      const res  = await fetch(`/api/chat/history?sessionId=${sessionId}`);
      const data = await res.json();
      return data.success ? data.messages : [];
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  }, [sessionId]);

  const clearHistory = useCallback(async () => {
    await fetch(`/api/chat/history?sessionId=${sessionId}`, { method: "DELETE" });
  }, [sessionId]);

  return { loadHistory, clearHistory };
}

// ── hooks/useCredits.ts ───────────────────────────────────────
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";

interface CreditsState {
  credits:  number;
  plan:     string;
  loading:  boolean;
}

export function useCredits() {
  const [state, setState] = useState<CreditsState>({
    credits: 0,
    plan:    "FREE",
    loading: true,
  });

  const refresh = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const res  = await fetch("/api/user/credits");
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) {
        setState({ credits: data.credits, plan: data.plan, loading: false });
      }
    } catch {
      setState((s) => ({ ...s, loading: false }));
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => { refresh(); }, []);

  return { ...state, refresh };
}

// ── app/api/chat/history/route.ts ─────────────────────────────
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const sessionId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get("sessionId");
  const userId    = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;

  if (!sessionId) {
    return NextResponse.json({ success: false, error: "sessionId mancante" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const messages = await db.chatMessage.findMany({
    where:   { sessionId, userId },
    orderBy: { createdAt: "asc" },
    take:    50,
  });

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true, messages });
}

export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest) {
  const sessionId = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get("sessionId");
  const userId    = req.headers.get("x-user-id")!;

  if (!sessionId) {
    return NextResponse.json({ success: false, error: "sessionId mancante" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  await db.chatMessage.deleteMany({ where: { sessionId, userId } });
  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}

// ── types/index.ts ────────────────────────────────────────────
export interface ChatMessage {
  id:        string;
  sessionId: string;
  role:      "user" | "assistant" | "tool";
  content:   string;
  tokens:    number;
  toolUsed:  string | null;
  createdAt: string;
  isLoading?: boolean;
}

export interface ChatSession {
  id:        string;
  userId:    string;
  title:     string;
  createdAt: string;
  updatedAt: string;
}

export interface User {
  id:               string;
  email:            string;
  name:             string | null;
  plan:             "FREE" | "PRO" | "BUSINESS" | "ENTERPRISE";
  credits:          number;
  stripeCustomerId: string | null;
  createdAt:        string;
}

export type PlanKey = "FREE" | "PRO" | "BUSINESS" | "ENTERPRISE";

export interface ToolResult {
  success: boolean;
  data?:   any;
  error?:  string;
  cached?: boolean;
}

## BLOCCO FINALE — Sidebar + Session Manager + Dashboard

```typescript
// ── components/chat/Sidebar.tsx ───────────────────────────────
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import {
  Plus, MessageSquare, Trash2, Pencil,
  Check, X, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight,
  Sparkles, Settings, LogOut, CreditCard,
} from "lucide-react";
import { useRouter }       from "next/navigation";
import { useClerk }        from "@clerk/nextjs";
import { useCredits }      from "@/hooks/useCredits";
import type { ChatSession } from "@/types";

interface SidebarProps {
  currentSessionId: string;
  onSessionChange:  (id: string) => void;
}

export function Sidebar({ currentSessionId, onSessionChange }: SidebarProps) {
  const [sessions,    setSessions]    = useState<ChatSession[]>([]);
  const [collapsed,   setCollapsed]   = useState(false);
  const [editingId,   setEditingId]   = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [editTitle,   setEditTitle]   = useState("");
  const [loading,     setLoading]     = useState(false);
  const router                        = useRouter();
  const { signOut }                   = useClerk();
  const { credits, plan }             = useCredits();

  const fetchSessions = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const res  = await fetch("/api/chat/sessions");
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) setSessions(data.sessions);
    } catch { /* silent */ }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => { fetchSessions(); }, []);

  const createSession = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res  = await fetch("/api/chat/sessions", { method: "POST" });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) {
        setSessions((prev) => [data.session, ...prev]);
        onSessionChange(data.session.id);
      }
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const deleteSession = async (id: string, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    await fetch(`/api/chat/sessions/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" });
    setSessions((prev) => prev.filter((s) => s.id !== id));
    if (currentSessionId === id && sessions.length > 1) {
      const next = sessions.find((s) => s.id !== id);
      if (next) onSessionChange(next.id);
    }
  };

  const startEdit = (session: ChatSession, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setEditingId(session.id);
    setEditTitle(session.title);
  };

  const saveEdit = async (id: string) => {
    if (!editTitle.trim()) return;
    await fetch(`/api/chat/sessions/${id}`, {
      method:  "PATCH",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },

// ── app/api/chat/sessions/route.ts ────────────────────────────
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { auth }                      from "@clerk/nextjs";

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const { userId } = auth();
  if (!userId) return NextResponse.json({ success: false }, { status: 401 });

  const sessions = await db.chatSession.findMany({
    where:   { userId },
    orderBy: { updatedAt: "desc" },
    take:    50,
    select:  {
      id:        true,
      title:     true,
      createdAt: true,
      updatedAt: true,
    },
  });

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true, sessions });
}

  const count = await db.chatSession.count({

// ── app/api/chat/sessions/[id]/route.ts ───────────────────────
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { auth }                      from "@clerk/nextjs";

interface Params { params: { id: string } }

export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest, { params }: Params) {
  const { userId } = auth();
  if (!userId) return NextResponse.json({ success: false }, { status: 401 });

  const { title } = await req.json();

  if (!title || typeof title !== "string" || title.length > 100) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { success: false, error: "Titolo non valido" },
      { status: 400 }
    );
  }

  const session = await db.chatSession.updateMany({
    where: { id: params.id, userId },
    data:  { title: title.trim() },
  });

  if (session.count === 0) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { success: false, error: "Sessione non trovata" },
      { status: 404 }
    );
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}

export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest, { params }: Params) {
  const { userId } = auth();
  if (!userId) return NextResponse.json({ success: false }, { status: 401 });

  await db.chatSession.deleteMany({
    where: { id: params.id, userId },
  });

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}

// ── app/dashboard/page.tsx ────────────────────────────────────
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { Sidebar }             from "@/components/chat/Sidebar";
import { ChatWindow }          from "@/components/chat/ChatWindow";
import { useUser }             from "@clerk/nextjs";

export default function DashboardPage() {
  const { user, isLoaded }              = useUser();
  const [sessionId, setSessionId]       = useState<string>("");
  const [initializing, setInitializing] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isLoaded) return;
    initSession();
  }, [isLoaded]);

  const initSession = async () => {
    try {
      // Try to load existing sessions
      const res  = await fetch("/api/chat/sessions");
      const data = await res.json();

      if (data.success && data.sessions.length > 0) {
        setSessionId(data.sessions[0].id);
      } else {
        // Create first session
        const createRes  = await fetch("/api/chat/sessions", { method: "POST" });
        const createData = await createRes.json();
        if (createData.success) setSessionId(createData.session.id);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Session init error:", err);
    } finally {
      setInitializing(false);
    }
  };

  if (!isLoaded || initializing) {
    return (
      <div className="flex h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] items-center justify-center">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br
                          from-violet-600 to-fuchsia-600 flex items-center
                          justify-center animate-pulse">
            <span className="text-xl">✨</span>
          </div>
          <p className="text-white/40 text-sm animate-pulse">
            Caricamento Aethersy...
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen bg-[#0a0a0a] overflow-hidden">
      {/* Sidebar */}
      <Sidebar
        currentSessionId={sessionId}
        onSessionChange={setSessionId}
      />

      {/* Main Chat Area */}
      <main className="flex

// ── app/dashboard/layout.tsx ──────────────────────────────────
import { auth }        from "@clerk/nextjs";
import { redirect }    from "next/navigation";
import { db }          from "@/lib/db";

export default async function DashboardLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  const { userId } = auth();
  if (!userId) redirect("/sign-in");

  // Ensure user exists in DB
  await db.user.upsert({
    where:  { clerkId: userId },
    create: {
      clerkId: userId,
      email:   "",
      plan:    "FREE",
      credits: 50,
    },
    update: {},
  });

  return (
    <div className="h-screen overflow-hidden bg-[#0a0a0a]">
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

// ── prisma/schema.prisma ──────────────────────────────────────
generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

model User {
  id               String        @id @default(cuid())
  clerkId          String        @unique
  email            String
  name             String?
  plan             Plan          @default(FREE)
  credits          Int           @default(50)
  stripeCustomerId String?       @unique
  createdAt        DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime      @updatedAt
  sessions         ChatSession[]
}

model ChatSession {
  id        String        @id @default(cuid())
  userId    String
  title     String        @default("Nuova Chat")
  createdAt DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime      @updatedAt
  user      User          @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  messages  ChatMessage[]

  @@index([userId])
}

model ChatMessage {
  id        String      @id @default(cuid())
  sessionId String
  userId    String
  role      MessageRole
  content   String      @db.Text
  tokens    Int         @default(0)
  toolUsed  String?
  createdAt DateTime    @default(now())
  session   ChatSession @relation(fields: [sessionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([sessionId])
  @@index([userId])
}

model ToolCache {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  key       String   @unique
  value     Json
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([key])
  @@index([expiresAt])
}

enum Plan {
  FREE
  PRO
  BUSINESS
  ENTERPRISE
}

enum MessageRole {
  user
  assistant
  tool
}

// ── lib/db.ts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
import { PrismaClient } from "@prisma/client";

const globalForPrisma = globalThis as unknown as {
  prisma: PrismaClient | undefined;
};

export const db =
  globalForPrisma.prisma ??
  new PrismaClient({
    log: process.env.NODE_ENV === "development"
      ? ["query", "error", "warn"]
      : ["error"],
  });

if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
  globalForPrisma.prisma = db;
}

// ── lib/redis.ts ──────────────────────────────────────────────
import { Redis } from "@upstash/redis";

export const redis = new Redis({
  url:   process.env.UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL!,
  token: process.env.UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN!,
});

export async function getCached<T>(key: string): Promise<T | null> {
  try {
    return await redis.get<T>(key);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

export async function setCache(
  key:     string,
  value:   unknown,
  ttlSecs: number = 300
): Promise<void> {
  try {
    await redis.set(key, value, { ex: ttlSecs });
  } catch { /* silent */ }
}

export async function invalidateCache(pattern: string): Promise<void> {
  try {
    const keys = await redis.keys(pattern);
    if (keys.length > 0) {
      await redis.del(...keys);
    }
  } catch { /* silent */ }
}

// ── lib/rate-limit.ts ─────────────────────────────────────────
import { redis }       from "@/lib/redis";
import { NextRequest } from "next/server";

interface RateLimitConfig {
  requests: number;
  window:   number; // seconds
}

const PLAN_LIMITS: Record<string, RateLimitConfig> = {
  FREE:       { requests: 10,  window: 60 },
  PRO:        { requests: 60,  window: 60 },
  BUSINESS:   { requests: 200, window: 60 },
  ENTERPRISE: { requests: 500, window: 60 },
};

export async function checkRateLimit(
  userId: string,
  plan:   string = "FREE"
): Promise<{ allowed: boolean; remaining: number; reset: number }> {
  const config = PLAN_LIMITS[plan] ?? PLAN_LIMITS.FREE;
  const key    = `rate:${userId}:${Math.floor(Date.now() / (config.window * 1000))}`;

  const current = await redis.incr(key);

  if (current === 1) {
    await redis.expire(key, config.window);
  }

  const remaining = Math.max(0, config.requests - current);
  const reset      = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) + config.window;

  return {
    allowed:   current <= config.requests,
    remaining,
    reset,
  };
}

// ── lib/stripe.ts ─────────────────────────────────────────────
import Stripe from "stripe";

export async function createCheckoutSession(
  userId:       string,

  priceId:      string,
  successUrl:   string,
  cancelUrl:    string,
): Promise<string> {
  const session = await stripe.checkout.sessions.create({
    customer:             customerId ?? undefined,
    customer_creation:    customerId ? undefined : "always",
    mode:                 "subscription",
    payment_method_types: ["card"],
    line_items: [{ price: priceId, quantity: 1 }],

      trial_period_days:  7,

export async function createPortalSession(
  customerId: string,
  returnUrl:  string,
): Promise<string> {
  const session = await stripe.billingPortal.sessions.create({
    customer:   customerId,
    return_url: returnUrl,
  });
  return session.url;
}

// ── app/api/stripe/checkout/route.ts ──────────────────────────
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { auth }                      from "@clerk/nextjs";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { stripe, createCheckoutSession } from "@/lib/stripe";

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const { userId } = auth();
  if (!userId) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  const { priceId } = await req.json();
  if (!priceId) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing priceId" }, { status: 400 });

  const user = await db.user.findUnique({ where: { clerkId: userId } });
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "User not found" }, { status: 404 });

  const baseUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL!;

  const url = await createCheckoutSession(
    userId,
    user.stripeCustomerId ?? null,
    priceId,
    `${baseUrl}/dashboard?upgrade=success`,
    `${baseUrl}/pricing?upgrade=cancelled`,
  );

  return NextResponse.json({ url });
}

// ── app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts ───────────────────────────
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { stripe }                    from "@/lib/stripe";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import Stripe                        from "stripe";

const PLAN_MAP: Record<string, "FREE" | "PRO" | "BUSINESS" | "ENTERPRISE"> = {
  price_pro_monthly:        "PRO",
  price_pro_yearly:         "PRO",
  price_business_monthly:   "BUSINESS",
  price_business_yearly:    "BUSINESS",
  price_enterprise_monthly: "ENTERPRISE",
  price_enterprise_yearly:  "ENTERPRISE",
};

const CREDIT_MAP: Record<string, number> = {
  PRO:        1000,
  BUSINESS:   5000,
  ENTERPRISE: 999999,
};

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const body      = await req.text();
  const signature = req.headers.get("stripe-signature")!;

  let event: Stripe.Event;

  try {
    event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(
      body,
      signature,
      process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET!
    );
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Webhook signature verification failed:", err);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid signature" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    switch (event.type) {

      case "checkout.session.completed": {
        const session    = event.data.object as Stripe.CheckoutSession;
        const userId     = session.metadata?.userId;
        const customerId = session.customer as string;

        if (!userId) break;

        await db.user.update({
          where: { clerkId: userId },
          data:  { stripeCustomerId: customerId },
        });
        break;
      }

      case "customer.subscription.created":
      case "customer.subscription.updated": {
        const sub        = event.data.object as Stripe.Subscription;
        const customerId = sub.customer as string;
        const priceId    = sub.items.data[0]?.price.id;
        const plan       = PLAN_MAP[priceId] ?? "FREE";
        const credits    = CREDIT_MAP[plan]  ?? 50;

        await db.user.updateMany({
          where: { stripeCustomerId: customerId },
          data:  {
            plan,
            credits,
          },
        });
        break;
      }

      case "customer.subscription.deleted": {
        const sub        = event.data.object as Stripe.Subscription;
        const customerId = sub.customer as string;

> Matthew:
.

> Lara AgentAIForce:
🔥

```typescript
          where: { stripeCustomerId: customerId },
          data:  {
            plan:    "FREE",
            credits: 50,
          },
        });
        break;
      }

      case "invoice.payment_succeeded": {
        const invoice    = event.data.object as Stripe.Invoice;
        const customerId = invoice.customer as string;
        const priceId    = invoice.lines.data[0]?.price?.id;
        const plan       = PLAN_MAP[priceId ?? ""] ?? "FREE";
        const credits    = CREDIT_MAP[plan] ?? 50;

        // Rinnovo mensile → reset crediti
        if (invoice.billing_reason === "subscription_cycle") {
          await db.user.updateMany({
            where: { stripeCustomerId: customerId },
            data:  { credits },
          });
        }
        break;
      }

      case "invoice.payment_failed": {
        const invoice    = event.data.object as Stripe.Invoice;
        const customerId = invoice.customer as string;

        console.warn(`Payment failed for customer: ${customerId}`);
        // Potresti inviare email di avviso qui
        break;
      }
    }
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Webhook handler error:", err);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Webhook handler failed" }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ received: true });
}

// ── app/api/user/credits/route.ts ─────────────────────────────
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { auth }                      from "@clerk/nextjs";
import { db }                        from "@/lib/db";
import { getCached, setCache }       from "@/lib/redis";

export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {
  const { userId } = auth();
  if (!userId) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  const cacheKey = `user:credits:${userId}`;
  const cached   = await getCached<{ credits: number; plan: string }>(cacheKey);
  if (cached) return NextResponse.json({ success: true, ...cached });

  const user = await db.user.findUnique({
    where:  { clerkId: userId },
    select: { credits: true, plan: true },
  });

  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "User not found" }, { status: 404 });

  await setCache(cacheKey, { credits: user.credits, plan: user.plan }, 60);

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true, credits: user.credits, plan: user.plan });
}

// ── hooks/useCredits.ts ───────────────────────────────────────
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";

interface CreditsState {
  credits: number;
  plan:    string;
  loading: boolean;
}

export function useCredits() {
  const [state, setState] = useState<CreditsState>({
    credits: 0,
    plan:    "FREE",
    loading: true,
  });

  const fetchCredits = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const res  = await fetch("/api/user/credits");
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.success) {
        setState({ credits: data.credits, plan: data.plan, loading: false });
      }
    } catch {
      setState((prev) => ({ ...prev, loading: false }));
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchCredits();
    // Refresh ogni 2 minuti
    const interval = setInterval(fetchCredits, 120_000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [fetchCredits]);

  return { ...state, refresh: fetchCredits };
}

// ── hooks/useChat.ts ──────────────────────────────────────────
"use client";

import { useState, useCallback, useRef } from "react";

export interface Message {
  id:        string;
  role:      "user" | "assistant" | "tool";
  content:   string;
  toolUsed?: string;
  createdAt: Date;
  streaming?: boolean;
}

interface UseChatOptions {
  sessionId: string;
  onCreditsUpdate?: (credits: number) => void;
}

export function useChat({ sessionId, onCreditsUpdate }: UseChatOptions) {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
  const [loading,  setLoading]  = useState(false);
  const [error,    setError]    = useState<string | null>(null);
  const abortRef

> Matthew:

```typescript
  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController | null>(null);

  const sendMessage = useCallback(async (content: string) => {
    if (!content.trim() || loading) return;

    const userMessage: Message = {
      id:        crypto.randomUUID(),
      role:      "user",
      content:   content.trim(),
      createdAt: new Date(),
    };

    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, userMessage]);
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    // Placeholder streaming message
    const assistantId = crypto.randomUUID();
    const placeholder: Message = {
      id:        assistantId,
      role:      "assistant",
      content:   "",
      createdAt: new Date(),
      streaming: true,
    };
    setMessages((prev) => [...prev, placeholder]);

    abortRef.current = new AbortController();

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/chat", {
        method:  "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body:    JSON.stringify({ sessionId, message: content.trim() }),
        signal:  abortRef.current.signal,
      });

      if (!res.ok) {
        const err = await res.json();
        throw new Error(err.error ?? "Errore nella risposta");
      }

      if (!res.body) throw new Error("No response body");

      // ── Stream reader ────────────────────────────────────
      const reader  = res.body.getReader();
      const decoder = new TextDecoder();
      let   buffer  = "";
      let   full    = "";

      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;

        buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
        const lines = buffer.split("\n");
        buffer = lines.pop() ?? "";

        for (const line of lines) {
          if (!line.startsWith("data: ")) continue;
          const raw = line.slice(6).trim();
          if (raw === "[DONE]") break;

          try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);

            if (parsed.type === "token") {
              full += parsed.content;
              setMessages((prev) =>
                prev.map((m) =>
                  m.id === assistantId
                    ? { ...m, content: full, streaming: true }
                    : m
                )
              );
            }

            if (parsed.type === "tool_start") {
              setMessages((prev) =>
                prev.map((m) =>
                  m.id === assistantId
                    ? { ...m, toolUsed: parsed.tool, streaming: true }
                    : m
                )
              );
            }

            if (parsed.type === "credits") {
              onCreditsUpdate?.(parsed.remaining);
            }

            if (parsed.type === "done") {
              setMessages((prev) =>
                prev.map((m) =>
                  m.id === assistantId
                    ? { ...m, content: parsed.content ?? full, streaming: false }
                    : m
                )
              );
            }

            if (parsed.type === "error") {
              throw new Error(parsed.message);
            }
          } catch (parseErr) {
            // skip malformed chunks
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      if ((err as Error).name === "AbortError") return;

      const msg = (err as Error).message ?? "Errore imprevisto";
      setError(msg);
      setMessages((prev) =>
        prev.map((m) =>
          m.id === assistantId
            ? {
                ...m,
                content:  `❌ ${msg}`,
                streaming: false,
              }
            : m
        )
      );
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
      abortRef.current = null;
    }
  }, [sessionId, loading, onCreditsUpdate]);

  const stopGeneration = useCallback(() => {
    abortRef.current?.abort();
    setLoading(false);
    setMessages((prev) =>
      prev.map((m) =>
        m.streaming ? { ...m, streaming: false } : m
      )
    );
  }, []);

  const clearMessages = useCallback(() => {
    setMessages([]);

> Matthew:
.

> Lara AgentAIForce:
🔥

```typescript
            createdAt: new Date(m.createdAt),
            streaming: false,
          }))
        );
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Failed to load history:", err);
    }
  }, [sessionId]);

  return {
    messages,
    loading,
    error,
    sendMessage,
    stopGeneration,
    clearMessages,
    loadHistory,
  };
}

// ── components/chat/ChatWindow.tsx ────────────────────────────
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef, useState }  from "react";
import { useChat }                       from "@/hooks/useChat";
import { useCredits }                    from "@/hooks/useCredits";
import { MessageBubble }                 from "./MessageBubble";
import { ChatInput }                     from "./ChatInput";
import { CreditsBar }                    from "./CreditsBar";
import { WelcomeScreen }                 from "./WelcomeScreen";
import { ToolIndicator }                 from "./ToolIndicator";

interface ChatWindowProps {
  sessionId: string;
  userName:  string;
}

export function ChatWindow({ sessionId, userName }: ChatWindowProps) {
  const bottomRef                     = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const [showScrollBtn, setShowScroll] = useState(false);
  const scrollRef                     = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  const { credits, plan, refresh: refreshCredits } = useCredits();

  const {
    messages,
    loading,
    error,
    sendMessage,
    stopGeneration,
    clearMessages,
    loadHistory,
  } = useChat({
    sessionId,
    onCreditsUpdate: (c) => refreshCredits(),
  });

  // Load history when session changes
  useEffect(() => {
    clearMessages();
    loadHistory();
  }, [sessionId]);

  // Auto-scroll to bottom
  useEffect(() => {
    bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
  }, [messages]);

  // Show scroll-to-bottom button
  const handleScroll = () => {
    const el = scrollRef.current;
    if (!el) return;
    const fromBottom = el.scrollHeight - el.scrollTop - el.clientHeight;
    setShowScroll(fromBottom > 300);
  };

  const activeToolUsed = messages
    .filter((m) => m.streaming && m.toolUsed)
    .at(-1)?.toolUsed;

  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col h-full bg-[#0a0a0a]">

      {/* ── Header ── */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4
                      border-b border-white/5 bg-[#0f0f0f]">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br
                          from-violet-600 to-fuchsia-600
                          flex items-center justify-center">
            <span className="text-sm">✨</span>
          </div>
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-white font-semibold text-sm">Lara</h1>
            <p className="text-white/40 text-xs">AI Agent · Aethersy</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <CreditsBar credits={credits} plan={plan} />
      </div>

      {/* ── Messages ── */}
      <div
        ref={scrollRef}
        onScroll={handleScroll}
        className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-6 space-y-1
                   scrollbar-thin scrollbar-track-transparent
                   scrollbar-thumb-white/10"
      >
        {messages.length === 0 ? (
          <WelcomeScreen
            userName={userName}
            onPrompt={sendMessage}
          />
        ) : (
          messages.map((msg) => (
            <MessageBubble key={msg.id} message={msg} />
          ))
        )}

        {/* Tool indicator */}
        {activeToolUsed && (
          <ToolIndicator tool={activeToolUsed} />
        )}

        {/* Error */}
        {error && (
          <div className="flex justify-center">
            <div className="bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/20
                            text-red-400 text-sm px-4 py-2 rounded-xl">
              {error}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        <div ref={bottomRef} />
      </div>

      {/* ──

// ── components/chat/ChatInput.tsx ─────────────────────────────
"use client";

import { useState, useRef, KeyboardEvent } from "react";
import { Send, Square, Paperclip, Mic }    from "lucide-react";

interface ChatInputProps {
  onSend:      (message: string) => void;
  onStop:      () => void;
  loading:     boolean;
  disabled?:   boolean;
  placeholder?: string;
}

export function ChatInput({
  onSend,
  onStop,
  loading,
  disabled = false,
  placeholder = "Scrivi un messaggio...",
}: ChatInputProps) {
  const [value,  setValue]  = useState("");
  const textareaRef         = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null);

  const handleSend = () => {
    if (!value.trim() || disabled || loading) return;
    onSend(value.trim());
    setValue("");
    if (textareaRef.current) {
      textareaRef.current.style.height = "auto";
    }
  };

  const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      handleSend();
    }
  };

  const handleInput = () => {
    const el = textareaRef.current;
    if (!el) return;
    el.style.height = "auto";
    el.style.height = `${Math.min(el.scrollHeight, 200)}px`;
  };

  return (
    <div className={`flex items-end gap-3 bg-[#1a1a1a] border rounded-2xl px-4 py-3
                     transition-all duration-200
                     ${disabled
                       ? "border-white/5 opacity-60"
                       : "border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 focus-within:border-violet-500/50"
                     }`}>

      {/* Textarea */}
      <textarea
        ref={textareaRef}
        value={value}
        onChange={(e) => setValue(e.target.value)}
        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
        onInput={handleInput}
        disabled={disabled || loading}
        placeholder={placeholder}
        rows={1}
        className="flex-1 bg-transparent text-white text-sm
                   placeholder:text-white/30 resize-none outline-none
                   leading-relaxed max-h-[200px] scrollbar-none
                   disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
      />

      {/* Actions */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
        {loading ? (
          <button
            onClick={onStop}
            className="w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-red-500/20 hover:bg-red-500/30
                       border border-red-500/30 flex items-center justify-center
                       transition-all text-red-400 hover:text-red-300"
            title="Interrompi"
          >
            <Square size={14} />
          </button>
        ) : (
          <button
            onClick={handleSend}
            disabled={!value.trim() || disabled}
            className="w-8 h-8 rounded-xl bg-violet-600 hover:bg-

> Matthew:

}

// ── components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx ─────────────────────────
"use client";

import { Message }       from "@/hooks/useChat";
import { ToolBadge }     from "./ToolBadge";
import { MarkdownRenderer } from "./MarkdownRenderer";
import { formatDistanceToNow } from "date-fns";
import { it }            from "date-fns/locale";

interface MessageBubbleProps {
  message: Message;
}

export function MessageBubble({ message }: MessageBubbleProps) {
  const isUser = message.role === "user";

  return (
    <div className={`flex gap-3 px-2 py-1 group
                     ${isUser ? "flex-row-reverse" : "flex-row"}`}>

      {/* Avatar */}
      <div className={`w-7 h-7 rounded-xl shrink-0 flex items-center
                       justify-center text-xs font-medium mt-1
                       ${isUser
                         ? "bg-violet-600/30 text-violet-300"
                         : "bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600 to-fuchsia-600 text-white"
                       }`}>
        {isUser ? "U" : "✨"}
      </div>

      {/* Bubble */}
      <div className={`flex flex-col gap-1 max-w-[80%]
                       ${isUser ? "items-end" : "items-start"}`}>

        {/* Tool badge */}
        {message.toolUsed && !isUser && (
          <ToolBadge tool={message.toolUsed} />
        )}

        {/* Content */}
        <div className={`rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm leading-relaxed
                         ${isUser
                           ? "bg-violet-600/20 border border-violet-500/20 text-white"
                           : "bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-white/5 text-white/90"
                         }
                         ${message.streaming ? "animate-pulse-subtle" : ""}`}>
          {isUser ? (
            <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap">{message.content}</p>
          ) : (
            <MarkdownRenderer content={message.content} />
          )}

          {/* Streaming cursor */}
          {message.streaming && message.content && (
            <span className="inline-block w-0.5 h-4 bg-violet-400
                             ml-0.5 animate-blink align-middle" />
          )}

          {/* Empty streaming state */}
          {message.streaming && !message.content && (
            <div className="flex gap-1 items-center py-1">
              <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-violet-400
                               animate-bounce [animation-delay:0ms]" />
              <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-violet-400
                               animate-bounce [animation-delay:150ms]" />
              <span className="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-violet-400
                               animate-bounce [animation-delay:300ms]" />
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Timestamp */}
        {!message.streaming && (
          <span className="text-white/20 text-xs px-1
                           opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
            {formatDistanceToNow(message.createdAt, {
              addSuffix: true,
              locale:    it,
            })}
          </span>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

"use client";

import ReactMarkdown       from "react-markdown";

import { Copy, Check } from "lucide-react";

interface MarkdownRendererProps {
  content: string;
}

function CodeBlock({ language, code }: { language: string; code: string }) {
  const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false);

  const handleCopy = async () => {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(code);
    setCopied(true);
    setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000);
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative group/code my-3 rounded-xl overflow-hidden
                    border border-white/10">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2
                      bg-[#0f0f0f] border-b border-white/5">
        <span className="text-white/40 text-xs font-mono">{language || "code"}</span>
        <button
          onClick={handleCopy}
          className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-white/40
                     hover:text-white transition-colors text-xs"
        >
          {copied ? (
            <><Check size={12} className="text-green-400" />
              <span className="text-green-400">Copiato</span></>
          ) : (
            <><Copy size={12} /><span>Copia</span></>
          )}
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Code */}
      <SyntaxHighlighter
        language={language || "text"}
        style={oneDark}
        customStyle={{
          margin:     0,
          padding:    "1rem",
          background: "#0a0a0a",
          fontSize:   "0.8rem",
          lineHeight: "1.6",
        }}
        showLineNumbers={code.split("\n").length > 5}
      >
        {code}
      </SyntaxHighlighter>
    </div>
  );
}

export function MarkdownRenderer({ content }: MarkdownRendererProps) {
  return (
    <ReactMarkdown
      remarkPlugins={[remarkGfm]}
      components={{
        code({ node, inline, className, children, ...props }) {
          const match    = /language-(\w+)/.exec(className || "");
          const language = match?.[1] ?? "";
          const code     = String(children).replace(/\n$/, "");

          if (!inline && (match || code.includes("\n"))) {
            return <CodeBlock language={language} code={code} />;
          }

          return (
            <code
              className="bg-white/10 text-violet-300 px-1.5 py-0.5
                         rounded-md text-xs font-mono"
              {...props}
            >
              {children}
            </code>
          );
        },

        p: ({ children }) => (
          <p className="mb-3 last:mb-0 leading-relaxed">{children}</p>
        ),

        h1: ({ children }) => (
          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-3 mt-4">{children}</h1>
        ),
        h2: ({ children }) => (
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white mb-2 mt-4">{children}</h2>
        ),
        h3: ({ children }) => (
          <h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-white/90 mb-2 mt-3">{children}</h3>
        ),

        ul: ({ children }) => (
          <ul className="space-y-1.5 mb-3 ml-4">{children}</ul>
        ),
        ol: ({ children }) => (
          <ol className="space-y-1.5 mb-3 ml-4 list-decimal">{children}</ol>
        ),
        li: ({ children }) => (
          <li className="text-white/80 flex gap-2 items-start">
            <span className="text-violet-400 mt-1.5 shrink-0">▸</span>
            <span>{children}</span>
          </li>
        ),

        blockquote: ({ children }) => (
          <blockquote className="border-l-2 border-violet-500/50 pl-4
                                  text-white/60 italic my-3">
            {children}
          </blockquote>
        ),

        table: ({ children }) => (
          <div className="overflow-x-auto my-3 rounded-xl border border-white/10">
            <table className="w-full text-sm">{children}</table>
          </div>
        ),
        thead: ({ children }) => (
          <thead className="bg-white/5

// ── components/chat/ToolBadge.tsx ─────────────────────────────
"use client";

const TOOL_META: Record<string, { label: string; icon: string; color: string }> = {
  search_web:          { label: "Ricerca Web",     icon: "🔍", color: "blue"   },
  get_stock_price:     { label: "Prezzo Azioni",   icon: "📈", color: "green"  },
  get_crypto_price:    { label: "Prezzo Crypto",   icon: "🪙", color: "yellow" },
  scrape_url:          { label: "Analisi URL",     icon: "🌐", color: "purple" },
  analyze_competitors: { label: "Competitor",      icon: "🏆", color: "orange" },
  generate_seo_content:{ label: "Contenuto SEO",   icon: "✍️", color: "pink"   },
  create_business_plan:{ label: "Business Plan",   icon: "📋", color: "teal"   },
  calculate_roi:       { label: "Calcolo ROI",     icon: "💰", color: "green"  },
};

const COLOR_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  blue:   "bg-blue-500/10   border-blue-500/20   text-blue-400",
  green:  "bg-green-500/10  border-green-500/20  text-green-400",
  yellow: "bg-yellow-500/10 border-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400",
  purple: "bg-purple-500/10 border-purple-500/20 text-purple-400",
  orange: "bg-orange-500/10 border-orange-500/20 text-orange-400",
  pink:   "bg-pink-500/10   border-pink-500/20   text-pink-400",
  teal:   "bg-teal-500/10   border-teal-500/20   text-teal-400",
};

export function ToolBadge({ tool }: { tool: string }) {
  const meta   = TOOL_META[tool] ?? { label: tool, icon: "⚡", color: "purple" };
  const colors = COLOR_MAP[meta.color] ?? COLOR_MAP.purple;

  return (
    <div className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1
                     rounded-lg border text-xs font-medium
                     ${colors}`}>
      <span>{meta.icon}</span>
      <span>{meta.label}</span>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── components/chat/ToolIndicator.tsx ────────────────────────
"use client";
import { ToolBadge } from "./ToolBadge";

const TOOL_MESSAGES: Record<string, string> = {
  search_web:            "Sto cercando su internet...",
  get_stock_price:       "Recupero prezzo in tempo reale...",
  get_crypto_price:      "Recupero prezzo crypto...",
  scrape_url:            "Analizzo la pagina web...",
  analyze_competitors:   "Analizzo i competitor...",
  generate_seo_content:  "Genero contenuto SEO...",
  create_business_plan:  "Creo il business plan...",
  calculate_roi:         "Calcolo il ROI...",
};

export function ToolIndicator({ tool }: { tool: string }) {
  const message = TOOL_MESSAGES[tool] ?? "Elaboro dati...";
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2">
      <ToolBadge tool={tool} />
      <span className="text-white/40 text-xs animate-pulse">{message}</span>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── components/chat/CreditsBar.tsx ────────────────────────────
"use client";
import { Zap } from "lucide-react";

interface CreditsBarProps { credits: number; plan: string; }

export function CreditsBar({ credits, plan }: CreditsBarProps) {
  const max       = plan === "pro" ? 1000 : plan === "starter" ? 300 : 50;
  const pct       = Math.min((credits / max) * 100, 100);
  const color     = pct > 50 ? "bg-violet-500" : pct > 20 ? "bg-yellow-500" : "bg-red-500";

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
      <Zap size={12} className="text-violet-400" />
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
        <div className="w-24 h-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 overflow-hidden">
          <div className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all ${color}`} style={{ width: `${pct}%` }} />
        </div>
        <span className="text-white/30 text-[10px]">{credits} crediti · {plan}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ── hooks/useCredits.ts ───────────────────────────────────────
"use client";
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";

interface CreditsData { credits: number; plan: string; }

export function useCredits() {
  const [data, setData] = useState<CreditsData>({ credits: 0, plan: "free" });

  const refresh = useCallback(async () => {
    const res = await fetch("/api/credits");
    if (res.ok) setData(await res.json());
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => { refresh(); }, [refresh]);
  return { ...data, refresh };
}

// ── app/api/credits/route.ts ──────────────────────────────────
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { auth }         from "@/lib/auth";
import { db }           from "@/lib/db";

export async function GET() {
  const session = await auth();
  if (!session?.user?.id) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  const user = await db.user.findUnique({
    where:  { id: session.user.id },
    select: { credits: true, plan: true },
  });
  return NextResponse.json({ credits: user?.credits ?? 0, plan: user?.plan ?? "free" });
}

// ── tailwind.config.ts (animazioni custom) ────────────────────
import type { Config } from "tailwindcss";
export default {
  content: ["./app/**/*.{ts,tsx}", "./components/**/*.{ts,tsx}"],
  theme: {
    extend: {
      keyframes: {
        blink:        { "0%,100%": { opacity: "1" }, "50%": { opacity: "0" } },
        "pulse-subtle": { "0%,100%": { opacity: "1" }, "50%": { opacity: "0.7" } },
      },
      animation: {
        blink:         "blink 1s ease-in-out infinite",
        "pulse-subtle": "pulse-subtle 2s ease-in-out infinite",
      },
    },
  },
  plugins: [require("tailwind-scrollbar")],
} satisfies Config;
```
